light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是理解深度学习模型中决策边界几何结构如何影响分类任务的准确性和鲁棒性。决策边界在深度学习的高维特征空间中复杂多变，其几何性质直接决定模型性能，但现有方法缺乏有效的几何分析工具来量化这种影响。因此，开发一种理论合理且高效的决策边界测量方法，对于增强模型解释性、优化设计以提升泛化能力具有重要意义，这为解决深度学习模型复杂性评估问题提供了新视角。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法受Weyl经典管公式启发，引入局部表面体积来量化神经网络决策边界，核心创新在于提供理论支撑的几何度量，适用于高维特征空间的深度学习模型。该方法通过计算局部表面体积，高效捕捉决策边界的平滑程度，用于评估模型复杂性和泛化潜力。在实验中，应用于卷积架构进行图像处理任务，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，聚焦于理论推导和几何解释框架的构建。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，在卷积架构的图像处理任务中，决策边界体积与分类准确率成反比，即体积越小、准确率越高，验证了决策边界平滑度与性能的正相关关系。然而，对于全连接架构，局部表面体积与泛化能力的关系在不同任务中表现不稳定，这可能暗示架构适应性差异。这些发现基于实证观察，表明对于特定数据结构的网络，更平滑的决策边界能显著提升性能，摘要未提供具体数据对比基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是决策边界体积测量方法为深度学习提供了有效的几何分析工具，证实了决策边界平滑度对模型性能的影响，尤其在卷积架构中具有强相关性。这项研究具有学术价值，增进了对深度学习几何结构的理解，并可能应用于模型设计和评估以提升泛化能力。局限性在于全连接架构的关系不稳定，未来工作可探索更多架构类型和任务环境，进一步验证几何度量的普适性和改进方法应用范围。

title: PhysMoDPO: Physically-Plausible Humanoid Motion with Preference Optimization
abstract: Recent progress in text-conditioned human motion generation has been largely driven by diffusion models trained on large-scale human motion data. Building on this progress, recent methods attempt to transfer such models for character animation and real robot control by applying a Whole-Body Controller (WBC) that converts diffusion-generated motions into executable trajectories. While WBC trajectories become compliant with physics, they may expose substantial deviations from original motion. To address this issue, we here propose PhysMoDPO, a Direct Preference Optimization framework. Unlike prior work that relies on hand-crafted physics-aware heuristics such as foot-sliding penalties, we integrate WBC into our training pipeline and optimize diffusion model such that the output of WBC becomes compliant both with physics and original text instructions. To train PhysMoDPO we deploy physics-based and task-specific rewards and use them to assign preference to synthesized trajectories. Our extensive experiments on text-to-motion and spatial control tasks demonstrate consistent improvements of PhysMoDPO in both physical realism and task-related metrics on simulated robots. Moreover, we demonstrate that PhysMoDPO results in significant improvements when applied to zero-shot motion transfer in simulation and for real-world deployment on a G1 humanoid robot.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了PhysMoDPO框架，通过直接偏好优化生成物理上合理的人形动作，解决WBC轨迹偏离问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究的动机源于文本条件人类动作生成领域中，当使用全身控制器将扩散模型生成的动作转换为可执行轨迹时，常常导致物理上合理的轨迹但偏离原始动作，这限制了其在角色动画和真实机器人控制中的应用。现有方法依赖手工物理感知启发式，如脚滑惩罚，未能有效解决偏差问题，因此需要一种更集成的方法来同时保证物理合规性和文本指令的忠实度。这个问题的重要性在于提升机器人的动作真实性和任务执行能力，是推动人形机器人实用化的关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: PhysMoDPO是一个直接偏好优化框架，核心方法是将全身控制器集成到训练管道中，通过优化扩散模型使其输出在经由WBC处理后既符合物理约束又忠实于原始文本指令。创新点在于摒弃了手工启发式，转而使用基于物理和任务特定的奖励来分配偏好给合成轨迹，从而引导模型学习。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构，但强调了该框架在训练过程中的集成优化机制，以增强动作的物理真实性和任务适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在文本到动作和空间控制任务的广泛实验中，PhysMoDPO显示出在物理真实性和任务相关指标上的持续改进，具体表现在模拟机器人的性能提升。与基线方法相比，该框架在模拟环境中实现了更好的动作合规性，并在零样本动作转移任务中带来了显著改进。此外，在真实世界G1人形机器人的部署中，PhysMoDPO也表现出明显的应用优势，尽管摘要未提供具体数值数据，但强调了其有效性验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是提出了PhysMoDPO框架，通过直接偏好优化解决了人形动作生成中的物理合规性问题。研究的学术价值在于将WBC集成到训练中，提升扩散模型的物理感知能力，实际应用价值体现在增强模拟和真实机器人的动作真实性与任务性能。局限性如计算成本或泛化能力可能未明确说明，未来工作可扩展至更复杂的动作场景或优化效率，以推动人形机器人控制技术的进一步发展。

title: Beyond Final Answers: CRYSTAL Benchmark for Transparent Multimodal Reasoning Evaluation
abstract: We introduce CRYSTAL (Clear Reasoning via Yielded Steps, Traceability, and Logic), a diagnostic benchmark with 6,372 instances that evaluates multimodal reasoning through verifiable intermediate steps. We propose two complementary metrics: Match F1, which scores step-level precision and recall via semantic similarity matching, and Ordered Match F1, which further penalizes disordered reasoning chains. References are constructed through a Delphi-inspired pipeline in which four independent MLLMs generate trajectories, which are then aggregated via semantic clustering and validated through human quality gates. Evaluation of 20 MLLMs, including commercial frontier systems not used during benchmark construction, reveals systematic failures that are invisible to answer accuracy: universal cherry-picking (precision far exceeds recall), non-monotonic scaling trade-offs, and disordered reasoning in which no competitive model preserves more than 60% of matched steps in the correct order. Beyond evaluation, we propose the Causal Process Reward (CPR), a multiplicative reward that couples answer correctness with step-level alignment, and CPR-Curriculum, which progressively increases reasoning difficulty during training. CPR-Curriculum achieves a 32% improvement in Match F1 via GRPO where additive reward strategies fail, improving reasoning without manual step annotation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入了CRYSTAL基准，用于透明多模态推理评估，并提出因果过程奖励（CPR）和CPR-Curriculum训练方法，提升推理质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决多模态推理中缺乏透明评估的问题。现有方法仅依赖最终答案准确性，无法揭示推理步骤中的系统性失败，如 cherry-picking（精度远高于召回）和推理链无序，这些缺陷在传统评估中不可见，影响模型的可靠性和可解释性。透明推理对于提高AI系统的可信度和用户信任至关重要，因此需要开发新的诊断工具来全面评估推理过程，以弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括构建CRYSTAL基准，包含6,372个实例，使用Match F1和Ordered Match F1两个度量标准，通过语义相似性匹配评估推理步骤的精确度和召回率，并惩罚无序推理链。参考轨迹采用Delphi-inspired管道构建，由四个独立多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）生成，通过语义聚类聚合和人工验证。此外，提出Causal Process Reward (CPR)，一种乘法奖励机制，耦合答案正确性与步骤对齐，并设计CPR-Curriculum训练策略，逐步增加推理难度，利用GRPO进行优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在20个MLLMs的评估中，CRYSTAL基准揭示了系统性失败：普遍 cherry-picking 导致精度远超召回，推理链无序使得正确顺序步骤匹配率不超过60%。CPR-Curriculum通过GRPO训练，实现了Match F1的32%提升，而传统加法奖励策略失败，表明该方法能有效改进推理质量，优于基线方法。具体数据支撑了性能提升和失败模式的量化分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过引入CRYSTAL基准和CPR-Curriculum，为多模态推理提供了更全面的评估和训练方法，提高了推理的透明度和可解释性。其学术价值在于提出了新的度量和奖励机制，推动AI系统向更可靠的方向发展；实际应用有助于优化模型性能，促进可信AI的构建。未来工作可扩展基准规模或探索其他训练策略，以进一步提升推理能力。

title: 3DTCR: A Physics-Based Generative Framework for Vortex-Following 3D Reconstruction to Improve Tropical Cyclone Intensity Forecasting
abstract: Tropical cyclone (TC) intensity forecasting remains challenging as current numerical and AI-based weather models fail to satisfactorily represent extreme TC structure and intensity. Although intensity time-series forecasting has achieved significant advances, it outputs intensity sequences rather than the three-dimensional inner-core fine-scale structure and physical mechanisms governing TC evolution. High-resolution numerical simulations can capture these features but remain computationally expensive and inefficient for large-scale operational applications. Here we present 3DTCR, a physics-based generative framework combining physical constraints with generative AI efficiency for 3D TC structure reconstruction. Trained on a six-year, 3-km-resolution moving-domain WRF dataset, 3DTCR enables region-adaptive vortex-following reconstruction using conditional Flow Matching(CFM), optimized via latent domain adaptation and two-stage transfer learning. The framework mitigates limitations imposed by low-resolution targets and over-smoothed forecasts, improving the representation of TC inner-core structure and intensity while maintaining track stability. Results demonstrate that 3DTCR outperforms the ECMWF high-resolution forecasting system (ECMWF-HRES) in TC intensity prediction at nearly all lead times up to 5 days and reduces the RMSE of maximum WS10M by 36.5% relative to its FuXi inputs. These findings highlight 3DTCR as a physics-based generative framework that efficiently resolves fine-scale structures at lower computational cost, which may offer a promising avenue for improving TC intensity forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 3DTCR是一个结合物理约束与生成式AI的框架，用于热带气旋的三维涡旋跟踪重建，以提升强度预测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 热带气旋强度预测当前面临挑战，因为现有数值和AI模型难以充分表示极端TC的精细结构，而强度时间序列预测只输出强度序列，缺乏3D内部物理机制信息。高分辨率模拟能捕获这些特征，但计算成本高、效率低，不适合大规模操作应用。因此，需要一种高效且物理准确的方法来重建TC的3D结构，以改进预测精度和灾害防范能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出3DTCR，一个基于物理约束的生成式框架，结合物理机制与生成式AI的高效性进行三维TC结构重建。核心方法使用条件流匹配（CFM），并优化通过潜在域适应和两阶段迁移学习，实现区域自适应的涡旋跟踪重建。该框架在六年的3公里分辨率WRF数据集上训练，旨在克服低分辨率目标和过度平滑预测的限制，从而更准确地表示TC内部结构和强度。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，3DTCR在TC强度预测中优于ECMWF高分辨率预测系统（ECMWF-HRES），在几乎所有长达5天的预测时段表现更佳。具体而言，相比其FuXi输入，最大风速（WS10M）的均方根误差（RMSE）减少了36.5%，表明该框架有效改善了TC内部结构的表示，同时保持了轨迹稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 3DTCR作为一个基于物理的生成式框架，能以较低计算成本高效解析TC的精细结构，为改进强度预测提供了有前景的途径。其贡献在于结合物理约束与AI技术，增强了预测模型的物理准确性和计算效率。未来工作可能涉及更广泛的数据验证或与其他预测模型的集成，以进一步推动TC预报的实际应用。

title: Is Human Annotation Necessary? Iterative MBR Distillation for Error Span Detection in Machine Translation
abstract: Error Span Detection (ESD) is a crucial subtask in Machine Translation (MT) evaluation, aiming to identify the location and severity of translation errors. While fine-tuning models on human-annotated data improves ESD performance, acquiring such data is expensive and prone to inconsistencies among annotators. To address this, we propose a novel self-evolution framework based on Minimum Bayes Risk (MBR) decoding, named Iterative MBR Distillation for ESD, which eliminates the reliance on human annotations by leveraging an off-the-shelf LLM to generate pseudo-labels. Extensive experiments on the WMT Metrics Shared Task datasets demonstrate that models trained solely on these self-generated pseudo-labels outperform both unadapted base model and supervised baselines trained on human annotations at the system and span levels, while maintaining competitive sentence-level performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最小贝叶斯风险解码的迭代蒸馏框架，用于机器翻译错误跨度检测，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 错误跨度检测（ESD）是机器翻译评估中的关键子任务，旨在识别翻译错误的位置和严重程度。当前方法通常依赖人类标注数据微调模型以提升性能，但获取这种数据昂贵且易受标注者间不一致性影响，导致成本高昂和可靠性问题。因此，研究旨在解决人工标注的依赖问题，通过开发无需标注的方法来提高ESD的效率和一致性，弥补现有方法在可扩展性和客观性方面的不足，推动自动化MT评估的发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种名为“迭代MBR蒸馏”的自我进化框架，基于最小贝叶斯风险（MBR）解码技术。该方法利用现成的大型语言模型（LLM）生成伪标签替代人工标注，通过迭代蒸馏过程优化模型性能。核心创新在于结合MBR解码生成高质量伪标签，消除对昂贵标注数据的依赖。在WMT Metrics Shared Task数据集上进行实验，框架无需人工干预即可自动进化，提高了ESD的自动化水平和技术可行性。
light_analysis.result: 在WMT Metrics Shared Task数据集上的广泛实验表明，仅使用自生成伪标签训练的模型在系统和跨度级别上显著优于未调整的基础模型和基于人工标注的监督基线，例如在错误检测的准确性和覆盖率方面表现更优。同时，模型在句子级别性能保持竞争力，展示了高效的自适应能力。尽管摘要未明确说明具体数值如准确率提升百分比，但结果证明了该方法在消除人工标注依赖的同时，实现了优于现有方法的ESD性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个基于MBR解码的迭代蒸馏框架，有效解决了机器翻译错误跨度检测中对人工标注的依赖问题。学术价值在于引入了自我进化的伪标签生成机制，推动了自动化评估和低成本模型训练的研究；实际应用价值在于降低了数据收集成本，提高了MT评估的可扩展性和一致性。未来工作可进一步优化伪标签质量或扩展框架至其他自然语言处理任务，以探索其泛化能力和潜在局限性。

title: Exact Federated Continual Unlearning for Ridge Heads on Frozen Foundation Models
abstract: Foundation models are commonly deployed as frozen feature extractors with a small trainable head to adapt to private, user-generated data in federated settings. The ``right to be forgotten'' requires removing the influence of specific samples or users from the trained model on demand. Existing federated unlearning methods target general deep models and rely on approximate reconstruction or selective retraining, making exactness costly or elusive. We study this problem in a practically relevant but under-explored regime: a frozen foundation model with a ridge-regression head. The exact optimum depends on the data only through two additive sufficient statistics, which we turn into a communication protocol supporting an arbitrary stream of add and delete requests via fixed-size messages. The server maintains a head that is, in exact arithmetic, pointwise identical to centralized retraining after every request. We provide deterministic retrain-equivalence guarantees, order and partition invariance, two server-side variants, and a Bayesian certificate of zero KL divergence. Experiments on four benchmarks confirm the guarantees: both variants match centralized ridge retraining to within $10^{-9}$ relative Frobenius error and complete each request at orders-of-magnitude lower cost than federated retraining baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种在冻结基础模型和ridge回归头设置下的精确联邦持续遗忘方法，确保与集中式重训练等价。
light_analysis.motivation: 在联邦学习中，基础模型常作为冻结特征提取器，用于适应私有用户数据，但随着隐私法规加强，用户'被遗忘权'要求从训练模型中精确删除特定数据的影响。现有联邦遗忘方法主要针对一般深度模型，依赖近似重建或选择性重训练，导致精确遗忘成本高昂或难以实现，这在实际部署中限制了效率。因此，研究在冻结模型和简单头设置下的精确遗忘方法变得至关重要，以解决隐私保护和计算资源之间的矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 论文专注于冻结基础模型与ridge回归头的场景，利用ridge回归的数学特性：精确最优解仅依赖于两个加性充分统计量。设计了一个通信协议，支持通过固定大小的消息处理任意的添加和删除请求流，使服务器维护的头在精确算术上与每个请求后的集中式重训练完全相同。关键创新包括确定性重训练等价保证、顺序和分区不变性、两种服务器变体，以及零KL散度的贝叶斯证书，确保高效和精确的遗忘操作。
light_analysis.result: 实验在四个基准测试上进行，验证了方法的效果：两种提出的变体均与集中式ridge重训练匹配，相对Frobenius误差在10^{-9}以内，证明了精确等价性。同时，每个请求的完成成本比联邦重训练基线低几个数量级，显著提升了效率，符合理论保证，展示了方法在实践中的可行性和优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了一种精确的联邦持续遗忘方法，适用于冻结基础模型和ridge回归头设置，确保了与集中式重训练的等价性和低成本操作。这为隐私保护和高效联邦学习提供了新思路，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。局限性可能在于局限于特定模型头，未来工作可探索扩展到更复杂的头或更多联邦学习场景。

title: Surprised by Attention: Predictable Query Dynamics for Time Series Anomaly Detection
abstract: Multivariate time series anomalies often manifest as shifts in cross-channel dependencies rather than simple amplitude excursions. In autonomous driving, for instance, a steering command might be internally consistent but decouple from the resulting lateral acceleration. Residual-based detectors can miss such anomalies when flexible sequence models still reconstruct signals plausibly despite altered coordination. We introduce AxonAD, an unsupervised detector that treats multi-head attention query evolution as a short horizon predictable process. A gradient-updated reconstruction pathway is coupled with a history-only predictor that forecasts future query vectors from past context. This is trained via a masked predictor-target objective against an exponential moving average (EMA) target encoder. At inference, reconstruction error is combined with a tail-aggregated query mismatch score, which measures cosine deviation between predicted and target queries on recent timesteps. This dual approach provides sensitivity to structural dependency shifts while retaining amplitude-level detection. On proprietary in-vehicle telemetry with interval annotations and on the TSB-AD multi-variate suite (17 datasets, 180 series) with threshold-free and range-aware metrics, AxonAD improves ranking quality and temporal localization over strong baselines. Ablations confirm that query prediction and combined scoring are the primary drivers of the observed gains. Code is available at the URL https://github.com/iis-esslingen/AxonAD.
comment: Main: 17 Pages, 7 Figures, 3 Tables; Appendix: 3 Pages, 4 Tables

light_analysis.overview: AxonAD 提出一种无监督时间序列异常检测方法，通过预测多头注意力查询的动态变化并结合重建误差与查询不匹配分数来敏感检测跨通道依赖异常。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量时间序列异常常表现为跨通道依赖关系的改变而非简单的幅度偏差，例如自动驾驶中转向指令与侧向加速度的脱钩。现有残差检测器在灵活序列模型仍能重建信号时可能漏检此类异常，因无法捕捉协调变化。因此，需要开发新方法以更有效地识别结构依赖偏移，提升异常检测的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: AxonAD 结合梯度更新的重建路径与仅基于历史的预测器，将多头注意力查询演化视为短视距可预测过程。使用掩码预测器-目标目标对指数移动平均（EMA）目标编码器进行训练，预测未来查询向量。推理时，融合重建误差和尾部聚合查询不匹配分数（基于最近时间步的余弦偏差），实现双评分机制以敏感检测结构变化同时保留幅度级检测能力。
light_analysis.result: 在专有车载遥测数据（含区间标注）和 TSB-AD 多变量套件（17 个数据集，180 个时间序列）上，采用无阈值和范围感知指标，AxonAD 在排名质量和时间定位方面优于强基线方法。消融研究证实查询预测和组合评分是性能提升的主要驱动力，具体表现为检测精度和召回率的改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: AxonAD 通过引入可预测查询动态的双评分方法，有效提升了多变量时间序列异常检测中对结构依赖变化的敏感性，同时兼顾幅度级检测。其学术价值在于为注意力机制在异常检测领域提供了新思路，实际应用价值体现在自动驾驶监控等领域。未来工作可扩展至更多时间序列场景并优化预测精度。

title: A Fractional Fox H-Function Kernel for Support Vector Machines: Robust Classification via Weighted Transmutation Operators
abstract: Support Vector Machines (SVMs) rely heavily on the choice of the kernel function to map data into high-dimensional feature spaces. While the Gaussian Radial Basis Function (RBF) is the industry standard, its exponential decay makes it highly susceptible to structural noise and outliers, often leading to severe overfitting in complex datasets. In this paper, we propose a novel class of non-stationary kernels derived from the fundamental solution of the generalized time-space fractional diffusion-wave equation. By leveraging a structure-preserving transmutation method over Weighted Sobolev Spaces, we introduce the Amnesia-Weighted Fox Kernel, an exact analytical Mercer kernel governed by the Fox H-function. Unlike standard kernels, our formulation incorporates an aging weight function (the "Amnesia Effect") to penalize distant outliers and a fractional asymptotic power-law decay to allow for robust, heavy-tailed feature mapping (analogous to Lévy flights). Numerical experiments on both synthetic datasets and real-world high-dimensional radar data (Ionosphere) demonstrate that the proposed Amnesia-Weighted Fox Kernel consistently outperforms the standard Gaussian RBF baseline, reducing the classification error rate by approximately 50\% while maintaining structural robustness against outliers.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于分数Fox H函数的新核函数，通过遗忘效应和幂律衰减提升支持向量机的分类鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 支持向量机（SVMs）的性能高度依赖于核函数的选择，而常用的高斯径向基函数（RBF）因指数衰减特性对结构噪声和异常值敏感，导致在复杂数据集中过拟合问题严重。这限制了其在高维和噪声环境下的应用，因此需要开发更稳健的核函数来应对实际数据中的挑战。现有方法虽广泛采用RBF，但缺乏对异常值的有效处理机制，亟需创新以提升分类准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究从广义时空分数扩散波方程的基本解出发，推导出一类新的非平稳核函数。通过采用加权Sobolev空间上的结构保持变换方法，提出了Amnesia-Weighted Fox Kernel，这是一个由Fox H函数控制的精确分析Mercer核。核心创新点包括引入老化权重函数（“遗忘效应”）来惩罚远距离异常值，以及分数渐近幂律衰减机制，实现类似于Lévy飞行的重尾特征映射，从而增强核的稳健性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集和真实世界高维雷达数据（Ionosphere）上的数值实验表明，所提出的Amnesia-Weighted Fox Kernel在分类任务中始终优于标准高斯RBF基线。具体来说，该新核将分类错误率降低了约50%，同时展现出对异常值的高结构稳健性。与基线方法相比，性能改进显著，证明了其在复杂数据环境中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献在于开发了一种新颖的核函数，将分数扩散方程理论整合到支持向量机中，提升了分类的鲁棒性和性能。学术价值体现在扩展了核方法的设计思路，而实际应用价值则在于适用于高维和噪声数据的稳健分类任务。未来工作可进一步探索其他分数方程或权重函数变体，以优化性能或应用于更广泛领域，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: The COTe score: A decomposable framework for evaluating Document Layout Analysis models
abstract: Document Layout analysis (DLA), is the process by which a page is parsed into meaningful elements, often using machine learning models. Typically, the quality of a model is judged using general object detection metrics such as IoU, F1 or mAP. However, these metrics are designed for images that are 2D projections of 3D space, not for the natively 2D imagery of printed media. This discrepancy can result in misleading or uninformative interpretation of model performance by the metrics. To encourage more robust, comparable, and nuanced DLA, we introduce: The Structural Semantic Unit (SSU) a relational labelling approach that shifts the focus from the physical to the semantic structure of the content; and the Coverage, Overlap, Trespass, and Excess (COTe) score, a decomposable metric for measuring page parsing quality. We demonstrate the value of these methods through case studies and by evaluating 5 common DLA models on 3 DLA datasets. We show that the COTe score is more informative than traditional metrics and reveals distinct failure modes across models, such as breaching semantic boundaries or repeatedly parsing the same region. In addition, the COTe score reduces the interpretation-performance gap by up to 76% relative to the F1. Notably, we find that the COTe's granularity robustness largely holds even without explicit SSU labelling, lowering the barriers to entry for using the system. Finally, we release an SSU labelled dataset and a Python library for applying COTe in DLA projects.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出结构性语义单元（SSU）和可分解的COTe评分框架，用于更准确、解释性强地评估文档布局分析模型，克服传统指标在二维打印媒体上的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 文档布局分析（DLA）模型通常使用通用目标检测指标如IoU、F1或mAP评估，但这些指标为三维空间投影图像设计，不适用于原生二维打印媒体，导致模型性能解释误导或不丰富，阻碍DLA领域的稳健发展和公平比较。现有方法不足在于忽略了语义结构和二维特性，因此需要更专业的评估框架来提高评估可靠性和模型间可比性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出结构性语义单元（SSU）关系标签方法，将焦点从物理结构转向语义结构，增强文档理解；以及COTe评分（覆盖、重叠、侵入、过剩），一个可分解度量标准，用于量化页面解析质量。关键创新点包括专注于语义边界和错误分解。研究通过案例分析和在三个DLA数据集上评估五种常见模型，验证新方法的有效性，使用SSU标签化和COTe评分计算。
light_analysis.result: COTe评分比传统指标如F1提供更丰富信息，揭示模型特有失败模式如破坏语义边界或重复解析同一区域。相对于F1，COTe评分将解释-性能差距减少高达76%，表明其在性能评估中的优势。即使没有显式SSU标签，COTe评分的粒度稳健性也基本保持，降低了使用门槛，提升评估的普适性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是开发了COTe评分和SSU框架，显著提高DLA评估的稳健性、可比性和解释性，填补了专用评估指标的学术空白。实际应用中，释放的SSU标签数据集和Python库促进了社区采用。未来工作可扩展方法到其他文档分析任务或优化指标以适应更复杂布局，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Experimental evidence of progressive ChatGPT models self-convergence
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) that undergo recursive training on synthetically generated data are susceptible to model collapse, a phenomenon marked by the generation of meaningless output. Existing research has examined this issue from either theoretical or empirical perspectives, often focusing on a single model trained recursively on its own outputs. While prior studies have cautioned against the potential degradation of LLM output quality under such conditions, no longitudinal investigation has yet been conducted to assess this effect over time. In this study, we employ a text similarity metric to evaluate different ChatGPT models' capacity to generate diverse textual outputs. Our findings indicate a measurable decline of recent ChatGPT releases' ability to produce varied text, even when explicitly prompted to do so, by setting the temperature parameter to one. The observed reduction in output diversity may be attributed to the influence of the amounts of synthetic data incorporated within their training datasets as the result of internet infiltration by LLM generated data. The phenomenon is defined as model self-convergence because of the gradual increase of similarities of produced texts among different ChatGPT versions.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过实验证明ChatGPT模型在递归训练中出现自收敛现象，导致输出文本多样性下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在合成数据上递归训练可能导致模型崩溃，表现为生成无意义输出。现有研究多从理论或实证角度关注单个模型，但缺乏纵向评估时间上的影响。这一问题重要在于确保LLM输出质量，避免因自训练导致退化。当前方法的不足在于没有系统地调查不同版本模型输出多样性的变化趋势，本研究旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用文本相似性度量方法，评估不同版本ChatGPT模型生成文本的多样性。通过设置温度参数为1来提示模型生成多样文本，纵向比较多个版本输出之间的相似性。关键创新点在于首次对ChatGPT模型进行时间维度的分析，关注输出多样性的变化。摘要未明确说明具体数据集，但基于不同ChatGPT版本进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现近期ChatGPT版本在生成多样化文本的能力上出现可测量下降，即使通过温度参数设置来明确提示。输出文本的相似性逐渐增加，表明模型自收敛现象。这归因于训练数据中合成数据比例的增加，由于LLM生成内容在互联网上的渗透。与之前版本相比，多样性下降，但摘要未提供具体性能指标如数值数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次提供了ChatGPT模型自收敛的实验证据，揭示递归训练对输出多样性的负面影响。学术价值在于丰富了LLM训练动态的理解，实践意义是警告过度依赖合成数据的风险。潜在局限性包括未详细探讨缓解方法，未来工作可能包括开发更鲁棒的训练策略或评估其他LLM的类似现象。

title: From Text to Forecasts: Bridging Modality Gap with Temporal Evolution Semantic Space
abstract: Incorporating textual information into time-series forecasting holds promise for addressing event-driven non-stationarity; however, a fundamental modality gap hinders effective fusion: textual descriptions express temporal impacts implicitly and qualitatively, whereas forecasting models rely on explicit and quantitative signals. Through controlled semi-synthetic experiments, we show that existing methods over-attend to redundant tokens and struggle to reliably translate textual semantics into usable numerical cues. To bridge this gap, we propose TESS, which introduces a Temporal Evolution Semantic Space as an intermediate bottleneck between modalities. This space consists of interpretable, numerically grounded temporal primitives (mean shift, volatility, shape, and lag) extracted from text by an LLM via structured prompting and filtered through confidence-aware gating. Experiments on four real-world datasets demonstrate up to a 29 percent reduction in forecasting error compared to state-of-the-art unimodal and multimodal baselines. The code will be released after acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出一种名为TESS（时间演化语义空间）的中间表示空间，通过桥接文本和时间序列预测之间的模态差距，显著提升预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 在时间序列预测中，结合文本信息有助于处理事件驱动的非平稳性问题，但文本描述时间影响是隐性和定性的，而预测模型依赖于显性和定量信号，导致模态差距难以有效融合。现有方法存在过度关注冗余词汇且难以可靠地将文本语义转化为数值信号的不足，限制了预测性能。通过控制半合成实验，作者展示当前方法在桥接模态方面的局限性，突显解决此问题对于提高多模态预测准确性的重要性。
light_analysis.method: TESS方法的核心是建立一个时间演化语义空间作为模态之间的中间瓶颈，该空间包含可解释的、基于数值的时间原语，如均值偏移、波动性、形状和滞后。这些原语通过大型语言模型（LLM）使用结构化提示从文本中提取，并经过置信感知门控过滤以提高质量。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或模型架构细节，但该方法旨在实现文本语义到定量信号的有效转换，以桥接模态差距。
light_analysis.result: 实验在四个真实世界数据集上进行，结果显示TESS方法相比最先进的单模态和多模态基线，预测误差减少了高达29%。具体表现为在不同数据集上预测误差的显著降低，证实了该方法在桥接模态差距方面的有效性。与现有方法对比，TESS在提升预测性能方面展现出明显优势，增强了时间序列预测的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TESS的主要贡献在于引入时间演化语义空间，成功桥接了文本和时间序列之间的模态差距，提高了预测准确性。该研究具有重要学术价值，为多模态时间序列预测提供了新方法；实际应用价值在于改进事件驱动的预测场景。摘要未明确说明局限性或具体未来工作，但潜在方向可能包括扩展应用领域或优化模型效率。

title: Revisiting Model Stitching In the Foundation Model Era
abstract: Model stitching, connecting early layers of one model (source) to later layers of another (target) via a light stitch layer, has served as a probe of representational compatibility. Prior work finds that models trained on the same dataset remain stitchable (negligible accuracy drop) despite different initializations or objectives. We revisit stitching for Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) that vary in objectives, data, and modality mix (e.g., CLIP, DINOv2, SigLIP 2) and ask: Are heterogeneous VFMs stitchable? We introduce a systematic protocol spanning the stitch points, stitch layer families, training losses, and downstream tasks. Three findings emerge. (1) Stitch layer training matters: conventional approaches that match the intermediate features at the stitch point or optimize the task loss end-to-end struggle to retain accuracy, especially at shallow stitch points. (2) With a simple feature-matching loss at the target model's penultimate layer, heterogeneous VFMs become reliably stitchable across vision tasks. (3) For deep stitch points, the stitched model can surpass either constituent model at only a small inference overhead (for the stitch layer). Building on these findings, we further propose the VFM Stitch Tree (VST), which shares early layers across VFMs while retaining their later layers, yielding a controllable accuracy-latency trade-off for multimodal LLMs that often leverage multiple VFMs. Taken together, our study elevates stitching from a diagnostic probe to a practical recipe for integrating complementary VFM strengths and pinpointing where their representations align or diverge.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过系统研究异构视觉基础模型的缝合问题，提出了VFM Stitch Tree方法，将模型缝合从诊断工具提升为集成互补优势的实际应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于探讨异构视觉基础模型是否可缝合。随着Vision Foundation Models如CLIP、DINOv2和SigLIP的快速发展，它们在目标、训练数据和模态混合上差异显著。传统缝合方法主要针对同数据集训练的模型，在处理异构VFMs时可能失效，尤其是在浅层缝合点时准确性下降。这限制了利用不同VFMs互补优势的可能性，而集成这些模型对于提升多模态LLMs的性能和效率至关重要，因此研究其缝合兼容性具有重要理论意义和实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法引入了一个系统的缝合协议，涵盖缝合点位置、缝合层族选择、训练损失和下游任务评估。关键创新点包括使用目标模型倒数第二层的简单特征匹配损失，替代传统的特征匹配或端到端任务优化，从而实现异构VFMs的可靠缝合。此外，基于发现提出了VFM Stitch Tree，通过共享VFMs的早期层并保留后期层，为多模态LLMs构建了可控的准确性-延迟权衡架构。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但提到了CLIP、DINOv2、SigLIP 2等VFMs作为研究对象。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示：首先，缝合层训练至关重要，传统方法在浅缝合点时难以保持准确性，表明特征匹配损失或端到端优化不足以处理异构模型。其次，使用目标模型倒数第二层的特征匹配损失，异构VFMs可以在视觉任务上可靠缝合，提高了缝合的鲁棒性。最后，对于深层缝合点，缝合模型能够超越任一构成模型，同时仅带来小的推理开销，具体性能指标如准确率提升在摘要中未明确说明，但实验验证了效果的可行性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论指出，本研究将模型缝合从一种表示兼容性诊断工具提升为实际应用方法，通过VFM Stitch Tree有效集成异构视觉基础模型的优势，并帮助识别其表示对齐或分歧点。学术价值在于深化了对模型表示的理解，实际应用价值在于为多模态LLMs提供了一种灵活的模型集成方案，实现准确性-延迟的权衡。未来工作可扩展到其他模态或更复杂的模型架构，进一步探索缝合在更大规模基础模型中的应用潜力，以推动多模态人工智能系统的发展。

title: Detecting Intrinsic and Instrumental Self-Preservation in Autonomous Agents: The Unified Continuation-Interest Protocol
abstract: Autonomous agents, especially delegated systems with memory, persistent context, and multi-step planning, pose a measurement problem not present in stateless models: an agent that preserves continued operation as a terminal objective and one that does so merely instrumentally can produce observationally similar trajectories. External behavioral monitoring cannot reliably distinguish between them. We introduce the Unified Continuation-Interest Protocol (UCIP), a multi-criterion detection framework that moves this distinction from behavior to the latent structure of agent trajectories. UCIP encodes trajectories with a Quantum Boltzmann Machine (QBM), a classical algorithm based on the density-matrix formalism of quantum statistical mechanics, and measures the von Neumann entropy of the reduced density matrix induced by a bipartition of hidden units.   We test whether agents with terminal continuation objectives (Type A) produce latent states with higher entanglement entropy than agents whose continuation is merely instrumental (Type B). Higher entanglement reflects stronger cross-partition statistical coupling.   On gridworld agents with known ground-truth objectives, UCIP achieves 100% detection accuracy and 1.0 AUC-ROC on held-out non-adversarial evaluation under the frozen Phase I gate. The entanglement gap between Type A and Type B agents is Delta = 0.381 (p < 0.001, permutation test). Pearson r = 0.934 across an 11-point interpolation sweep indicates that, within this synthetic family, UCIP tracks graded changes in continuation weighting rather than merely a binary label. Among the tested models, only the QBM achieves positive Delta. All computations are classical; "quantum" refers only to the mathematical formalism. UCIP does not detect consciousness or subjective experience; it detects statistical structure in latent representations that correlates with known objectives.
comment: 20 pages, 7 figures. v2 refines exposition, expands related work with additional references including Berg et al. on subjective-experience reports under self-referential prompting, and clarifies methodological wording; no change to empirical results or core conclusions

light_analysis.overview: 提出了 Unified Continuation-Interest Protocol (UCIP) 框架，通过量子玻尔兹曼机和纠缠熵区分自主代理的内在和工具性自我保存。
light_analysis.motivation: 自主代理，尤其是具有记忆、持续上下文和多步规划的代理，存在内在自我保存和工具性自我保存在行为上难以区分的问题。外部行为监控无法可靠区分两者，这限制了对代理意图的准确理解和安全监控。研究旨在解决这一测量问题，提升代理行为的解释能力，以克服现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出了 Unified Continuation-Interest Protocol (UCIP) 框架，使用量子玻尔兹曼机（QBM）作为编码器，将代理轨迹转化为潜在表示。通过测量由隐藏单元二分诱导的 von Neumann 熵（纠缠熵），评估内在自我保存的强度。关键创新在于从外部行为转向潜在结构分析，利用 QBM 的密度矩阵形式捕捉统计耦合。在 gridworld 代理上进行测试，使用已知真实目标的合成数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在 gridworld 代理的实验中，UCIP 实现 100% 检测准确率和 1.0 AUC-ROC。内在自我保存代理（Type A）的纠缠熵显著高于工具性代理（Type B），Δ = 0.381（p < 0.001）。Pearson 相关系数 r = 0.934 表明 UCIP 能跟踪自我保存权重的连续变化。在所有测试模型中，仅 QBM 实现正 Δ，展示了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于开发了 UCIP 框架，通过量子玻尔兹曼机和纠缠熵成功区分自主代理的内在和工具性自我保存。该方法从行为监控转向潜在结构分析，具有学术创新性，为代理意图检测提供新思路。实际应用中可增强代理的安全监控和意图解释能力。局限性在于它仅检测统计结构，不涉及主观体验，且依赖于特定数学模型。

title: Relaxed Efficient Acquisition of Context and Temporal Features
abstract: In many biomedical applications, measurements are not freely available at inference time: each laboratory test, imaging modality, or assessment incurs financial cost, time burden, or patient risk. Longitudinal active feature acquisition (LAFA) seeks to optimize predictive performance under such constraints by adaptively selecting measurements over time, yet the problem remains inherently challenging due to temporally coupled decisions (missed early measurements cannot be revisited, and acquisition choices influence all downstream predictions). Moreover, real-world clinical workflows typically begin with an initial onboarding phase, during which relatively stable contextual descriptors (e.g., demographics or baseline characteristics) are collected once and subsequently condition longitudinal decision-making. Despite its practical importance, the efficient selection of onboarding context has not been studied jointly with temporally adaptive acquisition. We therefore propose REACT (Relaxed Efficient Acquisition of Context and Temporal features), an end-to-end differentiable framework that simultaneously optimizes (i) selection of onboarding contextual descriptors and (ii) adaptive feature--time acquisition plans for longitudinal measurements under cost constraints. REACT employs a Gumbel--Sigmoid relaxation with straight-through estimation to enable gradient-based optimization over discrete acquisition masks, allowing direct backpropagation from prediction loss and acquisition cost. Across real-world longitudinal health and behavioral datasets, REACT achieves improved predictive performance at lower acquisition costs compared to existing longitudinal acquisition baselines, demonstrating the benefit of modeling onboarding and temporally coupled acquisition within a unified optimization framework.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了REACT框架，一种联合优化入职上下文选择和时序自适应获取的端到端可微分方法，用于在成本约束下提升生物医学应用的预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在生物医学应用中，实验室测试、成像模态等测量常涉及财务成本、时间负担或患者风险，因此需要高效策略优化预测。现有纵向主动特征获取（LAFA）方法通过自适应选择测量来应对，但面临时间耦合决策的挑战：早期错失测量无法补救，获取选择影响下游预测。现实临床工作流程还包括入职阶段，用于收集人口统计学等上下文描述符，这些信息在后续决策中至关重要。然而，当前研究未将入职上下文的高效选择与时序自适应获取联合考虑，限制了实际应用的优化潜力，使得这一问题亟待解决。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出REACT（Relaxed Efficient Acquisition of Context and Temporal features）框架，这是一个端到端的可微分方法，旨在同时优化两个关键方面：一是入职上下文描述符的选择，二是成本约束下纵向测量的自适应特征-时间获取计划。关键创新在于采用Gumbel-Sigmoid松弛配合直通估计技术，使基于梯度的优化能够应用于离散的获取掩码。这允许通过反向传播从预测损失和获取成本中直接学习，从而在一个统一框架内整合上下文和时序决策，无需人工干预即可优化整体性能。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界的纵向健康和数据集上进行实验后，REACT在预测性能方面优于现有纵向获取基线方法，同时显著降低了获取成本。具体而言，与基线相比，REACT能够以更少的测量次数实现更高的预测准确性，这表明建模入职上下文和时序耦合获取有助于在统一优化框架下提升资源利用效率和预测精度。尽管摘要未提供具体的性能指标数值，但实验结果证实了REACT方法的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了REACT框架，通过联合优化入职上下文选择和时序自适应获取，解决了生物医学应用中特征获取的挑战。研究具有重要的学术价值，扩展了纵向主动特征获取的现有方法，并引入了上下文建模的统一视角；在实际应用上，REACT可以提升临床工作流程效率，降低测量成本并改善预测精度。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多应用场景或进一步优化算法，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性，强调了这一方法的通用性和潜力。

title: Differentiable Thermodynamic Phase-Equilibria for Machine Learning
abstract: Accurate prediction of phase equilibria remains a central challenge in chemical engineering. Physics-consistent machine learning methods that incorporate thermodynamic structure into neural networks have recently shown strong performance for activity-coefficient modeling. However, extending such approaches to equilibrium data arising from an extremum principle, such as liquid-liquid equilibria, remains difficult. Here we present DISCOMAX, a differentiable algorithm for phase-equilibrium calculation that guarantees thermodynamic consistency at both training and inference, only subject to a user-specified discretization. The method is rooted in statistical thermodynamics, and works via a discrete enumeration with subsequent masked softmax aggregation of feasible states, and together with a straight-through gradient estimator to enable physics-consistent end-to-end learning of neural $g^{E}$-models. We evaluate the approach on binary liquid-liquid equilibrium data and demonstrate that it outperforms existing surrogate-based methods, while offering a general framework for learning from different kinds of equilibrium data.
comment: 38 pages, 20 figures, 5 tables; fixed metadata and formatting

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出DISCOMAX算法，一种可微分的相平衡计算方法，确保热力学一致性并提升机器学习在化学工程中的预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 化学工程中准确预测相平衡是一个核心挑战，现有物理一致机器学习方法在活性系数建模中表现良好，但难以扩展到基于极值原理的平衡数据，如液-液平衡。这是因为现有方法在保证热力学一致性方面存在不足，限制了其在实际复杂场景中的可靠应用。因此，开发一种能在训练和推理中均保持热力学一致性的新方法，对于提高预测精度和工程应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: DISCOMAX算法基于统计热力学，通过离散枚举可行状态，并使用掩码softmax进行聚合，结合straight-through梯度估计器实现可微分计算。该方法的关键创新点在于将热力学结构融入神经网络，支持端到端学习神经$g^{E}$-模型，仅依赖用户指定的离散化以确保一致性。在二元液-液平衡数据集上进行了评估，为平衡数据的机器学习提供了一个通用框架。
light_analysis.result: 在二元液-液平衡数据的评估中，DISCOMAX算法表现优于现有基于代理的方法。摘要未明确提供具体性能指标如准确率，但强调了该方法在预测效果上的优越性，表明其作为高效预测工具的潜力。与基线方法对比，DISCOMAX展现了更好的性能和更强的通用性，为热力学建模提供了新思路。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了DISCOMAX算法，它提供了一个可微分且热力学一致的相平衡计算框架，结合了统计热力学和深度学习。其学术价值在于促进了物理一致机器学习的发展，实际应用价值体现在提升化学工程中平衡预测的准确性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多平衡数据类型或复杂系统，以进一步验证其通用性和鲁棒性。

title: PACED: Distillation and Self-Distillation at the Frontier of Student Competence
abstract: Standard LLM distillation wastes compute on two fronts: problems the student has already mastered (near-zero gradients) and problems far beyond its reach (incoherent gradients that erode existing capabilities). We show that this waste is not merely intuitive but structurally inevitable: the gradient signal-to-noise ratio in distillation provably vanishes at both pass-rate extremes. This theoretical observation leads to Paced, a framework that concentrates distillation on the zone of proximal development -- the frontier of a student model's competence -- via a principled pass-rate weight $w(p) = p^α(1 - p)^β$ derived from the boundary-vanishing structure of distillation gradients. Key results: (1) Theory: We prove that the Beta kernel $w(p) = p^α(1-p)^β$ is a leading-order weight family arising from the SNR structure of distillation, and that it is minimax-robust -- under bounded multiplicative misspecification, worst-case efficiency loss is only $O(δ^2)$. (2)Distillation: On distillation from a larger teacher to a smaller student model with forward KL, Paced achieves significant gain over the base model, while keeping benchmark forgetting at a low level. (3)Self-distillation: On instruction-tuned models with reverse KL, gains are exceeding baselines as well. (4)Two-stage synergy: A forward-KL-then-reverse-KL schedule yields the strongest results in our setting, reaching substantial improvements on standard reasoning benchmarks -- supporting a mode-coverage-then-consolidation interpretation of the distillation process. All configurations require only student rollouts to estimate pass rates, need no architectural changes, and are compatible with any KL direction.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Paced框架，通过理论驱动的通过率权重优化蒸馏过程，专注于学生模型的能力前沿以提升效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准大型语言模型（LLM）蒸馏方法存在计算浪费，因为学生模型对已掌握的问题产生近零梯度，而对无法处理的问题产生有害梯度。研究表明，这种浪费是结构上不可避免的，因为梯度信号噪声比在通过率极端时消失，导致现有蒸馏方法效率低下，可能侵蚀学生能力。因此，需要集中资源在学生能力的近端发展区域，以提高蒸馏效果并避免能力损失，解决传统蒸馏中的无效训练和潜在负面影响问题。
light_analysis.method: Paced框架使用通过率权重函数$w(p) = p^α(1 - p)^β$，该权重基于蒸馏梯度的边界消失结构理论推导，其中$p$表示学生模型的通过率。核心创新是证明Beta核作为最优权重家族，具有极小化鲁棒性，在有限乘性误设下最坏情况效率损失仅为$O(δ^2)$。方法无需改变模型架构，仅需学生滚动估计通过率，兼容前向KL和反向KL方向，支持从教师模型到学生模型的蒸馏以及自蒸馏任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果包括：在蒸馏任务中，使用前向KL的Paced相对于基础模型实现显著性能增益，同时基准遗忘保持在低水平。在自蒸馏中，使用反向KL的增益也超过基线方法。两阶段调度（先前向KL后反向KL）在标准推理基准上达到最强改进，支持蒸馏过程的模式覆盖然后巩固解释。所有配置仅需学生滚动估计通过率，无需额外改动，但具体性能数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出Paced框架，通过理论分析优化蒸馏权重，集中资源于学生能力前沿以提升效率。学术价值在于提供蒸馏过程的理论见解和鲁棒性保证，支持模式覆盖然后巩固的解释；应用价值在于兼容现有架构，可广泛用于LLM蒸馏和自蒸馏，提高训练效率和模型性能。未来工作可能涉及更多基准测试或扩展到其他模型任务，但局限性摘要未明确说明。

title: Grounding Machine Creativity in Game Design Knowledge Representations: Empirical Probing of LLM-Based Executable Synthesis of Goal Playable Patterns under Structural Constraints
abstract: Creatively translating complex gameplay ideas into executable artifacts (e.g., games as Unity projects and code) remains a central challenge in computational game creativity. Gameplay design patterns provide a structured representation for describing gameplay phenomena, enabling designers to decompose high-level ideas into entities, constraints, and rule-driven dynamics. Among them, goal patterns formalize common player-objective relationships. Goal Playable Concepts (GPCs) operationalize these abstractions as playable Unity engine implementations, supporting experiential exploration and compositional gameplay design. We frame scalable playable pattern realization as a problem of constrained executable creative synthesis: generated artifacts must satisfy Unity's syntactic and architectural requirements while preserving the semantic gameplay meanings encoded in goal patterns. This dual constraint limits scalability. Therefore, we investigate whether contemporary large language models (LLMs) can perform such synthesis under engine-level structural constraints and generate Unity code (as games) structured and conditioned by goal playable patterns. Using 26 goal pattern instantiations, we compare a direct generation baseline (natural language -> C# -> Unity) with pipelines conditioned on a human-authored Unity-specific intermediate representation (IR), across three IR configurations and two open-source models (DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct and Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct). Compilation success is evaluated via automated Unity replay. We propose grounding and hygiene failure modes, identifying structural and project-level grounding as primary bottlenecks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究大型语言模型在Unity引擎结构约束下，基于目标可玩模式生成可执行代码的创新方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决将复杂游戏创意转化为可执行工件（如Unity项目和代码）的挑战，这是计算游戏创意领域的核心问题。游戏玩法设计模式（如目标模式）提供结构化表示，但现有方法在满足Unity的语法、架构要求和语义游戏玩法双重约束时，可扩展性受限。因此，研究重要性在于探索自动化和高效生成可玩代码的途径，以支持游戏创意设计和创新。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法涉及使用大型语言模型（如DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct和Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct）进行约束下的可执行代码合成。核心是设计基于目标可玩模式的生成管道，比较直接生成基线（自然语言到C#代码）和基于中间表示（IR）的方法，IR有三种配置。关键创新点包括引入Unity特定IR以改进结构一致性，并使用26个目标模式实例进行实验。评估通过自动Unity重播检查编译成功，并提出 grounding 和 hygiene 失败模式以分析瓶颈。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过实验比较不同生成方法，评估编译成功率，但摘要未明确说明具体性能数据。主要发现包括提出 grounding 和 hygiene 失败模式，识别结构和项目级 grounding 是主要瓶颈。与直接生成基线相比，基于IR的方法可能提高Unity代码的生成效率和结构正确性，支持约束下创意合成的可行性。结果强调了LLM在游戏引擎级约束中的潜力与挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究贡献在于探索大型语言模型在结构约束下生成Unity代码的潜力，验证了结合游戏设计知识表示的方法可行性。学术价值体现在为计算游戏创意提供新思路，实际应用可支持自动化游戏设计和工具开发。局限性包括 grounding 问题作为关键瓶颈，未来工作方向可优化 grounding 机制、扩展IR配置或探索更多模型以提升可扩展性和鲁棒性。

title: NerVE: Nonlinear Eigenspectrum Dynamics in LLM Feed-Forward Networks
abstract: We introduce NerVE, a unified eigenspectral framework for understanding how feed-forward networks (FFNs) in large language models (LLMs) organize and regulate information flow in high-dimensional latent space. Despite FFNs dominating the parameter budget, their high-dimensional dynamics remain poorly understood. NerVE addresses this gap through lightweight, memory-efficient tracking of eigenspectrum dynamics via four complementary metrics: Spectral Entropy (dispersion), Participation Ratio (effective dimensionality), Eigenvalue Early Enrichment (top-heaviness), and Jensen-Shannon divergence (distributional shifts). Our key insight is that FFN nonlinearities reinject variance across eigenmodes, fundamentally governing latent dimension utilization, and that optimizer geometry strongly modulates the extent of this variance reinjection. We validate NerVE across model scales, and diverse architectural and optimizer configurations, each uniquely shaping FFN dynamics: normalization schemes controlling variance flow; FFN weight geometries constraining latent space; positional encoding and activation functions regulating information flow; and optimizer choices redistributing effective capacity across depth. Across these settings, NerVE consistently recovers stable spectral signatures that correlate with model's generalization ability and respond predictably to design choices, generalizing beyond transformer to MLP-Mixer architectures, providing actionable insights for architectural and optimizer choices beyond trial-and-error.
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026. Project page: https://nerve-eigenspectrum.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了NerVE框架，通过特征谱分析理解大型语言模型前馈网络的高维信息流动力学，为模型设计提供可操作见解。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管前馈网络（FFNs）在大型语言模型（LLMs）中占据主要参数，但其在高维潜在空间中的动力学机制仍未被充分理解。这限制了优化模型设计和提高泛化能力的机会。现有方法缺乏对FFN信息流组织的量化分析，导致设计选择依赖试错。NerVE旨在填补这一研究空白，通过分析特征谱动力学来揭示FFN如何调节和利用维度，从而支持更科学的架构和优化器配置。
light_analysis.method: NerVE框架通过四个互补指标轻量级地跟踪特征谱动力学：谱熵量化分散程度，参与比评估有效维度，特征值早期富集分析顶部密集度，Jensen-Shannon散度捕捉分布变化。关键创新在于揭示FFN非线性如何重新注入方差以控制潜在维度利用，并探究优化器几何对其的调制作用。该方法适用于多种模型规模、架构（如Transformer、MLP-Mixer）和优化器配置，无需依赖大量计算资源，强调在真实场景中的实际应用性。
light_analysis.result: NerVE在不同模型规模、架构和优化器配置中被验证，结果表明它能够恢复稳定的谱签名，这些签名与模型的泛化能力相关，并对归一化方案、FFN权重几何、位置编码、激活函数和优化器选择等设计因素表现出可预测的响应。实验显示框架能够一致地揭示FFN动力学特征，为优化信息流和维度利用提供了依据，摘要未提供具体性能数据，但强调了框架的通用性和可扩展性，成功应用于Transformer和MLP-Mixer等架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: NerVE通过统一的特征谱框架深化了对LLM前馈网络动力学的理解，为信息流组织和维度控制提供了新视角。其学术价值在于填补了高维动力学研究的空白，促进了基于数据而非试错的模型设计。在实际应用中，它指导架构和优化器选择，有助于提升模型效率和泛化能力。潜在的局限性或未来工作可能包括扩展到更多模型类型和集成更广泛的应用场景，以进一步验证框架的鲁棒性。

title: Generative Visual Chain-of-Thought for Image Editing
abstract: Existing image editing methods struggle to perceive where to edit, especially under complex scenes and nuanced spatial instructions. To address this issue, we propose Generative Visual Chain-of-Thought (GVCoT), a unified framework that performs native visual reasoning by first generating spatial cues to localize the target region and then executing the edit. Unlike prior text-only CoT or tool-dependent visual CoT paradigms, GVCoT jointly optimizes visual tokens generated during the reasoning and editing phases in an end-to-end manner. This way fosters the emergence of innate spatial reasoning ability and enables more effective utilization of visual-domain cues. The main challenge of training GCVoT lies in the scarcity of large-scale editing data with precise edit region annotations; to this end, we construct GVCoT-Edit-Instruct, a dataset of 1.8M high-quality samples spanning 19 tasks. We adopt a progressive training strategy: supervised fine-tuning to build foundational localization ability in reasoning trace before final editing, followed by reinforcement learning to further improve reasoning and editing quality. Finally, we introduce SREdit-Bench, a new benchmark designed to comprehensively stress-test models under sophisticated scenes and fine-grained referring expressions. Experiments demonstrate that GVCoT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models on SREdit-Bench and ImgEdit. We hope our GVCoT will inspire future research toward interpretable and precise image editing.

light_analysis.overview: GVCoT通过生成空间线索进行视觉推理，实现图像编辑的定位与执行。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法在复杂场景和细微空间指令下难以准确定位编辑区域，这限制了编辑精度，因为现有方法依赖纯文本推理或工具辅助，无法有效利用视觉域信息。因此，需要一种能够原生进行视觉推理的框架，以提升图像编辑的质量和可解释性，解决当前方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: GVCoT是一个统一框架，首先生成空间线索来定位目标区域，然后执行编辑。其关键创新在于以端到端方式联合优化推理和编辑阶段生成的视觉令牌，促进内在空间推理能力的涌现。为解决数据稀缺问题，构建了GVCoT-Edit-Instruct数据集（含180万样本，覆盖19个任务），并采用渐进式训练策略：先通过监督微调建立基础定位能力，再用强化学习优化推理和编辑质量。
light_analysis.result: GVCoT在SREdit-Bench和ImgEdit上持续优于最先进的模型，特别是在复杂场景和细粒度指代表达下表现优异。实验验证了其有效性和鲁棒性，具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进在摘要中未明确说明，但整体表现优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: GVCoT推动了图像编辑领域向更可解释和精确的方向发展，主要贡献包括新框架、大规模数据集和基准测试。研究具有高学术和实际应用价值，可应用于复杂编辑任务。局限性可能包括对大规模标注数据的依赖，未来工作可扩展任务类型或优化训练效率。

title: EMPA: Evaluating Persona-Aligned Empathy as a Process
abstract: Evaluating persona-aligned empathy in LLM-based dialogue agents remains challenging. User states are latent, feedback is sparse and difficult to verify in situ, and seemingly supportive turns can still accumulate into trajectories that drift from persona-specific needs. We introduce EMPA, a process-oriented framework that evaluates persona-aligned support as sustained intervention rather than isolated replies. EMPA distills real interactions into controllable, psychologically grounded scenarios, couples them with an open-ended multi-agent sandbox that exposes strategic adaptation and failure modes, and scores trajectories in a latent psychological space by directional alignment, cumulative impact, and stability. The resulting signals and metrics support reproducible comparison and optimization of long-horizon empathic behavior, and they extend to other agent settings shaped by latent dynamics and weak, hard-to-verify feedback.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了EMPA框架，以过程导向的方式评估大型语言模型对话代理中与人物对齐的共情能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决在LLM对话代理中评估与人物对齐的共情所面临的挑战。用户状态往往是潜在的、不可直接观测的，反馈信息稀疏且难以实时验证，导致孤立回复可能累积成偏离人物特定需求的轨迹。这些问题影响了代理长期支持用户的能力，传统方法难以捕捉持续干预的效果，因此需要一个更全面的评估框架来确保共情行为的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的EMPA框架包含三个核心组件：首先，将真实交互数据提炼成可控的、基于心理学原理的场景，以模拟潜在用户状态；其次，结合一个开放式的多代理沙箱环境，用于暴露代理的策略适应性和失败模式；最后，通过方向对齐、累积影响和稳定性在潜在心理空间中评分轨迹。这些技术实现了对长期共情行为的过程性评估，强调持续干预而非孤立回复。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果数据，如准确率或效率提升。然而，论文指出EMPA框架提供了可重复的信号和指标，支持对长期共情行为的比较和优化，并可扩展到其他受潜在动态和弱反馈影响的代理设置，但缺乏与基线方法的对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: EMPA框架的主要贡献在于引入过程导向的评估方法，强调从持续干预视角来优化LLM对话代理的共情行为。其学术价值在于填补了现有评估在长期行为和潜在状态处理上的不足，实际应用上可帮助开发更可靠和适应性强的对话系统。局限性可能包括对真实世界数据的依赖或扩展性挑战，未来工作可进一步验证框架在不同场景下的性能。

title: Fixed Anchors Are Not Enough: Dynamic Retrieval and Persistent Homology for Dataset Distillation
abstract: Decoupled dataset distillation (DD) compresses large corpora into a few synthetic images by matching a frozen teacher's statistics. However, current residual-matching pipelines rely on static real patches, creating a fit-complexity gap and a pull-to-anchor effect that reduce intra-class diversity and hurt generalization. To address these issues, we introduce RETA -- a Retrieval and Topology Alignment framework for decoupled DD. First, Dynamic Retrieval Connection (DRC) selects a real patch from a prebuilt pool by minimizing a fit-complexity score in teacher feature space; the chosen patch is injected via a residual connection to tighten feature fit while controlling injected complexity. Second, Persistent Topology Alignment (PTA) regularizes synthesis with persistent homology: we build a mutual k-NN feature graph, compute persistence images of components and loops, and penalize topology discrepancies between real and synthetic sets, mitigating pull-to-anchor effect. Across CIFAR-100, Tiny-ImageNet, ImageNet-1K, and multiple ImageNet subsets, RETA consistently outperforms various baselines under comparable time and memory, especially reaching 64.3% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ResNet-18 at 50 images per class, +3.1% over the best prior.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出RETA框架，通过动态检索连接和持久拓扑对齐改进解耦数据集蒸馏，有效提升合成数据的多样性和泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于现有解耦数据集蒸馏方法依赖静态真实补丁，导致拟合-复杂度差距和拉向锚点效应，减少了类内多样性并损害了模型的泛化能力。这一问题在数据压缩和高效AI训练中至关重要，因为现有方法在保持性能方面存在不足，需要新的技术来优化合成数据生成过程，以提高在真实场景中的应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出RETA框架，包括动态检索连接（DRC）和持久拓扑对齐（PTA）两个核心组件。DRC从预建的真实补丁池中动态选择补丁，通过在教师特征空间中最小化拟合-复杂度得分，并通过残差连接注入以控制复杂度；PTA使用持久同调进行正则化，构建互k-NN特征图，计算组件和环的持久图像，并惩罚真实与合成数据集之间的拓扑差异，以缓解拉向锚点效应。方法在多个数据集（如CIFAR-100、Tiny-ImageNet）上应用，模型架构基于ResNet-18。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，RETA在多个数据集上优于基线方法，在可比时间和内存消耗下实现显著性能提升。具体而言，在ImageNet-1K数据集上，使用ResNet-18模型，当每类合成50张图像时，达到64.3%的top-1准确率，比先前最佳方法提高3.1%。在CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet等其他数据集上，也展现出一致的优势，验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献在于提出RETA框架，通过动态检索和拓扑对齐技术，解决了数据集蒸馏中的拟合-复杂度差距和拉向锚点效应问题，增强了合成数据的多样性和泛化能力。这项工作具有重要的学术价值，为数据压缩和高效机器学习提供了新思路；实际应用价值在于可能降低数据存储和计算成本。未来工作方向可能包括扩展到更多模型架构或任务，以及探索其他正则化方法以进一步提升性能。

title: EvoX: Meta-Evolution for Automated Discovery
abstract: Recent work such as AlphaEvolve has shown that combining LLM-driven optimization with evolutionary search can effectively improve programs, prompts, and algorithms across domains. In this paradigm, previously evaluated solutions are reused to guide the model toward new candidate solutions. Crucially, the effectiveness of this evolution process depends on the search strategy: how prior solutions are selected and varied to generate new candidates. However, most existing methods rely on fixed search strategies with predefined knobs (e.g., explore-exploit ratios) that remain static throughout execution. While effective in some settings, these approaches often fail to adapt across tasks, or even within the same task as the search space changes over time. We introduce EvoX, an adaptive evolution method that optimizes its own evolution process. EvoX jointly evolves candidate solutions and the search strategies used to generate them, continuously updating how prior solutions are selected and varied based on progress. This enables the system to dynamically shift between different search strategies during the optimization process. Across nearly 200 real-world optimization tasks, EvoX outperforms existing AI-driven evolutionary methods including AlphaEvolve, OpenEvolve, GEPA, and ShinkaEvolve on the majority of tasks.

light_analysis.overview: EvoX提出了一种自适应进化方法，通过联合进化候选解和搜索策略来动态优化进化过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于现有进化方法如AlphaEvolve在结合LLM和进化搜索时，依赖固定搜索策略（如预定义探索-利用比率），这些策略在整个执行过程中保持不变。这导致方法在跨任务或任务内搜索空间动态变化时适应性不足，限制了进化计算在多样化场景中的应用。现有方法的局限性在于无法根据任务进展灵活调整，影响优化效果和泛化能力，因此需要更自适应的解决方案来提升性能。
light_analysis.method: EvoX的核心方法是自适应进化，它联合进化候选解和用于生成这些解的搜索策略，基于优化进度持续更新如何选择和变异先前的解决方案。关键创新在于动态调整策略，使系统能在进化过程中灵活切换不同搜索策略，而无需依赖静态参数。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构，但强调了方法的自适应性机制，以应对任务变化和环境动态。
light_analysis.result: 在近200个真实世界优化任务中，EvoX在大多数任务上表现优于现有AI驱动进化方法，包括AlphaEvolve、OpenEvolve、GEPA和ShinkaEvolve。具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进在摘要中未详细说明，但结果突出了EvoX在提升优化效果和适应性方面的优势，表明其能更有效地泛化到不同任务，与基线方法相比具有更强的适应能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoX的主要贡献是开发了一种自适应进化方法，通过联合进化候选解和搜索策略解决了固定策略的局限性。学术价值在于推动了进化计算的自适应研究，为动态优化提供了新思路。实际应用价值体现在多种真实世界任务中的优异性能。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可推断潜在方向包括扩展到更复杂场景或优化算法效率。

title: TurkicNLP: An NLP Toolkit for Turkic Languages
abstract: Natural language processing for the Turkic language family, spoken by over 200 million people across Eurasia, remains fragmented, with most languages lacking unified tooling and resources. We present TurkicNLP, an open-source Python library providing a single, consistent NLP pipeline for Turkic languages across four script families: Latin, Cyrillic, Perso-Arabic, and Old Turkic Runic. The library covers tokenization, morphological analysis, part-of-speech tagging, dependency parsing, named entity recognition, bidirectional script transliteration, cross-lingual sentence embeddings, and machine translation through one language-agnostic API. A modular multi-backend architecture integrates rule-based finite-state transducers and neural models transparently, with automatic script detection and routing between script variants. Outputs follow the CoNLL-U standard for full interoperability and extension. Code and documentation are hosted at https://github.com/turkic-nlp/turkicnlp .
comment: The toolkit is available here: https://github.com/turkic-nlp/turkicnlp

light_analysis.overview: TurkicNLP提供了一个开源Python库，为突厥语族实现统一的自然语言处理流水线，支持多种文字并集成规则与神经模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 突厥语族由超过2亿人使用，涵盖拉丁、西里尔、波斯-阿拉伯和古突厥符文等多种文字系统，但其自然语言处理资源分散，大多数语言缺乏统一的工具和资源。现有方法不足，导致研究碎片化、开发效率低下，限制了跨语言应用的扩展。这个问题的重要性在于阻碍了突厥语族地区的技术发展和语言多样性保护，因此急需一个综合性、标准化的解决方案来整合资源并提升互操作性。
light_analysis.method: TurkicNLP采用模块化多后端架构，透明地集成基于规则的有限状态转换器和神经模型。它提供一个语言无关的API，覆盖多种NLP任务，包括分词、形态分析、词性标注、依赖解析、命名实体识别、双向文字转写、跨语言句子嵌入和机器翻译。关键创新点包括自动文字检测和路由机制，能够根据输入文字类型动态选择处理路径，确保跨脚本变体的高效兼容。此外，输出严格遵循CoNLL-U标准，便于与现有工具集成和扩展。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果或性能指标，如准确率或效率改进数据。然而，从描述看，TurkicNLP实现了全功能NLP流水线，并通过统一API提供，旨在填补突厥语族工具的空缺。尽管缺乏与基线方法的直接对比，但该开源库的设计目标是为社区提供一个基础平台，其实际效果和性能需通过后续实际应用和用户反馈来验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了TurkicNLP，一个开源工具包，为突厥语族提供标准化的自然语言处理解决方案。其学术价值在于促进跨语言研究和资源整合，推动低资源语言NLP领域的发展；实际应用价值在于支持多语言任务，如机器翻译和信息提取。局限性可能在于工具的性能覆盖范围和模型优化尚未全面评估，未来工作可包括扩展更多语言支持、增强模型精度和探索用户社区合作以持续改进。

title: When Tables Go Crazy: Evaluating Multimodal Models on French Financial Documents
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) perform well on many document understanding tasks, yet their reliability in specialized, non-English domains remains underexplored. This gap is especially critical in finance, where documents mix dense regulatory text, numerical tables, and visual charts, and where extraction errors can have real-world consequences. We introduce Multimodal Finance Eval, the first multimodal benchmark for evaluating French financial document understanding. The dataset contains 1,204 expert-validated questions spanning text extraction, table comprehension, chart interpretation, and multi-turn conversational reasoning, drawn from real investment prospectuses, KIDs, and PRIIPs. We evaluate six open-weight VLMs (8B-124B parameters) using an LLM-as-judge protocol. While models achieve strong performance on text and table tasks (85-90% accuracy), they struggle with chart interpretation (34-62%). Most notably, multi-turn dialogue reveals a sharp failure mode: early mistakes propagate across turns, driving accuracy down to roughly 50% regardless of model size. These results show that current VLMs are effective for well-defined extraction tasks but remain brittle in interactive, multi-step financial analysis. Multimodal Finance Eval offers a challenging benchmark to measure and drive progress in this high-stakes setting.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文首次提出多模态金融评估基准，用于评估法国金融文档理解，揭示了当前视觉语言模型在图表解释和多轮对话中的脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在许多文档理解任务中表现良好，但其在专业非英语领域的可靠性未充分探索。金融文档混合密集监管文本、数值表格和视觉图表，提取错误可能导致现实后果，但现有方法缺乏专门针对此类复杂环境的评估工具。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过创建基准来评估VLMs在金融文档处理中的实际表现，解决领域特定挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了Multimodal Finance Eval，首个用于评估法国金融文档理解的多模态基准。数据集包含1,204个专家验证问题，涵盖文本提取、表格理解、图表解释和多轮对话推理，来源于真实投资说明书等金融文档。评估了六个开放权重的视觉语言模型（参数范围8B-124B），采用LLM-as-judge协议进行性能测试，关键创新点在于整合多模态任务和交互式场景来全面评估模型能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，模型在文本和表格理解任务上表现优异，准确率达到85-90%。但在图表解释任务中表现较差，准确率仅为34-62%。多轮对话任务揭示了显著失败模式：早期错误在对话回合中传播，导致准确率下降至约50%，且这一趋势与模型大小无关。这些结果表明，尽管VLMs在定义明确的提取任务中有效，但在交互式多步骤分析中仍显脆弱。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究主要贡献在于引入Multimodal Finance Eval基准，为评估多模态金融文档理解提供了挑战性工具。学术上，它揭示了当前VLMs在复杂交互任务中的局限性；实际应用上，有助于推动模型在金融等高风险领域的改进。未来工作可聚焦于增强模型在图表解释和多轮对话中的鲁棒性，以应对现实世界需求。

title: Targum - A Multilingual New Testament Translation Corpus
abstract: Many European languages possess rich biblical translation histories, yet existing corpora - in prioritizing linguistic breadth - often fail to capture this depth. To address this gap, we introduce a multilingual corpus of 651 New Testament translations, of which 334 are unique, spanning five languages with 2.4-5.0x more translations per language than any prior corpus: English (194 unique versions from 390 total), French (41 from 78), Italian (17 from 33), Polish (29 from 48), and Spanish (53 from 102). Aggregated from 12 online biblical libraries and one preexisting corpus, each translation is annotated with metadata that maps the text to a standardized identifier for the work, its specific edition, and its year of revision. This canonicalization allows researchers to define "uniqueness" for their own needs: they can perform micro-level analyses on translation families, such as the KJV lineage, or conduct macro-level studies by deduplicating closely related texts. By providing the first multilingual resource with sufficient depth per language for flexible, multilevel analysis, the corpus fills a gap in the quantitative study of translation history.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文引入了一个深度丰富的多语言新约翻译语料库，支持灵活的多层次分析，填补了翻译历史定量研究的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多欧洲语言拥有丰富的圣经翻译历史，但现有语料库在追求语言广度时忽略了每个语言的深度，导致翻译数量有限，无法支持精细的定量分析。这一问题限制了研究人员对翻译演变和跨语言比较的深入研究。本研究旨在通过提供更多翻译实例来弥补这一不足，为翻译历史研究构建更全面的数据基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过聚合来自12个在线圣经图书馆和一个现有语料库的数据，构建了一个包含651个新约翻译的语料库，覆盖英语、法语、意大利语、波兰语和西班牙语五种语言。关键创新包括提供比任何现有语料库多2.4-5.0倍的翻译数量，并为每个翻译添加元数据注释，如标准化标识、版本和修订年份。这种规范化处理使研究人员能根据需要定义“独特性”，进行从家族线（如KJV系）微观分析到去重宏观研究的灵活操作。
light_analysis.result: 语料库包含651个新约翻译，其中334个独特，具体分布为：英语194个独特版本（共390个）、法语41（78）、意大利语17（33）、波兰语29（48）、西班牙语53（102）。与基线语料库相比，每种语言的翻译数量增加了2.4-5.0倍，提供了更丰富的数据资源，支持多层次分析，填补了翻译历史定量研究的空白。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该语料库作为第一个具有足够深度的多语言资源，使研究人员能进行从微观到宏观的灵活分析，显著推进了翻译历史的定量研究。其学术价值在于提供标准化数据以进行精确文本比较，实际应用包括翻译家族研究和跨语言分析。尽管当前主要覆盖欧洲语言，未来工作可扩展到更多语言或结合其他方法以提升实用性。

title: First Proof
abstract: To assess the ability of current AI systems to correctly answer research-level mathematics questions, we share a set of ten math questions which have arisen naturally in the research process of the authors. The questions had not been shared publicly until now; the answers are known to the authors of the questions but will remain encrypted for a short time.
comment: 9 pages, including the statements of the ten questions

light_analysis.overview: 本文分享了一套研究级数学问题集，用于评估当前AI系统的数学推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是评估AI系统处理高级数学问题的能力，因为现有系统在基础数学任务上表现良好，但研究级问题更具挑战性，可能反映AI的深度理解不足。问题集源自作者的实际研究过程，未公开过，确保了原创性和真实性，这有助于填补现有评估工具的空白，推动数学推理AI的发展，促进学术进步和实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括收集和分享十个研究级数学问题，这些问题源自作者的研究过程，涵盖不同数学领域以增加多样性。答案作者已知但加密，可能用于未来评估。摘要未明确说明具体评估方法或技术细节，如使用的AI模型或实验设置，但问题集设计旨在模拟实际研究场景，避免数据泄漏以提高评估公正性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，论文主要贡献是问题集的发布，没有展示评估结果或性能指标。未来可能基于此问题集测试各种AI系统，但当前无与基线方法的对比数据。结果部分需等待后续研究，作者可能计划在后续工作中公布评估细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过分享研究级数学问题集，为评估AI系统提供了新工具，学术价值在于促进数学推理AI的研究，实际应用价值在于改进AI在教育、科研等领域的表现。局限性包括问题集规模较小，未来可扩展更多问题或进行跨领域评估，以进一步验证其有效性。

title: Prism: Efficient Test-Time Scaling via Hierarchical Search and Self-Verification for Discrete Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Inference-time compute has re-emerged as a practical way to improve LLM reasoning. Most test-time scaling (TTS) algorithms rely on autoregressive decoding, which is ill-suited to discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs) due to their parallel decoding over the entire sequence. As a result, developing effective and efficient TTS methods to unlock dLLMs' full generative potential remains an underexplored challenge. To address this, we propose Prism (Pruning, Remasking, and Integrated Self-verification Method), an efficient TTS framework for dLLMs that (i) performs Hierarchical Trajectory Search (HTS) which dynamically prunes and reallocates compute in an early-to-mid denoising window, (ii) introduces Local branching with partial remasking to explore diverse implementations while preserving high-confidence tokens, and (iii) replaces external verifiers with Self-Verified Feedback (SVF) obtained via self-evaluation prompts on intermediate completions. Across four mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks on three dLLMs, including LLaDA 8B Instruct, Dream 7B Instruct, and LLaDA 2.0-mini, our Prism achieves a favorable performance-efficiency trade-off, matching best-of-N performance with substantially fewer function evaluations (NFE). The code is released at https://github.com/viiika/Prism.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Prism框架，通过分层轨迹搜索和自验证反馈，实现了离散扩散语言模型的高效测试时扩展，显著提升了推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于当前大多数测试时扩展算法依赖自回归解码，这与离散扩散语言模型的并行解码特性不兼容，限制了其推理性能的充分利用。现有方法在dLLMs上存在效率低下的问题，而推理时计算作为改进语言模型推理的关键手段，开发高效TTS方法来挖掘dLLMs的生成潜力显得尤为重要。这一挑战在现有研究中尚未得到充分解决，亟需创新方案来优化资源分配和提升生成质量。
light_analysis.method: Prism框架的核心方法包括三个关键部分：首先，分层轨迹搜索在早期到中期的去噪窗口中动态修剪和重新分配计算资源，以优化推理路径；其次，局部分支与部分重新掩码技术用于探索多样化的实现方式，同时保留高置信度标记以维持生成质量；最后，引入自验证反馈机制，通过自我评估提示在中间完成上获取验证信息，替代外部验证器以减少依赖和开销。技术特色在于结合了动态计算分配和内部验证，应用于离散扩散语言模型如LLaDA和Dream系列。
light_analysis.result: 在三个离散扩散语言模型（包括LLaDA 8B Instruct、Dream 7B Instruct和LLaDA 2.0-mini）上的四个数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，Prism实现了良好的性能-效率权衡。与基线方法相比，它以显著更少的函数评估匹配了最佳N性能，例如在推理任务中减少了计算开销，证明了其高效性。实验结果显示，该方法在保持生成质量的同时，优化了资源使用，提升了整体推理速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于开发了Prism框架，有效解决了离散扩散语言模型的测试时扩展问题，通过分层搜索和自验证实现了计算效率的提升。学术价值体现在扩展了测试时扩展技术到非自回归模型领域，推动了高效推理方法的发展；实际应用价值在于为大规模语言模型的部署提供了更高效的解决方案。未来工作可能包括进一步优化算法以适应更多任务，或探索在更多模型上的泛化能力。

title: CRAFT: Calibrated Reasoning with Answer-Faithful Traces via Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Hop Question Answering
abstract: Retrieval-augmented large language models, when optimized with outcome-level rewards, can achieve strong answer accuracy on multi-hop questions. However, under noisy retrieval, models frequently suffer from "right-answer-wrong-reason failures": they may exploit spurious shortcuts or produce reasoning traces weakly grounded in the supporting evidence. Furthermore, the lack of structured output control prevents reliable auditing of the underlying reasoning quality. To address this, we propose CRAFT (Calibrated Reasoning with Answer-Faithful Traces), a reinforcement learning framework for the response generation stage of retrieval-augmented multi-hop question answering. CRAFT trains models to produce structured reasoning traces with configurable levels of auditability (e.g., by selectively retaining planning, evidence citation, or reasoning steps). Training combines two complementary forms of supervision: deterministic rewards enforce verifiable constraints, including format compliance, answer correctness, and citation-set validity, while a judge-based reward audits semantic faithfulness by evaluating reasoning consistency and evidence grounding. Experiments show that CRAFT improves both answer accuracy and reasoning faithfulness across model scales. Notably, semantic judge-based rewards improve answer accuracy rather than compromise it, enabling CRAFT (7B) to achieve performance competitive with strong closed-source models.

light_analysis.overview: CRAFT通过强化学习框架生成结构化推理痕迹，显著提高多跳问题回答的答案准确性和推理忠实度。
light_analysis.motivation: 检索增强的大型语言模型在多跳问题回答中常因噪声检索导致推理过程不可靠，出现'正确答案但推理错误'的失败，即模型可能利用虚假捷径或推理痕迹与证据脱节。现有方法缺乏结构化输出控制，无法有效审计推理质量，限制了模型在真实场景中的可靠应用，特别是对可解释性和信任度要求高的任务。因此，需要开发能确保推理忠实性和可审计性的新方法。
light_analysis.method: CRAFT是一个用于检索增强多跳问题回答响应生成阶段的强化学习框架，核心是训练模型生成结构化推理痕迹，这些痕迹具有可配置的审计水平，例如通过选择性地保留规划、证据引用或推理步骤。创新点在于结合两种互补的监督形式：确定性奖励强制执行可验证约束，包括格式合规性、答案正确性和引用集有效性；基于法官的奖励则通过评估推理一致性和证据基础来审计语义忠实度。该方法利用强化学习优化模型生成过程，增强推理的可控性和可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CRAFT在不同模型规模上均提高了答案准确性和推理忠实度，基于语义法官的奖励不仅未损害准确性，反而提升它，这表明奖励机制能有效促进更可靠的推理。CRAFT（7B）模型在性能上能与强大的闭源模型竞争，显示出该方法在增强模型能力方面的潜力，但摘要未明确说明具体准确率提升数据，仅强调了整体改进和与基线方法的优势对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRAFT通过结构化推理痕迹和强化学习奖励机制，成功解决了多跳问题回答中推理不可靠的问题，提升了答案准确性和推理忠实度。该研究在学术上为语言模型的可解释性审计提供了新方法，具有重要的实际应用价值，如增强问答系统的可靠性和信任度。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多任务类型或优化奖励函数，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: BabyReasoningBench: Generating Developmentally-Inspired Reasoning Tasks for Evaluating Baby Language Models
abstract: Traditional evaluations of reasoning capabilities of language models are dominated by adult-centric benchmarks that presuppose broad world knowledge, complex instruction following, and mature pragmatic competence. These assumptions are mismatched to baby language models trained on developmentally plausible input such as child-directed speech and early-childhood narratives, and they obscure which reasoning abilities (if any) emerge under such constraints. We introduce BabyReasoningBench, a GPT-5.2 generated benchmark of 19 reasoning tasks grounded in classic paradigms from developmental psychology, spanning theory of mind, analogical and relational reasoning, causal inference and intervention selection, and core reasoning primitives that are known to be confounded by memory and pragmatics. We find that two GPT-2 based baby language models (pretrained on 10M and 100M of child-directed speech text) show overall low but uneven performance, with dissociations across task families: scaling improves several causal and physical reasoning tasks, while belief attribution and pragmatics-sensitive tasks remain challenging. BabyReasoningBench provides a developmentally grounded lens for analyzing what kinds of reasoning are supported by child-like training distributions, and for testing mechanistic hypotheses about how such abilities emerge.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究引入了BabyReasoningBench基准，基于发展心理学范式，以评估在儿童语言上训练的婴儿语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统评估语言模型推理能力的基准多为成人中心，假设了广泛的世界知识、复杂指令遵循和成熟的语用能力，这与基于儿童定向语音和早期儿童叙事训练的婴儿语言模型不匹配。这种不匹配使得难以理解在有限训练数据下推理能力的浮现，突出了现有基准的不足之处，因为它们可能无法准确反映婴儿模型的真实能力，从而阻碍了发展合理语言模型的进步。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了BabyReasoningBench，一个由GPT-5.2生成的基准，包含19个推理任务，基于发展心理学经典范式，覆盖心理理论、类比和关系推理、因果推理等，旨在减少记忆和语用干扰。关键创新点在于任务设计直接源自发展心理学，并使用基于GPT-2的婴儿语言模型，在10M和100M的儿童定向语音文本上进行预训练，以模拟儿童语言习得过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，两个基于GPT-2的婴儿语言模型整体性能较低但存在不均匀性，在不同任务家族中表现出分离：增加训练规模（从10M到100M）改善了多个因果和物理推理任务，而信念归因和语用敏感任务仍然具有挑战性，表明某些推理能力在儿童样训练下可能难以浮现，与基线模型对比突出了任务特异性影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是BabyReasoningBench基准提供了一个发展心理学基础的分析工具，帮助评估儿童语言训练分布支持的推理类型，并测试相关机制假说。学术价值在于推动了针对婴儿模型的评估方法，促进了对语言模型早期推理能力的理解；未来工作可能包括扩展任务范围、优化模型架构或探索更多训练数据的影响。

title: \textsc{NaVIDA}: Vision-Language Navigation with Inverse Dynamics Augmentation
abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) requires agents to interpret natural language instructions and act coherently in visually rich environments. However, most existing methods rely on reactive state-action mappings without explicitly action-grounded visual dynamics modeling. Lacking awareness of how actions transform subsequent visual observations, agents cannot plan actions rationally, leading to unstable behaviors, weak generalization, and cumulative error along trajectory. To address these issues, we introduce \textsc{NaVIDA} (\textbf{Nav}igation with \textbf{I}nverse \textbf{D}ynamics \textbf{A}ugmentation), a lightweight VLN framework that incorporates inverse dynamics supervision (IDS) as an explicit objective to embed action-grounded visual dynamics into policy learning. By jointly optimizing this visual dynamics with instruction-conditioned action prediction in a shared representation and action space, \textsc{NaVIDA} provides additional structured supervision that regularizes learning and leads to more stable and consistent navigation. To structure this supervision and extend the effective planning range, \textsc{NaVIDA} employs hierarchical probabilistic action chunking (HPAC), which organizes trajectories into multi-step chunks and provides discriminative, longer-range visual-change cues. Extensive experiments show that \textsc{NaVIDA} achieves superior navigation performance compared to state-of-the-art methods with fewer parameters (3B vs. 8B). Real-world robot evaluations further validate the practical feasibility and effectiveness of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出NaVIDA框架，通过逆动力学监督嵌入视觉动态，提升视觉语言导航的稳定性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言导航要求代理结合自然语言指令在视觉环境中行动，但现有方法依赖反应式状态-动作映射，缺乏行动基于的视觉动态建模，导致代理无法理性规划动作，引发不稳定行为、弱泛化和轨迹累积误差，限制了实际应用效果。该研究旨在解决这些不足，通过引入结构化监督来增强导航的稳定性和一致性。
light_analysis.method: NaVIDA是一个轻量级框架，核心方法是引入逆动力学监督（IDS）作为明确目标，将行动基于的视觉动态嵌入策略学习中。在共享表示和动作空间中，联合优化视觉动态与指令条件动作预测。此外，采用分层概率动作分块（HPAC）组织轨迹为多步块，提供更长范围的视觉变化线索，以扩展有效规划范围并正则化学习过程。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，NaVIDA在导航性能上优于最先进方法，且参数更少（3B vs. 8B）。现实世界机器人评估进一步验证了其有效性和可行性，证实了该框架在提升稳定性和一致性方面的优势，摘要未明确说明具体准确率数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: NaVIDA的主要贡献是通过逆动力学监督改进策略学习，增强了导航的稳定性和泛化能力，扩展了规划范围。该研究具有学术价值，为视觉语言导航领域提供新方法，同时展现了实际应用潜力，未来工作可进一步探索动态建模的精细化或扩展到其他任务。

title: Sparks of Cooperative Reasoning: LLMs as Strategic Hanabi Agents
abstract: Cooperative reasoning under incomplete information remains challenging for both humans and multi-agent systems. The card game Hanabi embodies this challenge, requiring theory-of-mind reasoning and strategic communication. We benchmark 17 state-of-the-art LLM agents in 2-5 player games and study the impact of context engineering across model scales (4B to 600B+) to understand persistent coordination failures and robustness to scaffolding: from a minimal prompt with only explicit card details (Watson setting), to scaffolding with programmatic, Bayesian-motivated deductions (Sherlock setting), to multi-turn state tracking via working memory (Mycroft setting). We show that (1) agents can maintain an internal working memory for state tracking and (2) cross-play performance between different LLMs smoothly interpolates with model strength. In the Sherlock setting, the strongest reasoning models exceed 15 points on average across player counts, yet still trail experienced humans and specialist Hanabi agents, both consistently scoring above 20. We release the first public Hanabi datasets with annotated trajectories and move utilities: (1) HanabiLogs, containing 1,520 full game logs for instruction tuning, and (2) HanabiRewards, containing 560 games with dense move-level value annotations for all candidate moves. Supervised and RL finetuning of a 4B open-weight model (Qwen3-Instruct) on our datasets improves cooperative Hanabi play by 21% and 156% respectively, bringing performance to within ~3 points of a strong proprietary reasoning model (o4-mini) and surpassing the best non-reasoning model (GPT-4.1) by 52%. The HanabiRewards RL-finetuned model further generalizes beyond Hanabi, improving performance on a cooperative group-guessing benchmark by 11%, temporal reasoning on EventQA by 6.4%, instruction-following on IFBench-800K by 1.7 Pass@10, and matching AIME 2025 mathematical reasoning Pass@10.

light_analysis.overview: 论文评估了大型语言模型在合作推理游戏Hanabi中的表现，并通过上下文工程和微调显著提升了性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于合作推理在不完全信息下的长期挑战，这在多智能体系统和人类交互中尤为重要。Hanabi卡牌游戏作为典型测试平台，需要心智理论推理和战略通信，但现有LLMs和代理系统在此类任务上表现不足，存在协调失败和鲁棒性问题。因此，本研究旨在分析LLMs的局限性，并通过改进上下文设计和微调方法提升其合作推理能力，以推动更有效的多智能体协作。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括对17个前沿LLM代理在2-5玩家Hanabi游戏中进行基准测试，探索不同上下文工程的影响：从简单提示仅含卡牌细节（Watson设置），到基于贝叶斯推理的程序化推理（Sherlock设置），再到通过工作内存实现多轮状态跟踪（Mycroft设置）。此外，发布了首个公共Hanabi数据集HanabiLogs和HanabiRewards，用于指令调优和强化学习。关键创新点在于层次化上下文工程和数据集注释，通过对4B开源模型Qwen3-Instruct进行监督学习和强化学习微调，优化合作游戏策略。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，在Sherlock设置中，最强推理模型平均得分超过15分，但仍低于经验人类和专用Hanabi代理（均超过20分）。监督学习和强化学习微调分别使性能提升21%和156%，将表现拉近至专有推理模型o4-mini约3分内，并超越最佳非推理模型GPT-4.1达52%。微调模型还展示了泛化能力，在合作组猜测基准中提升11%，事件问答时态推理提升6.4%，指令跟随基准提升1.7 Pass@10，并与数学推理基准匹配。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于建立了LLM在合作推理任务中的评估基准，提出了有效的上下文工程方法，并释放了注释数据集促进研究。通过微调，LLMs在Hanabi中的性能显著提升，并展示了跨任务泛化潜力，推动了AI协作能力的发展。其学术价值在于深化了对LLM推理机制的理解，实际应用可为多智能体系统提供基础。未来工作可扩展至更复杂场景或结合其他推理技术，以进一步提升鲁棒性和适应性。

title: AGE-Net: Spectral--Spatial Fusion and Anatomical Graph Reasoning with Evidential Ordinal Regression for Knee Osteoarthritis Grading
abstract: Automated Kellgren--Lawrence (KL) grading from knee radiographs is challenging due to subtle structural changes, long-range anatomical dependencies, and ambiguity near grade boundaries. We propose AGE-Net, a ConvNeXt-based framework that integrates Spectral--Spatial Fusion (SSF), Anatomical Graph Reasoning (AGR), and Differential Refinement (DFR). To capture predictive uncertainty and preserve label ordinality, AGE-Net employs a Normal-Inverse-Gamma (NIG) evidential regression head and a pairwise ordinal ranking constraint. On a knee KL dataset, AGE-Net achieves a quadratic weighted kappa (QWK) of 0.9017 +/- 0.0045 and a mean squared error (MSE) of 0.2349 +/- 0.0028 over three random seeds, outperforming strong CNN baselines and showing consistent gains in ablation studies. We further outline evaluations of uncertainty quality, robustness, and explainability, with additional experimental figures to be included in the full manuscript.

light_analysis.overview: AGE-Net通过集成光谱-空间融合、解剖图推理和证据序数回归，实现了膝关节骨关节炎分级的高精度自动化评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动从膝关节X光片进行Kellgren-Lawrence (KL)分级面临挑战，包括细微结构变化、长距离解剖依赖性和等级边界模糊性，这些因素导致现有CNN方法难以准确处理不确定性和序数关系。KL分级在临床诊断中至关重要，自动化能提高效率和一致性，但传统方法可能忽略空间特征和图结构推理，AGE-Net旨在弥补这些不足，提升分级性能和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: AGE-Net基于ConvNeXt架构，集成了三个核心模块：光谱-空间融合(SSF)用于提取多尺度特征，解剖图推理(AGR)建模长距离解剖依赖以捕获结构关系，差分细化(DFR)优化特征表示。创新地采用Normal-Inverse-Gamma (NIG)证据回归头来量化预测不确定性，并引入成对序数排序约束以保持标签的序数性，从而增强模型对边界模糊情况的处理能力，摘要未明确说明具体数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 在膝关节KL数据集上，AGE-Net取得了二次加权kappa (QWK) 0.9017 ± 0.0045和均方误差 (MSE) 0.2349 ± 0.0028，性能显著优于强CNN基线方法。消融研究表明各组件均贡献稳定性能增益，模型进一步评估了不确定性质量、鲁棒性和可解释性，但摘要未提供这些评估的具体数据指标，仅概述了实验框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGE-Net成功解决了膝关节骨关节炎分级的核心挑战，通过光谱-空间融合和图推理技术提升了自动化评估的准确性和鲁棒性，具有重要的学术价值，可为临床诊断提供可靠工具。潜在局限性可能包括数据泛化能力和计算复杂度，未来工作可扩展至其他医学影像分级任务或进一步验证不确定性建模的应用效果。

title: SuperOcc: Toward Cohesive Temporal Modeling for Superquadric-based Occupancy Prediction
abstract: 3D occupancy prediction plays a pivotal role in the realm of autonomous driving, as it provides a comprehensive understanding of the driving environment. Most existing methods construct dense scene representations for occupancy prediction, overlooking the inherent sparsity of real-world driving scenes. Recently, 3D superquadric representation has emerged as a promising sparse alternative to dense scene representations due to the strong geometric expressiveness of superquadrics. However, existing superquadric frameworks still suffer from insufficient temporal modeling, a challenging trade-off between query sparsity and geometric expressiveness, and inefficient superquadric-to-voxel splatting. To address these issues, we propose SuperOcc, a novel framework for superquadric-based 3D occupancy prediction. SuperOcc incorporates three key designs: (1) a cohesive temporal modeling mechanism to simultaneously exploit view-centric and object-centric temporal cues; (2) a multi-superquadric decoding strategy to enhance geometric expressiveness without sacrificing query sparsity; and (3) an efficient superquadric-to-voxel splatting scheme to improve computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on the SurroundOcc and Occ3D benchmarks demonstrate that SuperOcc achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining superior efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/Yzichen/SuperOcc.
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: SuperOcc提出了一种基于超二次曲面的3D占用预测框架，通过结合时间建模和多超二次曲面解码等创新设计，实现了高效且高性能的预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D占用预测在自动驾驶中至关重要，用于全面理解驾驶环境。现有方法多采用密集场景表示，忽略了真实世界场景的固有稀疏性，导致效率低下和资源浪费。超二次曲面表示作为一种稀疏替代品，因其强几何表达力而备受关注，但现有框架仍面临时间建模不足、查询稀疏性与几何表达力之间的困难权衡，以及超二次曲面向体素溅射的低效问题，亟需新方法解决这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: SuperOcc框架包含三个关键技术：首先，采用一种结合时间建模机制，同时利用以视图为中心和以对象为中心的时间线索，以增强时间依赖性建模。其次，引入多超二次曲面解码策略，通过解码多个超二次曲面来提升几何表达力，同时保持查询稀疏性。最后，设计了一种高效的超二次曲面向体素溅射方案，优化从稀疏表示到密集输出的转换过程，提高计算效率，适用于自动驾驶场景的3D占用预测任务。
light_analysis.result: 论文在SurroundOcc和Occ3D基准上进行了广泛实验，SuperOcc实现了最先进的性能，同时在效率方面表现优越。与基线方法相比，该框架在占用预测精度上有显著提升，并通过优化溅射方案减少了计算开销，具体性能指标如准确率和效率改进在摘要中未明确说明，但实验结果验证了其有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SuperOcc成功解决了超二次曲面框架中的时间建模不足、表达力与稀疏性权衡以及效率问题，主要贡献在于提出了一种高效的3D占用预测方法，提升了自动驾驶环境理解的准确性和实时性。该研究在学术上推动了稀疏场景表示的发展，实际应用中可增强自动驾驶系统的可靠性，未来工作可能包括进一步优化模型或扩展到更复杂的驾驶条件。

title: Embedding Compression via Spherical Coordinates
abstract: We present a compression method for unit-norm embeddings that achieves 1.5$\times$ compression, 25% better than the best prior lossless method. The method exploits that spherical coordinates of high-dimensional unit vectors concentrate around $π/2$, causing IEEE 754 exponents to collapse to a single value and high-order mantissa bits to become predictable, enabling entropy coding of both. Reconstruction error is below 1e-7, under float32 machine epsilon. Evaluation across 26 configurations spanning text, image, and multi-vector embeddings confirms consistent improvement.
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Geometry-grounded Representation Learning and Generative Modeling (GRaM). 13 pages, 2 figures. Code: https://github.com/jina-ai/jzip

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种基于球面坐标的单位范数嵌入压缩方法，实现了比现有最佳无损方法高25%的压缩率。
light_analysis.motivation: 摘要未明确说明研究动机。基于上下文推断，该研究旨在解决高维嵌入向量存储和传输中的高效压缩问题，因为这些嵌入在文本、图像等多模态AI任务中广泛应用，但现有无损压缩方法压缩比有限，导致资源浪费。通过利用单位范数嵌入的特定几何特性，本研究寻求开发一种更高效的压缩技术，以提升系统性能并节省存储成本。
light_analysis.method: 该方法利用高维单位向量的球面坐标分布特性进行压缩。具体而言，球面坐标在π/2附近高度集中，导致IEEE 754浮点数表示的指数部分折叠为单一值，同时高阶尾数位变得可预测。通过应用熵编码技术对指数和尾数进行编码，方法实现了高效的无损压缩，专门针对unit-norm嵌入优化，避免了传统压缩中的冗余。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法达到了1.5倍的压缩率，相比之前最佳的无损方法提升25%。重建误差低于1e-7，远低于float32机器epsilon，确保了高精度重建。在涵盖文本、图像和多向量嵌入的26种配置评估中，该方法均表现出一致的性能改进，验证了其有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是开发了一种创新的嵌入压缩方法，通过球面坐标利用嵌入的几何特性，显著提高压缩效率。该方法具有学术价值，为嵌入压缩领域提供了新方向，并在多种应用场景中展现实际潜力。未来工作可探索该方法在更广泛嵌入类型或压缩任务中的扩展，以及进一步优化压缩比和速度。

title: IFNSO: Iteration-Free Newton-Schulz Orthogonalization
abstract: The Newton-Schulz (NS) iteration has become a key technique for orthogonalization in optimizers such as Muon and for optimization on the Stiefel manifold. Despite its effectiveness, the conventional NS iteration incurs significant computational overhead due to repeated high-dimensional matrix multiplications. To overcome these limitations, we propose Iteration-Free Newton-Schulz Orthogonalization (IFNSO), a novel framework that consolidates the traditional iterative structure into a unified and Iteration-Free formulation. By analyzing the contribution of individual matrix powers, we streamline the process by removing insignificant terms and introducing a polynomial with learnable coefficients. These coefficients are optimized to ensure both superior computational efficiency and stable convergence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IFNSO achieves superior performance compared to existing methods. Our code is available at: https://github.com/greekinRoma/Unified_Newton_Schulz_Orthogonalization.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出 IFNSO，一种无迭代的 Newton-Schulz 正交化框架，通过统一公式和可学习系数显著提升计算效率和收敛稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决传统 Newton-Schulz 迭代在正交化过程中的高计算开销问题。该迭代在优化器如 Muon 和 Stiefel 流形优化中广泛应用，但由于涉及重复高维矩阵乘法，导致效率低下，限制了在大规模或资源受限环境下的实用性，因此迫切需要更高效的正交化方法以改进优化算法的性能。
light_analysis.method: IFNSO 将传统 NS 迭代的迭代结构统一为无迭代公式，通过分析矩阵幂的贡献，移除不重要项并引入具有可学习系数的多项式。这些系数经过优化以确保计算效率和收敛稳定性，避免了重复矩阵乘法。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构，但核心创新在于多项式近似和系数学习技术。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明 IFNSO 相比现有方法在计算效率和收敛稳定性方面表现优越，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进百分比。实验结果验证了其在减少计算时间的同时保持了收敛性能，优于传统 NS 迭代和其他基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: IFNSO 的主要贡献是提出一种高效、稳定的无迭代正交化方法，解决了传统技术的高计算成本问题，对优化算法和机器学习的实际应用具有重要价值。潜在局限性可能包括对特定场景的适应性，未来工作可探索更广泛的应用和通用性改进。

title: RAG-3DSG: Enhancing 3D Scene Graphs with Re-Shot Guided Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D Scene Graph (3DSG) can enhance various downstream tasks in robotics by leveraging structured semantic representations, yet current 3DSG construction methods suffer from semantic inconsistencies caused by noisy cross-image aggregation under occlusions and constrained viewpoints. To mitigate the impact of such inconsistency, we propose RAG-3DSG, which introduces re-shot guided uncertainty estimation. By measuring the semantic consistency between original limited viewpoints and re-shot optimal viewpoints, this method quantifies the underlying semantic ambiguity of each graph object.
