Based on this quantification, we devise an Object-level Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that leverages low-uncertainty objects as semantic anchors to retrieve more reliable contextual knowledge, enabling a Vision-Language Model to rectify the predictions of uncertain objects and optimize the final 3DSG. Extensive evaluations across three challenging benchmarks and real-world robot trials demonstrate that RAG-3DSG achieves superior recall and precision, effectively mitigating semantic noise to provide highly reliable scene representations for robotics tasks.

light_analysis.overview: RAG-3DSG通过重新拍摄引导的检索增强生成优化3D场景图的语义一致性，解决遮挡和受限视角下的语义不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前开放词汇3D场景图构建方法在遮挡和受限视角下因跨图像聚合噪声导致语义不一致性，严重影响下游机器人任务的可靠性。该问题的重要性在于语义表示是机器人感知和决策的基础，而现有方法未能有效处理噪声和视角限制，因此研究旨在减少语义噪声，提升场景图质量以支持实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 该方法引入重新拍摄引导的不确定性估计，通过比较原始受限视角和重新拍摄最优视角的语义一致性，量化每个图对象的语义模糊性。基于此，设计对象级检索增强生成（RAG），利用低不确定性对象作为语义锚点检索可靠上下文知识，并借助视觉语言模型修正不确定对象的预测，从而优化最终3D场景图。
light_analysis.result: 在三个挑战性基准和真实世界机器人试验中，RAG-3DSG实现了卓越的召回率和精度，有效减轻语义噪声，提供高度可靠的场景表示。与基线方法相比，该方法在性能指标上表现优异，具体提升体现在更高的召回率和精度上，显著增强了3D场景图的实用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAG-3DSG的主要贡献是通过不确定性估计和对象级RAG优化3D场景图的语义一致性，提升其可靠性和应用价值。研究具有学术意义，为噪声视角下的场景理解提供新方法，并推动机器人感知技术发展。未来工作可扩展至更多场景或改进不确定性模型，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Imagine-then-Plan: Agent Learning from Adaptive Lookahead with World Models
abstract: Recent advances in world models have shown promise for modeling future dynamics of environmental states, enabling agents to reason and act without accessing real environments. Current methods mainly perform single-step or fixed-horizon rollouts, leaving their potential for complex task planning under-exploited. We propose Imagine-then-Plan (\texttt{ITP}), a unified framework for agent learning via lookahead imagination, where an agent's policy model interacts with the learned world model, yielding multi-step ``imagined'' trajectories. Since the imagination horizon may vary by tasks and stages, we introduce a novel adaptive lookahead mechanism by trading off the ultimate goal and task progress. The resulting imagined trajectories provide rich signals about future consequences, such as achieved progress and potential conflicts, which are fused with current observations, formulating a partially \textit{observable} and \textit{imaginable} Markov decision process to guide policy learning. We instantiate \texttt{ITP} with both training-free and reinforcement-trained variants. Extensive experiments across representative agent benchmarks demonstrate that \texttt{ITP} significantly outperforms competitive baselines. Further analyses validate that our adaptive lookahead largely enhances agents' reasoning capability, providing valuable insights into addressing broader, complex tasks. Our code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/loyiv/ITP.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Imagine-then-Plan框架，通过自适应前瞻与世界模型交互，实现代理在多步规划中的高效学习和规划能力提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于世界模型的代理学习方法主要依赖于单步或固定步长的推出，这在处理复杂任务时存在不足，因为不同任务和阶段可能需要不同的前瞻步长。这种局限性限制了代理的规划和推理能力，无法充分利用世界模型的潜力来模拟未来动态，导致在处理长期目标或动态环境时效果不佳。因此，研究旨在解决如何自适应调整想象步长以优化规划效率的问题。
light_analysis.method: ITP框架的核心是让代理的策略模型与学习的世界模型交互，生成多步想象轨迹。关键创新点包括引入自适应前瞻机制，该机制通过平衡最终目标和任务进度来动态调整想象步长。想象轨迹提供未来后果的丰富信号，如进度和冲突，这些信号与当前观察融合，形成部分可观察和可想象的马尔可夫决策过程，用于指导策略学习。论文还实例化了两种变体：训练自由版本和强化训练版本，以适应不同学习场景。
light_analysis.result: 在代表性代理基准测试中，ITP显著优于竞争基线，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进。进一步分析验证，自适应前瞻机制有效提升了代理的推理能力，这表明该方法在处理复杂任务时具有优势，为更广泛的应用程序提供了有价值的洞察。与基线方法的对比强调了其在规划能力上的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: ITP框架通过自适应前瞻和想象轨迹，提升了代理在复杂任务中的学习和规划能力，具有重要的学术价值，为基于世界模型的代理学习提供了统一方法。其实际应用价值在于处理动态和长期规划任务，未来工作可能包括优化前瞻机制或扩展到更多领域，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: GeoMotionGPT: Geometry-Aligned Motion Understanding with Large Language Models
abstract: Discrete motion tokenization has recently enabled Large Language Models (LLMs) to serve as versatile backbones for motion understanding and motion-language reasoning. However, existing pipelines typically decouple motion quantization from semantic embedding learning, linking them solely via token IDs. This approach fails to effectively align the intrinsic geometry of the motion space with the embedding space, thereby hindering the LLM's capacity for nuanced motion reasoning. We argue that alignment is most effective when both modalities share a unified geometric basis. Therefore, instead of forcing the LLM to reconstruct the complex geometry among motion tokens from scratch, we present a novel framework that explicitly enforces orthogonality on both the motion codebook and the LLM embedding space, ensuring that their relational structures naturally mirror each other. Specifically, we employ a decoder-only quantizer with Gumbel-Softmax for differentiable training and balanced codebook usage. To bridge the modalities, we use a sparse projection that maps motion codes into the LLM embedding space while preserving orthogonality. Finally, a two-stage orthonormal regularization schedule enforces soft constraints during tokenizer training and LLM fine-tuning to maintain geometric alignment without hindering semantic adaptation. Extensive experiments show that our framework improves the aggregated Average by 22.4% over the strongest baseline on HumanML3D and by 14.4% on KIT-ML, while ablations confirm the effectiveness of the tokenizer, projection, and regularization designs.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出GeoMotionGPT框架，通过强制执行运动代码本和LLM嵌入空间的正交性，实现几何对齐，从而提升运动理解和运动-语言推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 运动理解在人工智能中具有重要应用，如人机交互和虚拟现实。现有基于离散运动标记化的方法通常将运动量化与语义嵌入学习解耦，仅通过标记ID链接，这导致运动空间的固有几何结构与嵌入空间无法有效对齐，从而限制大型语言模型在精细运动推理上的能力。几何对齐对提升性能至关重要，但现有方法因解耦设计而未能解决此问题，因此需要一种新方法来弥合这一差距。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种新颖框架，通过强制执行正交性来对齐运动空间几何与LLM嵌入空间。首先，采用基于Gumbel-Softmax的解码器专用量化器，实现可微分训练和平衡代码本使用。其次，使用稀疏投影将运动代码映射到LLM嵌入空间，同时保持正交性。最后，设计两阶段正交正则化计划，在标记器训练和LLM微调阶段施加软约束，确保几何对齐而不阻碍语义适应。关键创新点包括几何对齐机制和优化的量化与投影设计。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所提框架在HumanML3D数据集上比最强基线提升了22.4%的聚合平均值，在KIT-ML数据集上提升了14.4%。消融实验验证了量化器、投影和正则化设计的有效性，确认了各组件对性能提升的贡献，展示了框架在运动理解和推理任务上的优越性。摘要未明确说明具体指标细节，但性能提升显著，凸显了几何对齐策略的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了几何对齐框架，通过正交性强制运动空间与LLM嵌入空间对齐，增强了运动理解和推理能力。学术上推动了多模态对齐技术，提高了LLM在运动领域的应用潜力；实际应用价值包括改进人机交互和运动分析系统。潜在局限性可能包括对特定数据集的依赖，未来工作可探索扩展到其他模态或优化泛化能力。

title: Boosting Latent Diffusion Models via Disentangled Representation Alignment
abstract: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) rely heavily on the compressed latent space provided by Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) for high-quality image generation. Recent studies have attempted to obtain generation-friendly VAEs by directly adopting alignment strategies from LDM training, leveraging Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) as representation alignment targets. However, such alignment paradigms overlook the fundamental differences in representational requirements between LDMs and VAEs. Simple feature mapping from local patches to high-dimensional semantics can induce semantic collapse, leading to the loss of fine-grained attributes. In this paper, we reveal a key insight: unlike LDMs that benefit from high-level global semantics, a generation-friendly VAE must possess strong semantic disentanglement capabilities to preserve fine-grained, attribute-level information in a structured manner. To address this discrepancy, we propose the Semantic-Disentangled VAE (Send-VAE). Deviating from previous shallow alignment approaches, Send-VAE introduces a non-linear mapping architecture to effectively bridge the local structures of VAEs and the dense semantics of VFMs, thereby encouraging emergent disentangled properties in the latent space without explicit regularization. Extensive experiments establish a new paradigm for evaluating VAE latent spaces via low-level attribute separability and demonstrate that Send-VAE achieves state-of-the-art generation quality (FID of 1.21) on ImageNet 256x256.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出 Semantic-Disentangled VAE (Send-VAE)，通过解耦表示对齐方法提升潜在扩散模型的图像生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决现有方法在将 Vision Foundation Models 作为对齐目标用于 VAE 训练时，因忽略 LDM 和 VAE 表示需求差异而导致的问题。简单对齐引发语义塌陷，丢失细粒度属性，影响生成质量。现有方法如浅层对齐不能有效保留结构化信息，因此需新方法来提升 VAE 的解耦能力，以支持高质量图像生成。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 Send-VAE，核心创新是引入非线性映射架构，桥接 VAE 的局部结构与 VFM 的密集语义，鼓励潜在空间涌现解耦特性而无须显式正则化。该方法通过结构化保留属性级信息，避免语义塌陷。使用模型如 Variational Autoencoders 和 Vision Foundation Models，但不指定具体数据集或架构细节，摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验在 ImageNet 256x256 上进行，Send-VAE 取得了最先进的生成质量，FID 为 1.21。与基线方法相比，该方法建立了通过低层次属性可分性评估 VAE 潜在空间的新范式，验证了解耦表示对提升图像生成效果的显著作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是开发了 Send-VAE，增强了 VAE 的语义解耦能力，从而提升 LDM 的生成性能。研究具有重要学术价值，提出了评估潜在空间的新方法，实际应用中可改进图像生成质量。潜在局限性如对其他数据集的适用性摘要未明确说明，未来工作可扩展至更多场景或结合其他技术。

title: From Entropy to Epiplexity: Rethinking Information for Computationally Bounded Intelligence
abstract: Can we learn more from data than existed in the generating process itself? Can new and useful information be constructed from merely applying deterministic transformations to existing data? Can the learnable content in data be evaluated without considering a downstream task? On these questions, Shannon information and Kolmogorov complexity come up nearly empty-handed, in part because they assume observers with unlimited computational capacity and do not target the useful information content. In this work, we identify and exemplify three seeming paradoxes in information theory: (1) information cannot be increased by deterministic transformations; (2) information is independent of the order of data; (3) likelihood modeling is merely distribution matching. To shed light on the tension between these results and modern practice, and to quantify the value of data, we introduce epiplexity, a formalization of information capturing what computationally bounded observers can learn from data. Epiplexity captures the structural content in data while excluding time-bounded entropy, the random unpredictable content exemplified by pseudorandom number generators and chaotic dynamical systems. With these concepts, we demonstrate how information can be created with computation, how it depends on the ordering of the data, and how likelihood modeling can produce more complex programs than present in the data generating process itself. We also present practical procedures to estimate epiplexity which we show capture differences across data sources, track with downstream performance, and highlight dataset interventions that improve out-of-distribution generalization. In contrast to principles of model selection, epiplexity provides a theoretical foundation for data selection, guiding how to select, generate, or transform data for learning systems.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出epiplexity概念，重新定义信息以捕捉计算受限智能体能从数据中学到的结构内容，为数据选择提供理论基础。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于传统信息理论（如香农信息和Kolmogorov复杂度）的局限性，它们假设观察者具有无限计算能力，不关注数据中的有用信息，无法量化实际学习系统中的数据价值。论文指出三个看似悖论的现象：信息不能通过确定性变换增加、信息独立于数据顺序、似然建模仅是分布匹配，这揭示了现有方法在现代机器学习实践中的不足，尤其是在评估数据内容和指导数据使用方面的缺陷。因此，需要一种新框架来理解计算受限观察者如何从数据中提取有用信息，以支持更有效的学习和泛化。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法的核心是引入epiplexity，这是一种形式化信息的概念，专门捕捉计算受限观察者能从数据中学到的内容。关键创新点在于区分结构化内容（可通过计算提取的有意义模式）和时间有界熵（如伪随机数生成器产生的随机不可预测内容），从而排除无用的噪音。论文通过理论分析展示了如何利用计算创造信息、信息如何依赖数据顺序，以及似然建模如何产生比数据生成过程本身更复杂的程序。此外，论文还提出了估计epiplexity的实用方法，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，epiplexity能够捕捉不同数据源之间的差异，并有效跟踪下游任务的性能改进，从而突出显示数据集干预（如数据选择或变换）可以改善分布外泛化能力。与传统的模型选择原则相比，epiplexity为数据选择提供了理论基础，指导如何优化数据以提升学习系统效果。摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据（如准确率或效率对比），但强调了epiplexity在评估数据价值方面的实用性，表明其可作为数据驱动的机器学习中的重要工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出epiplexity概念，重新思考信息理论以适应计算受限智能体的需求，为数据选择提供了新框架。学术上，它扩展了信息理论的范畴，强调了计算能力在信息评估中的作用；实际上，可应用于机器学习中的数据预处理、增强和选择，以改善模型泛化和性能。未来工作方向可能包括进一步量化epiplexity在具体应用中的效果，以及探索其在更多场景下的实践方法，但摘要未明确说明局限性或详细未来计划。

title: From Intuition to Calibrated Judgment: A Rubric-Based Expert-Panel Study of Human Detection of LLM-Generated Korean Text
abstract: Distinguishing human-written Korean text from fluent LLM outputs remains difficult even for trained readers, who can over-trust surface well-formedness. We present LREAD, a Korean-specific instantiation of a rubric-based expert-calibration framework for human attribution of LLM-generated text. In a three-phase blind longitudinal study with three linguistically trained annotators, Phase 1 measures intuition-only attribution, Phase 2 introduces criterion-anchored scoring with explicit justifications, and Phase 3 evaluates a limited held-out elementary-persona subset. Majority-vote accuracy improves from 0.60 in Phase 1 to 0.90 in Phase 2, and reaches 10/10 on the limited Phase 3 subset (95% CI [0.692, 1.000]); agreement also increases from Fleiss' $κ$ = -0.09 to 0.82. Error analysis suggests that calibration primarily reduces false negatives on AI essays rather than inducing generalized over-detection. We position LREAD as pilot evidence for within-panel calibration in a Korean argumentative-essay setting. These findings suggest that rubric-scaffolded human judgment can complement automated detectors by making attribution reasoning explicit, auditable, and adaptable.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了LREAD框架，通过基于评分标准的专家校准，显著提升人类对LLM生成的韩语文本的检测准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于区分人类书写与LLM生成的韩语文本在实际应用中具有挑战性，即使训练有素的读者也可能因表面形式的流畅性而过度信任，导致误判。现有人类判断方法多依赖直觉，缺乏可靠性和一致性，自动检测器可能存在不足。该问题在韩语内容验证、学术诚信等领域尤为重要，因此需要发展可校准的人类判断框架来补充自动化方法，提高检测的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用LREAD框架，一个专为韩语设计的基于评分标准的专家校准系统。研究设计为三阶段盲法纵向实验：第一阶段，三名语言训练专家仅凭直觉进行文本归因；第二阶段，引入明确标准的评分系统，要求提供理由；第三阶段，评估保留子集。关键创新在于使用评分标准锚定人类判断，使推理过程透明化和可审计，从而提高判断的一致性和可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，校准后检测性能显著提升。多数投票准确率从第一阶段的0.60增加到第二阶段的0.90，在第三阶段的有限子集上达到完美10/10（95%置信区间[0.692, 1.000]）。注释者间一致性从Fleiss' κ = -0.09提升到0.82，表明高度一致。误差分析表明，校准主要减少了AI生成文本的假阴性错误，而未引发过度检测，验证了框架在提高人类判断准确性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文结论强调LREAD框架作为韩语议论文场景的试点证据，表明评分标准支撑的人类判断可以补充自动检测器，通过使归因推理明确、可审计和可适应，提升检测可靠性。学术上，为人类-AI协作检测提供了新方法；应用上，适用于教育、内容审核等领域。局限性包括样本规模较小，未来可扩展至其他语言和更大数据集，以进一步验证通用性。

title: MorphGS: Morphology-Adaptive Articulated 3D Motion Transfer from Videos
abstract: Transferring articulated motion from monocular videos to rigged 3D characters is challenging due to pose ambiguity in 2D observations and morphological differences between source and target. Existing approaches often follow a reconstruct-then-retarget paradigm, tying transfer quality to intermediate 3D reconstruction and limiting applicability to categories with parametric templates. We propose MorphGS, a framework that formulates motion retargeting as a target-driven analysis-by-synthesis problem, directly optimizing target morphology and pose through image-space supervision. A rig-coupled morphology parameterization factorizes character identity from time-varying joint rotations, while dense 2D-3D correspondences and synthesized views provide complementary structural and multi-view guidance. Experiments on synthetic benchmarks and in-the-wild videos show consistent improvements over baselines.

light_analysis.overview: MorphGS 提出了一个形态自适应的框架，通过图像空间监督直接优化目标角色的形态和姿态，实现高效的3D关节运动转移。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决从单目视频中转移关节运动到3D角色时的核心挑战，包括2D观察的姿态模糊性和源/目标间的形态差异。现有方法普遍采用重建-重定向范式，导致转移质量受限于中间3D重建步骤，且仅适用于具有参数化模板的类别，这限制了方法的实际应用范围和灵活性。因此，需要一个更直接和自适应的解决方案来提高运动转移的准确性和通用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 MorphGS 框架，将运动重定向形式化为目标驱动的分析-合成问题，直接通过图像空间监督优化目标形态和姿态。关键创新点包括使用与绑定耦合的形态参数化来分解角色身份和随时间变化的关节旋转，以及利用密集的2D-3D对应关系和合成视图提供互补的结构性指导和多视角约束。实验在合成基准测试和野外视频上进行，未指定具体数据集，但框架避免了传统重建步骤的局限性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MorphGS 在合成基准测试和野外视频上都相比基线方法取得了持续改进，但摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率或效率数据。这表明该框架在运动转移任务中表现出更高的质量和适用性，尤其是在处理形态差异和姿态模糊性方面优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MorphGS 的主要贡献是开发了一个新型框架，通过目标驱动的分析-合成方法显著改进了3D运动转移，提升了转移质量和泛化能力。该研究具有重要学术价值，为动画和虚拟现实领域提供了更灵活的解决方案，但摘要未明确提及局限性或未来方向，潜在工作可能包括扩展到更多类别或优化计算效率。

title: Agentic Retoucher for Text-To-Image Generation
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models such as SDXL and FLUX have achieved impressive photorealism, yet small-scale distortions remain pervasive in limbs, face, text and so on. Existing refinement approaches either perform costly iterative re-generation or rely on vision-language models (VLMs) with weak spatial grounding, leading to semantic drift and unreliable local edits. To close this gap, we propose Agentic Retoucher, a hierarchical decision-driven framework that reformulates post-generation correction as a human-like perception-reasoning-action loop. Specifically, we design (1) a perception agent that learns contextual saliency for fine-grained distortion localization under text-image consistency cues, (2) a reasoning agent that performs human-aligned inferential diagnosis via progressive preference alignment, and (3) an action agent that adaptively plans localized inpainting guided by user preference. This design integrates perceptual evidence, linguistic reasoning, and controllable correction into a unified, self-corrective decision process. To enable fine-grained supervision and quantitative evaluation, we further construct GenBlemish-27K, a dataset of 6K T2I images with 27K annotated artifact regions across 12 categories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Agentic Retoucher consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in perceptual quality, distortion localization and human preference alignment, establishing a new paradigm for self-corrective and perceptually reliable T2I generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agentic Retoucher框架，通过感知-推理-动作循环的分层决策驱动方法，解决文本到图像生成中的小规模扭曲问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型（如SDXL和FLUX）虽已实现高真实感，但生成图像中普遍存在小规模扭曲，如肢体变形和文本失真。现有改进方法要么依赖昂贵的迭代重新生成，要么使用空间定位较弱的视觉语言模型，导致语义漂移和局部编辑不可靠，影响了T2I技术的实用性和质量。因此，急需一种高效、精确的校正方法，以提升图像生成的可靠性和用户满意度。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Agentic Retoucher框架，采用分层决策驱动设计，将后生成校正重构为感知-推理-动作循环。具体包括：感知代理利用上下文显著性和文本-图像一致性进行细粒度扭曲定位；推理代理通过渐进偏好对齐实现人类对齐推断诊断；动作代理根据用户偏好自适应规划局部修复。该框架整合了多模态信息，实现统一自校正决策。为支持训练和评估，构建了GenBlemish-27K数据集，包含6K T2I图像和12个类别的27K标注扭曲区域。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据，但指出广泛实验显示Agentic Retoucher在感知质量、扭曲定位精度和人类偏好对齐方面，一致优于现有最先进方法。这表明该框架有效改善了图像校正效果，为自校正的T2I生成提供了量化支持，尽管未提供如准确率提升的具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: Agentic Retoucher的主要贡献在于提出了一种创新的分层决策驱动框架，通过整合感知、推理和动作模块，解决了T2I生成中的扭曲问题，并实现了自校正和人类对齐的局部编辑。该研究为T2I领域建立了新范式，同时构建的GenBlemish-27K数据集为未来研究提供了宝贵资源。摘要未明确说明局限性或具体未来方向，但强调其在提升感知可靠性方面的价值。

title: A Language-Agnostic Hierarchical LoRA-MoE Architecture for CTC-based Multilingual ASR
abstract: Large-scale multilingual ASR (mASR) models such as Whisper achieve strong performance but incur high computational and latency costs, limiting their deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. In this study, we propose a lightweight and language-agnostic multilingual ASR system based on a CTC architecture with domain adaptation. Specifically, we introduce a Language-agnostic Hierarchical LoRA-MoE (HLoRA) framework integrated into an mHuBERT-CTC model, enabling end-to-end decoding via LID-posterior-driven LoRA routing. The hierarchical design consists of a multilingual shared LoRA for learning language-invariant acoustic representations and language-specific LoRA experts for modeling language-dependent characteristics. The proposed routing mechanism removes the need for prior language identity information or explicit language labels during inference, achieving true language-agnostic decoding. Experiments on MSR-86K and the MLC-SLM 2025 Challenge datasets demonstrate that HLoRA achieves comparable performance to two-stage inference approaches while reducing RTF by 11.7% and 8.2%, respectively, leading to improved decoding efficiency for low-resource mASR applications.
comment: 5 pages, submitted to IEEE Communications Letters

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种基于CTC架构的轻量级语言无关多语言ASR系统，通过HLoRA框架实现高效端到端解码，显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模多语言ASR模型如Whisper虽性能强大，但计算和延迟成本高，限制其在资源受限边缘设备上的部署。现有方法通常依赖先验语言信息或复杂的多阶段推断流程，增加了系统复杂度和资源消耗，导致低效率。因此，急需开发一种轻量级且无需额外语言识别就能高效解码的mASR系统，以解决边缘计算场景下的实际应用问题。
light_analysis.method: 该研究引入了语言无关层次LoRA-MoE（HLoRA）框架，集成到基于CTC的mHuBERT模型中，采用LID-posterior驱动路由机制实现端到端解码。层次设计包括多语言共享LoRA用于学习语言不变声学表示，以及语言特定LoRA专家处理语言依赖特征。这种路由机制消除了推理时对语言身份信息的需求，实现了真正的语言无关解码，简化了模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在MSR-86K和MLC-SLM 2025数据集上的实验表明，HLoRA模型在性能上与传统的两阶段推断方法相媲美，同时实时因子（RTF）分别降低了11.7%和8.2%。这显著提升了低资源多语言ASR应用的解码效率，减少了计算开销，证明了该方法在保持准确性的同时优化了推断速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过HLoRA框架成功开发了一种轻量级语言无关多语言ASR系统，解决了现有模型在边缘设备部署中的计算瓶颈问题。其主要贡献在于实现了无需语言标签的高效解码，对低资源ASR应用具有重要实际价值，可能推动轻量级语音识别技术的发展。未来工作可扩展至更多语言场景或进一步优化模型效率。

title: Training-Free Global Geometric Association for 4D LiDAR Panoptic Segmentation
abstract: Dominant paradigms for 4D LiDAR panoptic segmentation are usually required to train deep neural networks with large superimposed point clouds or design dedicated modules for instance association. However, these approaches perform redundant point processing and consequently become computationally expensive, yet still overlook the rich geometric priors inherently provided by raw point clouds. To this end, we introduce \textsc{Geo-4D}, a simple yet effective training-free framework that unifies spatial and temporal reasoning, enabling holistic LiDAR perception over long time horizons. Specifically, we propose a global geometric association strategy that establishes consistent instance correspondences by estimating an optimal transformation between instance-level point sets. To mitigate instability caused by structural inconsistencies in point cloud observations, we propose a global geometry-aware soft matching mechanism that enforces spatially coherent point-wise correspondences grounded in the spatial distribution of instance point sets. Furthermore, our carefully designed pipeline, which considers three instance types-static, dynamic, and missing-offers computational efficiency and occlusion-aware matching. Our extensive experiments across both SemanticKITTI and nuScenes demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, even without additional training or extra point cloud inputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个无需训练的全局几何关联框架Geo-4D，用于4D LiDAR全景分割，通过统一空间和时间推理提高效率和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决4D LiDAR全景分割中现有方法的计算效率低下和几何信息利用不足问题。主导方法通常需要训练深度神经网络或设计专用模块，导致计算冗余昂贵，且未充分利用点云的丰富几何先验。在自动驾驶等实际应用中，长期LiDAR感知的准确性和效率是关键挑战，因此开发无需训练、基于几何先验的方法具有重要意义，以克服现有方法在实时性和精度上的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出了Geo-4D框架，一个训练免费的方法，通过全局几何关联策略建立实例级点集之间的最优变换对应关系，统一空间和时间推理。核心创新包括全局几何感知软匹配机制，该机制基于实例点集的空间分布强制点对应，以缓解点云观测中的结构不一致性问题。此外，设计了考虑静态、动态和缺失实例类型的管道，提供计算效率和遮挡感知匹配，实验在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上进行，无需额外点云输入。
light_analysis.result: 论文在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明Geo-4D框架在4D LiDAR全景分割任务中一致优于最先进方法。尽管无需额外训练或额外点云输入，该方法在性能上仍表现出色，突显了利用几何先验的优势。与现有方法相比，Geo-4D在计算效率上有显著提升，同时在分割准确性上也取得了改进，展示了其高效性和有效性，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是提出了一个训练免费的全局几何关联框架Geo-4D，有效利用点云几何先验进行4D LiDAR全景分割。研究具有重要学术价值，为时空感知提供了一种新颖的无监督方法；实际应用上，为自动驾驶等领域提供了高效、可靠的LiDAR感知解决方案。局限性方面，摘要未明确说明潜在问题，但未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂场景或集成其他传感器数据，以进一步提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: EventGPT: Capturing Player Impact from Team Action Sequences Using GPT-Based Framework
abstract: Transfers play a pivotal role in shaping a football club's success, yet forecasting whether a transfer will succeed remains difficult due to the strong context-dependence of on-field performance. Existing evaluation practices often rely on static summary statistics or post-hoc value models, which fail to capture how a player's contribution adapts to a new tactical environment or different teammates. To address this gap, we introduce EventGPT, a player-conditioned, value-aware next-event prediction model built on a GPT-style autoregressive transformer. Our model treats match play as a sequence of discrete tokens, jointly learning to predict the next on-ball action's type, location, timing, and its estimated residual On-Ball Value (rOBV) based on the preceding context and player identity. A key contribution of this framework is the ability to perform counterfactual simulations. By substituting learned player embeddings into new event sequences, we can simulate how a player's behavioral distribution and value profile would change when placed in a different team or tactical structure. Evaluated on five seasons of Premier League event data, EventGPT outperforms existing sequence-based baselines in next-event prediction accuracy and spatial precision. Furthermore, we demonstrate the model's practical utility for transfer analysis through case studies-such as comparing striker performance across different systems and identifying stylistic replacements for specific roles-showing that our approach provides a principled method for evaluating transfer fit.
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 7 tables. To appear in Hudl Performance Insights 2025

light_analysis.overview: EventGPT是一个基于GPT框架的模型，通过预测足球比赛中的下一个事件并进行反事实模拟，以评估球员转会的适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 足球转会对俱乐部成功至关重要，但预测转会成功具有挑战性，因为球员表现强烈依赖于比赛上下文。现有方法如静态统计或事后价值模型，无法有效捕捉球员在新战术环境或不同队友中的适应能力，导致转会决策往往基于不完整信息，影响俱乐部的战略规划。因此，开发一种能够动态模拟球员在不同情境下表现的模型具有重要实际意义，旨在解决现有方法在上下文依赖性处理上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出EventGPT，一个基于GPT风格自回归变换器的球员条件化、价值感知下一个事件预测模型。模型将足球比赛处理为离散令牌序列，学习预测下一个触球动作的类型、位置、时间和估计的残余触球价值（rOBV），基于先前上下文和球员身份。关键创新是引入反事实模拟能力：通过学习到的球员嵌入，可以将其替换到新事件序列中，模拟球员在不同队伍或战术结构中的行为分布和价值变化。该方法使用五个赛季的英超联赛事件数据进行训练，实现上下文相关的预测。
light_analysis.result: 在五个赛季的英超联赛事件数据上进行评估，EventGPT在下一个事件预测准确性和空间精度方面优于现有序列基线方法。摘要未明确具体数据，但模型表现出显著改进。此外，通过案例研究，如比较前锋在不同系统中的表现和识别特定角色的风格替代者，证明了模型在转会分析中的实际应用价值，为评估转会适应性提供了原则性方法，展示了其超越纯预测功能的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EventGPT的主要贡献在于提出了一个基于GPT的框架，结合序列预测和反事实模拟，为评估球员转会适应性提供了数据驱动的方法。学术上，它推动了事件序列建模和上下文依赖分析的进展；应用上，可辅助足球俱乐部优化转会决策，提升战略规划效率。局限性方面，摘要未明确说明，但未来工作可能包括扩展到更多体育领域或集成更复杂的战术因素。

title: SoliReward: Mitigating Susceptibility to Reward Hacking and Annotation Noise in Video Generation Reward Models
abstract: Post-training alignment of video generation models with human preferences is a critical goal. Developing effective Reward Models (RMs) for this process faces significant methodological hurdles. Current data collection paradigms, reliant on in-prompt pairwise annotations, suffer from labeling noise. Concurrently, the architectural design of VLM-based RMs, particularly their output mechanisms, remains underexplored. Furthermore, RM is susceptible to reward hacking in post-training. To mitigate these limitations, we propose SoliReward, a systematic framework for video RM training. Our framework first sources high-quality, cost-efficient data via single-item binary annotations, then constructs preference pairs using a cross-prompt pairing strategy. Architecturally, we employ a Hierarchical Progressive Query Attention mechanism to enhance feature aggregation. Finally, we introduce a modified BT loss that explicitly accommodates win-tie scenarios. This approach regularizes the RM's score distribution for positive samples, providing more nuanced preference signals to alleviate over-focus on a small number of top-scoring samples. Our approach is validated on benchmarks evaluating physical plausibility, subject deformity, and semantic alignment, demonstrating improvements in direct RM evaluation metrics and in the efficacy of post-training on video generation models. Code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/lian700/SoliReward.

light_analysis.overview: SoliReward框架通过系统化方法减轻视频生成奖励模型中奖励黑客攻击和标注噪声的敏感性，提升对齐人类偏好的效能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成模型训练后对齐人类偏好是关键目标，但现有奖励模型面临显著挑战。数据收集依赖成对标注易引入标签噪声，降低偏好信号质量；视觉语言模型为基础的奖励模型架构设计不足，输出机制未充分探索，且模型易受奖励黑客攻击，导致过度优化少数高分样本。这些问题限制了奖励模型的可靠性和视频生成质量的提升，亟需改进以增强鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: SoliReward框架采用多步骤方法：首先，通过单项目二元标注收集高质量、成本效益的数据，并利用跨提示配对策略构建偏好对，减少标注噪声。架构上，引入分层渐进查询注意力机制，增强特征聚合能力，优化视觉语言模型输出。损失函数方面，修改Bradley-Terry损失以显式处理win-tie场景，正则化正样本分数分布，提供更细致的偏好信号，缓解对高分样本的过关注，从而提升模型泛化性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在评估物理可能性、主体畸形和语义对齐的基准上进行验证，SoliReward在直接奖励模型评估指标上表现出改进，并在视频生成模型训练后效果中提升效能。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标提升数值，如准确率或效率改进百分比，但表明相较于基线方法有显著优势，展示了在减少奖励黑客和噪声影响方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出SoliReward框架，系统化解决奖励模型训练中的奖励黑客攻击和标注噪声问题，贡献在于数据收集策略优化、架构创新和损失函数改进。学术上为视频生成对齐提供新方法，推动奖励模型设计研究；实际应用中能提升奖励模型鲁棒性，改善视频生成质量。未来工作可探索扩展至其他生成任务或进一步优化计算效率，以适应更广泛场景。

title: Setting the Stage: Text-Driven Scene-Consistent Image Generation
abstract: We focus on the foundational task of Scene Staging: given a reference scene image and a text condition specifying an actor category to be generated in the scene and its spatial relation to the scene, the goal is to synthesize an output image that preserves the same scene identity as the reference image while correctly generating the actor according to the spatial relation described in the text. Existing methods struggle with this task, largely due to the scarcity of high-quality paired data and unconstrained generation objectives. To overcome the data bottleneck, we propose a novel data construction pipeline that combines real-world photographs, entity removal, and image-to-video diffusion models to generate training pairs with diverse scenes, viewpoints and correct entity-scene relationships. Furthermore, we introduce a novel correspondence-guided attention loss that leverages cross-view cues to enforce spatial alignment with the reference scene. Experiments on our scene-consistent benchmark show that our approach achieves better scene alignment and text-image alignment than state-of-the-art baselines, according to both automatic metrics and human preference studies. Our method generates images with diverse viewpoints and compositions while faithfully following the textual instructions and preserving the reference scene identity.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种文本驱动的场景一致图像生成方法，通过创新数据构建流程和对应引导注意力损失，解决场景布置任务中的数据稀缺和生成不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 场景布置任务要求根据参考图像和文本条件生成场景一致的图像，现有方法因缺乏高质量配对数据和无约束生成目标而表现不佳。高质量数据稀缺限制了模型学习实体与场景的正确空间关系，导致生成图像往往与参考场景不一致或不遵循文本描述。此问题在增强现实、图像编辑等应用中具有重要意义，但现有技术难以保证场景身份的保持和空间对齐的精确性，需要更有效的方法来克服数据瓶颈和生成约束。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括两个关键部分：一是新颖的数据构建流程，结合真实世界照片、实体移除技术和图像到视频扩散模型，自动生成多样化的训练数据对，涵盖不同场景、视角和正确的实体-场景关系。二是提出对应引导注意力损失，利用跨视图线索来强制生成图像与参考场景在空间上的对齐，通过注意力机制优化模型以更好地理解文本指令中的空间关系，从而提升场景一致性和文本-图像对齐性能。
light_analysis.result: 在自建场景一致性基准上的实验表明，所提方法在场景对齐和文本-图像对齐方面均优于最先进的基线模型。自动评估指标和人类偏好研究均证实了其优越性，生成图像不仅忠实遵循文本指令和保留参考场景身份，还能产生多样化的视角和构图，显示出更好的泛化能力和实用性，摘要未明确说明具体准确率数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于提出了一种有效的场景一致图像生成框架，解决了数据瓶颈和生成不一致问题，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。方法在保持场景身份的同时实现空间对齐，为图像合成和编辑任务提供了新思路。未来工作可扩展到更复杂的场景和多对象生成，并进一步优化模型的效率和鲁棒性，以应对更广泛的应用场景。

title: From Particles to Fields: Reframing Photon Mapping with Continuous Gaussian Photon Fields
abstract: Accurately modeling light transport is essential for realistic image synthesis. Photon mapping provides physically grounded estimates of complex global illumination effects such as caustics and specular-diffuse interactions, yet its per-view radiance estimation remains computationally inefficient when rendering multiple views of the same scene. The inefficiency arises from independent photon tracing and stochastic kernel estimation at each viewpoint, leading to inevitable redundant computation. To accelerate multi-view rendering, we reformulate photon mapping as a continuous and reusable radiance function. Specifically, we introduce the Gaussian Photon Field (GPF), a learnable representation that encodes photon distributions as anisotropic 3D Gaussian primitives parameterized by position, rotation, scale, and spectrum. GPF is initialized from physically traced photons in the first SPPM iteration and optimized using multi-view supervision of final radiance, distilling photon-based light transport into a continuous field. Once trained, the field enables differentiable radiance evaluation along camera rays without repeated photon tracing or iterative refinement. Extensive experiments on scenes with complex light transport, such as caustics and specular-diffuse interactions, demonstrate that GPF attains photon-level accuracy while reducing computation by orders of magnitude, unifying the physical rigor of photon-based rendering with the efficiency of neural scene representations.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出Gaussian Photon Field (GPF)，通过将光子映射重构为连续可重用的辐射函数，显著加速多视角渲染。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确建模光传输对真实感图像合成至关重要。光子映射方法虽然能物理基础地估计复杂全局光照效果如焦散和镜面-漫反射交互，但在渲染同一场景的多个视角时，计算效率低下。这是因为每个视角独立进行光子追踪和随机核估计，导致不可避免的冗余计算。现有方法在处理多视角时效率不足，限制了实际应用，因此需要一种更高效的解决方案来优化这一过程。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入Gaussian Photon Field (GPF)作为核心方法，这是一种可学习表示，将光子分布编码为各向异性的3D Gaussian原语，参数包括位置、旋转、尺度和光谱。GPF从第一次SPPM迭代的物理追踪光子初始化，并通过多视角监督优化，蒸馏基于光子的光传输为连续场。关键创新点在于将光子映射重构为连续可重用的辐射函数，训练后能进行可微辐射评估，无需重复光子追踪或迭代优化。
light_analysis.result: 在包含复杂光传输场景（如焦散和镜面-漫反射交互）的广泛实验中，GPF达到光子级精度，同时计算量减少几个数量级。与基线光子映射方法相比，该方法显著减少了冗余计算，统一了基于光子渲染的物理严谨性和神经场景表示的高效性。摘要未提供具体性能数据，但强调了效率和精度的显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出GPF，将光子映射从粒子表示转为连续场表示，加速多视角渲染，结合了物理准确性和计算效率。这一研究在计算机图形学领域具有重要学术和实用价值，为高效全局光照渲染提供了新思路。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来方向，但可推断未来工作可能探索该方法的泛化能力和更多应用场景。

title: STAGE: Storyboard-Anchored Generation for Cinematic Multi-shot Narrative
abstract: While recent advancements in generative models have achieved remarkable visual fidelity in video synthesis, creating coherent multi-shot narratives remains a significant challenge. To address this, keyframe-based approaches have emerged as a promising alternative to computationally intensive end-to-end methods, offering the advantages of fine-grained control and greater efficiency. However, these methods often fail to maintain cross-shot consistency and capture cinematic language. In this paper, we introduce STAGE, a SToryboard-Anchored GEneration workflow to reformulate the keyframe-based multi-shot video generation task. Instead of using sparse keyframes, we propose STEP2 to predict a structural storyboard composed of start-end frame pairs for each shot. We introduce the multi-shot memory pack to ensure long-range entity consistency, the dual-encoding strategy for intra-shot coherence, and the two-stage training scheme to learn cinematic inter-shot transition. We also contribute the large-scale ConStoryBoard dataset, including high-quality movie clips with fine-grained annotations for story progression, cinematic attributes, and human preferences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that STAGE achieves superior performance in structured narrative control and cross-shot coherence. Our code will be available at this url.

light_analysis.overview: STAGE通过故事板锚定生成工作流，引入结构化故事板预测和一致性机制，显著提升多镜头视频叙事的连贯性和电影感。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管生成模型在视频合成方面已实现视觉逼真，但创建连贯的多镜头叙事仍是一大挑战。现有基于关键帧的方法虽然提供细粒度控制和高效性，但往往无法维持跨镜头一致性并捕捉电影语言，导致生成的视频缺乏自然叙事感。因此，需要改进方法以解决这些问题，提升复杂视频内容的质量和实用性。
light_analysis.method: STAGE工作流重新定义了基于关键帧的多镜头视频生成任务，采用STEP2预测每个镜头的结构化故事板，由起始-结束帧对组成。为确保跨镜头实体一致性，引入多镜头记忆包；通过双编码策略增强镜头内连贯性；并设计两阶段训练方案学习电影化的镜头间过渡。此外，构建了ConStoryBoard数据集，包含高质量电影剪辑的细粒度注释，支持模型训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，STAGE在结构化叙事控制和跨镜头一致性方面表现出卓越性能。相比现有方法，它能生成更连贯、更具电影感的视频内容，有效解决了跨镜头不一致的问题。然而，摘要未明确提供具体的性能指标如准确率或效率数据，基于现有信息推断其效果显著且优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAGE的主要贡献在于提出创新工作流，利用故事板锚定生成提升多镜头视频叙事质量，学术上推动了生成模型在复杂叙事任务中的应用，实际价值体现在电影制作和视频创作等领域。未来工作可进一步优化模型效率，整合更多电影语言元素，或扩展到其他视频生成任务以探索更广泛应用。

title: MatAnyone 2: Scaling Video Matting via a Learned Quality Evaluator
abstract: Video matting remains limited by the scale and realism of existing datasets. While leveraging segmentation data can enhance semantic stability, the lack of effective boundary supervision often leads to segmentation-like mattes lacking fine details. To this end, we introduce a learned Matting Quality Evaluator (MQE) that assesses semantic and boundary quality of alpha mattes without ground truth. It produces a pixel-wise evaluation map that identifies reliable and erroneous regions, enabling fine-grained quality assessment. The MQE scales up video matting in two ways: (1) as an online matting-quality feedback during training to suppress erroneous regions, providing comprehensive supervision, and (2) as an offline selection module for data curation, improving annotation quality by combining the strengths of leading video and image matting models. This process allows us to build a large-scale real-world video matting dataset, VMReal, containing 28K clips and 2.4M frames. To handle large appearance variations in long videos, we introduce a reference-frame training strategy that incorporates long-range frames beyond the local window for effective training. Our MatAnyone 2 achieves state-of-the-art performance on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks, surpassing prior methods across all metrics.

light_analysis.overview: MatAnyone 2通过引入学习的抠图质量评估器（MQE）和构建大规模真实世界视频抠图数据集VMReal，扩展了视频抠图的可扩展性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频抠图任务受限于现有数据集的规模和真实性，导致抠图结果缺乏精细细节。现有方法在利用分割数据增强语义稳定性时，由于缺少有效的边界监督，常产生类似分割的粗糙抠图，这限制了抠图质量的实际应用。为了解决这一问题，研究提出引入一个无需地面实况的质量评估器来改善监督和数据处理，以提升抠图精度和数据集构建。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一个学习的抠图质量评估器（MQE），它能在没有地面实况的情况下评估alpha遮罩的语义和边界质量，生成像素级评估图以识别可靠和错误区域。MQE用于训练中作为在线反馈，提供全面监督来抑制错误区域；同时作为离线模块用于数据筛选，结合领先视频和图像抠图模型的优势提高标注质量。此外，针对长视频中的外观变化，引入了参考帧训练策略，整合超出局部窗口的长范围帧以增强训练效果。
light_analysis.result: MatAnyone 2在合成和真实世界的基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，在所有指标上超越先前方法。摘要未明确说明具体的准确率提升或效率改进等详细数据，但强调了性能的全面领先，表明该方法在提高抠图质量方面具有显著效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过引入MQE和构建VMReal数据集，显著提升了视频抠图的精确性和可扩展性，为抠图任务提供了有效的监督机制和数据增强方法。研究具有学术创新价值，并推动视频编辑等实际应用。未来工作可进一步优化MQE的评估精度或扩展其到其他视觉任务中，以应对更复杂场景。

title: sim2art: Accurate Articulated Object Modeling from a Single Video using Synthetic Training Data Only
abstract: Understanding articulated objects from monocular video is a crucial yet challenging task in robotics and digital twin creation. Existing methods often rely on complex multi-view setups, high-fidelity object scans, or fragile long-term point tracks that frequently fail in casual real-world captures. In this paper, we present sim2art, a data-driven framework that recovers the 3D part segmentation and joint parameters of articulated objects from a single monocular video captured by a freely moving camera. Our core insight is a robust representation based on per-frame surface point sampling, which we augment with short-term scene flow and DINOv3 semantic features. Unlike previous works that depend on error-prone long-term correspondences, our representation is easy to obtain and exhibits a negligible difference between simulation and reality without requiring domain adaptation. Also, by construction, our method relies on single-viewpoint visibility, ensuring that the geometric representation remains consistent across synthetic and real data despite noise and occlusions. Leveraging a suitable Transformer-based architecture, sim2art is trained exclusively on synthetic data yet generalizes strongly to real-world sequences. To address the lack of standardized benchmarks in the field, we introduce two datasets featuring a significantly higher diversity of object categories and instances than prior work. Our evaluations show that sim2art effectively handles large camera motions and complex articulations, outperforming state-of-the-art optimization-based and tracking-dependent methods. sim2art offers a scalable solution that can be easily extended to new object categories without the need for cumbersome real-world annotations. Project webpage: https://aartykov.github.io/sim2art/

light_analysis.overview: sim2art提出一种仅用合成数据训练的框架，从单目视频中准确恢复铰接物体的3D部分分割和关节参数，解决了现有方法依赖复杂设置和易失败的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器人和数字孪生领域，从单目视频理解铰接物体是关键技术，但现有方法依赖复杂多视角设置、高保真对象扫描或易碎的长时点轨迹，这些在真实世界捕获中常失败，限制了实际应用。因此，需要一种更鲁棒、易于获取的解决方案，仅使用单目视频建模，避免繁琐的数据采集和复杂硬件。
light_analysis.method: sim2art的核心是基于每帧表面点采样的鲁棒表示，结合短期场景流和DINOv3语义特征进行增强，避免了易错的长时对应关系。该方法采用Transformer架构，训练时完全依赖合成数据，无需域适应，利用单视角可见性确保模拟和真实数据之间的几何一致性。此外，框架通过引入多样性数据集支持训练和评估，增强了可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: sim2art在评估中有效处理大相机运动和复杂铰接，优于现有的优化基和依赖跟踪的方法，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升。论文引入了两个新数据集，提供比先前工作更高多样性的对象类别和实例，支持了泛化能力的验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: sim2art的主要贡献在于提供了一种可扩展的铰接物体建模方法，仅使用合成数据训练，无需真实世界标注，便于扩展到新对象类别。这项研究在学术上推动了单目视频分析和合成数据应用，实际应用中可提升机器人和数字孪生的效率，但潜在局限性如对特定噪声或遮挡的鲁棒性摘要未明确说明。

title: Live Avatar: Streaming Real-time Audio-Driven Avatar Generation with Infinite Length
abstract: Audio-driven avatar interaction demands real-time, streaming, and infinite-length generation -- capabilities fundamentally at odds with the sequential denoising and long-horizon drift of current diffusion models. We present Live Avatar, an algorithm-system co-designed framework that addresses both challenges for a 14-billion-parameter diffusion model. On the algorithm side, a two-stage pipeline distills a pretrained bidirectional model into a causal, few-step streaming one, while a set of complementary long-horizon strategies eliminate identity drift and visual artifacts, enabling stable autoregressive generation exceeding 10000 seconds. On the system side, Timestep-forcing Pipeline Parallelism (TPP) assigns each GPU a fixed denoising timestep, converting the sequential diffusion chain into an asynchronous spatial pipeline that simultaneously boosts throughput and improves temporal consistency. Live Avatar achieves 45 FPS with a TTFF of 1.21\,s on 5 H800 GPUs, and to our knowledge is the first to enable practical real-time streaming of a 14B diffusion model for infinite-length avatar generation. We further introduce GenBench, a standardized long-form benchmark, to facilitate reproducible evaluation. Our project page is at https://liveavatar.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Live Avatar框架，首次实现140亿参数扩散模型的实时流式无限长度音频驱动虚拟形象生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 音频驱动的虚拟形象交互需要实时、流式和无限长度的生成能力，但当前扩散模型存在顺序去噪和长时漂移问题，导致延迟和视觉伪影，限制了实际应用。现有方法难以满足实时性和稳定性需求，因此亟需克服这些挑战以实现高效的虚拟现实交互系统。
light_analysis.method: Live Avatar采用算法系统协同设计。算法方面，通过两阶段管道将预训练的双向扩散模型蒸馏为因果、少步的流式模型，并应用长时策略消除身份漂移和视觉伪影，支持稳定自回归生成。系统方面，引入Timestep-forcing Pipeline Parallelism (TPP)，将顺序扩散链转换为异步空间管道，每个GPU处理固定去噪时间步，提升吞吐量和时间一致性，无需额外数据集或模型架构细节说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，在5个H800 GPU上，Live Avatar实现45 FPS的生成速度，首次帧时间（TTFF）为1.21秒，并成功生成超过10000秒的稳定虚拟形象内容。相较于基线扩散模型，该框架显著优化了实时性能和生成长度，成为首个实用化的140亿参数扩散模型流式生成方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献包括提出创新的算法系统框架，解决扩散模型在实时流式无限长度生成中的关键问题，具有推动虚拟现实应用的学术和实际价值。引入GenBench基准促进长表单生成的可重复评估；未来工作可能包括进一步优化效率或扩展应用场景，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: GENA3D: Generative Amodal 3D Modeling by Bridging 2D Priors and 3D Coherence
abstract: Generating complete 3D objects under partial occlusions (i.e., amodal scenarios) is a practically important yet challenging problem, as large portions of object geometry are unobserved in real-world scenarios. Existing approaches either operate directly in 3D, which ensures geometric consistency but often lacks generative expressiveness, or rely on 2D amodal completion, which provides strong appearance priors but does not guarantee reliable 3D structure. This raises a key question: how can we achieve both generative plausibility and geometric coherence in amodal 3D modeling? To answer this question, we introduce GENA3D (GENarative Amodal 3D), a framework that integrates learned 2D generative priors with explicit 3D geometric reasoning within a conditional 3D generation paradigm. The 2D priors enable the model to plausibly infer diverse occluded content, while the 3D representation enforces multi-view consistency and spatial validity. Our design incorporates a novel View-Wise Cross-Attention for multi-view alignment and a Stereo-Conditioned Cross-Attention to anchor generative predictions in 3D relationships. By combining generative imagination with structural constraints, GENA3D generates complete and coherent 3D objects from limited observations without sacrificing geometric fidelity. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches in both synthetic and real-world amodal scenarios, highlighting the effectiveness of bridging 2D priors and 3D coherence in generating plausible and geometrically consistent 3D structures in complex environments.

light_analysis.overview: GENA3D通过融合2D生成先验与3D几何推理，在部分遮挡下生成几何一致且生成合理的3D对象模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 在现实场景中，物体常被部分遮挡，生成完整3D几何（即amodal建模）对机器人学、增强现实等应用至关重要。现有方法存在局限：直接3D方法能保证几何一致性但生成能力不足，而基于2D amodal完成的方法提供强外观先验却无法保证可靠3D结构。这导致一个问题：如何在amodal 3D建模中同时实现生成合理性和几何一致性，而现有方案难以平衡这两方面。
light_analysis.method: GENA3D采用条件3D生成框架，集成学习的2D生成先验和显式3D几何推理。关键创新包括View-Wise Cross-Attention，用于对齐多视图信息以增强一致性；以及Stereo-Conditioned Cross-Attention，通过立体条件锚定生成预测于3D关系。2D先验帮助合理推断遮挡内容，3D表示则强制执行多视图一致性和空间有效性，从而在有限观测下生成完整且连贯的3D对象。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GENA3D在合成和真实世界的amodal场景中均优于现有方法，有效生成合理且几何一致的3D结构。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率或效率数据），但强调该方法在复杂环境中成功平衡了生成想象与结构约束，并通过对比验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出GENA3D框架，巧妙融合2D生成先验和3D几何推理，解决了amodal 3D建模中的生成与一致性权衡问题。学术上，该方法为3D生成领域提供了新思路，强调跨模态信息整合；实践中，可用于自动驾驶、虚拟现实等需要处理遮挡的应用。未来工作可扩展至更多场景或集成更先进的生成模型。

title: SKEL-CF: Coarse-to-Fine Biomechanical Skeleton and Surface Mesh Recovery
abstract: Parametric 3D human models such as SMPL have driven significant advances in human pose and shape estimation, yet their simplified kinematics limit biomechanical realism. The recently proposed SKEL model addresses this limitation by re-rigging SMPL with an anatomically accurate skeleton. However, estimating SKEL parameters directly remains challenging due to limited training data, perspective ambiguities, and the inherent complexity of human articulation. We introduce SKEL-CF, a coarse-to-fine framework for SKEL parameter estimation. SKEL-CF employs a transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture, where the encoder predicts coarse camera and SKEL parameters, and the decoder progressively refines them in successive layers. To ensure anatomically consistent supervision, we convert the existing SMPL-based dataset 4DHuman into a SKEL-aligned version, 4DHuman-SKEL, providing high-quality training data for SKEL estimation. In addition, to mitigate depth and scale ambiguities, we explicitly incorporate camera modeling into the SKEL-CF pipeline and demonstrate its importance across diverse viewpoints. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed design. On the challenging MOYO dataset, SKEL-CF achieves 85.0 MPJPE / 51.4 PA-MPJPE, significantly outperforming the previous SKEL-based state-of-the-art HSMR (104.5 / 79.6). These results establish SKEL-CF as a scalable and anatomically faithful framework for human motion analysis, facilitating the use of computer vision techniques in biomechanics-related analysis. Our implementation is available on the project page: https://pokerman8.github.io/SKEL-CF/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SKEL-CF框架，通过从粗到细策略估计解剖学准确的SKEL参数，提升3D人体姿态估计的生物力学真实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参数化3D人体模型如SMPL在人体姿态和形状估计中取得进展，但简化运动学导致生物力学真实性不足。SKEL模型通过引入解剖学准确骨架解决此问题，但直接估计其参数面临训练数据有限、透视模糊性及人体关节复杂性的挑战，限制实际应用。这需要开发更有效的方法来克服数据不足和模糊性问题，推动计算机视觉在生物力学领域的深入应用。
light_analysis.method: SKEL-CF采用从粗到细的估计框架，基于transformer的编码器-解码器架构，编码器预测粗略相机和SKEL参数，解码器在连续层中逐步细化以提升精度。为提供高质量训练数据，将SMPL-based数据集4DHuman转换为SKEL对齐版本4DHuman-SKEL，确保解剖学一致的监督。此外，流程中明确集成相机建模，解决深度和尺度模糊性，验证其在多样化视角下的重要性。
light_analysis.result: 在MOYO数据集上的实验表明，SKEL-CF达到85.0 MPJPE和51.4 PA-MPJPE，显著优于之前的SKEL-based state-of-the-art方法HSMR（104.5 MPJPE和79.6 PA-MPJPE），误差降低明显。这些定量结果验证了SKEL-CF在提升估计准确性和鲁棒性方面的有效性，通过基线对比证实其优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SKEL-CF贡献了一个可扩展且解剖学忠实的人体运动分析框架，通过创新架构和数据增强，克服了SKEL参数估计的挑战。这不仅提升了3D姿态估计的生物力学真实性，还促进了计算机视觉在生物力学相关分析中的应用。未来工作可探索数据集扩展和模型鲁棒性优化。

title: Scale Where It Matters: Training-Free Localized Scaling for Diffusion Models
abstract: Diffusion models have become the dominant paradigm in text-to-image generation, and test-time scaling (TTS) improves sample quality by allocating additional computation at inference. Existing TTS methods, however, resample the entire image, while generation quality is often spatially heterogeneous. This leads to unnecessary computation on regions that are already correct, and localized defects remain insufficiently corrected. In this paper, we explore a new direction - Localized TTS - that adaptively resamples defective regions while preserving high-quality regions, thereby substantially reducing the search space. This raises two challenges: accurately localizing defects and maintaining global consistency. We propose LoTTS, the first fully training-free framework for localized TTS. For defect localization, LoTTS contrasts cross- and self-attention signals under quality-aware prompts (e.g., high-quality vs. low-quality) to identify defective regions, and then refines them into coherent masks. For consistency, LoTTS perturbs only defective regions and denoises them locally, ensuring that corrections remain confined while the rest of the image remains undisturbed. Extensive experiments on SD2.1, SDXL, and FLUX demonstrate that LoTTS achieves state-of-the-art performance: it consistently improves both local quality and global fidelity, while reducing GPU cost by 2-4x compared to Best-of-N sampling. These findings establish localized TTS as a promising new direction for scaling diffusion models at inference time.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了 LoTTS，一个完全无训练的局部测试时间缩放框架，用于扩散模型，通过自适应地改进缺陷区域并降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在文本到图像生成中占据主导地位，测试时间缩放（TTS）通过推理时分配额外计算来提升样本质量，但现有方法需对整个图像重采样，导致在已正确区域进行不必要计算，局部缺陷纠正不足。由于图像质量存在空间异质性，这一问题限制了效率和效果，因此需要更精细的方法来定位和处理缺陷区域，以实现更高效和准确的生成。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 LoTTS 框架，首先在质量感知提示（如高质量与低质量）下，通过对比跨注意力和自注意力信号来识别缺陷区域，并将其细化为连贯掩码。然后，仅对缺陷区域进行扰动和局部去噪，确保全局一致性，避免干扰图像其他部分。关键创新在于无需训练，依赖注意力信号分析实现局部化处理。实验使用 SD2.1、SDXL 和 FLUX 等扩散模型进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 在 SD2.1、SDXL 和 FLUX 模型上的广泛实验显示，LoTTS 实现了最先进的性能：局部图像质量和全局保真度均有显著提升。具体而言，与 Best-of-N 采样基线相比，GPU 成本降低了 2-4 倍。例如，LoTTS 在减少计算开销的同时，有效改善了缺陷区域的校正效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了 LoTTS，一个无训练的局部 TTS 框架，为扩散模型的推理优化提供了新方向。其学术价值在于探索局部化缩放的可能性，实际应用价值体现在降低计算成本、提升图像质量。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到更多模型或应用场景。

title: 3M-TI: High-Quality Mobile Thermal Imaging via Calibration-free Multi-Camera Cross-Modal Diffusion
abstract: The miniaturization of thermal sensors for mobile platforms inherently limits their spatial resolution and textural fidelity, leading to blurry and less informative images. Existing thermal super-resolution (SR) methods can be grouped into single-image and RGB-guided approaches: the former struggles to recover fine structures from limited information, while the latter relies on accurate and laborious cross-camera calibration, which hinders practical deployment and robustness. Here, we propose 3M-TI, a calibration-free Multi-camera cross-Modality diffusion framework for Mobile Thermal Imaging. At its core, 3M-TI integrates a cross-modal self-attention module (CSM) into the diffusion UNet, replacing the original self-attention layers to adaptively align thermal and RGB features throughout the denoising process, without requiring explicit camera calibration. This design enables the diffusion network to leverage its generative prior to enhance spatial resolution, structural fidelity, and texture detail in the super-resolved thermal images. Extensive evaluations on real-world mobile thermal cameras and public benchmarks validate our superior performance, achieving state-of-the-art results in both visual quality and quantitative metrics. More importantly, the thermal images enhanced by 3M-TI lead to substantial gains in critical downstream tasks like object detection and segmentation, underscoring its practical value for robust mobile thermal perception systems. More materials: https://github.com/work-submit/3MTI.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了3M-TI框架，一种无需校准的多相机跨模态扩散方法，用于显著提升移动热成像的图像分辨率、结构保真度和纹理细节。
light_analysis.motivation: 移动热成像传感器因小型化导致空间分辨率和纹理保真度低，产生模糊且信息不足的图像。现有热超分辨率方法中，单图像方法难以从有限信息恢复精细结构，而RGB引导方法依赖繁琐的跨相机校准，增加了部署难度并影响鲁棒性。因此，开发无校准的跨模态超分辨率方法对于增强移动热感知系统的实用性和性能至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 3M-TI框架将跨模态自注意力模块（CSM）集成到扩散UNet网络中，替换原有的自注意力层，从而在去噪过程中自适应地对齐热图像和RGB图像的特征，无需进行显式相机校准。该方法利用扩散网络的生成先验，在增强超分辨率热图像的空间分辨率、结构保真度和纹理细节的同时，避免了复杂的校准步骤，实现了高效的特征融合。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界移动热相机和公共基准数据集上的广泛评估表明，3M-TI在热超分辨率任务中达到了最先进的性能，在视觉质量和定量指标上均表现优异。更重要的是，由3M-TI增强的热图像显著提升了关键下游任务的准确性，如目标检测和分割，证实了其在移动热感知系统中的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了3M-TI框架，一种创新的无校准跨模态扩散方法，解决了移动热成像中的校准依赖问题。学术上，该方法结合扩散模型与自注意力机制，为热超分辨率提供了新途径；应用上，其在下游任务中的显著提升突显了在鲁棒移动感知系统中的潜力，摘要未明确说明潜在的局限性或未来工作方向。

title: CoD: A Diffusion Foundation Model for Image Compression
abstract: Existing diffusion codecs typically build on text-to-image diffusion foundation models like Stable Diffusion. However, text conditioning is suboptimal from a compression perspective, hindering the potential of downstream diffusion codecs, particularly at ultra-low bitrates. To address it, we introduce \textbf{CoD}, the first \textbf{Co}mpression-oriented \textbf{D}iffusion foundation model, trained from scratch to enable end-to-end optimization of both compression and generation. CoD is not a fixed codec but a general foundation model designed for various diffusion-based codecs. It offers several advantages: \textbf{High compression efficiency}, replacing Stable Diffusion with CoD in downstream codecs like DiffC achieves SOTA results, especially at ultra-low bitrates (e.g., 0.0039 bpp); \textbf{Low-cost and reproducible training}, 300$\times$ faster training than Stable Diffusion ($\sim$ 20 vs. $\sim$ 6,250 A100 GPU days) on entirely open image-only datasets; \textbf{Providing new insights}, e.g., We find pixel-space diffusion can achieve VTM-level PSNR with high perceptual quality and can outperform GAN-based codecs using fewer parameters. We hope CoD lays the foundation for future diffusion codec research. Codes are released at https://github.com/microsoft/GenCodec/tree/main/CoD.

light_analysis.overview: CoD是一种专为图像压缩设计的扩散基础模型，通过端到端优化实现高效压缩，创新性地替代了传统的文本条件扩散模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散编解码器通常基于文本到图像的扩散基础模型，如Stable Diffusion，但文本条件从压缩角度看并不最优，尤其是在超低比特率下，这限制了编解码器的性能提升和潜力。因此，开发一种专门针对压缩优化的扩散模型是必要的，以解决现有方法在效率和适应性上的不足，并为图像压缩任务提供更好的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: CoD是一种从头训练的扩散基础模型，专注于图像压缩任务，实现压缩和生成的端到端优化。它作为通用基础模型，可适配多种扩散编解码器。关键技术包括使用纯图像数据集进行训练，训练效率极高，仅需约20 A100 GPU天，比Stable Diffusion的约6,250天快300倍，避免了文本条件的限制，提升了压缩专用性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，CoD在超低比特率下表现卓越，当下游编解码器如DiffC使用CoD替换Stable Diffusion时，实现了最佳性能，例如在0.0039 bpp的指标上。训练速度比Stable Diffusion快300倍。此外，研究发现像素空间扩散能达到VTM级别的PSNR，并在感知质量上超越基于GAN的编解码器，同时使用更少的参数。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoD的主要贡献是提出了首个面向压缩的扩散基础模型，为图像压缩提供了高效、低成本的解决方案，推动了扩散编解码器研究。其学术价值在于揭示扩散模型在压缩任务中的潜力，实际应用价值体现在提升编解码器性能上。未来工作可基于CoD进一步探索压缩优化和更广泛的应用场景。

title: A Tri-Modal Dataset and a Baseline System for Tracking Unmanned Aerial Vehicles
abstract: With the proliferation of low altitude unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), visual multi-object tracking is becoming a critical security technology, demanding significant robustness even in complex environmental conditions. However, tracking UAVs using a single visual modality often fails in challenging scenarios, such as low illumination, cluttered backgrounds, and rapid motion. Although multi-modal multi-object UAV tracking is more resilient, the development of effective solutions has been hindered by the absence of dedicated public datasets. To bridge this gap, we release MM-UAV, the first large-scale benchmark for Multi-Modal UAV Tracking, integrating three key sensing modalities, e.g. RGB, infrared (IR), and event signals. The dataset spans over 30 challenging scenarios, with 1,321 synchronised multi-modal sequences, and more than 2.8 million annotated frames. Accompanying the dataset, we provide a novel multi-modal multi-UAV tracking framework, designed specifically for UAV tracking applications and serving as a baseline for future research. Our framework incorporates two key technical innovations, e.g. an offset-guided adaptive alignment module to resolve spatio mismatches across sensors, and an adaptive dynamic fusion module to balance complementary information conveyed by different modalities. Furthermore, to overcome the limitations of conventional appearance modelling in multi-object tracking, we introduce an event-enhanced association mechanism that leverages motion cues from the event modality for more reliable identity maintenance. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. To foster further research in multi-modal UAV tracking, both the dataset and source code will be made publicly available at https://xuefeng-zhu5.github.io/MM-UAV/.

light_analysis.overview: 本文贡献在于发布首个大规模多模态无人机跟踪数据集MM-UAV，并提出创新框架，通过自适应对齐和事件增强技术提升跟踪鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着低空无人机的普及，视觉多目标跟踪成为关键安全技术，需在复杂环境（如低光照、杂乱背景、快速运动）中保持鲁棒性。现有单一模态跟踪方法在挑战性场景下易失败，而多模态跟踪虽更稳健，却因缺乏专门公共数据集发展受阻。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过提供数据集促进多模态UAV跟踪研究，解决实际安全监控问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个新颖的多模态多UAV跟踪框架，专为UAV跟踪设计，集成RGB、红外和事件三种模态。关键创新包括偏移引导自适应对齐模块，用于解决传感器空间失配问题；自适应动态融合模块，以平衡不同模态的互补信息；以及事件增强关联机制，利用事件线索的运动特性增强身份维护可靠性。框架基于MM-UAV数据集，包含超过30个挑战性场景，提供系统化的技术路线。
light_analysis.result: 通过全面实验验证，提出的框架在MM-UAV数据集上一致优于当前最先进方法。虽然摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进数据，但实验结果强调了框架在复杂场景中的卓越性能，验证了其自适应对齐、动态融合和事件增强关联模块的有效性，表明其在提升跟踪鲁棒性方面具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于发布首个大规模多模态UAV跟踪数据集MM-UAV，并提供创新跟踪框架作为基线系统，填补了领域数据集空白，促进了多模态跟踪技术发展。框架通过自适应对齐、动态融合和事件增强关联机制，提升了跟踪鲁棒性，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力，如安全监控。未来工作可扩展数据集或优化框架以进一步改进性能，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: ConsistCompose: Unified Multimodal Layout Control for Image Composition
abstract: Unified multimodal models that couple visual understanding with image generation have advanced rapidly, yet most systems still focus on visual grounding-aligning language with image regions-while their generative counterpart, linguistic-embedded layout-grounded generation (LELG) for layout-controllable multi-instance generation, remains underexplored and limits precise compositional control. We present ConsistCompose, a unified multimodal framework that embeds layout coordinates directly into language prompts, enabling layout-controlled multi-instance image generation from Interleaved Image-Text within a single generative interface. We further construct ConsistCompose3M, a 3.4M multi-instance generation dataset with layout and identity annotations (2.6M text-guided and 0.8M image-guided data pairs) that provides large-scale supervision for layout-conditioned generation. Within this framework, LELG is instantiated through instance-coordinate binding prompts and coordinate-aware classifier-free guidance, which translate linguistic layout cues into precise spatial control without task-specific branches. Experiments on COCO-Position and MS-Bench show that ConsistCompose substantially improves spatial accuracy over layout-controlled baselines while preserving identity fidelity and competitive general multimodal understanding, establishing a unified paradigm for layout-controllable multimodal image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了ConsistCompose框架，通过将布局坐标直接嵌入语言提示中，实现了统一的布局可控多实例图像生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前统一多模态模型在视觉理解与图像生成方面进展迅速，但多数系统侧重于视觉接地，即将语言与图像区域对齐。然而，其生成对应部分，即布局可控的多实例生成，仍未被充分探索，这限制了精确的组合控制。本研究旨在解决这一问题，因为准确的布局控制对于复杂图像合成至关重要，但现有方法在生成时缺乏有效的空间控制机制，导致在实际应用中难以实现细节化的多实例布局。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了ConsistCompose框架，这是一个统一的多模态系统，它将布局坐标直接嵌入到语言提示中，使得在单个生成接口内实现从交错图像-文本输入进行布局控制的多实例图像生成。关键创新包括构建ConsistCompose3M数据集，包含340万带有布局和身份注释的数据对，提供大规模监督。此外，通过实例-坐标绑定提示和坐标感知的无分类器指导，将语言布局线索转化为精确的空间控制，无需特定任务分支，简化了模型架构并增强了泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO-Position和MS-Bench数据集上的实验表明，ConsistCompose显著提高了空间准确性，相比于布局控制的基线方法。同时，它保持了身份保真度和竞争力的多模态理解能力。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了性能的实质性改进，建立了布局可控多模态图像生成的统一范式，验证了方法在多个基准测试中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了ConsistCompose框架，为布局可控的多实例图像生成建立了一个统一的范式。它的学术价值在于填补了多模态生成中布局控制的研究空白，实际应用价值在于增强图像合成的精确性和可控性。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可以推断未来可能扩展到更多模态或更复杂场景，进一步提升模型的多功能性。

title: SciPostLayoutTree: A Dataset for Structural Analysis of Scientific Posters
abstract: Scientific posters play a vital role in academic communication by presenting ideas through visual summaries. Analyzing reading order and parent-child relations of posters is essential for building structure-aware interfaces that facilitate clear and accurate understanding of research content. Despite their prevalence in academic communication, posters remain underexplored in structural analysis research, which has primarily focused on papers. To address this gap, we constructed SciPostLayoutTree, a dataset of approximately 8,000 posters annotated with reading order and parent-child relations. Compared to an existing structural analysis dataset, SciPostLayoutTree contains more instances of spatially challenging relations, including upward, horizontal, and long-distance relations. As a solution to these challenges, we develop Layout Tree Decoder, which incorporates visual features as well as bounding box features including position and category information. The model also uses beam search to predict relations while capturing sequence-level plausibility. Experimental results demonstrate that our model improves the prediction accuracy for spatially challenging relations and establishes a solid baseline for poster structure analysis. The dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/omron-sinicx/scipostlayouttree. The code is also publicly available at https://github.com/omron-sinicx/scipostlayouttree.

light_analysis.overview: 本文构建了SciPostLayoutTree数据集并提出Layout Tree Decoder模型，以改进科学海报的结构分析，特别处理空间挑战性关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学海报在学术交流中通过视觉摘要呈现关键信息，其结构分析对于开发结构感知界面以促进内容理解至关重要。然而，现有研究主要聚焦于学术论文，海报的结构分析仍未被充分探索，导致在处理复杂空间关系（如向上、水平和长距离连接）时存在不足。这限制了自动导航和内容提取工具的发展，因此需要构建专用数据集和创新方法来填补这一研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Layout Tree Decoder模型，用于预测海报的阅读顺序和父子关系。该模型整合了视觉特征以及包围框的几何和语义特征，包括位置和组件类别信息。采用波束搜索算法，在预测关系时捕捉序列级整体合理性。数据集SciPostLayoutTree包含约8,000张科学海报，注释了结构关系，特别包含大量空间挑战性实例，如向上、水平和长距离关系，为模型训练提供基础。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Layout Tree Decoder模型显著提高了对空间挑战性关系的预测准确性，包括向上、水平和长距离关系。与现有基线方法相比，该模型在SciPostLayoutTree数据集上建立了坚实的性能基准。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但强调模型在处理复杂空间关系方面的有效性，为海报结构分析领域的后续研究提供了参考。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过公开SciPostLayoutTree数据集和Layout Tree Decoder模型，推动了科学海报结构分析的进展。数据集的丰富标注和模型的创新方法为构建结构感知界面提供了技术支持，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来工作可进一步优化模型性能，或扩展应用到其他视觉文档类型，以促进更广泛的文档理解研究。

title: Illustrator's Depth: Monocular Layer Index Prediction for Image Decomposition
abstract: We introduce Illustrator's Depth, a novel definition of depth that addresses a key challenge in digital content creation: decomposing flat images into editable, ordered layers. Inspired by an artist's compositional process, illustrator's depth infers a layer index to each pixel, forming an interpretable image decomposition through a discrete, globally consistent ordering of elements optimized for editability. We also propose and train a neural network using a curated dataset of layered vector graphics to predict layering directly from raster inputs. Our layer index inference unlocks a range of powerful downstream applications. In particular, it significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines for image vectorization while also enabling high-fidelity text-to-vector-graphics generation, automatic 3D relief generation from 2D images, and intuitive depth-aware editing. By reframing depth from a physical quantity to a creative abstraction, illustrator's depth prediction offers a new foundation for editable image decomposition.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了‘插画师深度’概念，通过预测像素层索引实现图像的可编辑分解和排序，优化下游应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决数字内容创建中的关键挑战：如何将平面图像分解为可编辑且有序的层，以支持高效编辑。现有方法可能难以从单目图像推断全局一致的排序或优化可编辑性，这限制了图像矢量化、合成和编辑等应用的发展。数字内容创作需求日益增长，因此开发更有效的分解工具具有重要实际意义。摘要未明确说明具体现有方法的不足，但强调了可编辑性和全局一致性的关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种新方法，定义‘插画师深度’作为层索引，将深度从物理量重新概念化为创造性抽象，以实现离散、全局一致的像素排序。核心创新点在于优化可编辑性。作者训练了一个神经网络，使用精心策划的分层矢量图形数据集，从栅格输入直接预测层索引。模型架构基于神经网络，旨在自动化图像分解过程，生成可解释的层顺序。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在图像矢量化的基准测试中显著优于当前最先进的基线，展示了优越的性能。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升。此外，它解锁了多种下游应用，包括高保真文本到矢量图形生成、从2D图像自动生成3D浮雕，以及直观的深度感知编辑，这些应用验证了方法的实用性和多任务适用性。与基线对比突显了其在矢量化和编辑任务中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了‘插画师深度’定义，为图像的可编辑分解提供了新基础。学术价值在于创新性地将深度视为创造性抽象，拓展了深度估计的研究方向；实际应用价值体现在增强数字内容创建工具，如矢量化和3D生成。潜在局限性可能包括对特定数据集的依赖或泛化能力挑战；未来工作可扩展到更复杂图像类型或集成其他模态。

title: Off the Planckian Locus: Using 2D Chromaticity to Improve In-Camera Color
abstract: Traditional in-camera colorimetric mapping relies on correlated color temperature (CCT)-based interpolation between pre-calibrated transforms optimized for Planckian illuminants such as CIE A and D65. However, modern lighting technologies such as LEDs can deviate substantially from the Planckian locus, exposing the limitations of relying on conventional one-dimensional CCT for illumination characterization. This paper demonstrates that transitioning from 1D CCT (on the Planckian locus) to a 2D chromaticity space (off the Planckian locus) improves colorimetric accuracy across various mapping approaches. In addition, we replace conventional CCT interpolation with a lightweight multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that leverages 2D chromaticity features for robust colorimetric mapping under non-Planckian illuminants. A lightbox-based calibration procedure incorporating representative LED sources is used to train our MLP. Validated across diverse LED lighting, our method reduces angular reproduction error by 22% on average in LED-lit scenes, maintains backward compatibility with traditional illuminants, accommodates multi-illuminant scenes, and supports real-time in-camera deployment with negligible additional computational cost.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出通过2D色度空间和轻量级多层感知机改进相机内色彩映射，提高非普朗克光源下的色度准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统相机色彩映射依赖于相关色温的一维插值方法，但这在处理现代LED等非普朗克光源时存在局限性，因为这些光源的色度点常偏离普朗克轨迹，导致基于CCT的插值不准确。这在实际应用中影响图像色彩还原质量，尤其在多变照明环境下问题更为突出。因此，研究旨在开发一种能适应非标准光源的色彩映射技术，以弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出从一维CCT转向二维色度空间，并引入轻量级多层感知机进行色彩映射。关键创新在于用MLP替换传统CCT插值，该MLP利用2D色度特征作为输入，通过光盒校准程序训练，使用代表性LED光源数据集学习映射关系。这种方法能够鲁棒地处理非普朗克光源，同时保持计算效率，支持实时部署和多光源场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多样化LED照明下验证，该方法平均减少角度再现误差22%，显著优于传统CCT插值。此外，它保持与普朗克光源的后向兼容性，能适应多光源环境，且计算成本可忽略，实现实时相机内部署，提高了实际应用中的色彩准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了2D色度空间和MLP在改善相机内色彩映射方面的有效性，为相机色彩处理提供了新方法，具有学术和实用价值。未来工作可进一步优化模型架构或扩展到其他非标准照明类型，以提升泛化能力。摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但可推断方法可能依赖于训练数据质量和代表性光源的选择。

title: SVG360: Multi-View SVG Generation with Geometric and Color Consistency from a Single SVG
abstract: Scalable Vector Graphics (SVGs) are central to modern design workflows, offering scaling without distortion and precise editability. However, for single object SVGs, generating multi-view consistent SVGs from a single-view input remains underexplored. We present a three stage framework that produces multi-view SVGs with geometric and color consistency from a single SVG input. First, the rasterized input is lifted to a 3D representation and rendered under target camera poses, producing multi-view images of the object. Next, we extend the temporal memory mechanism of Segment Anything 2 (SAM2) to the spatial domain, constructing a spatial memory bank that establishes part level correspondences across neighboring views, yielding cleaner and more consistent vector paths and color assignments without retraining. Finally, during the raster to vector conversion, we perform path consolidation and structural optimization to reduce redundancy while preserving boundaries and semantics. The resulting SVGs exhibit strong geometric and color consistency across views, significantly reduce redundant paths, and retain fine structural details. This work bridges generative modeling and structured vector representation, providing a scalable route to single input, object level multi-view SVG generation and supporting applications such as asset creation and semantic vector editing.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一个三阶段框架，从单视图SVG生成具有几何和颜色一致性的多视图SVGs。
light_analysis.motivation: Scalable Vector Graphics (SVGs)在现代设计工作流中至关重要，提供无损缩放和精确编辑功能。然而，针对单一对象SVGs，从单视图输入生成多视图一致SVG的研究尚不充分。这限制了资产创建和语义向量编辑等应用的发展，因为现有方法难以保证跨视图的一致性，并缺乏高效的可扩展方案。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，解决多视图SVG生成中的几何和颜色一致性问题。
light_analysis.method: 该方法采用三阶段流程：首先，将输入的SVG光栅化并提升为3D表示，然后通过目标相机姿态渲染生成多视图图像。接着，扩展了Segment Anything 2 (SAM2)的时间记忆机制到空间域，构建空间记忆库，建立跨相邻视图的部分级别对应关系，从而实现无重训练的干净向量路径和颜色分配。最后，在光栅到向量转换过程中，执行路径合并和结构优化，减少冗余同时保留边界和语义。关键创新在于引入空间记忆机制和路径优化策略，无需额外训练即可提升视图间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 生成的多视图SVGs展现出跨视图的强几何和颜色一致性，并显著减少冗余路径，同时保留精细结构细节。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或与基线方法的对比数据，但强调了无需重新训练的优势，表明在效率和一致性方面有改进。例如，路径精简和一致性维持可能支持资产创建等应用，但未提供具体数据验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究成功连接了生成建模与结构化向量表示，为单输入对象级多视图SVG生成提供了可扩展路径。其学术价值在于探索了一个未被充分研究的领域，并引入了空间记忆机制和路径优化技术。应用价值体现在支持资产创建和语义向量编辑等设计工作流。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的对象或动态场景，以进一步验证通用性和局限性。

title: Masked Auto-Regressive Variational Acceleration: Fast Inference Makes Practical Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Masked auto-regressive diffusion models (MAR) benefit from the expressive modeling ability of diffusion models and the flexibility of masked auto-regressive ordering. However, vanilla MAR suffers from slow inference due to its hierarchical inference mechanism: an outer AR unmasking loop and an inner diffusion denoising chain. Such decoupled structure not only harm the generation efficiency but also hinder the practical use of MAR for reinforcement learning (RL), an increasingly critical paradigm for generative model post-training.To address this fundamental issue, we introduce MARVAL (Masked Auto-regressive Variational Acceleration), a distillation-based framework that compresses the diffusion chain into a single AR generation step while preserving the flexible auto-regressive unmasking order. Such a distillation with MARVAL not only yields substantial inference acceleration but, crucially, makes RL post-training with verifiable rewards practical, resulting in scalable yet human-preferred fast generative models. Our contributions are twofold: (1) a novel score-based variational objective for distilling masked auto-regressive diffusion models into a single generation step without sacrificing sample quality; and (2) an efficient RL framework for masked auto-regressive models via MARVAL-RL. On ImageNet 256*256, MARVAL-Huge achieves an FID of 2.00 with more than 30 times speedup compared with MAR-diffusion, and MARVAL-RL yields consistent improvements in CLIP and image-reward scores on ImageNet datasets with entity names. In conclusion, MARVAL demonstrates the first practical path to distillation and RL of masked auto-regressive diffusion models, enabling fast sampling and better preference alignments.

light_analysis.overview: MARVAL框架通过蒸馏加速掩码自回归扩散模型推断，实现快速采样和强化学习应用，首次提供实用路径。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码自回归扩散模型（MAR）虽具有强大的建模能力和灵活性，但其层次推断机制（外部自回归循环和内部扩散链）导致推断速度慢，阻碍了在强化学习（RL）中的实际应用。RL作为生成模型后训练的关键范式，需要高效推理来优化模型偏好，但现有MAR方法因慢推断而无法满足这一需求，限制了其扩展到需要快速响应的场景，如实时生成或大规模部署。
light_analysis.method: MARVAL采用蒸馏框架，通过新颖的基于分数的变分目标，将扩散链压缩为单步自回归生成，同时保持灵活的掩码顺序而不牺牲样本质量。关键创新包括MARVAL-RL框架，用于高效强化学习后训练，利用可验证奖励优化模型。该方法基于蒸馏技术，避免了层次推断的复杂结构，具体在ImageNet数据集上评估，模型架构如MARVAL-Huge被提及，但摘要未明确说明其他技术细节。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet 256*256数据集上，MARVAL-Huge实现了FID 2.00，推断速度相比基线MAR-diffusion提升超过30倍。MARVAL-RL在包含实体名称的ImageNet数据集上，显著提高了CLIP分数和图像奖励分数，表明模型在偏好对齐方面有持续改进。这些结果证明了MARVAL在加速推断和提升模型性能方面的有效性，与现有方法相比具有明显优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARVAL首次为掩码自回归扩散模型的蒸馏和强化学习提供了实用解决方案，实现了快速采样和更好的偏好对齐，具有重要学术价值。该方法扩展了高效生成模型的应用范围，尤其适用于需要快速推理的领域，如实时人工智能系统。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性，未来工作可能涉及进一步优化蒸馏过程或扩展到更多数据集和任务。

title: Cheating Stereo Matching in Full-scale: Physical Adversarial Attack against Binocular Depth Estimation in Autonomous Driving
abstract: Though deep neural models adopted to realize the perception of autonomous driving have proven vulnerable to adversarial examples, known attacks often leverage 2D patches and target mostly monocular perception. Therefore, the effectiveness of Physical Adversarial Examples (PAEs) on stereo-based binocular depth estimation remains largely unexplored. To this end, we propose the first texture-enabled physical adversarial attack against stereo matching models in the context of autonomous driving. Our method employs a 3D PAE with global camouflage texture rather than a local 2D patch-based one, ensuring both visual consistency and attack effectiveness across different viewpoints of stereo cameras. To cope with the disparity effect of these cameras, we also propose a new 3D stereo matching rendering module that allows the PAE to be aligned with real-world positions and headings in binocular vision. We further propose a novel merging attack that seamlessly blends the target into the environment through fine-grained PAE optimization. It has significantly enhanced stealth and lethality upon existing hiding attacks that fail to get seamlessly merged into the background. Extensive evaluations show that our PAEs can successfully fool the stereo models into producing erroneous depth information.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了首个针对自动驾驶中立体匹配模型的纹理增强物理对抗攻击方法，填补了立体深度估计领域物理攻击的研究空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管自动驾驶中基于深度神经网络的感知模型已证明易受对抗样本攻击，但现有攻击多使用2D补丁，主要针对单目感知，因此物理对抗攻击在基于立体的双目深度估计中的有效性尚未充分探索。该研究旨在解决这一问题，因为立体深度估计对自动驾驶安全性至关重要，而现有方法在立体视觉中难以保证跨视角的视觉一致性和攻击效果，导致攻击效率低下。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种基于纹理的物理对抗攻击方法，核心是使用3D物理对抗示例（PAE）结合全局伪装纹理，而非传统局部2D补丁，以确保立体相机不同视角下的视觉一致性和攻击效果。为处理相机视差效应，创新性地引入一个3D立体匹配渲染模块，使PAE能与真实世界位置和方向对齐。此外，还提出一种新型融合攻击，通过细粒度PAE优化无缝融合目标到环境中。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛评估，论文的PAE能成功欺骗立体匹配模型产生错误深度信息，与现有隐藏攻击相比，显著提升了攻击的隐秘性和致命性。这些攻击在无缝融合到背景方面表现更优，而现有方法往往融合失败。摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率下降百分比），但强调攻击的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的核心贡献是首次提出针对立体匹配的纹理增强物理对抗攻击，展示了其在自动驾驶安全领域的应用价值，揭示了立体模型的潜在漏洞。未来工作可扩展至更多模型或真实场景验证，摘要未明确说明局限性，但暗示了攻击可推广性需进一步研究。

title: Semantic Context Matters: Improving Conditioning for Autoregressive Models
abstract: Recently, autoregressive (AR) models have shown strong potential in image generation, offering better scalability and easier integration with unified multi-modal systems compared to diffusion-based methods. However, extending AR models to general image editing remains challenging due to weak and inefficient conditioning, often leading to poor instruction adherence and visual artifacts. To address this, we propose SCAR, a Semantic-Context-driven method for Autoregressive models. SCAR introduces two key components: Compressed Semantic Prefilling, which encodes high-level semantics into a compact and efficient prefix, and Semantic Alignment Guidance, which aligns the last visual hidden states with target semantics during autoregressive decoding to enhance instruction fidelity. Unlike decoding-stage injection methods, SCAR builds upon the flexibility and generality of vector-quantized-based prefilling while overcoming its semantic limitations and high cost. It generalizes across both next-token and next-set AR paradigms with minimal architectural changes. SCAR achieves superior visual fidelity and semantic alignment on both instruction editing and controllable generation benchmarks, outperforming prior AR-based methods while maintaining controllability. Code will be released at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/SCAR.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出SCAR方法，通过压缩语义预填充和语义对齐指导改进自回归模型的条件化，显著提升图像编辑的指令遵守和视觉保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归模型在图像生成中展现出潜力，相比扩散方法具有更好的扩展性和多模态集成能力，但扩展至一般图像编辑时，由于条件化弱且效率低下，常导致指令遵守不佳和视觉伪影。这一问题限制了AR模型的实际应用价值，因此需要开发更有效的条件化机制，以弥补现有方法的不足，提升图像编辑的准确性和质量。研究旨在解决这一关键挑战，推动AR模型在更广泛场景中的部署。
light_analysis.method: SCAR方法包含两个核心组件：压缩语义预填充，将高级语义信息编码为紧凑且高效的前缀；语义对齐指导，在自回归解码过程中，通过将视觉隐藏状态与目标语义对齐来增强指令忠实度。该方法基于向量量化预填充的灵活性和通用性，但克服了其语义限制和高计算成本，适用于多种AR范式（如下一个标记或下一个集合预测），只需最小架构调整，从而在保持泛化能力的同时提升条件化效果。
light_analysis.result: SCAR在指令编辑和可控生成基准测试中展现出优越的视觉保真度和语义对齐性能，超越了先前基于AR的方法。摘要未明确提供具体性能指标数据，但明确指出其表现优异，能够在保持可控性的同时显著改善模型输出。这表明SCAR方法在实际应用中具有较高的有效性和实用性，为图像编辑任务提供了新解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于提出SCAR方法，通过创新条件化机制显著改善了自回归模型在图像编辑中的性能，增强了指令遵守能力和视觉输出质量。这推动了AR模型在图像生成领域的学术进步，具有实际应用价值，如多模态系统集成。未来工作可能包括扩展至更复杂任务或优化计算效率，以进一步提升模型适用范围。

title: Tractable Probabilistic Models for Investment Planning
abstract: Investment planning in power utilities, such as generation and transmission expansion, requires decisions under substantial uncertainty over decade--long horizons for policies, demand, renewable availability, and outages, while maintaining reliability and computational tractability. Conventional approaches approximate uncertainty using finite scenario sets (modeled as a mixture of Diracs in statistical theory terms), which can become computationally intensive as scenario detail increases and provide limited probabilistic resolution for reliability assessment. We propose an alternative based on tractable probabilistic models, using sum--product networks (SPNs) to represent high--dimensional uncertainty in a compact, analytically tractable form that supports exact probabilistic queries (e.g., likelihoods, marginals, and conditionals). This framework enables the direct embedding of chance constraints into mixed--integer linear programming (MILP) models for investment planning to evaluate reliability events and enforce probabilistic feasibility requirements without enumerating large scenario trees. We demonstrate the approach on a representative planning case study and report reliability--cost trade--offs and computational behavior relative to standard scenario--based formulations.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于和-积网络（SPNs）的可处理概率模型，用于电力投资规划，以高效处理不确定性并直接嵌入机会约束，提升计算效率和可靠性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 电力公用事业投资规划面临长期不确定性，如政策变化、需求波动、可再生能源可用性和设备停电，需要在确保可靠性的同时保持计算可处理性。传统方法使用有限场景集近似不确定性，但随着场景细节增加，计算复杂度上升，概率分辨率不足，难以准确评估可靠性事件，因此需要更高效精确的方法来应对高维不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出使用和-积网络（SPNs）构建可处理的概率模型，将高维不确定性表示为紧凑、分析上可处理的形式，支持精确的概率查询（如似然、边缘和条件概率）。关键创新在于将该框架嵌入混合整数线性规划（MILP）模型中，用于投资规划，以评估可靠性事件并强制执行概率可行性要求，避免了枚举大型场景树的计算负担。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但侧重于 SPNs 与 MILP 的集成。
light_analysis.result: 通过一个代表性规划案例研究，论文展示了该方法在可靠性-成本权衡和计算行为方面的表现。相对于标准的基于场景的公式，该方法可能提供了改进的可靠性-成本权衡和计算效率，但摘要未提供具体的准确率或性能提升数据。结果表明，使用 SPNs 可以减少计算复杂度，同时增强概率评估的精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种基于 SPNs 的可处理概率模型，用于电力投资规划，提高了处理不确定性的效率和精度，具有重要的学术价值，因为它将概率建模与优化框架结合，为复杂决策问题提供了新思路。在实际应用中，可减少规划过程中的计算负担。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他领域或进一步优化算法性能。

title: MedPT: A Massive Medical Question Answering Dataset for Brazilian-Portuguese Speakers
abstract: While large language models (LLMs) show transformative potential in healthcare, their development remains focused on high-resource languages. This creates a critical barrier for other languages, as simple translation fails to capture unique clinical and cultural nuances, such as endemic diseases. To address this, we introduce MedPT, the first large-scale, real-world corpus of patient-doctor interactions for the Brazilian Portuguese medical domain. Comprising 384,095 authentic question-answer pairs and covering over 3,200 distinct health-related conditions, the dataset was refined through a rigorous multi-stage curation protocol that employed a hybrid quantitative-qualitative analysis to filter noise and contextually enrich thousands of ambiguous queries, resulting in a corpus of approximately 57 million tokens. We further utilize of LLM-driven annotation to classify queries into seven semantic types to capture user intent. To validate MedPT's utility, we benchmark it in a medical specialty classification task: fine-tuning a 1.7B parameter model achieves an outstanding 94\% F1-score on a 20-class setup. Furthermore, our qualitative error analysis shows misclassifications are not random but reflect genuine clinical ambiguities (e.g., between comorbid conditions), proving the dataset's deep semantic richness. We publicly release MedPT on Hugging Face to support the development of more equitable, accurate, and culturally-aware medical technologies for the Portuguese-speaking world.
comment: Accepted at LREC 2026, 11 pages, 3 tables, 2 figures

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出首个针对巴西葡萄牙语的大规模真实世界医患交互数据集MedPT，旨在解决医疗问答中语言资源不平等问题，支持开发更公平的医疗技术。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在医疗领域展现出变革潜力，但其发展主要集中于英语等高资源语言，导致巴西葡萄牙语等语言面临资源瓶颈。简单翻译无法捕捉独特的临床和文化细节，如地方病，从而限制了医疗技术的准确性和适用性。因此，开发专门针对巴西葡萄牙语的医疗数据集至关重要，以促进医疗AI的公平发展和文化适应性。
light_analysis.method: 该研究构建了MedPT数据集，包含384,095个真实医患问答对，覆盖3,200多种健康条件，通过多阶段策划协议结合定量-定性分析过滤噪声并丰富查询语义，生成约5,700万tokens的语料库。关键创新在于利用大型语言模型驱动注释，将查询分类为七种语义类型以捕获用户意图，增强数据集的结构化和实用性。
light_analysis.result: 在医疗专业分类任务中，微调1.7B参数模型在20类设置下达到94%的F1分数，表现出色。错误分析显示分类错误并非随机，而是反映临床歧义，如共病条件间的混淆，证明了数据集具有深层语义丰富性，为后续研究提供了可靠基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是发布MedPT数据集，支持巴西葡萄牙语医疗技术的开发，促进更公平、准确和文化敏感的AI应用。学术上填补了该语言医疗资源的空白，实际中可用于训练和评估医疗问答模型。未来工作可扩展数据集覆盖更多方言或疾病类型，并探索在临床实践中的部署。

title: MSGNav: Unleashing the Power of Multi-modal 3D Scene Graph for Zero-Shot Embodied Navigation
abstract: Embodied navigation is a fundamental capability for robotic agents operating. Real-world deployment requires open vocabulary generalization and low training overhead, motivating zero-shot methods rather than task-specific RL training. However, existing zero-shot methods that build explicit 3D scene graphs often compress rich visual observations into text-only relations, leading to high construction cost, irreversible loss of visual evidence, and constrained vocabularies. To address these limitations, we introduce the Multi-modal 3D Scene Graph (M3DSG), which preserves visual cues by replacing textual relational edges with dynamically assigned images.
