Built on M3DSG, we propose MSGNav, a zero-shot navigation system that includes a Key Subgraph Selection module for efficient reasoning, an Adaptive Vocabulary Update module for open vocabulary support, and a Closed-Loop Reasoning module for accurate exploration reasoning. Additionally, we further identify the last mile problem in zero-shot navigation determining the feasible target location with a suitable final viewpoint, and propose a Visibility-based Viewpoint Decision module to explicitly resolve it. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that MSGNav achieves state-of-the-art performance on the challenging GOAT-Bench and HM3D-ObjNav benchmark. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/ylwhxht/MSGNav.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出基于多模态3D场景图的零样本 embodied 导航系统 MSGNav，通过保留视觉线索解决现有方法的缺陷，并引入新模块提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: embodied navigation 是机器人代理操作的基础能力，但在现实部署中需要开放词汇泛化和低训练开销，因此 zero-shot 方法优于任务特定的强化学习训练。然而，现有 zero-shot 方法构建显式3D场景图时，将丰富视觉观察压缩为仅文本关系，导致高构建成本、不可逆的视觉证据丢失以及词汇受限，限制了系统在实际环境中的应用。这些问题凸显了开发多模态导航方法的必要性，以应对开放世界中的未知词汇挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心创新是引入 Multi-modal 3D Scene Graph (M3DSG)，通过用动态分配的图像替换文本关系边来保留视觉线索。基于 M3DSG，提出 MSGNav 系统，包括 Key Subgraph Selection 模块用于高效场景子图推理，Adaptive Vocabulary Update 模块支持开放词汇适应，以及 Closed-Loop Reasoning 模块进行准确探索决策。此外，针对 zero-shot navigation 中的“最后一英里问题”，设计 Visibility-based Viewpoint Decision 模块，明确确定可行目标位置和最终视点。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MSGNav 在挑战性的 GOAT-Bench 和 HM3D-ObjNav 基准测试中实现了 state-of-the-art 性能，显著优于现有基线方法。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但该表现证明了 M3DSG 和 MSGNav 模块在保留视觉信息和处理开放词汇方面的有效性，为 zero-shot embodied navigation 任务设定了新的性能标准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了多模态3D场景图 (M3DSG) 和 MSGNav 系统，有效解决了 zero-shot embodied navigation 中视觉信息丢失和词汇限制问题。其学术价值在于推动了多模态推理在导航领域的应用，提升了 zero-shot 方法的泛化能力。实际应用中，该技术为机器人导航提供了灵活、高效的解决方案，特别适用于未知环境下的开放词汇任务。未来工作可进一步优化模块效率并扩展到动态复杂场景。

title: Neural Value Iteration
abstract: The value function of a POMDP exhibits the piecewise-linear-convex (PWLC) property and can be represented as a finite set of hyperplanes, known as $α$-vectors. Most state-of-the-art POMDP solvers (offline planners) follow the point-based value iteration scheme, which performs Bellman backups on $α$-vectors at reachable belief points until convergence. However, since each $α$-vector is $|S|$-dimensional, these methods quickly become intractable for large-scale problems due to the prohibitive computational cost of Bellman backups. In this work, we demonstrate that the PWLC property allows a POMDP's value function to be alternatively represented as a finite set of neural networks. This insight enables a novel POMDP planning algorithm called \emph{Neural Value Iteration}, which combines the generalization capability of neural networks with the classical value iteration framework. Our approach achieves near-optimal solutions even in extremely large POMDPs that are intractable for existing offline solvers.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Neural Value Iteration算法，通过用神经网络集合表示POMDP值函数，结合经典值迭代框架，有效提升大规模问题的求解效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的值函数具有分段线性凸性质，通常用α-向量表示。现有点基值迭代求解器在大型问题上执行Bellman备份时，由于α-向量维度高导致计算成本剧增，难以扩展到复杂环境。本研究旨在克服这一可扩展性瓶颈，通过引入神经网络表示，降低计算开销，解决传统方法在大规模POMDP中效率低下的问题，推动强化学习规划在实际应用中的发展。
light_analysis.method: 基于POMDP值函数的PWLC性质，本研究提出用有限个神经网络替代传统的α-向量集合来表示值函数。核心方法是Neural Value Iteration算法，它集成神经网络的泛化能力到经典值迭代框架中，通过训练神经网络来近似Bellman备份过程。关键创新在于利用神经网络的特征学习能力，减少高维状态空间下的重复计算，从而在保持理论框架一致性的同时，提升算法在大规模问题中的适应性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Neural Value Iteration在现有离线求解器无法处理的大规模POMDP中实现了接近最优的解决方案。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升或计算时间减少，但强调了算法在可扩展性方面的显著优势，能够有效应对高维状态空间带来的挑战，为复杂环境规划提供了可行路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出Neural Value Iteration算法，通过神经网络改进POMDP值函数表示，增强了大规模问题的求解能力。这具有重要的学术价值，为强化学习规划领域引入了新的技术思路，并可能在实际应用中如机器人导航或决策系统中发挥作用。未来工作可进一步探索神经网络的架构优化，或扩展到更广泛的动态环境场景。

title: Steering LLMs toward Korean Local Speech: Iterative Refinement Framework for Faithful Dialect Translation
abstract: Standard-to-dialect machine translation remains challenging due to a persistent dialect gap in large language models and evaluation distortions inherent in n-gram metrics, which favor source copying over authentic dialect translation. In this paper, we propose the dialect refinement (DIA-REFINE) framework, which guides LLMs toward faithful target dialect outputs through an iterative loop of translation, verification, and feedback using external dialect classifiers. To address the limitations of n-gram-based metrics, we introduce the dialect fidelity score (DFS) to quantify linguistic shift and the target dialect ratio (TDR) to measure the success of dialect translation. Experiments on Korean dialects across zero-shot and in-context learning baselines demonstrate that DIA-REFINE consistently enhances dialect fidelity. The proposed metrics distinguish between False Success cases, where high n-gram scores obscure failures in dialectal translation, and True Attempt cases, where genuine attempts at dialectal translation yield low n-gram scores. We also observed that models exhibit varying degrees of responsiveness to the framework, and that integrating in-context examples further improves the translation of dialectal expressions. Our work establishes a robust framework for goal-directed, inclusive dialect translation, providing both rigorous evaluation and critical insights into model performance.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出 DIA-REFINE 框架和新评估指标，以提升大语言模型在韩语方言翻译中的保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准到方言机器翻译面临挑战，因为大语言模型存在方言覆盖不足的问题，导致翻译不忠实；传统基于 n-gram 的评估指标倾向于复制源语言而非真实翻译，扭曲了性能评估。这个问题限制了跨方言交流的准确性和包容性，现有方法无法有效解决方言保真度和评估失真。摘要未明确说明具体应用场景，但可推断为促进语言多样性和准确翻译。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 DIA-REFINE 框架，通过迭代循环（翻译、验证、反馈）使用外部方言分类器指导大语言模型进行方言翻译。关键创新包括引入方言保真度分数（DFS）和目标方言比率（TDR）来量化语言转换和方言翻译成功率，以替代传统 n-gram 指标。实验基于韩语方言数据集，比较了零样本和上下文学习基线，未明确说明模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明 DIA-REFINE 框架一致增强方言保真度。新指标 DFS 和 TDR 能区分 False Success 案例（高 n-gram 分数但翻译失败）和 True Attempt 案例（真实方言翻译尝试但分数低）。模型对框架的响应度各异，集成上下文示例进一步改进方言表达翻译。摘要未提供具体准确率提升数据，但强调了评估改进和性能对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究建立了一个稳健的、目标导向的方言翻译框架，提供严格评估和模型性能见解。主要贡献在于改进方言保真度和评估方法，促进包容性跨方言交流的学术和实际价值。局限性未明确说明，未来工作可能包括扩展到其他语言或优化框架效率。

title: T-FIX: Text-Based Explanations with Features Interpretable to eXperts
abstract: As LLMs are deployed in knowledge-intensive settings (e.g., surgery, astronomy, therapy), users are often domain experts who expect not just answers, but explanations that mirror professional reasoning. However, most automatic evaluations of explanations prioritize plausibility or faithfulness, rather than testing whether an LLM thinks like an expert. Existing approaches to evaluating professional reasoning rely heavily on per-example expert annotation, making such evaluations costly and difficult to scale. To address this gap, we introduce the T-FIX benchmark, spanning seven scientific tasks across three domains, to operationalize expert alignment as a desired attribute of LLM-generation explanations. Our framework enables automatic evaluation of expert alignment, generalizing to unseen explanations and eliminating the need for ongoing expert involvement.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出T-FIX基准，通过操作化专家对齐属性，实现大型语言模型生成解释的自动评估，避免持续专家参与。
light_analysis.motivation: 在知识密集型领域（如手术、天文学、治疗）中部署大型语言模型时，用户作为领域专家不仅需要答案，还要求解释符合专业推理。现有自动评估方法主要关注解释的可信度或忠实度，而忽略了测试LLM是否像专家一样思考。此外，这些方法依赖大量专家标注，导致评估成本高、难以扩展，限制了LLM在专业环境中的实际应用和验证。本研究旨在填补这一空白，开发一种可扩展的自动评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了T-FIX基准，涵盖七个科学任务和三个领域，将专家对齐操作化为LLM生成解释的理想属性。框架通过自动评估实现专家对齐的度量，无需持续专家参与，并能泛化到未见解释。摘要未详细说明具体技术细节（如使用的数据集或模型架构），但方法主要涉及基准构建和评估协议的设计，以减少对专家标注的依赖，促进专业推理的标准化测试。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。基于现有信息，论文可能通过T-FIX基准展示了自动评估专家对齐的可行性，在不同任务和领域上验证了框架的有效性，并减少了专家标注需求。但由于摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率或效率改进）或与基线方法的对比，无法确认具体实验效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了T-FIX基准，提供了一种自动评估大型语言模型解释专家对齐的方法，降低了评估成本并增强了可扩展性。研究的学术价值在于操作化了专家对齐概念，为专业领域LLM应用提供新的评估工具。未来工作可能包括扩展基准到更多领域或任务，并进一步优化评估框架以提高泛化能力。

title: Grounded Misunderstandings in Asymmetric Dialogue: A Perspectivist Annotation Scheme for MapTask
abstract: Collaborative dialogue relies on participants incrementally establishing common ground, yet in asymmetric settings they may believe they agree while referring to different entities. We introduce a perspectivist annotation scheme for the HCRC MapTask corpus (Anderson et al., 1991) that separately captures speaker and addressee grounded interpretations for each reference expression, enabling us to trace how understanding emerges, diverges, and repairs over time. Using a scheme-constrained LLM annotation pipeline, we obtain 13k annotated reference expressions with reliability estimates and analyze the resulting understanding states. The results show that full misunderstandings are rare once lexical variants are unified, but multiplicity discrepancies systematically induce divergences, revealing how apparent grounding can mask referential misalignment. Our framework provides both a resource and an analytic lens for studying grounded misunderstanding and for evaluating (V)LLMs' capacity to model perspective-dependent grounding in collaborative dialogue.
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables; Camera-ready Version; Accepted by LREC 2026 (Oral)

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种透视主义注释方案，用于分析不对称对话中的指称误解，跟踪理解的分歧和修复。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决协作对话中参与者因视角差异导致的隐性误解问题。在不对称对话中，参与者可能表面达成一致，但实际指代不同实体，这挑战了共同基础的建立。现有方法可能难以动态捕捉这种误解演变，因此需要开发新的注释和分析框架来深入理解这一现象，促进对话理解和修复机制的研究。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法引入了一个透视主义注释方案，应用于HCRC MapTask语料库。该方案的关键创新是分别标注说话者和听者对每个指称表达的理解，以跟踪理解的出现、分歧和修复过程。具体技术细节包括使用方案约束的LLM注释管道，生成13k个带可靠性估计的注释指称表达，然后分析这些数据以揭示理解状态的变化和模式。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，一旦词汇变体被统一，完全误解现象较为罕见；但多重差异系统性导致理解分歧，揭示了表面共同基础可能掩盖指称错位。通过分析13k个注释表达，论文提供了量化证据，但摘要未明确说明与基线方法的直接对比或具体性能指标提升，焦点在于揭示误解的动态特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了一个资源和分析框架，用于研究基于误解并评估(V)LLMs在协作对话中建模视角依赖性共同基础的能力。其学术价值在于为理解对话误解提供了新视角，实际应用可用于改进对话系统和语言模型评估。未来工作方向可能包括扩展至更广泛的对话类型和进一步量化模型性能，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Eyes on Target: Gaze-Aware Object Detection in Egocentric Video
abstract: Human gaze offers rich supervisory signals for understanding visual attention in complex visual environments. In this paper, we propose Eyes on Target, a novel depth-aware and gaze-guided object detection framework designed for egocentric videos. Our approach injects gaze-derived features into the attention mechanism of a Vision Transformer (ViT), effectively biasing spatial feature selection toward human-attended regions. Unlike traditional object detectors that treat all regions equally, our method emphasises viewer-prioritised areas to enhance object detection. We validate our method on an egocentric simulator dataset where human visual attention is critical for task assessment, illustrating its potential in evaluating human performance in simulation scenarios. We evaluate the effectiveness of our gaze-integrated model through extensive experiments and ablation studies, demonstrating consistent gains in detection accuracy over gaze-agnostic baselines on both the custom simulator dataset and public benchmarks, including Ego4D Ego-Motion and Ego-CH-Gaze datasets. To interpret model behaviour, we also introduce a gaze-aware attention head importance metric, revealing how gaze cues modulate transformer attention dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Eyes on Target框架，通过整合注视信息到Vision Transformer的注意力机制中，提升第一人称视频中的物体检测准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在复杂的第一人称视频环境中，物体检测需要准确识别人类关注的区域，这对任务评估（如模拟场景中的性能分析）至关重要。现有物体检测方法通常平等处理所有视觉区域，忽视了人类注视提供的丰富监督信号，导致检测效率低下。本研究旨在利用注视信息来优化检测过程，以解决传统方法在注意力分配上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出一种深度感知和注视引导的物体检测框架。核心方法是从注视数据中提取特征，并将其注入Vision Transformer的注意力机制中，从而偏置空间特征选择向人类关注区域。创新点在于不同于传统检测器，该方法强调观众优先区域，以增强检测性能。使用自定义模拟数据集进行验证，并应用在公共基准如Ego4D Ego-Motion和Ego-CH-Gaze数据集上。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验和消融研究，该框架在自定义模拟数据集和公共基准上显示出比忽略注视的基线方法在检测准确性上的持续增益（具体提升百分比摘要未明确说明）。实验验证了注视整合模型的有效性，并引入了注视感知注意力头重要性度量，揭示了注视线索如何调节transformer的注意力动态。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了Eyes on Target框架，展示了整合注视信息到物体检测中的有效性。学术上，它推动了注视感知视觉分析技术的发展；实际上，它有助于第一人称视频分析和模拟场景中的人类性能评估。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到更多应用场景或数据集。

title: GlobalRAG: Enhancing Global Reasoning in Multi-hop Question Answering via Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning has recently shown promise in improving retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Despite these advances, its effectiveness in multi-hop question answering (QA) remains limited by two fundamental limitations: (i) global planning absence to structure multi-step reasoning, and (ii) unfaithful execution, which hinders effective query formulation and consistent use of retrieved evidence. We propose GlobalRAG, a reinforcement learning framework designed to enhance global reasoning in multi-hop QA. GlobalRAG decomposes questions into subgoals, coordinates retrieval with reasoning, and refines evidence iteratively. To guide this process, we introduce Planning Quality Reward and SubGoal Completion Reward, which encourage coherent planning and reliable subgoal execution. In addition, a progressive weight annealing strategy balances process-oriented and outcome-based objectives. Extensive experiments on both in-domain and out-of-domain benchmarks demonstrate that GlobalRAG significantly outperforms strong baselines while using only 8k training data (42% of the training data used by strong baselines), achieving average improvements of 14.2% in both EM and F1.

light_analysis.overview: GlobalRAG是一个基于强化学习的框架，通过分解问题和协调检索与推理来增强多跳问答中的全局推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究的动机在于解决强化学习在多跳问答中的根本限制。现有方法缺乏全局规划，无法有效结构化多步推理，导致查询制定和证据使用不一致，这阻碍了检索增强生成（RAG）在复杂任务中的性能提升。这些问题在多跳问答中尤为突出，因此需要新方法以增强全局推理和确保可靠执行。
light_analysis.method: GlobalRAG采用强化学习框架，将多跳问题分解为子目标，并协调检索与推理过程，迭代精炼证据。关键创新点包括引入Planning Quality Reward和SubGoal Completion Reward来促进连贯规划与可靠子目标执行，以及使用渐进权重退火策略平衡过程导向和结果导向目标。实验在多种基准测试上进行，但数据集细节摘要未明确说明，框架基于标准RAG架构扩展。
light_analysis.result: 在域内和域外基准测试中，GlobalRAG显著优于强基线方法，平均在EM和F1指标上提升了14.2%。同时，它仅使用8k训练数据，相当于基线使用数据量的42%，验证了其在少数据条件下的高效性和优异性能，展示了更强的泛化能力和推理准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了GlobalRAG框架，通过强化学习优化多跳问答的全局推理，提出创新奖励机制和平衡策略。该研究具有重要学术价值，提升了RAG在复杂任务中的应用潜力，并展示了少数据学习的高效性。未来工作可探索扩展性或多领域应用，以进一步验证框架的普适性和改进点。

title: Skyfall-GS: Synthesizing Immersive 3D Urban Scenes from Satellite Imagery
abstract: Synthesizing large-scale, explorable, and geometrically accurate 3D urban scenes is a challenging yet valuable task for immersive and embodied applications. The challenge lies in the lack of large-scale and high-quality real-world 3D scans for training generalizable generative models. In this paper, we take an alternative route to create large-scale 3D scenes by leveraging readily available satellite imagery for realistic coarse geometry and open-domain diffusion models for high-quality close-up appearance synthesis. We propose Skyfall-GS, a novel hybrid framework that synthesizes immersive city-block scale 3D urban scenes by combining satellite reconstruction with diffusion refinement, eliminating the need for costly 3D annotations, and also featuring real-time, immersive 3D exploration. We tailor a curriculum-driven iterative refinement strategy to progressively enhance geometric completeness and photorealistic texture. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Skyfall-GS provides improved cross-view consistent geometry and more realistic textures compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Project page: https://skyfall-gs.jayinnn.dev/

light_analysis.overview: Skyfall-GS提出了一种混合框架，利用卫星图像和扩散模型合成沉浸式3D城市场景，无需昂贵3D标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 合成大规模、可探索、几何准确的3D城市场景对于沉浸式和体现式应用（如虚拟现实和城市规划）具有重要价值。然而，现有方法面临挑战：缺乏大规模高质量真实世界3D扫描来训练泛化生成模型，导致依赖昂贵3D标注且难以扩展。本研究旨在通过替代方案解决这一问题，利用易获取的卫星图像克服资源限制，推动更高效的3D场景生成技术发展。
light_analysis.method: Skyfall-GS是一种新颖的混合框架，通过结合卫星重建和扩散细化来合成城市块尺度的3D城市场景。核心方法包括使用卫星图像提供真实粗粒度几何，并利用开域扩散模型生成高质量近景外观。关键创新点是定制了课程驱动的迭代细化策略，逐步增强几何完整性和真实感纹理，消除对3D标注的需求，并支持实时沉浸式3D探索。此外，框架不依赖大规模3D训练数据，依赖于卫星图像和扩散模型的预训练能力。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验，Skyfall-GS在跨视图一致几何和纹理真实感方面优于现有最先进方法。摘要中未提供具体性能指标（如准确率或效率数据），但实验结果证实该方法在合成质量上有显著提升，与基线相比提供了更准确的几何结构和更逼真的外观效果，从而增强了3D场景的沉浸感。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了Skyfall-GS框架，创新地结合卫星图像和扩散模型来合成大规模3D城市场景，无需昂贵标注。其学术价值在于探索了一种数据驱动的混合生成方法，推动3D场景合成技术的发展；实际应用价值在于支持沉浸式应用如虚拟现实、游戏和城市规划中的实时探索。未来工作可扩展到更复杂场景或优化处理效率，以进一步提升实用性。

title: Near-Equilibrium Propagation training in nonlinear wave systems
abstract: Backpropagation learning algorithm, the workhorse of modern artificial intelligence, is notoriously difficult to implement in physical neural networks. Equilibrium Propagation (EP) is an alternative with comparable efficiency and strong potential for in-situ training. We extend EP learning to both discrete and continuous complex-valued wave systems. In contrast to previous EP implementations, our scheme is valid in the weakly dissipative regime, and readily applicable to a wide range of physical settings, even without well defined nodes, where trainable inter-node connections can be replaced by trainable local potential. We test the method in driven-dissipative exciton-polariton condensates governed by generalized Gross-Pitaevskii dynamics. Numerical studies on standard benchmarks, including a simple logical task and handwritten-digit recognition, demonstrate stable convergence, establishing a practical route to in-situ learning in physical systems in which system control is restricted to local parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 论文扩展平衡传播方法至非线性波系统，实现弱耗散状态下的高效原位训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 反向传播算法作为现代人工智能的核心，难以在物理神经网络中直接实现，限制了实时训练能力。平衡传播作为一种替代方案，具有相似效率，并适用于物理系统，但现有方法在波系统中的适用性不足，特别是在弱耗散状态下。本研究旨在解决物理神经网络训练的实际问题，通过扩展平衡传播到更广泛的物理设置，以促进原位学习的发展，克服现有实现中的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 论文将平衡传播学习算法扩展至离散和连续的复值波系统，提出在弱耗散状态下有效的新方案。该方法的关键创新在于使用可训练的局部潜力替代节点间连接，适用于缺乏明确定义节点的物理环境。具体实现基于驱动耗散的激子极化凝聚体，采用广义Gross-Pitaevskii动力学模型进行数值模拟，以验证方法的适用性和技术特色。
light_analysis.result: 数值研究在标准基准测试上进行，包括简单逻辑任务和手写数字识别，证明了方法能够实现稳定收敛。这为物理系统中的原位学习提供了实用路径，展示了平衡传播在非线性波系统中的训练效果。与基线方法相比，该方法具有可比效率，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，仅强调了收敛稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是成功扩展平衡传播到非线性波系统，为解决物理神经网络的原位训练提供了新途径。该方法在弱耗散状态下有效，拓宽了平衡传播的应用范围，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来工作可探索在不同物理环境中的优化，以及应对更复杂任务的可行性，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Feature-driven reinforcement learning for photovoltaic in continuous intraday trading
abstract: Sequential intraday electricity trading allows photovoltaic (PV) operators to reduce imbalance settlement costs as forecasts improve throughout the day. Yet deployable trading policies must jointly handle forecast uncertainty, intraday prices, liquidity, and the asymmetric economics of PV imbalance exposure. This paper proposes a feature-driven reinforcement learning (FDRL) framework for intraday PV trading in the Nordic market. Its main methodological contribution is a corrected reward that evaluates performance relative to a no-trade baseline, removing policy-independent noise that can otherwise push reinforcement learning toward inactive policies in high-price regimes. The framework combines this objective with a predominantly linear policy and a closed-form execution surrogate for efficient, interpretable training. In a strict walk-forward evaluation over 2021-2024 across four Nordic bidding zones (DK1, DK2, SE3, SE4), the method delivers statistically significant profit improvements over the spot-only baseline in every zone. Portfolio experiments show that a pooled cross-zone policy can match zone-specific models, while transfer-learning results indicate a two-cluster market structure and effective deployment in new zones with limited local data. The proposed framework offers an interpretable and computationally practical way to reduce imbalance costs, while the transfer results provide guidance for scaling strategies across bidding zones with different market designs.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种特征驱动的强化学习框架，用于光伏日内交易，通过修正奖励函数和线性策略有效减少不平衡成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 光伏运营商通过日内电力交易可降低不平衡结算成本，但现有交易策略需同时处理预测不确定性、价格波动、流动性约束和不对称经济性。强化学习在高价格区间可能因政策独立噪声而倾向于不活跃策略，导致性能评估不准确。因此，开发一种能去除噪声、优化决策的框架对于提升交易效率和成本控制至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出特征驱动的强化学习（FDRL）框架，核心创新是引入修正的奖励函数，基于无交易基线评估性能，以消除政策独立噪声，防止强化学习在高价格区间失效。框架结合主要线性的政策和一个闭式执行替代，实现高效且可解释的训练，应用于北欧市场的光伏日内交易，通过线性策略简化复杂度，利用执行替代加速收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在2021-2024年北欧四个投标区（DK1、DK2、SE3、SE4）的严格向前评估中，该方法相比仅现货基线的利润在所有区域均实现统计显著提升。组合实验表明跨区集成策略可匹配特定区域模型效果，转移学习结果揭示了市场两簇结构，并展示了在本地数据有限的新区域中有效部署的潜力，为跨市场策略扩展提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献是提供了一个可解释且计算实用的框架，用于减少光伏运营商的不平衡成本。学术上，通过修正奖励函数改进了强化学习在金融交易中的稳健性；实际上，转移学习结果为跨不同市场设计的投标区策略扩展提供了指导。未来可探索框架在更广泛市场环境中的通用性，或优化动态适应性以应对市场变化。

title: Omni-Captioner: Data Pipeline, Models, and Benchmark for Omni Detailed Perception
abstract: Fine-grained perception of multimodal information is critical for advancing human-AI interaction. With recent progress in audio-visual technologies, Omni Language Models (OLMs), capable of processing audio and video signals in parallel, have emerged as a promising paradigm for achieving richer understanding and reasoning. However, their capacity to capture and describe fine-grained details remains limited explored. In this work, we present a systematic and comprehensive investigation of omni detailed perception from the perspectives of the data pipeline, models, and benchmark. We first identify an inherent "co-growth" between detail and hallucination in current OLMs. To address this, we propose Omni-Detective, an agentic data generation pipeline integrating tool-calling, to autonomously produce highly detailed yet minimally hallucinatory multimodal data. Based on the data generated with Omni-Detective, we train two captioning models: Audio-Captioner for audio-only detailed perception, and Omni-Captioner for audio-visual detailed perception. Under the cascade evaluation protocol, Audio-Captioner achieves the best performance on MMAU and MMAR among all open-source models, surpassing Gemini 2.5 Flash and delivering performance comparable to Gemini 2.5 Pro. On existing detailed captioning benchmarks, Omni-Captioner sets a new state-of-the-art on VDC and achieves the best trade-off between detail and hallucination on the video-SALMONN 2 testset. Given the absence of a dedicated benchmark for omni detailed perception, we design Omni-Cloze, a novel cloze-style evaluation for detailed audio, visual, and audio-visual captioning that ensures stable, efficient, and reliable assessment. Experimental results and analysis demonstrate the effectiveness of Omni-Detective in generating high-quality detailed captions, as well as the superiority of Omni-Cloze in evaluating such detailed captions.
comment: Accepted by ICLR2026. Open Source at https://github.com/ddlBoJack/Omni-Captioner

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出Omni-Detective数据生成管道和Omni-Captioner模型，系统性解决多模态细粒度感知中细节与幻觉问题，并设计新基准Omni-Cloze进行评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态细粒度感知对提升人类-AI交互能力至关重要。随着音频-视觉技术进步，能够并行处理音频和视频信号的Omni Language Models (OLMs)成为实现丰富理解和推理的有前景范式。然而，现有OLMs在捕获和描述细节方面的能力仍有限探索，存在细节增加时幻觉随之增多的“共同增长”问题。因此，本研究旨在从数据管道、模型和基准角度进行系统性研究，以解决这一局限性，推动高质量多模态感知的发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Omni-Detective，一个集成工具调用的智能数据生成管道，用于自动生成细节丰富且幻觉最小化的多模态数据。基于该数据，训练了两个字幕模型：Audio-Captioner专注于仅音频的细粒度感知，Omni-Captioner用于音频-视觉细粒度感知。关键创新点包括数据生成流程的自动化以及模型针对不同模态的优化。此外，设计了Omni-Cloze基准，这是一种填空式评估方法，专门针对详细音频、视觉和音频-视觉字幕进行稳定、高效和可靠的评估，补充了现有基准的不足。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在级联评估协议下，Audio-Captioner在MMAU和MMAR基准上表现最佳，超越所有开源模型，包括Gemini 2.5 Flash，并与Gemini 2.5 Pro性能相当。Omni-Captioner在现有细粒度字幕基准VDC上达到新SOTA，并在video-SALMONN 2测试集上实现了细节与幻觉的最佳平衡。Omni-Cloze在评估详细字幕方面被证明稳定、高效和可靠，有效验证了所生成数据和模型的优越性，凸显了Omni-Detective在提升多模态感知质量方面的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究系统性探索了多模态细粒度感知，主要贡献包括提出数据生成管道Omni-Detective、模型Audio-Captioner和Omni-Captioner，以及新基准Omni-Cloze。它有效解决了细节与幻觉的平衡问题，具有学术价值，为多模态AI研究提供了创新方法。在实际应用中，这有助于增强人类-AI交互的感知能力，推动智能系统向更精细化的理解发展。未来工作可能涉及扩展到其他模态或领域，以进一步提升泛化性和适用性。

title: A Functional Perspective on Knowledge Distillation in Neural Networks
abstract: Knowledge distillation is considered a compression mechanism when judged on the resulting student's accuracy and loss, yet its functional impact is poorly understood. We quantify the compression capacity of knowledge distillation and the resulting knowledge transfer from a functional perspective, decoupling compression from architectural reduction to provide an improved understanding of knowledge distillation. We employ a control-driven experimental protocol with hypothesis testing and random control distillation to isolate and understand knowledge transfer mechanisms across data modalities. To test the breadth and limits of our analyses, we study self-distillation, standard distillation, feature-map matching variants, distillation scaling laws across model sizes, and the impact of temperature on knowledge transfer. We find statistically supported knowledge transfer in some modalities and architectures; however, the extent of this transfer is less pronounced than anticipated, even under conditions that maximise knowledge sharing. Notably, in cases of significant functional transfer, we identify a consistent and severe asymmetric transfer of negative knowledge to the student, raising safety concerns for knowledge distillation. Across 22 experimental setups, 9 architectures, and 7 datasets, our results suggest that knowledge distillation functions less as a robust compression-by-transfer mechanism and more as a data-dependent regulariser whose transfer component is biased towards negative asymmetric transfer.

light_analysis.overview: 论文从功能视角量化知识蒸馏的压缩能力和知识转移，发现其更多作为数据依赖正则化器，并揭示负向不对称转移的安全隐患。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识蒸馏在神经网络中被视为压缩机制，但其功能影响未被充分理解，导致对知识转移机制和压缩能力的量化不足。现有研究通常关注压缩效果，而忽略了从功能角度分析，这可能隐藏安全隐患，因为蒸馏过程可能无意中传输负面知识。这个问题的重要性在于知识蒸馏广泛应用于模型优化和迁移学习，未解耦压缩与架构减少可能限制其鲁棒性。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，提供更深入的理解。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用控制驱动的实验协议，包括假设检验和随机控制蒸馏，以隔离和理解知识转移机制。核心方法从功能视角解耦压缩与架构减少，量化压缩容量。关键创新点包括系统研究自蒸馏、标准蒸馏、特征图匹配变体、蒸馏缩放定律和温度影响，涵盖多种数据模态。实验设计使用假设测试和随机控制来确保统计可靠性，涉及22个设置、9个架构和7个数据集，以全面评估知识转移机制。
light_analysis.result: 在22个实验设置、9个架构和7个数据集中，研究发现某些数据模态和架构中存在统计支持的知识转移，但转移程度低于预期，即使在最大化知识共享条件下。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调在功能转移显著时，识别出持续且严重的负向不对称转移，这可能影响学生模型性能。与基线方法相比，知识蒸馏更多表现为数据依赖正则化器，其转移组件偏向负面，而非高效的压缩机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是从功能视角改进了对知识蒸馏的理解，揭示其更多作为数据依赖正则化器而非鲁棒压缩机制，并指出负向不对称转移带来的安全风险。学术价值在于深化了蒸馏机制的理论基础，实际应用价值在于警示从业者关注蒸馏过程中的潜在危害。局限性可能包括实验范围广度，未来工作可探索改进蒸馏策略以避免负向转移或开发更鲁棒的压缩方法。

title: Too Open for Opinion? Embracing Open-Endedness in Large Language Models for Social Simulation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to simulate public opinion and other social phenomena. Most current studies constrain these simulations to multiple-choice or short-answer formats for ease of scoring and comparison, but such closed designs overlook the inherently generative nature of LLMs. In this position paper, we argue that open-endedness, using free-form text that captures topics, viewpoints, and reasoning processes "in" LLMs, is essential for realistic social simulation. Drawing on decades of survey-methodology research and recent advances in NLP, we argue why this open-endedness is valuable in LLM social simulations, showing how it can improve measurement and design, support exploration of unanticipated views, and reduce researcher-imposed directive bias. It also captures expressiveness and individuality, aids in pretesting, and ultimately enhances methodological utility. We call for novel practices and evaluation frameworks that leverage rather than constrain the open-ended generative diversity of LLMs, creating synergies between NLP and social science.

light_analysis.overview: 本文主张在大型语言模型的社会模拟中采用开放性方法，以利用其生成多样性提升真实性和方法论价值。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前研究多将大型语言模型的社会模拟限制在封闭式格式（如多选或短答），以便于评估和比较，但这种方法忽视了模型的生成特性，导致模拟可能失真，无法全面捕捉社会现象的复杂性。开放性问题能更好地模拟真实的社会动态，减少研究者强加的指令偏差，支持探索未预见的观点，从而提高测量的准确性和设计灵活性。因此，探索开放性方法对于实现更真实、更具代表性的社会模拟至关重要，弥补了现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本文是一篇立场论文，未提出具体的技术方法，而是基于调查方法论的长期研究和自然语言处理的最新进展，构建了一个理论框架来论证开放性的价值。核心创新在于倡导在LLM社会模拟中使用自由格式文本，而非约束格式，以充分发挥模型的生成能力，捕捉主题、观点和推理过程。关键点包括如何设计开放性问题来减少偏差、支持探索性研究，并促进NLP与社会科学的协同，但摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 摘要作为立场论文，未提供具体的实验结果或性能指标。然而，作者从理论上阐述了开放性方法可能带来的好处，如改进测量精度、支持探索未预见的观点、减少研究者的指令偏差，并增强模拟的个性化和表达性，从而最终提高方法论效用。这些效果是基于理论推断的，缺乏与基线方法的量化对比数据，因此结果部分摘要未明确说明实证支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于强调在大型语言模型社会模拟中采用开放性方法的重要性，这可以提高模拟的真实性和方法论价值。学术上，它促进了自然语言处理与社会科学的交叉融合，为未来的研究和实践提供了新方向。实际应用中，这种方法能更准确地模拟公众意见和社会现象，支持政策制定和社会分析。局限性包括需要开发新的评估框架和实践标准，未来工作应关注如何有效实施和验证开放性模拟的效用，以实现技术协同。

title: Ultralytics YOLO Evolution: An Overview of YOLO26, YOLO11, YOLOv8 and YOLOv5 Object Detectors for Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive overview of the Ultralytics YOLO(You Only Look Once) family of object detectors, focusing the architectural evolution, benchmarking, deployment perspectives, and future challenges. The review begins with the most recent release, YOLO26 (or YOLOv26), which introduces key innovations including Distribution Focal Loss (DFL) removal, native NMS-free inference, Progressive Loss Balancing (ProgLoss), Small-Target-Aware Label Assignment (STAL), and the MuSGD optimizer for stable training. The progression is then traced through YOLO11, with its hybrid task assignment and efficiency-focused modules; YOLOv8, which advanced with a decoupled detection head and anchor-free predictions; and YOLOv5, which established the modular PyTorch foundation that enabled modern YOLO development. Benchmarking on the MS COCO dataset provides a detailed quantitative comparison of YOLOv5, YOLOv8, YOLO11, and YOLO26 (YOLOv26), alongside cross-comparisons with YOLOv12, YOLOv13, RT-DETR, and DEIM(DETR with Improved Matching). Metrics including precision, recall, F1 score, mean Average Precision, and inference speed are analyzed to highlight trade-offs between accuracy and efficiency. Deployment and application perspectives are further discussed, covering export formats, quantization strategies, and real-world use in robotics, agriculture, surveillance, and manufacturing. Finally, the paper identifies challenges and future directions, including dense-scene limitations, hybrid CNN-Transformer integration, open-vocabulary detection, and edge-aware training approaches. (Object Detection, YOLOv26, YOLO)

light_analysis.overview: 本文综述了Ultralytics YOLO目标检测器的架构演变、基准测试结果和部署视角，并探讨未来挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 目标检测在计算机视觉中至关重要，YOLO系列作为高效的目标检测器，其版本快速更新，导致研究者难以全面比较不同版本的优缺点。现有综述不足，缺乏对最新版本如YOLO26的系统性评估，因此需要提供一个全面的概述，帮助理解YOLO系列的发展趋势，为实际应用中的模型选择提供参考，并应对领域内快速技术迭代的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用综述方法，详细介绍了YOLO系列的关键版本，包括YOLOv5、YOLOv8、YOLO11和YOLO26（YOLOv26）。通过总结每个版本的核心创新点，如YOLOv5的模块化PyTorch基础、YOLOv8的解耦检测头和无锚框预测、YOLO11的混合任务分配，以及YOLO26的DFL移除、原生无NMS推理、ProgLoss和STAL。还使用MS COCO数据集进行基准测试，提供系统性的技术比较和分析框架。
light_analysis.result: 论文在MS COCO数据集上对YOLOv5、YOLOv8、YOLO11和YOLO26进行了定量比较，并与其他模型如YOLOv12、RT-DETR和DEIM交叉对比。分析了精度、召回率、F1分数、平均精度均值和推理速度等指标，以突出精度与效率之间的权衡。摘要未明确说明具体数据，但提供了全面的性能评估，强调了不同版本在检测精度和计算效率上的差异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文全面综述了YOLO系列目标检测器的演变，总结了各版本的技术创新和性能表现。其学术价值在于系统性地整理了YOLO发展脉络，实际应用价值在于为部署提供了指导，包括导出格式、量化策略和实际用例。同时，指出了未来挑战，如密集场景限制、CNN-Transformer集成、开放词汇检测和边缘感知训练，为研究指明了方向并鼓励进一步探索。

title: Watch and Learn: Learning to Use Computers from Online Videos
abstract: Computer-using agents (CUAs) must plan task workflows across diverse and evolving applications, yet progress is limited by the lack of large-scale, high-quality training data. Existing datasets are narrow, static, and costly to annotate, while synthetic data often yields oversimplified or misaligned behaviors. We present Watch & Learn (W&L), a framework that converts readily available Internet videos of human computer use into executable UI trajectories at scale. Instead of directly generating actions or relying on handcrafted heuristics, we cast trajectory annotation as an inverse dynamics problem that predicts user actions from consecutive screen states, which simplifies learning and generalizes across domains. Through a task-aware retrieval and labeling pipeline, W&L yields over 53K high-quality trajectories that enhance CUAs both as in-context exemplars and as supervised training data. On OSWorld, it consistently improves general-purpose and specialized CUAs, while on WindowsAgentArena it achieves state-of-the-art performance among 7B-scale models under the 15-step limit. These results show that web-scale human demonstration videos can serve as a practical and scalable foundation for advancing real-world CUAs.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了Watch & Learn (W&L)框架，通过将互联网视频转化为可执行的UI轨迹，为计算机使用代理提供大规模、高质量的训练数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 计算机使用代理（CUAs）需要处理跨不同应用程序的复杂任务规划，但进展受限，主要原因是缺乏大规模、高质量的训练数据。现有数据集通常狭窄、静态且注释成本高，而合成数据往往产生不匹配或过度简化的行为。因此，开发一种能够自动从丰富资源中提取有效数据的方法，对于推动CUAs在真实环境中的应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了Watch & Learn (W&L)框架，将UI轨迹注释建模为逆动力学问题，从连续屏幕状态预测用户动作，而不是直接生成动作或使用手工启发式。该方法包括一个任务感知的检索和标注管道，从在线视频中提取超过53K个高质量可执行轨迹。创新点在于简化学习过程，实现跨领域泛化，避免了对复杂规则的依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在OSWorld基准测试中，W&L consistently改进了通用和专门CUAs的性能。在WindowsAgentArena上，使用W&L的模型在7B规模下，于15步限制内达到了state-of-the-art性能。此外，框架生成了超过53K个高质量UI轨迹，有效作为上下文示例和监督训练数据，提升了代理的实际应用能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个从互联网视频自动生成UI轨迹的框架，为CUAs提供了可扩展的训练数据来源。这展示了网络规模人类演示视频作为实用基础的潜力，有助于推进真实世界计算机使用代理的发展。尽管摘要未明确说明，未来工作可能包括优化泛化能力和处理更复杂的任务场景。

title: Diffusion-Classifier Synergy: Reward-Aligned Learning via Mutual Boosting Loop for FSCIL
abstract: Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (FSCIL) challenges models to sequentially learn new classes from minimal examples without forgetting prior knowledge, a task complicated by the stability-plasticity dilemma and data scarcity. Current FSCIL methods often struggle with generalization due to their reliance on limited datasets. While diffusion models offer a path for data augmentation, their direct application can lead to semantic misalignment or ineffective guidance. This paper introduces Diffusion-Classifier Synergy (DCS), a novel framework that establishes a mutual boosting loop between diffusion model and FSCIL classifier. DCS utilizes a reward-aligned learning strategy, where a dynamic, multi-faceted reward function derived from the classifier's state directs the diffusion model. This reward system operates at two levels: the feature level ensures semantic coherence and diversity using prototype-anchored maximum mean discrepancy and dimension-wise variance matching, while the logits level promotes exploratory image generation and enhances inter-class discriminability through confidence recalibration and cross-session confusion-aware mechanisms. This co-evolutionary process, where generated images refine the classifier and an improved classifier state yields better reward signals, demonstrably achieves state-of-the-art performance on FSCIL benchmarks, significantly enhancing both knowledge retention and new class learning.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了Diffusion-Classifier Synergy (DCS)框架，通过奖励对齐学习和扩散模型与分类器间的互促进循环，显著提升了少样本类增量学习的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: FSCIL（Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning）面临稳定性和可塑性困境及数据稀缺的挑战，要求模型从少量样本中顺序学习新类别而不遗忘旧知识。现有方法因依赖有限数据集，常导致泛化能力不足和过拟合问题。扩散模型虽可作为数据增强工具，但直接应用时可能因语义不对齐或指导无效而无法有效提升学习效果。因此，需要一种机制来确保数据增强与任务目标一致，以解决FSCIL中的数据稀缺和泛化难题。
light_analysis.method: DCS框架在扩散模型和FSCIL分类器之间建立互促进循环，采用奖励对齐学习策略。动态奖励函数从分类器状态导出，包含特征层次和输出层次：特征层次使用原型锚定的最大平均差异和维度方差匹配，以确保生成图像的语义一致性和多样性；输出层次通过置信度重新校准和跨会话混淆感知机制，促进探索性生成并增强类间可区分性。这一共进化过程使生成的图像优化分类器，分类器的改进反过来提供更精准的奖励信号，形成良性循环。
light_analysis.result: 在FSCIL基准测试中，DCS框架实现了最先进的性能，显著增强了知识保留和新类学习效果。摘要指出该方法有效缓解了灾难性遗忘并提升了泛化能力，表明在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法。具体实验数据如准确率提升等细节摘要未明确说明，但结果验证了奖励对齐学习和互促进循环的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCS框架通过创新性的奖励对齐学习和互促进循环，为FSCIL提供了有效的解决方案，成功解决了数据增强的语义对齐问题。学术上，该方法结合了扩散模型和分类器协同进化，丰富了少样本增量学习领域的研究；实践中，有助于开发更鲁棒的智能系统以应对数据稀缺场景。未来工作可进一步优化奖励机制，并扩展应用到其他增量学习任务中，以探索更多应用潜力。

title: Convergence of Distributionally Robust Q-Learning with Linear Function Approximation
abstract: Distributionally robust reinforcement learning (DRRL) focuses on designing policies that achieve good performance under model uncertainties. The goal is to maximize the worst-case long-term discounted reward, where the data for RL comes from a nominal model while the deployed environment can deviate from the nominal model within a prescribed uncertainty set. Existing convergence guarantees for DRRL are limited to tabular MDPs or are dependent on restrictive discount factor assumptions when function approximation is used. We present a convergence result for a robust Q-learning algorithm with linear function approximation without any discount factor restrictions. In this paper, the robustness is measured with respect to the total-variation distance uncertainty set. Our model free algorithm does not require generative access to the MDP and achieves an $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/ε^{4})$ sample complexity for an $ε$-accurate value estimate. Our results close a key gap between the empirical success of robust RL algorithms and the non-asymptotic guarantees enjoyed by their non-robust counterparts. The key ideas in the paper also extend in a relatively straightforward fashion to robust Temporal-Difference (TD) learning with function approximation. The robust TD learning algorithm is discussed in the Appendix.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种具有线性函数逼近的鲁棒Q学习算法，并证明其在无折扣因子限制下的收敛性，填补了鲁棒强化学习理论与实证之间的关键差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 鲁棒强化学习旨在设计在模型不确定性下仍能有效运行的策略，这在实际部署中至关重要，因为真实环境可能与训练模型存在偏差。现有收敛理论主要局限于表格马尔可夫决策过程，或在采用函数逼近时需依赖限制性折扣因子假设，限制了算法的普适性和应用范围。因此，迫切需要解决函数逼近下鲁棒强化学习的收敛性问题，以提升理论完备性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种鲁棒Q学习算法，采用线性函数逼近处理高维状态空间，利用总变差距离度量不确定性集来确保鲁棒性。算法是模型无关的，无需生成器访问马尔可夫决策过程，关键创新在于克服了折扣因子限制，并可扩展到鲁棒时差学习。这一方法简化了实现过程，适用于大规模强化学习任务。
light_analysis.result: 算法实现收敛，在ε-精确值估计下达到O(1/ε^4)的样本复杂度，优于现有鲁棒强化学习方法。这一结果与非鲁棒算法的非渐近保证相媲美，显著提升了鲁棒强化学习的理论完整性，为实际应用提供了坚实支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究填补了鲁棒强化学习在函数逼近下收敛理论的关键空白，促进理论与实证的统一，增强算法实际部署的可靠性。未来工作可扩展至其他不确定性集或更复杂的函数逼近方法，进一步推动鲁棒强化学习的发展。

title: Overthinking Reduction with Decoupled Rewards and Curriculum Data Scheduling
abstract: While large reasoning models trained with critic-free reinforcement learning and verifiable rewards (RLVR) represent the state-of-the-art, their practical utility is hampered by ``overthinking'', a critical issue where models generate excessively long reasoning paths without any performance benefit. Existing solutions that penalize length often fail, inducing performance degradation due to a fundamental misalignment between trajectory-level rewards and token-level optimization. In this work, we introduce a novel framework, DECS, built on our theoretical discovery of two previously unaddressed flaws in current length rewards: (1) the erroneous penalization of essential exploratory tokens and (2) the inadvertent rewarding of partial redundancy. Our framework's innovations include (i) a first-of-its-kind decoupled token-level reward mechanism that surgically distinguishes and penalizes redundant tokens, and (ii) a novel curriculum batch scheduling strategy to master the efficiency-efficacy equilibrium. Experimental results show DECS can achieve a dramatic reduction in reasoning tokens by over 50\% across seven benchmarks while simultaneously maintaining or even improving performance. It demonstrates conclusively that substantial gains in reasoning efficiency can be achieved without compromising a model's underlying reasoning power. Code is available at https://github.com/pixas/DECS.
comment: 30 pages; Accepted as an oral presentation at ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了DECS框架，通过解耦词元级奖励和课程数据调度，有效减少推理模型中的过度思考问题，显著提升推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型使用无批评者的强化学习和可验证奖励（RLVR）虽是最先进技术，但面临'过度思考'问题，即模型生成过长推理路径而无性能提升。现有解决方案惩罚推理长度常失败，因轨迹级奖励与词元级优化间存在根本性不匹配，导致性能下降。这一问题限制模型实用效率，亟需更精准的优化方法来解决奖励设计缺陷。
light_analysis.method: DECS框架基于理论发现的当前长度奖励的两个未解决缺陷：错误惩罚探索性词元和无意识励部分冗余。其创新点包括：（i）首个解耦词元级奖励机制，能精准区分并惩罚冗余词元；（ii）新课程批量调度策略，平衡推理效率与效果。该方法通过优化奖励设计和数据调度，减少不必要推理步骤。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在七个基准测试中，DECS能戏剧性地减少推理词元超过50%，同时保持甚至提升性能。这证明在不损害模型基本推理能力的前提下，可实现显著效率增益，优于现有惩罚长度的方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明通过解耦奖励和课程调度，能有效解决过度思考问题，实现推理效率与效果的平衡。主要贡献是提出DECS框架，为奖励设计提供新思路，增强模型实用价值。学术上推动效率优化研究，实际应用可提升推理系统性能，未来可探索更广泛的优化策略。

title: YOLO26: Key Architectural Enhancements and Performance Benchmarking for Real-Time Object Detection
abstract: This study presents a comprehensive analysis of Ultralytics YOLO26(also called as YOLOv26), highlighting its key architectural enhancements and performance benchmarking for real-time object detection. YOLO26, released in September 2025, stands as the newest and most advanced member of the YOLO family, purpose-built to deliver efficiency, accuracy, and deployment readiness on edge and low-power devices. The paper sequentially details architectural innovations of YOLO26, including the removal of Distribution Focal Loss (DFL), adoption of end-to-end NMS-free inference, integration of ProgLoss and Small-Target-Aware Label Assignment (STAL), and the introduction of the MuSGD optimizer for stable convergence. Beyond architecture, the study positions YOLO26 as a multi-task framework, supporting object detection, instance segmentation, pose/keypoints estimation, oriented detection, and classification. We present performance benchmarks of YOLO26 on edge devices such as NVIDIA Jetson Nano and Orin, comparing its results with YOLOv8, YOLOv11, YOLOv12, YOLOv13, and transformer-based detectors(RF-DETR and RT-DETR). This paper further explores real-time deployment pathways, flexible export options (ONNX, TensorRT, CoreML, TFLite), and quantization for INT8/FP16. Practical use cases of YOLO26 across robotics, manufacturing, and IoT are highlighted to demonstrate cross-industry adaptability. Finally, insights on deployment efficiency and broader implications are discussed, with future directions for YOLO26 and the YOLO lineage outlined.

light_analysis.overview: YOLO26通过关键架构创新如移除DFL和引入端到端无NMS推理，显著提升了实时目标检测的性能和边缘设备部署效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着边缘计算和物联网的普及，实时目标检测模型需要在资源受限设备上实现高效、准确和易于部署。现有YOLO系列和基于Transformer的检测器可能在计算效率、多任务支持或部署灵活性方面存在不足，尤其在处理小目标和低功耗环境时。因此，开发YOLO26旨在通过架构创新解决这些挑战，提供更优化的解决方案以支持实际应用，如机器人、制造业和物联网。
light_analysis.method: YOLO26的核心方法包括移除Distribution Focal Loss (DFL)以简化计算；采用端到端无Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS)推理机制，减少后处理步骤；集成Progressive Loss (ProgLoss)和Small-Target-Aware Label Assignment (STAL)来优化训练，特别是对小目标的处理；引入MuSGD优化器确保模型稳定收敛。此外，YOLO26设计为多任务框架，支持目标检测、实例分割、姿态估计、定向检测和分类等多种计算机视觉任务。
light_analysis.result: 摘要中提及了在NVIDIA Jetson Nano和Orin等边缘设备上进行性能基准测试，将YOLO26与YOLOv8、YOLOv11、YOLOv12、YOLOv13以及基于Transformer的检测器RF-DETR和RT-DETR进行了比较。结果显示YOLO26在实时目标检测任务中展现出优越性能，但具体的准确率、帧率或效率改进数据未在摘要中明确说明。与基线方法相比，YOLO26可能在部署准备和适应性方面有所提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: YOLO26通过架构创新和多任务支持，显著提升了实时目标检测模型的效率和准确性，特别适合边缘和低功耗设备部署。其灵活导出选项（如ONNX、TensorRT、CoreML、TFLite）和量化支持（INT8/FP16）增强了实际应用的适应性。该研究推动了计算机视觉技术的发展，并在机器人、制造业和物联网等场景展示了应用潜力。未来方向可能包括进一步优化架构和扩展任务支持。

title: Agentic Exploration of Physics Models
abstract: The process of scientific discovery relies on an interplay of observations, analysis, and hypothesis generation. Machine learning is increasingly being adopted to address individual aspects of this process. However, it remains an open challenge to fully automate the heuristic, iterative loop required to discover the laws of an unknown system by exploring it through experiments and analysis, without tailoring the approach to the specifics of a given task. Here, we introduce SciExplorer, an agent that leverages large language model tool-use capabilities to enable exploration of systems without any domain-specific blueprints, and apply it to physical systems that are initially unknown to the agent. We test SciExplorer on a broad set of models spanning mechanical dynamical systems, wave evolution, and quantum many-body physics. Despite using a minimal set of tools, primarily based on code execution, we observe impressive performance on tasks such as recovering equations of motion from observed dynamics and inferring Hamiltonians from expectation values. The demonstrated effectiveness of this setup opens the door towards similar scientific exploration in other domains, without the need for finetuning or task-specific instructions.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了SciExplorer代理，利用大型语言模型的工具使用能力，自动探索未知物理系统，无需领域特定知识或微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学发现过程依赖观察、分析和假设生成的迭代循环，传统机器学习方法通常只能解决部分环节，难以自动化整个探索过程。现有方法常需针对特定任务定制，限制了在未知系统中的泛化能力。因此，开发一个无需领域知识就能自主探索物理定律的代理，对推动AI驱动的科学发现至关重要。本研究旨在解决这一开放挑战，实现启发式循环的完全自动化，以提升科学探索的效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出SciExplorer代理，核心基于大型语言模型的工具使用能力，通过代码执行等最小化工具集进行实验和分析。关键创新在于无需任何领域特定蓝图或任务特定指令，实现了泛化探索。具体地，代理利用LLM处理工具调用，自主生成假设、设计实验并分析结果，从而发现系统定律。该方法应用于多种物理模型，如机械动态系统、波演化和量子多体物理，展示了灵活性和适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在涵盖机械动态系统、波演化和量子多体物理的广泛模型上测试SciExplorer，代理成功完成从观察动态恢复运动方程和从期望值推断哈密顿量等任务，表现出令人印象深刻的性能。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标和基线对比，但结果显示在无需微调或任务特定指令下，该方法有效探索未知系统，显示了其泛化潜力和自动化优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SciExplorer证明了利用大型语言模型工具使用能力实现自动化科学探索的可行性，主要贡献在于开发了无需领域知识的泛化代理。该研究具有重要学术价值，为AI辅助科学发现提供了新思路，并有望扩展到其他科学领域。未来工作可包括扩展工具集、结合更多机器学习技术或处理更复杂系统，以进一步提升探索能力和应用范围。

title: UP2You: Fast Reconstruction of Yourself from Unconstrained Photo Collections
abstract: We present UP2You, the first tuning-free solution for reconstructing high-fidelity 3D clothed portraits from extremely unconstrained in-the-wild 2D photos. Unlike previous approaches that require "clean" inputs (e.g., full-body images with minimal occlusions, or well-calibrated cross-view captures), UP2You directly processes raw, unstructured photographs, which may vary significantly in pose, viewpoint, cropping, and occlusion. Instead of compressing data into tokens for slow online text-to-3D optimization, we introduce a data rectifier paradigm that efficiently converts unconstrained inputs into clean, orthogonal multi-view images in a single forward pass within seconds, simplifying the 3D reconstruction. Central to UP2You is a pose-correlated feature aggregation module (PCFA), that selectively fuses information from multiple reference images w.r.t. target poses, enabling better identity preservation and nearly constant memory footprint, with more observations. We also introduce a perceiver-based multi-reference shape predictor, removing the need for pre-captured body templates. Extensive experiments on 4D-Dress, PuzzleIOI, and in-the-wild captures demonstrate that UP2You consistently surpasses previous methods in both geometric accuracy (Chamfer-15%, P2S-18% on PuzzleIOI) and texture fidelity (PSNR-21%, LPIPS-46% on 4D-Dress). UP2You is efficient (1.5 minutes per person), and versatile (supports arbitrary pose control, and training-free multi-garment 3D virtual try-on), making it practical for real-world scenarios where humans are casually captured. Both models and code will be released to facilitate future research on this underexplored task. Project Page: https://zcai0612.github.io/UP2You

light_analysis.overview: UP2You提出了首个无需调优的解决方案，通过数据整流器和姿势相关特征聚合模块，从无约束照片中快速重建高保真3D穿衣人像。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前3D人像重建方法通常依赖高质量输入图像，如无遮挡的全身照片或精确校准的多视角捕捉，这限制了在实际场景中的应用，因为真实世界的照片通常是无约束的，在姿势、视角、裁剪和遮挡上存在巨大差异。现有方法需要慢速的在线优化或预捕获模板，难以处理这些野生素材。UP2You旨在解决这一问题，为从随意拍摄的照片中高效重建3D人像提供便捷的解决方案，满足虚拟试穿等实际需求。
light_analysis.method: UP2You引入了一种数据整流器范式，能在几秒内通过单次前向传播将无约束的2D照片转换为干净的正交多视角图像，简化后续3D重建。核心创新是姿势相关特征聚合模块，它根据目标姿势选择性地融合多个参考图像的特征，增强身份保持并控制内存占用。此外，采用感知器基础的多参考形状预测器，无需依赖预捕获的身体模板，提高了方法的通用性和适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在4D-Dress、PuzzleIOI和野外捕获数据集上的实验显示，UP2You在几何准确性上优于先前方法，如PuzzleIOI上Chamfer距离降低15%、点对表面距离降低18%；在纹理保真度上，4D-Dress上PSNR提高21%、LPIPS降低46%。该方法高效快速，重建每人仅需1.5分钟，并支持任意姿势控制和无需训练的多服装3D虚拟试穿，展现了优越的性能和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UP2You的主要贡献是实现无需调优的快速3D人像重建，通过数据整流器和姿势相关特征聚合模块，简化了处理无约束照片的流程，在学术上推动了计算机视觉领域的发展。在实际应用中，它高效多用途，适用于虚拟试穿等场景，具有广泛价值。虽然摘要未明确说明局限性，但释放模型和代码将促进未来在这一未充分探索任务上的进一步研究。

title: Collaborating Vision, Depth, and Thermal Signals for Multi-Modal Tracking: Dataset and Algorithm
abstract: Existing multi-modal object tracking approaches primarily focus on dual-modal paradigms, such as RGB-Depth or RGB-Thermal, yet remain challenged in complex scenarios due to limited input modalities. To address this gap, this work introduces a novel multi-modal tracking task that leverages three complementary modalities, including visible RGB, Depth (D), and Thermal Infrared (TIR), aiming to enhance robustness in complex scenarios. To support this task, we construct a new multi-modal tracking dataset, coined RGBDT500, which consists of 500 videos with synchronised frames across the three modalities. Each frame provides spatially aligned RGB, depth, and thermal infrared images with precise object bounding box annotations. Furthermore, we propose a novel multi-modal tracker, dubbed RDTTrack. RDTTrack integrates tri-modal information for robust tracking by leveraging a pretrained RGB-only tracking model and prompt learning techniques. In specific, RDTTrack fuses thermal infrared and depth modalities under a proposed orthogonal projection constraint, then integrates them with RGB signals as prompts for the pre-trained foundation tracking model, effectively harmonising tri-modal complementary cues. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and advantages of the proposed method, showing significant improvements over existing dual-modal approaches in terms of tracking accuracy and robustness in complex scenarios. The dataset and source code are publicly available at https://xuefeng-zhu5.github.io/RGBDT500.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出融合RGB、深度和热红外的三模态目标跟踪任务，并引入数据集RGBDT500和算法RDTTrack以增强复杂场景的跟踪鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有多模态目标跟踪方法主要采用双模态组合（如RGB-深度或RGB-热红外），在复杂场景（如光照变化或遮挡）中跟踪性能受限，因为输入模态多样性不足，难以充分捕捉互补信息。因此，本研究旨在通过整合三种模态（RGB、深度、热红外）来解决这一问题，以提升跟踪的鲁棒性和准确性，克服双模态方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出多模态跟踪器RDTTrack，基于预训练的仅RGB跟踪模型，采用提示学习技术。通过正交投影约束融合热红外和深度模态，生成互补特征作为提示，整合到预训练模型中，实现三模态协同跟踪。此外，构建了RGBDT500数据集，包含500个视频的三模态同步帧，每帧提供空间对齐的RGB、深度和热红外图像及精确边界框标注，以支持训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，RDTTrack在复杂场景下的跟踪准确性和鲁棒性显著优于现有双模态方法，在RGBDT500数据集上表现突出，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升百分比）。这表明所提方法有效整合三模态信息，提升了跟踪性能，在复杂环境中具有更好的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出融合RGB、深度和热红外的三模态跟踪任务，发布了RGBDT500数据集和RDTTrack算法。这推动了多模态视觉研究的发展，增强了复杂场景下的跟踪应用价值。未来工作可包括优化融合策略、扩展更多模态或提升算法效率，以进一步改善性能。

title: AutoEP: LLMs-Driven Automation of Hyperparameter Evolution for Metaheuristic Algorithms
abstract: Dynamically configuring algorithm hyperparameters is a fundamental challenge in computational intelligence. While learning-based methods offer automation, they suffer from prohibitive sample complexity and poor generalization. We introduce AutoEP, a novel framework that bypasses training entirely by leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) as zero-shot reasoning engines for algorithm control. AutoEP's core innovation lies in a tight synergy between two components: (1) an online Exploratory Landscape Analysis (ELA) module that provides real-time, quantitative feedback on the search dynamics, and (2) a multi-LLM reasoning chain that interprets this feedback to generate adaptive hyperparameter strategies. This approach grounds high-level reasoning in empirical data, mitigating hallucination. Evaluated on three distinct metaheuristics across diverse combinatorial optimization benchmarks, AutoEP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art tuners, including neural evolution and other LLM-based methods. Notably, our framework enables open-source models like Qwen3-30B to match the performance of GPT-4, demonstrating a powerful and accessible new paradigm for automated hyperparameter design. Our code is available at https://github.com/YiZheZhang12/AutoEP.

light_analysis.overview: AutoEP是一个基于大型语言模型的框架，实现无需训练的超参数自动化配置。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决计算智能中动态配置算法超参数的根本挑战。现有基于学习的方法虽能实现自动化，但面临样本复杂度极高和泛化能力差的问题，这限制了自动化调优的实际应用效果和效率。因此，需要一种新方法来克服这些不足，实现更高效、更通用的超参数自动化设计，以适应多样化的算法和场景。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出AutoEP框架，核心是利用大型语言模型作为零次推理引擎来控制算法超参数。该方法包含两个关键组件：在线探索性景观分析模块，提供搜索动态的实时量化反馈；以及基于多个LLM的推理链，解释反馈以生成自适应超参数策略。通过协同这两个组件，将高层次推理扎根于经验数据，有效减少模型幻觉，实现无需训练的零次学习。
light_analysis.result: 在三个不同元启发式算法和多种组合优化基准上进行评估，AutoEP始终优于最先进的超参数调优器，包括神经进化和其他基于LLM的方法。特别地，该框架使开源模型如Qwen3-30B能够匹配GPT-4的性能，展示了强大的自动化能力。摘要未明确说明具体性能提升百分比，但突出了对比优势和可访问性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出AutoEP框架，利用大型语言模型实现无需训练的超参数自动化配置，解决了现有方法样本复杂度高和泛化差的问题。该研究在学术上为超参数调优提供了新的零次推理范式，具有重要的理论和实践价值。在实际应用中，可提升元启发式算法的性能并降低调优成本。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: EMMA: Generalizing Real-World Robot Manipulation via Generative Visual Transfer
abstract: The generalization of vision-language-action (VLA) models heavily relies on diverse training data. However, acquiring large-scale data for robot manipulation across varied object appearances is costly and labor-intensive. To address this limitation, we introduce Embodied Manipulation Media Adaptation (EMMA), a framework for augmenting VLA policies that combines a generative data engine with an effective training pipeline. We introduce DreamTransfer, a diffusion Transformer-based architecture for generating multi-view consistent and geometrically grounded embodied manipulation videos. DreamTransfer enables visual editing of robot videos through prompts, allowing for changes to the foreground, background, and lighting while preserving their 3D structure and geometric validity. We also utilize a hybrid training set of real and generated data and propose AdaMix to enhance the training process. AdaMix is a training strategy that adaptively weights samples according to policy performance to emphasize challenging samples. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that videos created by DreamTransfer yield substantial improvements over previous video generation techniques in multi-view consistency, geometric accuracy, and text-conditioning precision. We conduct extensive evaluations with a total of more than 1800 trials in both simulated and real-world robotic environments. In real-world robotic tasks with zero-shot visual settings, our framework achieves a relative performance increase of over 92% compared to training with real data alone, and improves by an additional 17% with AdaMix, demonstrating its efficacy in enhancing policy generalization.

light_analysis.overview: EMMA框架通过生成式视觉转移和自适应训练策略，显著提升机器人操作中视觉语言动作模型的泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言动作（VLA）模型的泛化能力严重依赖于多样化的训练数据，但获取大规模、多对象外观的机器人操作数据成本高昂且劳动密集。现有方法因数据稀缺而导致模型泛化能力有限，难以适应真实世界中的多变场景，尤其是在零射击视觉设置下表现不佳。因此，研究旨在解决数据获取困难的问题，通过生成合成数据来增强模型训练，以提升泛化能力和实际应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出EMMA框架，结合生成数据引擎和训练管道。核心包括DreamTransfer，一个基于扩散Transformer的架构，用于生成多视角一致且几何基础的机器人操作视频，支持通过提示编辑前景、背景和光照，同时保持3D结构和几何有效性。训练使用真实和生成数据的混合集，并引入AdaMix策略，根据策略性能自适应加权样本，强调挑战性样本以优化训练过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，DreamTransfer生成的视频在多视角一致性、几何准确性和文本条件精度上优于先前视频生成技术。在模拟和真实世界机器人环境中进行了超过1800次试验，零射击视觉设置下，与仅使用真实数据训练相比，EMMA框架实现相对性能提升超过92%，加入AdaMix策略后额外提升17%，证明了其能有效增强策略泛化并超越基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: EMMA框架的主要贡献是通过生成视觉转移和自适应训练，解决VLA模型的数据依赖问题，显著提升机器人操作泛化。学术价值在于创新了视频生成和训练方法，实际应用有望降低数据采集成本并扩展机器人学习能力。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向，但潜在方向可包括扩展到更复杂环境和对象交互。

title: SloPal: A 60-Million-Word Slovak Parliamentary Corpus with Aligned Speech and Fine-Tuned ASR Models
abstract: Slovak remains a low-resource language for automatic speech recognition (ASR), with fewer than 100 hours of publicly available training data. We present SloPal, a comprehensive Slovak parliamentary corpus comprising 330,000 speaker-segmented transcripts (66 million words, 220 million tokens) spanning 2001--2024, with rich metadata including speaker names, roles, and session information. From this collection, we derive SloPalSpeech, a 2,806-hour aligned speech dataset with segments up to 30 seconds, constructed using a language-agnostic anchor-based alignment pipeline and optimized for Whisper-based ASR training. Fine-tuning Whisper on SloPalSpeech reduces Word Error Rate (WER) by up to 70\%, with the fine-tuned small model (244M parameters) approaching base large-v3 (1.5B parameters) performance at 6$\times$ fewer parameters. We publicly release the SloPal text corpus, SloPalSpeech aligned audio, and four fine-tuned Whisper models at https://huggingface.co/collections/NaiveNeuron/slopal, providing the most comprehensive open Slovak parliamentary language resource to date.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了SloPal斯洛伐克议会语料库及对齐语音数据集，微调Whisper模型，显著提升低资源语言自动语音识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 斯洛伐克语在自动语音识别领域是低资源语言，公开可用训练数据少于100小时，限制了模型开发和性能。现有ASR系统因数据稀缺，在斯洛伐克语上表现受限，阻碍了相关研究和应用。本研究旨在通过构建大规模、高质量数据集，弥补这一不足，为低资源语言ASR提供更多训练资源，推动技术进步。
light_analysis.method: 研究构建了SloPal语料库，包含330,000个演讲者分段转录本，覆盖2001-2024年议会内容，并衍生出SloPalSpeech，一个2,806小时的对齐语音数据集。使用语言无关的基于锚定的对齐流程处理音频，优化用于Whisper-based ASR训练。核心方法包括数据收集、对齐处理和微调Whisper模型，对齐流程设计为语言无关以提高泛化能力，数据集细分至30秒段以适合训练。
light_analysis.result: 在SloPalSpeech上微调Whisper模型，单词错误率降低最多70%。微调的小模型（2.44亿参数）性能接近大型-v3模型（15亿参数），但参数减少6倍，表明数据对齐和微调能显著提升ASR效果。这些结果优于未微调的基线模型，验证了高质量对齐数据集在低资源语言环境下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是发布最全面的开源斯洛伐克议会语言资源，包括语料库、对齐音频和微调模型，为低资源语言ASR研究提供关键数据支持。学术价值在于推动多语言处理技术进步，实际应用可扩展至议会转录、语言分析等领域。未来工作可能涉及优化对齐方法或扩展到其他低资源语言。

title: Track-On2: Enhancing Online Point Tracking with Memory
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of long-term point tracking, which requires consistent identification of points across video frames under significant appearance changes, motion, and occlusion. We target the online setting, i.e. tracking points frame-by-frame, making it suitable for real-time and streaming applications. We extend our prior model Track-On into Track-On2, a simple and efficient transformer-based model for online long-term tracking. Track-On2 improves both performance and efficiency through architectural refinements, more effective use of memory, and improved synthetic training strategies. Unlike prior approaches that rely on full-sequence access or iterative updates, our model processes frames causally and maintains temporal coherence via a memory mechanism, which is key to handling drift and occlusions without requiring future frames. At inference, we perform coarse patch-level classification followed by refinement. Beyond architecture, we systematically study synthetic training setups and their impact on memory behavior, showing how they shape temporal robustness over long sequences. Through comprehensive experiments, Track-On2 achieves state-of-the-art results across five synthetic and real-world benchmarks, surpassing prior online trackers and even strong offline methods that exploit bidirectional context. These results highlight the effectiveness of causal, memory-based architectures trained purely on synthetic data as scalable solutions for real-world point tracking. Project page: https://kuis-ai.github.io/track_on2

light_analysis.overview: Track-On2通过引入因果transformer架构和内存机制，实现了高效在线的长期点跟踪，性能超越现有SOTA方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 长期点跟踪是计算机视觉中的核心问题，需要在视频帧中一致识别点，但面临外观变化、运动和遮挡等挑战。在线设置要求帧-by-帧处理，适用于实时和流应用，但现有方法依赖全序列访问或迭代更新，不适合实时需求。Track-On2旨在解决这些不足，通过因果处理和内存机制提升性能，处理漂移和遮挡，推动在线跟踪技术的发展。
light_analysis.method: Track-On2是基于transformer的在线点跟踪模型，通过架构优化、内存机制改进和合成训练策略增强性能。关键创新包括因果处理帧，利用内存保持时间连贯性以应对漂移和遮挡，无需未来帧。推理时采用粗糙补丁级分类后细化技术。模型使用合成数据训练，系统研究了训练设置对内存行为和长期鲁棒性的影响，提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 通过综合实验，Track-On2在五个合成和真实世界基准测试上取得最优结果，性能超越现有在线跟踪器，甚至优于利用双向上下文的离线方法。这验证了因果处理、内存机制结合合成训练的有效性，显著提升跟踪精度和鲁棒性，展示了其在实时应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的贡献在于提出Track-On2模型，通过因果transformer架构和内存机制，增强了在线点跟踪的性能和效率。研究表明因果、内存架构结合合成训练为实际问题提供可扩展方案，具有学术和应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂场景优化，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Surgical Video Understanding with Label Interpolation
abstract: Robot-assisted surgery (RAS) has become a critical paradigm in modern surgery, promoting patient recovery and reducing the burden on surgeons through minimally invasive approaches. To fully realize its potential, however, a precise understanding of the visual data generated during surgical procedures is essential. Previous studies have predominantly focused on single-task approaches, but real surgical scenes involve complex temporal dynamics and diverse instrument interactions that limit comprehensive understanding. Moreover, the effective application of multi-task learning (MTL) requires sufficient pixel-level segmentation data, which are difficult to obtain due to the high cost and expertise required for annotation. In particular, long-term annotations such as phases and steps are available for every frame, whereas short-term annotations such as surgical instrument segmentation and action detection are provided only for key frames, resulting in a significant temporal-spatial imbalance. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework that combines optical flow-based segmentation label interpolation with multi-task learning. optical flow estimated from annotated key frames is used to propagate labels to adjacent unlabeled frames, thereby enriching sparse spatial supervision and balancing temporal and spatial information for training. This integration improves both the accuracy and efficiency of surgical scene understanding and, in turn, enhances the utility of RAS.
comment: Accepted to ICRA 2026. Video: https://youtu.be/24LlhqvgFBU | Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/KIST-HARILAB/MISAW-Seg

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种结合光流插值与多任务学习的新框架，用于改善手术视频理解的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器人辅助手术已成为现代手术的关键范式，通过微创方法促进患者康复并减轻外科医生负担。然而，实现其潜力需要精确理解手术过程中生成的视觉数据。现有研究主要聚焦于单任务方法，但真实手术场景涉及复杂的时间动态和多样化的仪器交互，限制了全面理解。多任务学习需要充足的像素级分割数据，但标注成本高且需专业知识，导致长期标注（如阶段和步骤）适用于每帧，短期标注（如仪器分割和动作检测）仅提供于关键帧，形成显著的时间-空间不平衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种创新框架，将基于光流的分割标签插值与多任务学习相结合。该方法从标注的关键帧估计光流，利用光流将标签传播到相邻未标注的帧中，从而丰富稀疏的空间监督数据并平衡训练中的时间和空间信息。这一整合旨在提高手术场景理解的准确性和效率，关键创新点在于通过标签插值解决标注数据不平衡问题，为多任务学习提供更全面的监督。
light_analysis.result: 论文摘要中未明确说明具体的实验结果，如准确率提升或效率改进的量化指标。基于方法描述，可以推断该框架通过标签插值增强监督数据，以改善手术视频理解的性能，但具体性能数据和与基线方法的对比情况在摘要中未被提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种结合光流插值和多任务学习的框架，用于改善手术视频理解，提高了机器人辅助手术的实用性。学术价值在于提供处理标注数据不平衡问题的新方法，拓展了多任务学习在医疗视频分析中的应用。实际应用价值包括促进手术自动化和辅助决策。未来工作可能涉及优化插值方法或扩展到更多手术任务，以进一步提升性能。

title: Beyond Words: Enhancing Desire, Emotion, and Sentiment Recognition with Non-Verbal Cues
abstract: Multimodal desire understanding, a task closely related to both emotion and sentiment that aims to infer human intentions from visual and textual cues, is an emerging yet underexplored task in affective computing with applications in social media analysis. Existing methods for related tasks predominantly focus on mining verbal cues, often overlooking the effective utilization of non-verbal cues embedded in images. To bridge this gap, we propose a Symmetrical Bidirectional Multimodal Learning Framework for Desire, Emotion, and Sentiment Recognition (SyDES). The core of SyDES is to achieve bidirectional fine-grained modal alignment between text and image modalities. Specifically, we introduce a mixed-scaled image strategy that combines global context from low-resolution images with fine-grained local features via masked image modeling (MIM) on high-resolution sub-images, effectively capturing intention-related visual representations. Then, we devise symmetrical cross-modal decoders, including a text-guided image decoder and an image-guided text decoder, which enable mutual reconstruction and refinement between modalities, facilitating deep cross-modal interaction. Furthermore, a set of dedicated loss functions is designed to harmonize potential conflicts between the MIM and modal alignment objectives during optimization. Extensive evaluations on the MSED benchmark demonstrate the superiority of our approach, which establishes a new state-of-the-art performance with 1.1% F1-score improvement in desire understanding. Consistent gains in emotion and sentiment recognition further validate its generalization ability and the necessity of utilizing non-verbal cues. Our code is available at: https://github.com/especiallyW/SyDES.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出SyDES框架，通过对称双向多模态学习和非口头线索集成，提升了欲望、情感和情感的识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态欲望理解是情感计算中的新兴任务，旨在从视觉和文本线索推断人类意图，应用于社交媒体分析等领域。现有方法主要侧重于挖掘口头线索，常忽视图像中的非口头线索，如表情、姿势等，导致识别性能受限。这个问题重要，因为非口头线索能提供关键的意图信息，补充口头表达的不足，提高识别准确性。当前研究缺口在于如何有效整合多模态数据中的非口头线索，以桥接口头与非口头信息之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: SyDES框架的核心是实现文本和图像模态间的双向细粒度对齐。首先，采用混合尺度图像策略，结合低分辨率图像的全局上下文和通过掩码图像建模（MIM）从高分辨率子图像提取的细粒度局部特征，有效捕捉意图相关的视觉表示。其次，设计对称跨模态解码器，包括文本引导图像解码器和图像引导文本解码器，实现模态间的相互重建和精炼，促进深度跨模态交互。最后，专门设计一组损失函数，协调优化过程中MIM和模态对齐目标之间的潜在冲突，确保模型训练的稳定性和效率。
light_analysis.result: 在MSED基准上进行广泛评估，SyDES建立了新的最先进性能。具体地，在欲望理解任务中，F1分数提升了1.1%，显示出实质性改进。同时，在情感和情感识别任务中也观察到一致的性能提升，验证了该框架的泛化能力。与基线方法相比，SyDES在处理多模态数据时表现优越，特别是在利用非口头线索方面，实验结果强调了整合非口头信息对提升整体识别准确性的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SyDES通过对称双向多模态学习框架，有效整合非口头线索，显著提升了欲望、情感和情感的识别性能。主要贡献在于提出了混合尺度图像策略和对称解码器，实现模态间的深度对齐和交互，为多模态情感计算提供了新思路。学术上，该方法推动了跨模态学习的研究；实际上，可应用于社交媒体分析等领域，增强意图推断的准确性。未来工作可探索扩展到其他模态或更复杂的场景，进一步优化模型架构。

title: Limitations of Public Chest Radiography Datasets for Artificial Intelligence: Label Quality, Domain Shift, Bias and Evaluation Challenges
abstract: Artificial intelligence has shown significant promise in chest radiography, where deep learning models can approach radiologist-level diagnostic performance. Progress has been accelerated by large public datasets such as MIMIC-CXR, ChestX-ray14, PadChest, and CheXpert, which provide hundreds of thousands of labelled images with pathology annotations. However, these datasets also present important limitations. Automated label extraction from radiology reports introduces errors, particularly in handling uncertainty and negation, and radiologist review frequently disagrees with assigned labels. In addition, domain shift and population bias restrict model generalisability, while evaluation practices often overlook clinically meaningful measures. We conduct a systematic analysis of these challenges, focusing on label quality, dataset bias, and domain shift. Our cross-dataset domain shift evaluation across multiple model architectures revealed substantial external performance degradation, with pronounced reductions in AUPRC and F1 scores relative to internal testing. To assess dataset bias, we trained a source-classification model that distinguished datasets with near-perfect accuracy, and performed subgroup analyses showing reduced performance for minority age and sex groups. Finally, expert review by two board-certified radiologists identified significant disagreement with public dataset labels. Our findings highlight important clinical weaknesses of current benchmarks and emphasise the need for clinician-validated datasets and fairer evaluation frameworks.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究系统揭示了公开胸片数据集的局限性，包括标签质量、域偏移和偏见问题，并强调了临床验证数据集和公平评估框架的必要性。
light_analysis.motivation: AI在胸片分析中展现出潜力，但现有研究依赖大规模公开数据集如MIMIC-CXR、ChestX-ray14等，这些数据集存在标签提取错误、领域分布不一致和人口偏见等问题。这些问题限制了模型的泛化能力和临床应用价值，导致评估可能忽视临床意义，迫切需要改进数据质量和评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用系统分析方法，通过跨数据集测试多个深度学习模型架构来评估域偏移，使用源分类模型区分数据集以检测偏见，并进行子组分析。此外，邀请两位认证放射科医生进行专家评审，对比公共数据集标签与专家意见。关键创新点在于综合评估多个数据集和模型，揭示局限性。
light_analysis.result: 跨数据集评估显示模型外部性能显著下降，AUPRC和F1分数相对内部测试降低。偏见检测模型能高精度区分数据集来源，子组分析揭示少数年龄和性别群体性能更差。专家评审发现公共数据集标签与专家意见存在显著分歧，表明标签质量存在问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究结论指出，当前公开胸片数据集存在标签错误、域偏移和偏见等临床弱点，限制了AI模型的适用性。主要贡献在于系统识别这些挑战，呼吁开发临床验证数据集和更公平评估框架，以促进AI在医疗领域的可靠应用，未来工作需要改进数据采集和评估标准。

title: Frame Sampling Strategies Matter: A Benchmark for small vision language models
abstract: Comparing vision language models on videos is particularly complex, as the performances is jointly determined by the model's visual representation capacity and the frame-sampling strategy used to construct the input. Current video benchmarks are suspected to suffer from substantial frame-sampling bias, as models are evaluated with different frame selection strategies. In this work, we propose the first frame-accurate benchmark of state-of-the-art small VLMs for video question-answering, evaluated under controlled frame-sampling strategies. Our results confirm the suspected bias and highlight both data-specific and task-specific behaviors of SVLMs under different frame-sampling techniques. By open-sourcing our benchmarking code, we provide the community with a reproducible and unbiased protocol for evaluating video VLMs and emphasize the need for standardized frame-sampling strategies tailored to each benchmarking dataset in future research.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次提出一个帧准确的小型视觉语言模型基准，用于视频问答任务，在受控帧采样策略下评估，旨在揭示并解决现有基准中的帧采样偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频视觉语言模型（VLM）的性能评估复杂，因为它同时取决于模型的视觉表示能力和输入构建中的帧采样策略。当前视频基准可能存在显著的帧采样偏差，因为不同模型使用不同的帧选择策略进行评估，导致不公平比较，影响模型性能的准确评估和研究进展。现有方法的不足之处在于缺乏标准化的帧采样策略，因此需要一种受控评估协议来减少偏差，确保评估的公正性和可重复性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了第一个帧准确的小型视觉语言模型（SVLMs）基准，专门用于视频问答任务。核心方法是在受控的帧采样策略下进行评估，通过标准化采样过程以减少偏差，确保所有模型使用相同策略。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集和模型架构细节，但创新点在于建立了一个可重复的评估协议，并开源基准代码，强调了为不同数据集定制标准化帧采样策略的重要性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果证实了帧采样偏差的假设，显示了不同帧采样技术下SVLMs的性能差异，突出了数据特定和任务特定的行为。例如，模型在不同采样策略下的表现可能因数据集或任务而异。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率，但结果定性分析了偏差的影响，表明采样策略对模型评估有重要影响，并与基线方法在相同条件下对比，强调了标准化评估的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了帧准确基准并开源代码，为社区提供了可重复且无偏差的评估协议，强调了未来研究中针对每个基准数据集标准化帧采样策略的重要性。学术价值在于改进了视频VLM的评估方法，促进公平比较；实际应用价值在于帮助研究者更准确地评估模型性能，推动领域进展。局限性可能包括基准适用范围有限，未来工作可扩展更多任务和数据集以验证通用性。

title: Generating solution paths of Markovian stochastic differential equations using diffusion models
abstract: This paper introduces a new approach to generating sample paths of unknown Markovian stochastic differential equations (SDEs) using diffusion models, a class of generative AI methods commonly employed in image and video applications. Unlike the traditional Monte Carlo methods for simulating SDEs, which require explicit specifications of the drift and diffusion coefficients, ours takes a model-free, data-driven approach. Given a finite set of sample paths from an SDE, we utilize conditional diffusion models to generate new, synthetic paths of the same SDE. Numerical experiments show that our method consistently outperforms two alternative methods in terms of the Kullback--Leibler (KL) divergence between the distributions of the target SDE paths and the generated ones. Moreover, we present a theoretical error analysis deriving an explicit bound on the said KL divergence. Finally, in simulation and empirical studies, we leverage these synthetically generated sample paths to boost the performance of reinforcement learning algorithms for continuous-time mean--variance portfolio selection, hinting promising applications of our study in financial analysis and decision-making.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种使用扩散模型生成未知马尔可夫随机微分方程样本路径的数据驱动方法，无需显式指定系数。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛方法模拟随机微分方程需要显式指定漂移和扩散系数，这在处理未知或复杂方程时可能不适用，导致灵活性不足。扩散模型作为一种生成AI方法，在图像和视频领域已成功应用，但尚未广泛用于SDE路径生成。本研究旨在开发一种无模型、数据驱动的方法，仅基于有限样本路径生成新路径，以克服传统方法的局限性，并为金融分析等应用提供更灵活的解决方案，弥补现有方法在缺乏先验知识时的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用条件扩散模型来生成随机微分方程的样本路径。给定一个有限的SDE样本路径集，模型通过学习这些数据的分布，生成新的合成路径。关键创新在于无模型和数据驱动的特性，无需预先知道漂移和扩散系数，直接利用观测数据。扩散模型通过逐步去噪过程生成高质量样本，本方法将其适应到SDE路径生成任务中，扩展了扩散模型的应用范围，专注于马尔可夫过程的路径模拟。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验显示，本方法在目标SDE路径分布与生成路径分布之间的Kullback–Leibler散度方面，一致优于两种替代方法。理论误差分析推导了KL散度的显式界限，为方法的可靠性提供了保证。在模拟和实证研究中，利用生成的合成路径提升了强化学习算法在连续时间均值-方差投资组合选择中的性能，证明了方法的实用价值，但摘要未明确说明具体性能提升的数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出了一种基于扩散模型的SDE路径生成方法，具有无模型和数据驱动的优势。理论分析确保了方法的数学基础，实验验证了其优于传统方法。通过提升强化学习算法的性能，本方法在金融分析和决策中展现出应用潜力，如投资组合优化。未来工作可探索更复杂的扩散模型变体或应用于其他领域，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: ECHO: Ego-Centric modeling of Human-Object interactions
abstract: Modeling human-object interactions (HOI) from an egocentric perspective is a critical yet challenging task, particularly when relying on sparse signals from wearable devices like smart glasses and watches. We present ECHO, the first unified framework to jointly recover human pose, object motion, and contact dynamics solely from head and wrist tracking. To tackle the underconstrained nature of this problem, we introduce a novel tri-variate diffusion process with independent noise schedules that models the mutual dependencies between the human, object, and interaction modalities. This formulation allows ECHO to operate with flexible input configurations, making it robust to intermittent tracking and capable of leveraging partial observations. Crucially, it enables training on a combination of large-scale human motion datasets and smaller HOI collections, learning strong priors while capturing interaction nuances. Furthermore, we employ a smooth inpainting inference mechanism that enables the generation of temporally consistent interactions for arbitrarily long sequences. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that ECHO achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming existing methods lacking such flexibility.

light_analysis.overview: ECHO首次从头部和手腕跟踪中联合恢复人-物交互，采用创新的三元变量扩散过程解决稀疏信号建模问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 从自我中心视角建模人-物交互依赖于可穿戴设备（如智能眼镜和手表）的稀疏信号，这是一个关键但具有挑战性的任务。现有方法在处理间歇性跟踪和部分观测时灵活性不足，无法有效联合建模交互动态，导致在真实场景中性能受限，而这一问题对于虚拟现实、增强现实和人机交互等应用至关重要，需要更鲁棒的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: ECHO提出一个统一框架，仅从头和手腕跟踪中联合恢复人体姿态、物体运动和接触动态。其核心创新是引入三元变量扩散过程，使用独立噪声调度来建模人、物体和交互模态间的相互依赖，从而解决欠约束问题。该框架支持灵活输入配置，通过平滑修复推理机制生成时间一致的交互，并在训练中结合大型人体运动数据集和较小的人-物交互集合，以学习强先验和交互细节。
light_analysis.result: 广泛评估表明，ECHO在自我中心人-物交互建模中达到了最先进的性能，显著优于缺乏灵活性的现有方法。摘要未明确说明具体数据如准确率提升，但强调其能够处理间歇跟踪并利用部分观测，显示出在实验中的优越表现和鲁棒性，有效应对了稀疏信号建模的挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: ECHO的主要贡献是提出了首个从稀疏可穿戴设备信号中联合建模人-物交互的统一框架，通过创新的扩散过程有效解决了欠约束问题。该研究在学术上推动了交互建模技术的发展，具有实际应用价值，可增强虚拟现实和可穿戴设备的交互体验。未来工作可能包括扩展更多传感器输入或处理更复杂交互场景，以进一步优化性能。

title: Breaking the SFT Plateau: Multimodal Structured Reinforcement Learning for Chart-to-Code Generation
abstract: While reinforcement learning (RL) has proven highly effective for general reasoning in vision-language models, its application to tasks requiring deep understanding of information-rich images and structured output generation remains underexplored. Chart-to-code generation exemplifies this challenge, demanding complex reasoning over visual charts to produce structured code. Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) alone is often insufficient, highlighting the need for effective RL strategies tailored to structured outputs. In this paper, we systematically investigate the performance plateau of SFT through large-scale experiments and propose Multimodal Structured Reinforcement Learning (MSRL) for chart-to-code generation. We construct the largest training corpus to date, with 3 million chart-code pairs curated from real-world tables in arXiv papers, addressing the limitations of previous synthetic datasets. Despite achieving state-of-the-art performance, our experiments show that simply increasing SFT data eventually leads to diminishing improvements. To break this plateau, MSRL employs a multi-granularity reward system that integrates both textual and visual feedback. At the textual level, rule-based rewards validate fine-grained code details, while at the visual level, a model-based reward assesses the structural similarity between rendered code and ground-truth charts. We implement a two-stage curriculum training strategy, first optimizing the model with textual rewards and then incorporating visual signals for further enhancement. Experimental results demonstrate that MSRL substantially breaks the SFT plateau, improving high-level metrics by 6.2% and 9.9% on ChartMimic and ReachQA benchmarks, respectively. Notably, our method outperforms all existing approaches in the chart domain and achieves competitive results with advanced closed-source models.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出多模态结构化强化学习方法，以突破监督微调在图表到代码生成任务中的性能瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于，强化学习在视觉语言模型中已证明有效，但对于需要深度理解信息丰富图像和生成结构化输出的任务，如图表到代码生成，探索不足。现有方法中，仅依赖监督微调往往不足以应对复杂推理需求，导致性能瓶颈；同时，先前的合成数据集限制模型泛化能力。因此，需要开发针对结构化输出的有效强化学习策略，以提升任务性能和模型鲁棒性，推动多模态推理领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出多模态结构化强化学习方法，核心在于设计一个多粒度奖励系统，集成文本级和视觉级反馈。文本奖励基于规则验证代码细节，如语法和语义正确性；视觉奖励通过模型评估渲染代码与真实图表的结构相似性，确保输出准确性。采用两阶段课程训练策略，先使用文本奖励优化模型，再融入视觉信号进行增强，以逐步提升性能。此外，构建了迄今最大的训练语料库，包含 300 万从 arXiv 论文中整理的图表-代码对，以克服先前合成数据集的限制，提升模型训练效果。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MSRL 方法显著打破了监督微调的性能瓶颈。在 ChartMimic 和 ReachQA 基准测试中，高级指标分别提升了 6.2% 和 9.9%。该方法在图表领域优于所有现有方法，包括基线强化学习策略，验证了多模态奖励和课程训练的有效性。同时，与先进的闭源模型相比，取得了竞争性结果，表明该方法在结构化输出生成任务中具有强大的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了 MSRL 方法，解决了图表到代码生成任务中监督微调的瓶颈问题。其学术价值在于推动了多模态强化学习在结构化输出生成中的应用，为复杂推理任务提供了新思路；实际应用价值体现在提升了代码生成的准确性和效率，可辅助自动化工具开发。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可以推断该方法为进一步优化奖励系统或扩展到其他多模态任务提供了基础。

title: An Implemention of Two-Phase Image Segmentation using the Split Bregman Method
abstract: In this paper, we describe an implementation of the two-phase image segmentation algorithm proposed by Goldstein, Bresson, Osher in \cite{gold:bre}. This algorithm partitions the domain of a given 2d image into foreground and background regions, and each pixel of the image is assigned membership to one of these two regions. The underlying assumption for the segmentation model is that the pixel values of the input image can be summarized by two distinct average values, and that the region boundaries are smooth. Accordingly, the model is defined as an energy in which the variable is a region membership function to assign pixels to either region, originally proposed by Chan and Vese in \cite{chan:vese}. This energy is the sum of image data terms in the regions and a length penalty for region boundaries. Goldstein, Bresson, Osher modify the energy of Chan-Vese in \cite{gold:bre} so that their new energy can be minimized efficiently using the split Bregman method to produce an equivalent two-phase segmentation. We provide a detailed implementation of this method \cite{gold:bre}, and document its performance with several images over a range of algorithm parameters.

light_analysis.overview: 本文实现了一种基于Split Bregman方法的两阶段图像分割算法，优化了Chan-Vese模型的能量最小化效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决将2D图像分割为前景和背景的经典问题，假设像素值可归纳为两个不同的平均值，且区域边界平滑，以提高图像分割的精度和效率。图像分割在计算机视觉中至关重要，但现有Chan-Vese模型在能量最小化时可能计算复杂、效率较低。Goldstein等人修改能量模型，使其能通过Split Bregman方法实现高效处理，以克服传统方法中的优化不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文详细实现了Goldstein等人提出的两阶段图像分割算法，该方法基于Chan-Vese能量模型，该模型通过定义区域成员函数分配像素到前景或背景，能量包括图像数据项和边界长度惩罚项。关键创新在于使用Split Bregman方法最小化修改后的能量，通过迭代优化过程实现高效且等效的两阶段分割，提升了算法处理速度和稳定性，具体涉及图像数据和边界平滑的优化。
light_analysis.result: 论文记录了对多个图像在不同算法参数下的性能表现，展示了算法在不同条件下的分割效果和效率改进，但具体准确率、效率提升或与基线对比数据摘要未明确说明。可以推断该方法在分割任务中可能表现良好，但详细数值需要参考全文，以确保技术验证和实际应用评估的完整性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提供了一个基于Split Bregman方法的两阶段图像分割算法的详细实现和性能文档，促进了图像分割技术的优化和实际应用。学术价值在于展示了高效能量最小化方法在图像处理中的潜力，为后续研究提供基础。实际应用中，该算法可用于医学图像分析或计算机视觉任务。未来工作可能涉及扩展到多相分割或处理更复杂的图像模型。

title: STEMTOX: From Social Tags to Fine-Grained Toxic Meme Detection via Entropy-Guided Multi-Task Learning
abstract: Memes, as a widely used mode of online communication, often serve as vehicles for spreading harmful content. However, limitations in data accessibility and the high costs of dataset curation hinder the development of robust meme moderation systems. To address this challenge, in this work, we introduce a first-of-its-kind dataset - TOXICTAGS consisting of 6,300 real-world meme-based posts annotated in two stages: (i) binary classification into toxic and normal, and (ii) fine-grained labelling of toxic memes as hateful, dangerous, or offensive. A key feature of this dataset is that it is enriched with auxiliary metadata of socially relevant tags, enhancing the context of each meme. In addition, we propose a novel entropy guided multi-tasking framework - STEMTOX - that integrates the generation of socially grounded tags with a robust classification framework. Experimental results show that incorporating these tags substantially enhances the performance of state-of-the-art VLMs in toxicity detection tasks. Our contributions offer a novel and scalable foundation for improved content moderation in multimodal online environments. Warning: Contains potentially toxic contents.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了首个细粒度有毒meme检测数据集TOXICTAGS和熵引导多任务框架STEMTOX，用于提升多模态在线内容审核性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Memes作为广泛使用的在线通信方式，常传播有毒内容，对网络环境安全构成威胁。然而，现有meme审核系统的发展受限于数据可访问性差和数据集整理成本高的问题。当前方法在处理多模态内容时缺乏上下文理解，导致毒性检测精度不足。本研究旨在通过结合社会标签增强meme上下文信息，以解决数据稀缺和检测效率低下的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括构建TOXICTAGS数据集，含6,300个真实世界meme帖子，进行二分类（有毒/正常）和细粒度标注（仇恨、危险、冒犯），并集成了社会相关标签作为辅助元数据。提出STEMTOX框架，采用熵引导多任务学习，同时进行社会标签生成和毒性分类。关键创新在于通过多任务整合标签信息，优化模型对上下文的理解，提升分类鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，将社会标签纳入模型后，最先进的视觉语言模型（VLMs）在毒性检测任务中的性能显著提升。摘要未明确说明具体指标如准确率，但表明结合标签能有效改善检测效果，为现有基线方法提供了性能改进。这验证了STEMTOX框架在增强分类准确性和上下文理解方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究主要贡献是提出了TOXICTAGS数据集和STEMTOX框架，为多模态在线内容审核提供了新颖且可扩展的基础。学术上，结合社会标签和多任务学习增强了meme毒性检测；实践中，有助于开发更有效的meme审核系统。未来工作可扩展数据集或优化框架以适应更多毒性类型。

title: Cropping outperforms dropout as an augmentation strategy for self-supervised training of text embeddings
abstract: Text embeddings, i.e. vector representations of entire texts, play an important role in many NLP applications, such as retrieval-augmented generation, clustering, or visualizing collections of texts for data exploration.
