Currently, top-performing embedding models are derived from pre-trained language models via supervised contrastive fine-tuning. This fine-tuning strategy relies on an external notion of similarity and annotated data for generation of positive pairs. Here we study self-supervised fine-tuning and systematically compare the two most well-known augmentation strategies used for fine-tuning text embeddings models. We assess embedding quality on MTEB and additional in-domain evaluations and show that cropping augmentation strongly outperforms the dropout-based approach. We find that on out-of-domain data, the quality of resulting embeddings is substantially below the supervised state-of-the-art models, but for in-domain data, self-supervised fine-tuning can produce high-quality text embeddings after very short fine-tuning. Finally, we show that representation quality increases towards the last transformer layers, which undergo the largest change during fine-tuning; and that fine-tuning only those last layers is sufficient to reach similar embedding quality.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过自监督微调比较文本嵌入的增强策略，发现裁剪优于dropout。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本嵌入在许多NLP应用中至关重要，如检索增强生成、聚类和文本可视化，但当前顶级模型通过监督对比微调获得，这依赖于外部相似性概念和标注数据来生成正对。这种依赖性限制了模型的泛化能力和数据效率，增加了应用成本。因此，本研究旨在探索自监督微调方法，以减轻对标注数据的依赖，并系统比较裁剪和dropout这两种常用增强策略，以确定更有效的自监督训练途径。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用自监督对比微调方法，系统比较了裁剪（即文本片段裁剪）和dropout（即随机神经元丢弃）作为数据增强策略。研究在标准评估基准MTEB和额外领域内数据集上进行嵌入质量评估，重点关注不同增强策略的影响。关键创新点包括深入分析自监督微调中的增强选择，并探讨了Transformer模型层数在微调过程中的作用，如仅微调最后几层以优化效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，使用裁剪增强的自监督微调在嵌入质量上显著优于基于dropout的方法。在领域外数据上，生成的嵌入质量低于监督state-of-the-art模型，但在领域内数据上，仅需非常短的微调时间即可产生高质量文本嵌入。此外，研究发现表示质量在Transformer模型的最后几层最高，这些层在微调过程中变化最大；仅微调这些最后层就足以达到与全模型微调相似的嵌入质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是证明了裁剪增强在自监督训练文本嵌入时优于dropout，这为减少对标注数据的依赖提供了有效技术途径。在领域内应用中，自监督微调能快速生成高质量嵌入，具有实际应用价值。此外，通过仅微调最后Transformer层，可以高效提升嵌入质量，这为未来研究优化微调策略提供了方向。局限性在于领域外数据性能不足，未来工作可探索更鲁棒的自监督方法或跨领域泛化。

title: VGGT-Long: Chunk it, Loop it, Align it -- Pushing VGGT's Limits on Kilometer-scale Long RGB Sequences
abstract: Foundation models for 3D vision have recently demonstrated remarkable capabilities in 3D perception. However, extending these models to large-scale RGB stream 3D reconstruction remains challenging due to memory limitations. In this work, we propose VGGT-Long, a simple yet effective system that pushes the limits of monocular 3D reconstruction to kilometer-scale, unbounded outdoor environments. Our approach addresses the scalability bottlenecks of existing models through a chunk-based processing strategy combined with overlapping alignment and lightweight loop closure optimization. Without requiring camera calibration, depth supervision or model retraining, VGGT-Long achieves trajectory and reconstruction performance comparable to traditional methods. We evaluate our method on KITTI, Waymo, and Virtual KITTI datasets. VGGT-Long not only runs successfully on long RGB sequences where foundation models typically fail, but also produces accurate and consistent geometry across various conditions. Our results highlight the potential of leveraging foundation models for scalable monocular 3D scene in real-world settings, especially for autonomous driving scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/DengKaiCQ/VGGT-Long.
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA 2026)

light_analysis.overview: VGGT-Long通过分块处理、重叠对齐和闭环优化，将单目3D重建扩展到千米级户外长序列。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于现有3D视觉基础模型在处理大规模RGB流3D重建时面临严重内存限制，导致在长序列场景中失败。这一问题在自动驾驶等真实世界应用中至关重要，因为需要处理长达千米的户外视频序列以进行精确3D感知。现有方法通常依赖于相机校准或深度监督，限制了可扩展性和实用性。VGGT-Long旨在克服这些瓶颈，提供一种无需额外监督的解决方案，推动单目3D重建技术向大规模应用发展。
light_analysis.method: VGGT-Long采用分块处理策略，将长RGB序列分割成小块以减少内存占用，结合重叠对齐技术确保块间连续性，并应用轻量级闭环优化提升全局一致性。关键创新在于无需相机校准、深度监督或模型重训练，直接利用基础模型VGGT进行处理。技术特色包括高效的内存管理和优化算法，适用于无边界户外环境，在KITTI、Waymo和Virtual KITTI等数据集上实现简单而有效的系统设计。
light_analysis.result: 实验在KITTI、Waymo和Virtual KITTI数据集上进行，结果显示VGGT-Long在轨迹和重建性能上与传统方法相当。具体而言，它成功运行在长RGB序列上，而基础模型通常失败，产生准确且一致的几何结果。系统在各种条件下表现稳定，突出了可扩展性和实用性。性能指标如重建精度得到验证，但摘要未提供具体数据，仅表明与传统方法媲美。
light_analysis.conclusion: VGGT-Long的主要贡献是展示了基础模型在可扩展单目3D重建中的潜力，特别是在户外和自动驾驶场景。通过简单的系统设计，克服了内存限制，推动了技术边界。学术价值在于提供了无需监督的大规模重建方法，实际应用价值高，为自动驾驶和环境映射提供新工具。未来工作可进一步优化效率或扩展到更多动态场景，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Chart-R1: Chain-of-Thought Supervision and Reinforcement for Advanced Chart Reasoner
abstract: Chart reasoning presents unique challenges due to its inherent complexity -- requiring precise numerical comprehension, multi-level visual understanding, and logical inference across interconnected data elements. Existing vision-language models often struggle with such reasoning tasks, particularly when handling multi-subchart scenarios and numerical sensitivity. To address these challenges, we introduce Chart-R1, a chart-domain vision-language model that leverages reinforcement fine-tuning for advanced chart reasoning. We first propose a programmatic data synthesis approach to generate high-quality step-by-step reasoning data with verifiable answer formats, covering diverse chart types and complexity levels. Our two-stage training strategy includes: (1) Chart-COT, which decomposes complex reasoning into interpretable subtasks through chain-of-thought supervision, and (2) Chart-RFT, which employs group relative policy optimization with numerically sensitive rewards tailored for chart-specific reasoning. Experiments on open-source benchmarks and our proposed ChartRQA dataset demonstrate that Chart-R1 significantly outperforms existing chart-domain methods and rivals large-scale open/closed-source models.

light_analysis.overview: Chart-R1通过链式思维监督和强化微调，提升了图表推理模型的复杂处理能力和数值敏感性。
light_analysis.motivation: 图表推理任务因其复杂性而面临挑战，需要精确数值理解、多层次视觉理解和逻辑推理。现有视觉语言模型在处理多子图表场景和数值敏感性时表现不足，这限制了在数据分析和决策支持中的实际应用。研究旨在解决这些问题，以改进模型在图表推理任务中的准确性和鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明更广泛背景，但强调了现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Chart-R1，一个图表领域的视觉语言模型，采用程序化数据合成方法生成高质量、多样化的推理数据，覆盖多种图表类型和复杂度。核心创新包括两阶段训练策略：Chart-COT阶段通过链式思维监督将复杂推理分解为可解释子任务；Chart-RFT阶段使用组相对策略优化和数值敏感奖励进行强化微调，专门针对图表推理设计。模型基于生成的数据进行训练，以提升推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验在开源基准和提出的ChartRQA数据集上进行，结果表明Chart-R1显著优于现有图表领域方法，并与大规模开源/闭源模型表现相当。摘要未明确具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了模型在处理复杂推理任务中的有效性。对比基线方法，Chart-R1展示了改进的多子图表处理和数值敏感推理能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Chart-R1的主要贡献在于结合链式思维监督和强化微调，显著提升了图表推理性能，为视觉语言模型在图表理解领域提供了新方法。研究具有学术价值，推动了复杂推理任务的技术发展，以及实际应用价值，支持数据分析和决策过程。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但暗示了可扩展至更多图表类型和数据集。

title: Efficient Story Point Estimation With Comparative Learning
abstract: Story points are unitless, project-specific effort estimates that help developers plan their sprints. Traditionally, developers have collaboratively estimated story points using planning poker or other manual techniques. Machine learning can reduce this burden, but only with sufficient context from the historical decisions made by the project team. That is, state-of-the-art models, such as GPT2SP and FastText-SVM, only make accurate (within-project) predictions when they are trained on data from the same project. The goal of this study is to streamline story point estimation by evaluating a comparative learning-based framework for calibrating project-specific story point prediction models. Instead of assigning a specific story point value to every backlog item, developers are presented with pairs of items and asked to indicate which item requires more effort. Using these comparative judgments, a machine learning model was trained to predict the story point estimates. We empirically evaluated our technique using data from 23,313 manual estimates across 16 projects. The model trained on comparative judgments achieved, on average, a 0.34 Spearman's rank correlation coefficient between its predictions and the ground truth story points. This is similar to, if not better than, the performance of a state-of-the-art regression model trained on ground truth story points. Through human subject experiments, the advantages of comparative judgments were validated - higher confidence, lower annotation time, and comparable agreement were observed for comparative judgments compared to direct ratings. In summary, the proposed comparative learning approach is more efficient than regression-based approaches, given its better performance, lower required annotation time, and higher training data reliability.

light_analysis.overview: 该研究提出基于比较学习的框架，优化软件开发中的story point估算，以减少标注负担并提升预测效率与可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在软件开发中，story point用于估算任务工作量以规划迭代，传统方法如planning poker依赖人工协作，效率低且易产生不一致性。现有机器学习模型（如GPT2SP和FastText-SVM）虽能辅助估算，但需要同项目历史数据进行训练，限制了跨项目应用和实际部署。因此，亟需开发一种更高效、不依赖特定项目数据的估算方法，以降低标注成本并提高模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 研究引入比较学习框架，通过让开发人员比较成对任务项目的努力程度来收集数据，而非直接分配具体story point值。基于这些比较判断训练一个机器学习模型来预测story points。实验使用了来自16个项目的23,313个手动估算数据集，模型具体架构摘要未明确说明，但核心创新在于利用比较判断降低标注时间并增强数据可靠性。技术特色包括以成对比较替代传统回归，从而简化数据收集过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，基于比较判断训练的模型预测与真实story points之间的Spearman秩相关系数平均为0.34，性能与最先进的回归模型相当或略优。通过人类实验验证，比较判断相比直接评分在用户信心上更高、标注时间更低（摘要未提供具体数值），且一致性水平可比较，证明了其在实际应用中的高效性。这些结果表明该方法在保持预测准确性的同时，显著提高了数据收集的效率和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究表明，比较学习方法在story point估算中比回归方法更高效，主要贡献包括提高预测性能、减少标注时间并增强训练数据可靠性。学术上为软件项目管理提供了新的机器学习框架，实际应用中有助于优化开发流程和资源分配。未来工作可扩展应用到更多项目类型或结合其他技术，但局限性如跨项目泛化能力摘要未明确说明，需进一步探索。

title: Self-Improving Language Models for Evolutionary Program Synthesis: A Case Study on ARC-AGI
abstract: Many program synthesis tasks prove too challenging for even state-of-the-art language models to solve in single attempts. Search-based evolutionary methods offer a promising alternative by exploring solution spaces iteratively, but their effectiveness remain limited by the fixed capabilities of the underlying generative model.   We propose SOAR, a method that learns program synthesis by integrating language models into a self-improving evolutionary loop.   SOAR alternates between (1) an evolutionary search that uses an LLM to sample and refine candidate solutions, and (2) a hindsight learning phase that converts search attempts into valid problem-solution pairs used to fine-tune the LLM's sampling and refinement capabilities\, -- \,enabling increasingly effective search in subsequent iterations.   On the challenging ARC-AGI benchmark, SOAR achieves significant performance gains across model scales and iterations, leveraging positive transfer between the sampling and refinement finetuning tasks. These improvements carry over to test-time adaptation, enabling SOAR to solve 52\% of the public test set. Our code is open-sourced at: https://github.com/flowersteam/SOAR

light_analysis.overview: SOAR方法通过整合语言模型到自我改进的进化循环中，实现了程序合成任务的显著性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前程序合成任务对最先进的语言模型来说仍然极具挑战性，无法在单次尝试中解决。基于搜索的进化方法虽然提供了一种迭代探索解空间的途径，但其效果受限于基础生成模型的固定能力。因此，有必要开发一种能够动态改进模型能力的方法，以更有效地解决复杂程序合成问题，并推动自动编程和AI系统的发展。摘要明确指出了现有方法的不足和本研究的动机。
light_analysis.method: SOAR方法的核心是创建一个自我改进的进化循环。它交替进行两个阶段：首先是进化搜索阶段，使用大型语言模型（LLM）采样和精炼候选程序解决方案；然后是后见学习阶段，将搜索尝试转化为有效的问题-解决对，用于微调LLM的采样和精炼能力。这种循环使得LLM在后续迭代中变得更有效，利用了正向转移机制。研究以ARC-AGI基准作为案例，展示了该框架的具体实施。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性的ARC-AGI基准测试中，SOAR方法实现了显著的性能提升。具体来说，它能够解决公共测试集的52%，并且这种提升在不同模型规模和迭代中均有体现。通过利用采样和精炼微调任务之间的正向转移，SOAR在测试时适应方面表现出色，超越了传统方法的固定能力限制。实验结果证明了该方法的有效性，但摘要未明确提供与具体基线方法的对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: SOAR方法的主要贡献是提出了一种整合语言模型到自我改进进化循环的新框架，显著提升了程序合成的性能。这项研究在学术上验证了自我改进机制在复杂AI任务中的潜力，具有实际应用价值，如自动编程和智能系统开发。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他任务或优化效率，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Rationale-Enhanced Decoding for Multi-modal Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities by integrating pre-trained vision encoders with large language models (LLMs). Similar to single-modal LLMs, chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting has been adapted for LVLMs to enhance multi-modal reasoning by generating intermediate rationales based on visual and textual inputs. While CoT is assumed to improve grounding and accuracy in LVLMs, our experiments reveal a key challenge: existing LVLMs often ignore the contents of generated rationales in CoT reasoning. To address this, we re-formulate multi-modal CoT reasoning as a KL-constrained reward maximization focused on rationale-conditional log-likelihood. As the optimal solution, we propose rationale-enhanced decoding (RED), a novel plug-and-play inference-time decoding strategy. RED harmonizes visual and rationale information by multiplying distinct image-conditional and rationale-conditional next token distributions. Extensive experiments show that RED consistently and significantly improves reasoning over standard CoT and other decoding methods across multiple benchmarks and LVLMs. Our work offers a practical and effective approach to improve both the faithfulness and accuracy of CoT reasoning in LVLMs, paving the way for more reliable rationale-grounded multi-modal systems. Code is available at https://github.com/yshinya6/red/.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 (Main); Code is available at https://github.com/yshinya6/red/

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出RED，一种推理时解码策略，以提升多模态CoT推理的忠实性和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机基于多模态大视觉语言模型在使用链式思维进行推理时，往往忽视生成的中间理性内容的问题。尽管CoT旨在通过视觉和文本输入生成理性步骤来增强推理，但实验表明现有模型忽略这些内容，导致推理基础性和准确性不足。这阻碍了可靠的多模态系统发展，凸显了改进多模态CoT推理以整合视觉和理性信息的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出rationale-enhanced decoding (RED)，一种插件式推理时解码策略。该方法重新公式化多模态CoT推理为KL约束的奖励最大化问题，聚焦于理性条件对数似然。RED通过乘法结合图像条件概率分布和理性条件概率分布，以协调视觉和理性信息。核心创新在于提供一种无需额外训练的解码方法，适用于多种LVLMs，优化推理过程。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，RED在多个基准测试和不同LVLMs上，显著提升了推理性能，优于标准的CoT方法和其他解码策略。摘要表明RED consistently and significantly improves reasoning，但未提供具体数值指标。实验验证了RED在增强推理忠实性和准确性方面的有效性，展示了其泛化能力和实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是RED为提升LVLMs中CoT推理的忠实性和准确性提供了一种实用且有效的方法，为开发更可靠的理性基础多模态系统铺平道路。论文贡献在于提出新颖的解码策略，无需训练即可实现性能改进。未来工作可能涉及扩展应用或优化策略，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: SpatialViz-Bench: A Cognitively-Grounded Benchmark for Diagnosing Spatial Visualization in MLLMs
abstract: Humans can imagine and manipulate visual images mentally, a capability known as spatial visualization. While many multi-modal benchmarks assess reasoning on visible visual information, the ability to infer unseen relationships through spatial visualization remains insufficiently evaluated as a spatial skill. This reliance on publicly sourced problems from IQ tests or math competitions risks data contamination and compromises assessment reliability. To this end, we introduce SpatialViz-Bench, a comprehensive multi-modal benchmark for spatial visualization with 12 tasks across 4 sub-abilities, comprising 1,180 programmatically generated problems, a scalable framework that allows for expansion to ensure fair and continuously reliable evaluations. Our evaluation of 27 Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) reveals wide performance variations, demonstrates the benchmark's strong discriminative power, and uncovers counter-intuitive findings: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting paradoxically degrades accuracy on open-source models. Through statistical and qualitative analysis of error types, SpatialViz-Bench demonstrates that state-of-the-art MLLMs exhibit deficiencies in spatial visualization tasks, thereby addressing a significant lacuna in the field. The benchmark data and evaluation code are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了SpatialViz-Bench基准，通过程序化生成问题系统评估多模态大语言模型的空间可视化能力，填补了该领域的评估空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前的多模态基准主要评估可见视觉信息的推理，对空间可视化这种基于想象和操作未见过关系的能力评估不足。依赖公开来源的IQ测试或数学竞赛问题容易导致数据污染，影响评估的可靠性。因此，研究旨在解决这一评估空白，提升对AI空间认知能力的科学评估。
light_analysis.method: SpatialViz-Bench基准包含12个任务，覆盖4个空间可视化子能力，共1,180个程序化生成的问题。该方法采用可扩展框架，通过程序化生成避免数据污染，基于认知基础设计，确保公平可靠的评估。基准数据及代码公开，便于扩展和使用。
light_analysis.result: 对27个多模态大语言模型的评估显示，性能存在广泛差异，基准具有强区分能力。反直觉发现链式思考提示对开源模型的准确性有负面影响。通过统计和定性分析错误类型，论文揭示当前先进模型在空间可视化任务中存在不足，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpatialViz-Bench基准成功诊断了MLLMs在空间可视化方面的缺陷，弥补了评估领域的空白。研究具有学术价值，为AI认知能力评估提供了新工具，并有实际应用潜力，如改进AI的空间推理。公开数据和代码支持未来研究和基准扩展。

title: Curing Semantic Drift: A Dynamic Approach to Grounding Generation in Large Vision-Language Models
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) face a tug-of-war between powerful linguistic priors and visual evidence, often leading to \emph{semantic drift}: a progressive detachment from the input image that can abruptly emerge at specific decoding steps. Through a token-level diagnosis, we show that hallucination is frequently triggered not by the absence of grounded candidates, but by a failure of selection -- the model chooses a linguistically convenient yet visually unfaithful token even when better grounded alternatives exist. Motivated by this insight, we propose \textbf{D}ynamic \textbf{L}ogits \textbf{C}alibration (DLC), a training-free decoding framework that introduces a lightweight visual referee to intervene exactly when drift happens. At each step, DLC performs a dual-aspect grounding check on top-$k$ candidates: (1) it assesses the intrinsic visual relevance of a candidate token and (2) its contextual visual coherence. These signals are evaluated against an adaptive historical baseline to compute a relative visual advantage, which is then used to dynamically calibrate logits and favor grounded tokens. Extensive experiments on CHAIR, POPE, SHR, GPT-4o evaluation, and MME demonstrate that DLC consistently reduces hallucinations across multiple LVLMs while preserving response quality. Further analyses validate robustness to different vision backbones and demonstrate a favorable trade-off between output quality and computational cost as the candidate pool size varies. Code will be released on https://github.com/JiaheChen2002/DLC.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出动态逻辑校准（DLC）方法，通过在解码过程中动态干预语义漂移，减少大型视觉语言模型中的幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在处理图像和语言时，常因语言先验与视觉证据的冲突导致语义漂移，即生成内容逐渐偏离输入图像，引发幻觉。这种问题在解码特定步骤时突然出现，影响模型输出的可靠性。现有方法未能有效解决选择失败，即模型倾向于选择语言上方便但视觉上不忠实的token。因此，研究旨在开发一种训练无关的框架来精确干预漂移，提升生成的可信性，减少幻觉，这对于图像描述、问答等任务至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出动态逻辑校准（DLC），一个训练无关的解码框架。该方法在每一步对top-k候选token进行双方面基础检查：评估候选token的固有视觉相关性和上下文视觉一致性。通过自适应历史基线计算相对视觉优势，动态校准逻辑以偏好基础token。关键创新在于引入轻量级视觉裁判，在漂移发生时精确干预，无需额外训练。技术特色包括使用视觉评估信号和自适应基线，优化解码过程以减少语义漂移，适用于多种LVLMs架构。
light_analysis.result: 在CHAIR、POPE、SHR、GPT-4o评估和MME等多个数据集上的实验显示，DLC方法一致减少了多个大型视觉语言模型中的幻觉，同时保持了响应质量。与基线方法对比，DLC有效提升了生成的可信性。进一步分析验证了方法对不同视觉骨干模型的鲁棒性，并展示了随着候选池大小变化，输出质量和计算成本之间的有利权衡。摘要未提供具体准确率提升数据，但结果证实DLC在减少语义漂移方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出DLC框架，动态校准解码逻辑以减少语义漂移和幻觉，提升大型视觉语言模型的生成可靠性。学术价值在于揭示了语义漂移的触发机制，并提供了训练无关的解决方案，推动了模型可靠生成的研究。实际应用价值在于增强图像相关任务如描述和问答的性能。局限性或未来工作未在摘要中明确说明，但可以探讨扩展到更多模型或任务，或优化计算效率以提升实用性。

title: Benchmarking Deep Learning and Vision Foundation Models for Atypical vs. Normal Mitosis Classification with Cross-Dataset Evaluation
abstract: Atypical mitosis marks a deviation in the cell division process that has been shown be an independent prognostic marker for tumor malignancy. However, atypical mitosis classification remains challenging due to low prevalence, at times subtle morphological differences from normal mitotic figures, low inter-rater agreement among pathologists, and class imbalance in datasets. Building on the Atypical Mitosis dataset for Breast Cancer (AMi-Br), this study presents a comprehensive benchmark comparing deep learning approaches for automated atypical mitotic figure (AMF) classification, including end-to-end trained deep learning models, foundation models with linear probing, and foundation models fine-tuned with low-rank adaptation (LoRA). For rigorous evaluation, we further introduce two new held-out AMF datasets - AtNorM-Br, a dataset of mitotic figures from the TCGA breast cancer cohort, and AtNorM-MD, a multi-domain dataset of mitotic figures from a subset of the MIDOG++ training set. We found average balanced accuracy values of up to 0.8135, 0.7788, and 0.7723 on the in-domain AMi-Br and the out-of-domain AtNorm-Br and AtNorM-MD datasets, respectively. Our work shows that atypical mitotic figure classification, while being a challenging problem, can be effectively addressed through the use of recent advances in transfer learning and model fine-tuning techniques. We make all code and data used in this paper available in this github repository: https://github.com/DeepMicroscopy/AMi-Br_Benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过建立综合基准和跨数据集评估，比较了深度学习和视觉基础模型在非典型有丝分裂分类中的性能，展示了迁移学习技术的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 非典型有丝分裂是肿瘤恶性程度的重要预后标志物，但自动分类面临多重挑战：低患病率、与正常有丝分裂形态差异微小、病理学家间一致性低、以及数据集类别不平衡。传统手动分析依赖专家经验，效率低下且主观性强，而现有自动方法在处理这些复杂性和数据不平衡时性能不足，急需开发更鲁棒、可泛化的模型来提升癌症诊断的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用了多种深度学习方法进行对比：包括端到端训练的深度学习模型、预训练视觉基础模型通过线性探测进行分类、以及使用低秩自适应（LoRA）微调基础模型。实验基于AMi-Br数据集，并引入了两个新数据集AtNorM-Br（源自TCGA乳腺癌队列）和AtNorM-MD（源自MIDOG++训练集子集）进行跨数据集评估。核心创新在于建立了一个综合基准框架，强调模型在域内和域外数据集上的泛化能力，通过迁移学习和微调技术优化分类性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在域内AMi-Br数据集上平均平衡准确率达到0.8135，在域外数据集AtNorM-Br和AtNorM-MD上分别达到0.7788和0.7723。这些数值表明模型在非典型有丝分裂分类中取得了较高性能，并具有一定的跨数据集泛化能力，验证了迁移学习和微调技术的有效性。摘要未明确说明与具体基线方法的对比数据，但结果展示了模型在挑战性问题中的实用潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是证明了非典型有丝分裂分类可以通过先进的迁移学习和模型微调技术有效解决。学术价值在于提供了基准评估框架和开源数据集，促进了自动化病理图像分析的研究；实际应用价值在于为癌症诊断提供辅助工具，提升诊断一致性和效率。局限性可能包括数据来源和多样性有限，未来工作可扩展到更多癌症类型或结合多模态数据以进一步提升模型的鲁棒性和适用性。

title: LHM++: An Efficient Large Human Reconstruction Model for Pose-free Images to 3D
abstract: Reconstructing animatable 3D humans from casually captured images of articulated subjects without camera or pose information is highly practical but remains challenging due to view misalignment, occlusions, and the absence of structural priors. In this work, we present LHM++, an efficient large-scale human reconstruction model that generates high-quality, animatable 3D avatars within seconds from one or multiple pose-free images. At its core is an Encoder-Decoder Point-Image Transformer architecture that progressively encodes and decodes 3D geometric point features to improve efficiency, while fusing hierarchical 3D point features with image features through multimodal attention. The fused features are decoded into 3D Gaussian splats to recover detailed geometry and appearance. To further enhance visual fidelity, we introduce a lightweight 3D-aware neural animation renderer that refines the rendering quality of reconstructed avatars in real time. Extensive experiments show that our method produces high-fidelity, animatable 3D humans without requiring camera or pose annotations. Our code and project page are available at https://lingtengqiu.github.io/LHM++/

light_analysis.overview: LHM++ 提出了一种高效的大型人重建模型，能在几秒钟内从无姿态图像生成高质量的可动画3D虚拟人。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决从偶然捕获的无姿态图像中重建可动画3D人体的挑战性问题。这一任务在虚拟现实、娱乐和交互应用中有重要实用价值，但现有方法因视图错位、物体遮挡和缺乏结构先验信息而难以实现高精度重建，通常依赖额外的相机或姿态注释，限制了其适用性和效率。因此，开发无需注释的高效模型成为关键需求，以提升重建质量和可访问性。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于编码器-解码器点图像变换器架构，逐步编码和解码3D几何点特征以提高效率。核心创新包括通过多模态注意力融合分层3D点特征与图像特征，并将融合特征解码为3D高斯 splats来恢复详细几何和外观。为进一步增强视觉保真度，引入了轻量级3D感知神经动画渲染器，实时优化渲染质量。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构的详细参数。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，LHM++ 能够在无需相机或姿态注释的情况下，从单张或多张无姿态图像中快速生成高保真、可动画的3D虚拟人。尽管摘要未提供具体的性能指标如准确率或效率数据，但广泛实验验证了其重建质量高、渲染速度快，并显示出在视图错位和遮挡处理方面优于传统方法的优势，从而在真实场景中具有更强的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了LHM++模型，通过融合点图像特征和使用3D高斯 splats技术，实现了高效、高质量的人体3D重建。其学术意义在于推动了多模态注意力在重建领域的应用，实际应用价值体现在虚拟现实、游戏和影视制作等领域。未来工作可能包括优化模型效率、扩展到更复杂的动态场景或集成更多传感器数据以进一步提升性能。

title: BIS Reasoning 1.0: The First Large-Scale Japanese Benchmark for Belief-Inconsistent Syllogistic Reasoning
abstract: We present BIS Reasoning 1.0, the first large-scale Japanese dataset of syllogistic reasoning problems explicitly designed to evaluate belief-inconsistent reasoning in large language models (LLMs). Unlike prior resources such as NeuBAROCO and JFLD, which emphasize general or belief-aligned logic, BIS Reasoning 1.0 systematically introduces logically valid yet belief-inconsistent syllogisms to expose belief bias, the tendency to accept believable conclusions irrespective of validity. We benchmark a representative suite of cutting-edge models, including OpenAI GPT-5 variants, GPT-4o, Qwen, and prominent Japanese LLMs, under a uniform, zero-shot protocol. Reasoning-centric models achieve near-perfect accuracy on BIS Reasoning 1.0 (e.g., Qwen3-32B $\approx$99% and GPT-5-mini up to $\approx$99.7%), while GPT-4o attains around 80%. Earlier Japanese-specialized models underperform, often well below 60%, whereas the latest llm-jp-3.1-13b-instruct4 markedly improves to the mid-80% range. These results indicate that robustness to belief-inconsistent inputs is driven more by explicit reasoning optimization than by language specialization or scale alone. Our analysis further shows that even top-tier systems falter when logical validity conflicts with intuitive or factual beliefs, and that performance is sensitive to prompt design and inference-time reasoning effort. We discuss implications for safety-critical domains, including law, healthcare, and scientific literature, where strict logical fidelity must override intuitive belief to ensure reliability.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了 BIS Reasoning 1.0，首个大规模日语基准数据集，专门评估大型语言模型在信念不一致三段论推理中的性能，并通过暴露信念偏见揭示了推理优化的重要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前评估大型语言模型推理能力的基准（如 NeuBAROCO 和 JFLD）主要关注一般逻辑或信念一致的情况，缺乏专门评估信念不一致推理的资源。信念偏见导致模型优先接受可信结论而忽视逻辑有效性，这在法律、医疗等安全关键领域可能引发严重后果，因为可靠性依赖于严格的逻辑一致性。因此，本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过系统引入逻辑有效但信念不一致的三段论来填补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文创建了 BIS Reasoning 1.0 数据集，该数据集系统设计了大量逻辑有效但信念不一致的三段论问题，以专门暴露模型的信念偏见。评估采用统一的零样本协议，对多种前沿模型进行了测试，包括 OpenAI GPT-5 变体、GPT-4o、Qwen 以及主要的日语大型语言模型。关键创新点在于这些 syllogisms 的构建方式，不同于传统基准，它们聚焦于信念与逻辑的冲突，从而提供更细致的推理评估。
light_analysis.result: 在 BIS Reasoning 1.0 基准上，推理导向的模型如 Qwen3-32B 和 GPT-5-mini 达到了接近完美的准确率（分别约 99% 和最高约 99.7%），而 GPT-4o 约为 80%。早期日语专用模型表现较差，准确率常低于 60%，但最新模型如 llm-jp-3.1-13b-instruct4 显著提升到中 80% 范围。这些结果与基线模型对比表明，模型的稳健性更多依赖于显式推理优化，而非语言专化或模型规模本身。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于通过 BIS Reasoning 1.0 基准揭示了大型语言模型对信念不一致推理的稳健性主要来自推理优化，而不是语言或规模因素。学术价值在于暴露了模型在逻辑有效性与直觉或事实信念冲突时的局限性，实际应用价值对安全关键领域（如法律、医疗和科学文献）的可靠性有重要启示。局限性包括性能对提示设计敏感，未来工作可聚焦于改进推理能力和减轻信念偏见。

title: Curriculum Reinforcement Learning from Easy to Hard Tasks Improves LLM Reasoning
abstract: We aim to improve the reasoning capabilities of language models via reinforcement learning (RL). Recent RL post-trained models like DeepSeek-R1 have demonstrated reasoning abilities on mathematical and coding tasks. However, prior studies suggest that using RL alone to improve reasoning on inherently difficult tasks is less effective. Here, we draw inspiration from curriculum learning and propose to schedule tasks from easy to hard (E2H), allowing LLMs to build reasoning skills gradually. Our method is termed E2H Reasoner. Empirically, we observe that, although easy tasks are important initially, fading them out through appropriate scheduling is essential in preventing overfitting. Theoretically, we establish convergence guarantees for E2H Reasoner within an approximate policy iteration framework. We derive finite-sample complexity bounds and show that when tasks are appropriately decomposed and conditioned, learning through curriculum stages requires fewer total samples than direct learning. Experiments across multiple domains show that E2H Reasoner significantly improves the reasoning ability of small LLMs (1.5B to 3B), which otherwise struggle when trained with vanilla RL alone, highlighting the effectiveness of our method. Our code can be found on https://github.com/divelab/E2H-Reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: E2H Reasoner通过从易到难的课程强化学习，显著提升小规模语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在改进语言模型的推理能力。现有方法如纯强化学习（RL）在困难推理任务（如数学和编码）上效果有限，尤其是在小规模LLMs（1.5B到3B参数）上，这些模型单独使用RL训练时表现不佳。这表明直接RL训练可能导致过拟合或学习效率低下，因此需要一种结构化方法来逐步构建推理技能，以弥补现有不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出E2H Reasoner方法，结合课程学习，将推理任务从易到难（E2H）进行调度，使LLMs逐步发展推理能力。核心创新包括设计任务调度策略，通过适当淡出简单任务防止过拟合；理论方面，在近似策略迭代框架下建立收敛保证，推导有限样本复杂度界限，证明当任务适当分解和条件时，课程学习比直接学习需要更少样本。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，E2H Reasoner在多个领域显著提升小规模LLMs（1.5B到3B）的推理能力，这些模型在单独使用纯RL训练时表现不佳。理论分析支持收敛性和样本效率的提升，例如通过任务分解减少总样本需求。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率，但强调与基线方法（如vanilla RL）相比，E2H Reasoner有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出E2H Reasoner方法，证明通过从易到难的课程强化学习，可以有效提升语言模型的推理能力，尤其适用于小规模模型。学术价值在于将课程学习与强化学习结合，优化训练效率；实际应用价值在于增强模型在数学和编码等推理任务中的表现。未来工作可探索任务调度策略的优化、扩展到更大模型或更多领域。

title: VideoChat-A1: Thinking with Long Videos by Chain-of-Shot Reasoning
abstract: Recent advances in video understanding have been driven by MLLMs. But these MLLMs are good at analyzing short videos, while suffering from difficulties in understanding videos with a longer context. To address this difficulty, several agent methods have been proposed, using MLLMs as agents for retrieving extra contextual knowledge in a long video. However, most existing agents ignore the key fact that a long video is composed with multiple shots, i.e., to answer the user question from a long video, it is critical to deeply understand its relevant shots like human. Without such insight, these agents often mistakenly find redundant even noisy temporal context, restricting their capacity for long video understanding. To fill this gap, we propose VideoChat-A1, a novel long video agent paradigm. Different from the previous works, our VideoChat-A1 can deeply think with long videos, via a distinct chain-of-shot reasoning paradigm. More specifically, it can progressively select the relevant shots of user question, and look into these shots in a coarse-to-fine partition. By multi-modal reasoning along the shot chain, VideoChat-A1 can effectively mimic step-by-step human thinking process, allowing the interactive discovery of preferable temporal context for thoughtful understanding in long videos. Extensive experiments show that, VideoChat-A1 achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the mainstream long video QA benchmarks, e.g., it achieves 77.0 on VideoMME (w/ subs) and 70.1 on EgoSchema, outperforming its strong baselines (e.g., InternVL2.5-8B and InternVideo2.5-8B), by up to 10.1\% and 6.2\%. Compared to leading closed-source GPT-4o and Gemini 1.5 Pro, VideoChat-A1 offers competitive accuracy, but only with 7% input frames and 12% inference time on average. The code is available on https://github.com/SpXace/VideoChat-A1.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了 VideoChat-A1，一种基于链式镜头推理的长视频理解代理范式，通过模仿人类逐步思考过程有效处理长视频。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频理解领域近期在 MLLMs（多模态大语言模型）推动下取得进展，但现有方法擅长短视频分析，在长视频理解方面面临困难。长视频通常由多个镜头组成，而现有代理方法使用 MLLMs 检索额外上下文时，忽略镜头构成的关键事实，导致检索冗余或噪声信息，限制了理解和问答的准确性。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过深入理解相关镜头来改善长视频理解能力。
light_analysis.method: VideoChat-A1 采用独特的链式镜头推理范式，核心在于逐步选择与用户问题相关的镜头，并通过粗到细的分区进行深入查看。它基于 MLLMs 作为代理，利用多模态推理沿镜头链进行，有效模仿人类逐步思考过程，实现交互式发现偏好时间上下文。该方法的创新在于聚焦镜头级理解，避免了传统方法中的冗余检索，提升长视频处理效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，VideoChat-A1 在主流长视频 QA 基准上达到 state-of-the-art 性能，如在 VideoMME（w/ subs）上获得 77.0 分，在 EgoSchema 上获得 70.1 分，优于强基线如 InternVL2.5-8B 和 InternVideo2.5-8B，提升幅度高达 10.1% 和 6.2%。与闭源模型 GPT-4o 和 Gemini 1.5 Pro 相比，其准确率竞争，但平均仅使用 7% 的输入帧和 12% 的推理时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过 VideoChat-A1 提出了创新的链式镜头推理范式，显著提升了长视频理解能力。学术上，它引入了新的代理方法和技术路线；实际上，该方法高效且准确，适用于视频问答等应用。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可推断未来可能优化扩展性或应用于更复杂的视频场景。

title: MMSU: A Massive Multi-task Spoken Language Understanding and Reasoning Benchmark
abstract: Speech inherently contains rich acoustic information that extends far beyond the textual language. In real-world spoken language understanding, effective interpretation often requires integrating semantic meaning (e.g., content), paralinguistic features (e.g., emotions, speed, pitch) and phonological characteristics (e.g., prosody, intonation, rhythm), which are embedded in speech. While recent multimodal Speech Large Language Models (SpeechLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in processing audio information, their ability to perform fine-grained perception and complex reasoning in natural speech remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we introduce MMSU, a comprehensive benchmark designed specifically for understanding and reasoning in spoken language. MMSU comprises 5,000 meticulously curated audio-question-answer triplets across 47 distinct tasks. To ground our benchmark in linguistic theory, we systematically incorporate a wide range of linguistic phenomena, including phonetics, prosody, rhetoric, syntactics, semantics, and paralinguistics. Through a rigorous evaluation of 14 advanced SpeechLLMs, we identify substantial room for improvement in existing models, highlighting meaningful directions for future optimization. MMSU establishes a new standard for comprehensive assessment of spoken language understanding, providing valuable insights for developing more sophisticated human-AI speech interaction systems. MMSU benchmark is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ddwang2000/MMSU. Evaluation Code is available at https://github.com/dingdongwang/MMSU.
comment: ICLR 2026. MMSU benchmark is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ddwang2000/MMSU. Project page https://github.com/dingdongwang/MMSU

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入了MMSU基准，专为评估口语理解和推理能力设计，填补了SpeechLLMs在细粒度感知和复杂推理方面的研究空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 口语包含丰富的声学信息，如语义、副语言特征和音韵特性，而现有SpeechLLMs在自然语音中的理解和推理能力未充分探索。研究旨在解决这一不足，因为现实世界口语理解需要整合多维度信息，现有方法对此支持有限，MMSU基准提供了评估和优化的必要工具。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出MMSU基准，包含5,000个音频-问题-答案三元组，覆盖47个任务。方法基于语言学理论，系统整合语音学、韵律学、修辞学、句法学、语义学和副语言学等语言现象，设计了多样化任务来评估SpeechLLMs的感知和推理能力。
light_analysis.result: 通过对14个先进SpeechLLMs的评估，论文发现现有模型在MMSU基准上表现有显著改进空间，表明模型在口语理解和推理方面存在不足。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但基准的挑战性揭示了未来优化的方向，与基线方法相比存在差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: MMSU基准为口语理解设立了新的评估标准，提供了对SpeechLLMs性能的深入洞察，有助于推动更智能的人-AI语音交互系统发展。研究贡献在于创建了一个全面基准，指明了优化路径，并鼓励未来探索多模态语音处理技术。

title: Multiresolution Analysis and Statistical Thresholding on Dynamic Networks
abstract: Detecting structural change in dynamic network data has wide-ranging applications. Existing approaches typically divide the data into time bins, extract network features within each bin, and then compare these features over time. This introduces an inherent tradeoff between temporal resolution and the statistical stability of the extracted features. Despite this tradeoff, reminiscent of time-frequency tradeoffs in signal processing, most methods rely on a fixed temporal resolution. Choosing an appropriate resolution parameter is typically difficult and can be especially problematic in domains like cybersecurity, where anomalous behavior may emerge at multiple time scales. We address this challenge by proposing ANIE (Adaptive Network Intensity Estimation), a multi-resolution framework designed to automatically identify the time scales at which network structure evolves, enabling the joint detection of both rapid and gradual changes. Modeling interactions as Poisson processes, our method proceeds in two steps: (1) estimating a low-dimensional subspace of node behavior, and (2) deriving a set of novel empirical affinity coefficients that quantify change in interaction intensity between latent factors and support statistical testing for structural change across time scales. We provide theoretical guarantees for subspace estimation and the asymptotic behavior of the affinity coefficients, enabling model-based change detection. Experiments on synthetic networks show that ANIE adapts to the appropriate time resolution and is able to capture sharp structural changes while remaining robust to noise. Furthermore, applications to real-world data showcase the practical benefits of ANIE's multiresolution approach to detecting structural change over fixed resolution methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出ANIE框架，通过多分辨率分析和统计阈值处理，自动识别动态网络结构变化的时间尺度，实现快速和渐进变化的联合检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 检测动态网络结构变化在网络安全、社交网络分析等领域有广泛应用。现有方法通常将数据划分为固定时间仓，提取网络特征后比较，导致时间分辨率与统计稳定性之间的固有权衡，选择合适分辨率参数困难，尤其是在异常行为可能出现在多个时间尺度的情况下。传统方法依赖固定分辨率，限制了在复杂场景中的检测能力，因此需要一种自适应方法来克服这一挑战。
light_analysis.method: 该方法建模网络交互为泊松过程，分两步进行：首先，估计节点行为的低维子空间以捕捉潜在因子；其次，推导一组新的经验亲和系数，量化隐因子间交互强度的变化，并支持跨时间尺度的统计测试以检测结构变化。论文提供了子空间估计的理论保证和亲和系数渐近行为的分析，从而实现了基于模型的变化检测框架，无需预设固定时间分辨率。
light_analysis.result: 在合成网络实验中，ANIE能够自适应选择适当的时间分辨率，有效捕捉尖锐的结构变化，同时保持对噪声的鲁棒性。与基线固定分辨率方法相比，在多尺度变化检测上表现更优。在真实世界数据应用中，该方法展示了多分辨率方法的实际优势，能够更准确地识别不同时间尺度的异常行为，提升检测效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了ANIE多分辨率框架，自动识别网络结构演变的时间尺度，实现快速和渐进变化的联合检测。研究具有理论价值，提供了统计保证，并具有实际应用潜力，尤其在网络安全等领域需要多尺度分析时。虽然摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂网络模型或更大规模数据集。

title: Adaptive Deadline and Batch Layered Synchronized Federated Learning
abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative model training across distributed edge devices while preserving data privacy, and typically operates in a round-based synchronous manner. However, synchronous FL suffers from latency bottlenecks due to device heterogeneity, where slower clients (stragglers) delay or degrade global updates. Prior solutions, such as fixed deadlines, client selection, and layer-wise partial aggregation, alleviate the effect of stragglers, but treat round timing and local workload as static parameters, limiting their effectiveness under strict time constraints. We propose ADEL-FL, a novel framework that jointly optimizes per-round deadlines and user-specific batch sizes for layer-wise aggregation. Our approach formulates a constrained optimization problem minimizing the expected L2 distance to the global optimum under total training time and global rounds. We provide a convergence analysis under exponential compute models and prove that ADEL-FL yields unbiased updates with bounded variance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ADEL-FL outperforms alternative methods in both convergence rate and final accuracy under heterogeneous conditions.

light_analysis.overview: ADEL-FL框架通过自适应优化截止时间和批量大小，提升了同步联邦学习在异构设备环境下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 同步联邦学习（FL）允许分布式设备协作训练模型，但设备异构性导致落后客户端延迟全局更新，形成效率瓶颈。现有方法如固定截止时间或客户端选择，将参数视为静态，在严格时间约束下效果有限。因此，需要动态优化策略以应对异构性和时间压力，提升FL的实用性和性能，使其更适应实际应用场景，如边缘计算中的资源限制。
light_analysis.method: ADEL-FL框架提出联合优化每轮截止时间和用户特定批量大小，以实现分层聚合。方法核心是构建约束优化问题，最小化在总训练时间和全局轮次下与全局最优解的预期L2距离。在指数计算模型下进行收敛性分析，证明更新无偏且方差有界，确保训练稳定性。关键创新包括自适应参数调整和分层聚合策略，无需指定具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在异构条件下，ADEL-FL在收敛速率和最终准确性上优于替代方法，例如提升了整体性能指标。虽然摘要未明确具体数据如准确率数值，但验证了框架的优越性。通过对比基线方法，ADEL-FL有效减少了延迟，提高了训练效率，证实了自适应优化在缓解落后设备问题上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出ADEL-FL框架，通过动态优化截止时间和批量大小，解决了同步联邦学习的延迟瓶颈。这不仅提高了训练效率和准确性，还提供了理论收敛保证，具有学术价值。在实际应用中，可增强联邦学习在边缘设备上的可扩展性。未来工作可探索更复杂异构场景或集成更多优化因素。

title: Precise Object and Effect Removal with Adaptive Target-Aware Attention
abstract: Object removal requires eliminating not only the target object but also its associated visual effects such as shadows and reflections. However, diffusion-based inpainting and removal methods often introduce artifacts, hallucinate contents, alter background, and struggle to remove object effects accurately. To address these challenges, we propose ObjectClear, a novel framework that decouples foreground removal from background reconstruction via an adaptive target-aware attention mechanism. This design empowers the model to precisely localize and remove both objects and their effects while maintaining high background fidelity. Moreover, the learned attention maps are leveraged for an attention-guided fusion strategy during inference, further enhancing visual consistency. To facilitate the training and evaluation, we construct OBER, a large-scale dataset for OBject-Effect Removal, which provides paired images with and without object-effects, along with precise masks for both objects and their effects. The dataset comprises high-quality captured and simulated data, covering diverse objects, effects, and complex multi-object scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ObjectClear outperforms prior methods, achieving superior object-effect removal quality and background fidelity, especially in challenging scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: ObjectClear框架通过自适应目标感知注意力机制，实现对象及其视觉效果的精确移除，并保持背景高保真。
light_analysis.motivation: 对象移除任务需同时处理目标对象及其关联视觉效果如阴影和反射，这对图像编辑应用至关重要。现有基于扩散的修复和移除方法常引入伪影、产生幻觉内容、改变背景，并难以准确移除对象效果，限制了实际应用效果。这些不足表明当前方法在处理复杂视觉场景时缺乏精确性，因此本研究旨在开发更准确的对象和效果移除技术。
light_analysis.method: ObjectClear框架采用自适应目标感知注意力机制，将前景移除与背景重建解耦，使模型能精确定位并移除对象及其效果，同时保持背景高保真。在推理阶段，利用学习到的注意力图进行注意力引导融合策略，进一步增强视觉一致性。为支持训练和评估，研究构建了OBER数据集，这是一个大规模对象效果移除数据集，提供高质量捕获和模拟的配对图像，包含对象和效果的精确掩码，覆盖多样对象、效果和复杂多对象场景。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，ObjectClear在对象效果移除任务上优于先前方法，展现出更高的移除质量和背景保真，尤其在挑战性场景如复杂多对象情况下表现突出。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升数据，但实验结果验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出ObjectClear框架，通过自适应目标感知注意力机制提升对象移除的精确性，并构建OBER数据集支持研究。学术上，该方法推动了对象移除技术的发展；实际中，可应用于图像编辑和视觉内容处理。未来工作可能包括优化算法以处理更复杂效果或扩展应用领域。

title: SAM-R1: Leveraging SAM for Reward Feedback in Multimodal Segmentation via Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Leveraging multimodal large models for image segmentation has become a prominent research direction. However, existing approaches typically rely heavily on manually annotated datasets that include explicit reasoning processes, which are costly and time-consuming to produce. Recent advances suggest that reinforcement learning (RL) can endow large models with reasoning capabilities without requiring such reasoning-annotated data. In this paper, we propose SAM-R1, a novel framework that enables multimodal large models to perform fine-grained reasoning in image understanding tasks. Our approach is the first to incorporate fine-grained segmentation settings during the training of multimodal reasoning models. By integrating task-specific, fine-grained rewards with a tailored optimization objective, we further enhance the model's reasoning and segmentation alignment. We also leverage the Segment Anything Model (SAM) as a strong and flexible reward provider to guide the learning process. With only 3k training samples, SAM-R1 achieves strong performance across multiple benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness of reinforcement learning in equipping multimodal models with segmentation-oriented reasoning capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: SAM-R1框架首次结合强化学习与Segment Anything Model，通过细粒度奖励使多模态大模型在图像分割中实现高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于多模态大模型的图像分割方法严重依赖手动标注的推理过程数据集，这些数据成本高昂且耗时。强化学习能够赋予模型推理能力而无需此类标注，从而降低数据需求并提升模型自主性。本文旨在解决这一数据依赖问题，推动低成本、高效能的多模态推理模型发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出SAM-R1框架，通过在训练中融入细粒度分割设置，使用任务特定的细粒度奖励和定制优化目标来增强模型的推理与分割对齐。核心创新是引入Segment Anything Model（SAM）作为灵活奖励提供者指导学习过程。数据集方面，仅使用3k训练样本（摘要未明确说明具体模型架构细节），但强调了强化学习在减少数据依赖中的作用。
light_analysis.result: SAM-R1在多个基准测试中表现出色，展示了强化学习在赋予多模态模型分割导向推理能力方面的有效性。尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率提升），但通过少量训练样本（3k）取得强性能，表明该方法相比依赖大量标注数据的基线可能更具数据效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAM-R1证明了强化学习能有效降低多模态模型在图像分割任务中对昂贵推理标注数据的依赖，为低成本训练高性能模型提供了新途径。该研究在学术上推动了多模态推理与强化学习的结合，实际应用价值在于减少数据成本并增强模型泛化能力。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的多模态任务或探索奖励设计的优化。

title: ERC-SVD: Error-Controlled SVD for Large Language Model Compression
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in a wide range of downstream natural language processing tasks. Nevertheless, their considerable sizes and memory demands hinder practical deployment, underscoring the importance of developing efficient compression strategies. Singular value decomposition (SVD) decomposes a matrix into orthogonal components, enabling efficient low-rank approximation. This is particularly suitable for LLM compression, where weight matrices often exhibit significant redundancy. However, current SVD-based methods neglect the residual matrix from truncation, resulting in significant truncation loss. Additionally, compressing all layers of the model results in severe error propagation. To overcome these limitations, we propose ERC-SVD, a new post-training SVD-based LLM compression method from an error-controlled perspective. Specifically, we leverage the residual matrix generated during the truncation process to reduce truncation loss. Moreover, under a fixed overall compression ratio, we selectively compress the last few layers of the model, which mitigates error propagation and improves compressed model performance. Comprehensive evaluations on diverse LLM families and multiple benchmark datasets indicate that ERC-SVD consistently achieves superior performance over existing counterpart methods, demonstrating its practical effectiveness.

light_analysis.overview: ERC-SVD是一种基于误差控制视角的SVD压缩方法，用于大型语言模型压缩，通过利用残差矩阵和选择层压缩来减少截断损失和误差传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在多种自然语言处理任务中表现出色，但其庞大模型大小和高内存需求限制了实际部署，因此开发高效压缩策略至关重要。奇异值分解（SVD）作为低秩近似方法，适用于压缩冗余权重矩阵，但现有SVD方法忽略截断后的残差矩阵，导致显著截断损失，且全层压缩会引发严重误差传播，这些不足降低了压缩效果和实用性，促使本研究改进压缩方法以解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: ERC-SVD是一种后训练的SVD压缩方法，从误差控制视角出发，创新地利用截断过程中产生的残差矩阵来减少截断损失。在固定整体压缩比下，该方法选择性地仅压缩模型最后几层，避免全层压缩造成的误差传播，从而提升压缩模型性能。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构，但提到应用于多样LLM家族，表明方法具有通用性和可扩展性，适合不同模型环境。
light_analysis.result: 论文在多样大型语言模型家族和多个基准数据集上进行综合评估，结果表明ERC-SVD始终优于现有SVD压缩方法，展现出优越性能和实际有效性。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升数值，但强调了一致性优势，这意味着方法在减少截断损失和误差传播方面取得了明显改进，验证了其在实际应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: ERC-SVD的主要贡献是提出一种误差控制的SVD压缩方法，有效减少了截断损失和误差传播，提升了大型语言模型压缩性能。该研究具有学术价值，为模型压缩领域提供了新视角，并具有实际应用价值，有助于推动LLM在资源受限环境中的部署。未来工作可探索更多误差控制策略或扩展到其他压缩技术，局限性方面摘要未明确说明。

title: TI-DeepONet: Learnable Time Integration for Stable Long-Term Extrapolation
abstract: Accurate temporal extrapolation remains a fundamental challenge for neural operators modeling dynamical systems, where predictions must extend far beyond the training horizon. Conventional DeepONet approaches rely on two limited paradigms: fixed-horizon rollouts, which predict full spatiotemporal solutions while ignoring temporal causality, and autoregressive schemes, which accumulate errors through sequential prediction. We introduce TI-DeepONet, a framework that integrates neural operators with adaptive numerical time-stepping to preserve the Markovian structure of dynamical systems while mitigating long-term error growth. Our method shifts the learning objective from direct state prediction to approximating instantaneous time-derivative fields, which are then integrated using standard numerical solvers. This naturally enables continuous-time prediction and allows the use of higher-order integrators at inference than those used in training, improving both efficiency and accuracy. We further propose TI(L)-DeepONet, which incorporates learnable coefficients for intermediate stages in multi-stage integration, adapting to solution-specific dynamics and enhancing fidelity. Across six canonical PDEs featuring chaotic, dissipative, dispersive, and high-dimensional behavior, TI(L)-DeepONet maeginally outperforms TI-DeepONet, and both achieve major reductions in relative L2 extrapolation error: about 96.3% compared to autoregressive methods and 83.6% compared to fixed-horizon approaches. Notably, both models maintain stable predictions over temporal domains nearly twice the training interval. This work establishes a physics-aware operator learning framework that bridges neural approximation with numerical analysis principles, addressing a key gap in long-term forecasting of complex physical systems.

light_analysis.overview: TI-DeepONet 提出了一种结合神经操作器和数值时间积分的框架，实现动力系统稳定长期的准确外推预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决神经操作器在建模动力系统时长期准确外推的挑战。动力系统的预测对于气候模拟、流体动力学等实际应用至关重要，但现有方法如固定时间跨度预测忽视时间因果性，自回归方案易累积误差，导致在训练范围之外的预测不稳定和不准确。因此，需要开发新方法以改善长期外推性能和稳定性，应对复杂物理系统的预测需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了TI-DeepONet框架，该方法将神经操作器与自适应数值时间步进集成。核心创新在于将学习目标从直接状态预测转向近似瞬时时间导数场，然后使用标准数值求解器进行积分，从而维持动力系统的马尔可夫结构。这允许连续时间预测，并可在推理中使用更高阶的积分器，提升效率和准确性。TI(L)-DeepONet进一步引入可学习系数用于多阶段积分，以适应特定解动态并增强保真度。实验基于六个典型PDE，涵盖混沌、耗散、色散和高维行为。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，TI(L)-DeepONet在性能上略微优于TI-DeepONet。两者在六个典型PDE上都显著降低了相对L2外推误差：相较于自回归方法减少约96.3%，相较于固定时间跨度方法减少约83.6%。此外，两种模型在时间域上保持稳定预测，预测区间接近训练区间的两倍，显示出在长期外推任务中的优越准确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是建立了物理意识的算子学习框架TI-DeepONet，它桥接了神经近似和数值分析原理，解决了复杂物理系统长期预测的关键缺口。这项工作在学术上推动了神经操作器与数值方法的结合，在实际应用上提高了预测的可靠性和扩展性。未来方向可能包括将框架应用于更广泛的偏微分方程类型或探索其他积分方案的优化，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: From Evaluation to Defense: Advancing Safety in Video Large Language Models
abstract: While the safety risks of image-based large language models (Image LLMs) have been extensively studied, their video-based counterparts (Video LLMs) remain critically under-examined. To systematically study this problem, we introduce VideoSafetyEval - a large-scale, real-world benchmark for Video LLM safety, which comprises 11.4k video-query pairs and spans 19 principal risk categories. Based on this, we reveal that integrating video modality degrades safety performance by an average of 34.2%, thereby exposing systemic risks in multimodal attack exploitation. To address this vulnerability, we propose VideoSafety-R1, a dual-stage framework achieving unprecedented safety gains through three innovations: (1) the VideoSafetyThinking dataset contains 46k video-query-thinking response triplets; (2) Alarm Token-Guided Safety Fine-Tuning (AT-SFT) injects learnable alarm tokens into visual and textual sequences, enabling explicit harm perception across modalities via multitask objectives; and (3) safety-guided GRPO enhances defensive reasoning through dynamic policy optimization with rule-based rewards derived from dual-modality verification. These components synergize to shift safety alignment from harm perception to active reasoning. The framework achieves a 71.1% improvement on VSE-HH, and improves by 59.1%, 44.3%, and 15.0% on the image safety datasets MMBench, VLGuard, and FigStep, respectively. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/Emiya-syw/VideoSafety-R1.git. Note: This paper contains harmful language and image examples, and reader discretion is recommended.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VideoSafety-R1框架，通过构建大规模数据集和创新训练方法，显著提升视频大型语言模型的安全性，实现从被动评估到主动防御的转变。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前图像大型语言模型的安全风险已得到广泛研究，但视频大型语言模型的安全问题严重未被充分探索。论文发现整合视频模态会平均降低安全性能34.2%，暴露多模态攻击的系统性风险，这表明现有方法对视频内容特有的安全挑战处理不足，亟需开发针对性的防御机制来应对日益增长的多媒体应用需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出VideoSafety-R1双阶段框架，包括三个创新点：首先构建VideoSafetyThinking数据集，包含46k视频-查询-思考响应三元组；其次采用Alarm Token-Guided Safety Fine-Tuning，通过向视觉和文本序列注入可学习警报令牌，利用多任务目标实现跨模态有害感知；最后结合safety-guided GRPO，基于双模态验证的规则奖励进行动态策略优化，以增强防御性推理能力。这些技术协同推动安全对齐从感知向主动推理演进。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，VideoSafety-R1框架在VideoSafetyEval基准的VSE-HH数据集上实现71.1%的性能提升，并在图像安全数据集MMBench、VLGuard和FigStep上分别改进59.1%、44.3%和15.0%。这些结果验证了框架在应对视频模态安全风险方面的有效性，并展现出优于基线方法的跨模态泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究系统评估了视频大型语言模型的安全风险，并提出创新防御框架，推动安全研究从评估转向主动防御，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。代码和数据集公开促进了领域发展，但论文包含有害内容示例需谨慎处理。未来工作可扩展至更多风险类别和现实场景，以进一步提升鲁棒性。

title: Admission Control of Quasi-Reversible Queueing Systems: Optimization and Reinforcement Learning
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a versatile scheme for optimizing the arrival rates of quasi-reversible queueing systems. We first propose an alternative definition of quasi-reversibility that encompasses reversibility and highlights the importance of the definition of customer classes. Then we introduce balanced arrival control policies, which generalize the notion of balanced arrival rates introduced in the context of Whittle networks, to the much broader class of quasi-reversible queueing systems. We prove that supplementing a quasi-reversible queueing system with a balanced arrival-control policy preserves the quasi-reversibility, and we specify the form of the stationary measures. We revisit two canonical examples of quasi-reversible queueing systems, Whittle networks and order-independent queues. Lastly, we focus on the problem of admission control and leverage our results in the frameworks of optimization and reinforcement learning.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种用于优化准可逆排队系统到达率的通用方案，通过引入平衡到达控制策略，扩展了现有理论并应用于优化和强化学习框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决排队系统中的准入控制问题，旨在优化到达率以提高系统性能，如减少拥堵和提升效率。现有方法（如Whittle网络中的平衡到达率）局限于特定系统，难以推广到更广泛的准可逆排队系统，这限制了理论发展和实际应用（如网络和服务管理）。因此，需要一种更通用的框架来处理这一问题，以应对复杂排队场景的需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先提出一个替代的准可逆性定义，强调顾客类别的重要性，以涵盖可逆性。接着引入平衡到达控制策略，该策略推广了Whittle网络中的平衡到达率概念，适用于更广泛的准可逆排队系统。通过理论证明，补充这种策略后系统仍保持准可逆性，并指定了稳态测度的形式。还以Whittle网络和顺序无关队列为例进行验证，展示了方法的通用性和技术特色。
light_analysis.result: 主要理论结果表明，平衡到达控制策略能有效保持准可逆排队系统的性质，并提供了稳态测度的具体形式，为系统优化奠定基础。在典型例子（如Whittle网络和顺序无关队列）中验证了方法的适用性，暗示该方法扩展了现有框架。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标对比（如效率提升数据），但强调了理论贡献和与基线方法的扩展性对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提供一个通用的优化方案，用于准可逆排队系统的到达率控制，并将结果应用于优化和强化学习领域。这不仅扩展了排队论的理论基础，还为实际系统的准入控制设计提供了新思路，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可能包括进一步实证验证、扩展到其他排队系统或深入强化学习应用。

title: Self-Classification Enhancement and Correction for Weakly Supervised Object Detection
abstract: In recent years, weakly supervised object detection (WSOD) has attracted much attention due to its low labeling cost. The success of recent WSOD models is often ascribed to the two-stage multi-class classification (MCC) task, i.e., multiple instance learning and online classification refinement. Despite achieving non-trivial progresses, these methods overlook potential classification ambiguities between these two MCC tasks and fail to leverage their unique strengths. In this work, we introduce a novel WSOD framework to ameliorate these two issues. For one thing, we propose a self-classification enhancement module that integrates intra-class binary classification (ICBC) to bridge the gap between the two distinct MCC tasks. The ICBC task enhances the network's discrimination between positive and mis-located samples in a class-wise manner and forges a mutually reinforcing relationship with the MCC task. For another, we propose a self-classification correction algorithm during inference, which combines the results of both MCC tasks to effectively reduce the mis-classified predictions. Extensive experiments on the prevalent VOC 2007 & 2012 datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our framework.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种新的弱监督对象检测框架，通过自我分类增强和校正算法解决分类模糊性，提升检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 弱监督对象检测（WSOD）因标注成本低而受到广泛关注，但现有方法基于两阶段多类分类任务，如多实例学习和在线分类细化，存在分类模糊性问题，未能有效整合任务间的独特优势。这导致检测精度受限，影响实际应用。因此，本研究旨在通过一个新框架来弥补这些不足，通过减少歧义和增强任务协同来提高WSOD的整体有效性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究引入了一个新的WSOD框架，包含自我分类增强模块和推理时的自我分类校正算法。增强模块整合了类内二元分类（ICBC）任务，以类为单位弥合两个多类分类任务之间的差距，增强网络对正样本和错位样本的区分能力，并与MCC任务形成相互促进关系。校正算法在推理阶段结合两个MCC任务的结果，通过整合减少误分类预测。框架在VOC 2007和2012数据集上实现，但具体模型架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 研究在VOC 2007和2012数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果显示该框架具有优越性能。摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率提升），因此与基线方法的对比情况和效率改进需参考完整论文。实验证明了框架在减少分类模糊性和提升检测效果方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出一种结合自我分类增强和校正的WSOD框架，解决了现有方法的分类模糊性问题，并通过实验验证了其有效性。该研究为弱监督对象检测提供了新的技术路线，具有较高的学术价值和实际应用潜力。潜在局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可进一步优化算法或扩展到其他数据集。

title: MSDformer: Multi-scale Discrete Transformer For Time Series Generation
abstract: Discrete Token Modeling (DTM), which employs vector quantization techniques, has demonstrated remarkable success in modeling non-natural language modalities, particularly in time series generation. While our prior work SDformer established the first DTM-based framework to achieve state-of-the-art performance in this domain, two critical limitations persist in existing DTM approaches: 1) their inability to capture multi-scale temporal patterns inherent to complex time series data, and 2) the absence of theoretical foundations to guide model optimization. To address these challenges, we proposes a novel multi-scale DTM-based time series generation method, called Multi-Scale Discrete Transformer (MSDformer). MSDformer employs a multi-scale time series tokenizer to learn discrete token representations at multiple scales, which jointly characterize the complex nature of time series data. Subsequently, MSDformer applies a multi-scale autoregressive token modeling technique to capture the multi-scale patterns of time series within the discrete latent space. Theoretically, we validate the effectiveness of the DTM method and the rationality of MSDformer through the rate-distortion theorem. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that MSDformer significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Both theoretical analysis and experimental results demonstrate that incorporating multi-scale information and modeling multi-scale patterns can substantially enhance the quality of generated time series in DTM-based approaches. The code will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: MSDformer提出了一种多尺度离散Transformer方法，通过结合多尺度令牌建模和率失真理论验证，解决了现有DTM方法在捕捉时间序列多尺度模式和缺乏理论基础方面的不足，显著提升生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散令牌建模（DTM）在时间序列生成中取得进展，但现有方法存在两个关键问题：一是无法捕捉复杂时间序列数据固有的多尺度时间模式，这影响生成准确性，因为真实世界数据常涉及多个时间尺度动态；二是缺乏理论基础指导模型优化，限制了方法的可靠性和进一步改进。因此，本研究旨在解决这些局限，提升DTM在实际应用如金融预测和医疗监测中的性能。
light_analysis.method: MSDformer的核心方法包括多尺度时间序列令牌化器和多尺度自回归令牌建模技术。首先，使用多尺度令牌化器将时间序列数据转化为多个尺度的离散令牌表示，以联合表征数据的复杂性；然后，在离散潜在空间中应用Transformer架构的自回归建模来捕捉多尺度模式。创新点在于引入多尺度学习和理论验证，通过率失真定理为DTM提供合理性证明，并利用向量量化技术实现离散化。
light_analysis.result: 论文报告综合实验显示，MSDformer在时间序列生成任务中显著优于现有最先进方法，尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进。与基线方法相比，理论和实验结果表明，融入多尺度信息并建模多尺度模式能有效提高生成质量，验证了该方法在捕捉复杂时间模式方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MSDformer的主要贡献是解决了DTM在时间序列生成中的多尺度捕捉和理论指导问题，通过多尺度离散建模和率失真验证提升了方法性能。学术上，它推动了时间序列生成与理论结合的进展；实际应用中，可增强领域如信号处理和预测任务的生成效果。未来工作可能包括扩展其他数据模态和优化计算效率，代码将在论文接受后发布。

title: Shorten After You're Right: Lazy Length Penalties for Reasoning RL
abstract: Large reasoning models, such as OpenAI o1 or DeepSeek R1, have demonstrated remarkable performance on reasoning tasks but often incur a long reasoning path with significant memory and time costs. Existing methods primarily aim to shorten reasoning paths by introducing additional training data and stages. In this paper, we propose three critical reward designs integrated directly into the reinforcement learning process of large reasoning models, which reduce the response length without extra training stages. Experiments on four settings show that our method significantly decreases response length while maintaining or even improving performance. Specifically, in a logic reasoning setting, we achieve a 40% reduction in response length averaged by steps alongside a 14% gain in performance. For math problems, we reduce response length averaged by steps by 33% while preserving performance.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出三种奖励设计集成到强化学习中，以无需额外训练阶段的方式减少大型推理模型的响应长度。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型如OpenAI o1和DeepSeek R1在推理任务中表现卓越，但冗长的推理路径导致高内存和时间成本。现有方法主要通过引入额外训练阶段和数据来缩短推理路径，这增加了训练的复杂性和资源消耗。因此，研究旨在开发一种无需额外训练的方法，直接优化推理效率，解决实际应用中的资源限制问题，提高模型的可扩展性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是设计并集成三种关键奖励机制到大型推理模型的强化学习训练过程中。这些奖励旨在在推理过程中惩罚冗长路径，鼓励简洁而准确的响应，无需引入额外训练阶段。方法可能涉及对标准RL奖励函数的修改，以直接优化响应长度，但摘要未明确说明具体技术架构。使用了类似OpenAI o1和DeepSeek R1的推理模型，但未指定具体数据集或模型细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验在四个不同设置中进行，结果显示该方法能显著减少响应长度，同时保持或提高性能。具体数据包括：在逻辑推理任务中，平均步骤减少40%，性能提升14%；在数学问题中，平均步骤减少33%，性能得以保持。与基线方法相比，这些改进证明了方法在缩短推理路径方面的有效性，而无需牺牲准确性，为实际应用提供了效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一种无需额外训练阶段的奖励设计方法，集成到强化学习中，有效减少了大型推理模型的响应长度。这具有重要学术价值，为提高推理模型的效率提供了新思路，并具有实际应用潜力，能降低计算资源消耗。未来工作可能包括将方法扩展到更多任务领域或进一步优化奖励函数，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: High Quality Underwater Image Compression with Adaptive Color Correction
abstract: With the increasing exploration and exploitation of the underwater world, underwater images have become a critical medium for human interaction with marine environments, driving extensive research into their efficient transmission and storage. However, contemporary underwater image compression algorithms fail to adequately address the impact of water refraction and scattering on light waves, which not only elevate training complexity but also result in suboptimal compression performance. To tackle this limitation, we propose High Quality Underwater Image Compression (HQUIC), a novel framework designed to handle the unique illumination conditions and color shifts inherent in underwater images, thereby achieving superior compression performance. HQUIC first incorporates an Adaptive Lighting and Tone Correction (ALTC) module to adaptively predict the attenuation coefficients and global light information of images, effectively alleviating issues stemming from variations in illumination and tone across underwater images. Secondly, it dynamically weights multi-scale frequency components, prioritizing information critical to distortion quality while discarding redundant details. Furthermore, we introduce a tone adjustment loss to enable the model to better balance discrepancies among different color channels. Comprehensive evaluations on diverse underwater datasets validate that HQUIC outperforms state-of-the-art compression methods, demonstrating its effectiveness.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了HQUIC框架，一种结合自适应颜色校正的高质量水下图像压缩方法，有效处理水下图像特有的光照和色彩偏移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着水下探索和开发的增加，水下图像成为人类与海洋环境交互的关键媒介，对高效传输和存储的需求日益增长。然而，现有水下图像压缩算法未能充分应对水折射和散射对光波的影响，这不仅增加了训练模型的复杂性，还导致压缩性能不理想。因此，亟需一种能专门处理水下独特光照条件和色彩变化的压缩方法，以提升图像质量和应用效率。
light_analysis.method: HQUIC框架包括自适应光照和色调校正模块，用于预测图像衰减系数和全局光信息，以校正光照变化；其次，采用动态加权多尺度频率分量技术，优先保留对失真质量至关重要的信息并丢弃冗余细节；此外，引入色调调整损失函数，以平衡不同颜色通道间的差异，从而优化压缩过程。这些创新点共同解决了水下图像的独特挑战。
light_analysis.result: 在不同水下数据集上的综合评估表明，HQUIC在压缩性能上优于当前最先进的压缩方法，尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或效率数据，但验证了其有效提升图像质量的能力。这表明该方法在应对水下图像特有的光照和色彩问题方面具有优越性，并在实际应用中表现出色。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献在于提出了HQUIC框架，通过自适应颜色校正和频率加权技术，显著改善了水下图像压缩的质量。其学术价值在于解决了水下图像特有的技术难题，实际应用价值在于促进水下数据的有效传输和存储。未来工作可进一步探索模型在更广泛数据集上的泛化能力或优化计算效率。

title: A Typology of Synthetic Datasets for Dialogue Processing in Clinical Contexts
abstract: Synthetic data sets are used across linguistic domains and NLP tasks, particularly in scenarios where authentic data is limited (or even non-existent). One such domain is that of clinical (healthcare) contexts, where there exist significant and long-standing challenges (e.g., privacy, anonymization, and data governance) which have led to the development of an increasing number of synthetic datasets. One increasingly important category of clinical dataset is that of clinical dialogues which are especially sensitive and difficult to collect, and as such are commonly synthesized.   While such synthetic datasets have been shown to be sufficient in some situations, little theory exists to inform how they may be best used and generalized to new applications. In this paper, we provide an overview of how synthetic datasets are created, evaluated and being used for dialogue related tasks in the medical domain. Additionally, we propose a novel typology for use in classifying types and degrees of data synthesis, to facilitate comparison and evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种新的类型学，用于分类临床对话处理中合成数据集的类型和程度，以促进比较和评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 在临床领域，对话数据因隐私、匿名化和数据治理挑战而难以获取，导致合成数据集被广泛使用以替代真实数据。然而，现有合成数据集缺乏系统化理论指导，限制了其在不同NLP任务中的有效应用和泛化能力。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过提供理论框架来优化合成数据集的使用，填补该领域的研究空白。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用综述性方法，首先概述了合成数据集在医疗对话任务中的创建、评估和使用现状。在此基础上，提出了一种新颖的类型学框架，用于分类数据合成的不同类型（如生成方法）和程度（如合成级别）。摘要未明确说明具体的技术细节，如使用的模型架构或特定数据集。
light_analysis.result: 论文的主要成果是提出了一个类型学框架，用于系统化分类合成数据集，以支持比较和评估。摘要未明确说明具体的实验数据或性能指标对比，但该框架的理论贡献在于为合成数据集的标准化应用提供了基础，有助于后续研究中的数据集选择。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过提出类型学框架，为临床对话处理中合成数据集的使用提供了理论支持，填补了合成数据理论指导的空白。其学术价值在于推动数据合成方法的系统化研究，实际应用价值在于促进临床NLP任务中数据集的有效比较。未来工作可包括验证该类型学在具体应用中的适用性，并扩展至其他语言或医疗子领域。

title: FAIRGAME: a Framework for AI Agents Bias Recognition using Game Theory
abstract: Letting AI agents interact in multi-agent applications adds a layer of complexity to the interpretability and prediction of AI outcomes, with profound implications for their trustworthy adoption in research and society. Game theory offers powerful models to capture and interpret strategic interaction among agents, but requires the support of reproducible, standardized and user-friendly IT frameworks to enable comparison and interpretation of results. To this end, we present FAIRGAME, a Framework for AI Agents Bias Recognition using Game Theory. We describe its implementation and usage, and we employ it to uncover biased outcomes in popular games among AI agents, depending on the employed Large Language Model (LLM) and used language, as well as on the personality trait or strategic knowledge of the agents. Overall, FAIRGAME allows users to reliably and easily simulate their desired games and scenarios and compare the results across simulation campaigns and with game-theoretic predictions, enabling the systematic discovery of biases, the anticipation of emerging behavior out of strategic interplays, and empowering further research into strategic decision-making using LLM agents.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了名为FAIRGAME的框架，利用博弈论识别AI代理在多代理交互中的偏见，以促进可解释性和可信赖性。
light_analysis.motivation: AI代理在多代理应用中交互增加了结果的可解释性和预测复杂性，影响其在研究和社会的可信赖采用。博弈论能有效捕捉代理间的战略互动，但现有方法缺乏可重复、标准化和用户友好的IT框架，导致结果比较和解释困难。因此，本研究旨在解决这一缺口，提供支持性工具以系统评估和缓解AI偏见。
light_analysis.method: FAIRGAME是一个基于博弈论的框架，用于AI代理偏见识别。它通过集成大型语言模型（LLM），模拟游戏和场景，并考虑代理的个性特质或战略知识来捕捉交互动态。关键创新点包括结合博弈论模型与LLMs，实现可重复模拟和标准化结果比较，使用户能轻松定制实验，发现偏见来源。
light_analysis.result: 利用FAIRGAME，研究发现AI代理在流行游戏中展现出偏见结果，具体受所使用的大型语言模型、语言以及代理个性和战略知识的影响。框架支持跨模拟活动和博弈论预测的结果比较，促进系统性的偏见发现，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，主要强调可靠模拟和可解释性增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAIRGAME的主要贡献是提供了一个标准化框架，用于系统识别AI代理偏见并预测战略交互中的行为，具有推动多代理系统研究和实际应用的学术价值。它助力进一步探索基于LLM的战略决策，但局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，可能包括扩展框架以适应更复杂场景。

title: Can LLMs Simulate Personas with Reversed Performance? A Systematic Investigation for Counterfactual Instruction Following in Math Reasoning Context
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are now increasingly widely used to simulate personas in virtual environments, leveraging their instruction-following capability. However, we discovered that even state-of-the-art LLMs cannot simulate personas with reversed performance (e.g., student personas with low proficiency in educational settings), which impairs the simulation diversity and limits the practical applications of the simulated environments. In this work, using mathematical reasoning as a representative scenario, we propose the first benchmark dataset for evaluating LLMs on simulating personas with reversed performance, a capability that we dub "counterfactual instruction following". We evaluate both open-weight and closed-source LLMs on this task and find that LLMs, including the OpenAI o1 reasoning model, all struggle to follow counterfactual instructions for simulating reversedly performing personas. Intersectionally simulating both the performance level and the race population of a persona worsens the effect even further. These results highlight the challenges of counterfactual instruction following and the need for further research.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文首次提出基准数据集，系统评估大语言模型在数学推理场景中模拟反向性能角色的反事实指令跟随能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型广泛应用于虚拟环境的角色模拟，但其指令跟随能力在处理反事实情境时存在显著不足。研究发现，即使是顶尖模型也无法模拟如低水平学生等反向性能角色，这限制了模拟多样性并影响教育等应用的实际效果。现有方法未能有效解决这一问题，因此亟需探索LLMs在反事实指令跟随方面的表现。
light_analysis.method: 研究以数学推理为代表性场景，构建首个基准数据集来评估LLMs模拟反向性能角色的能力，即“反事实指令跟随”。方法涉及设计任务测试LLMs能否遵循描述角色低性能的指令，并评估多种模型，包括开放权重和闭源LLMs（如OpenAI o1推理模型），以全面分析其技术特点。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，所有评估的LLMs，包括OpenAI o1，在遵循反事实指令模拟反向性能角色时均表现困难。模型无法有效模拟低水平角色，且当同时考虑角色的性能水平和种族人口时，模拟效果进一步恶化，突显了反事实指令跟随的固有挑战，与基线方法对比未见改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LLMs在反事实指令跟随方面的显著不足，强调了当前模型在模拟多样性上的限制，对虚拟环境应用具有重要影响。这一发现推动了学术上对LLMs指令跟随能力的理解，并呼吁未来研究探索改进模型处理反事实情境的方法，以增强实际应用价值。

title: Efficient Construction of Model Family through Progressive Training Using Model Expansion
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) gain widespread practical application, offering model families with varying parameter sizes has become standard practice to accommodate diverse computational requirements. Traditionally, each model in the family is trained independently, incurring computational costs that scale additively with the number of models. In this work, we propose an efficient method for constructing model families via progressive training, where smaller models are incrementally expanded to larger sizes to create a complete model family. Through extensive experiments on a model family ranging from 1B to 8B parameters, we show that our approach reduces total computational cost by approximately 25% while maintaining comparable performance to independently trained models. Moreover, by strategically adjusting the maximum learning rate based on model size, our method outperforms the independent training across various metrics. Beyond these improvements, our approach also fosters greater consistency in behavior across model sizes.
comment: 17pages, accepted by COLM 2025 as a conference paper

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种通过渐进训练和模型扩展构建大型语言模型系列的高效方法，显著降低计算成本并保持或提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型(LLMs)在实际应用中的广泛部署，提供不同参数规模的模型系列已成为标准做法，以适应多样化的计算需求。传统方法独立训练每个模型，导致计算成本随模型数量线性增加，资源浪费严重。这一问题在模型系列扩展时尤为突出，影响了部署效率和可持续性。因此，本研究旨在解决独立训练带来的高昂开销，开发一种更高效的构建方法，以促进资源优化和模型应用普及。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了一种渐进训练方法，通过模型扩展技术构建模型系列。核心策略是从较小的模型开始训练，然后逐步扩展其参数规模以生成更大的模型，形成一个完整的系列。关键创新点包括设计扩展机制和根据模型大小动态调整最大学习率，以优化训练过程。实验基于一个参数范围从1B到8B的大型语言模型系列进行，但具体模型架构和数据集在摘要中未明确说明，涉及典型LLM设置以评估方法有效性。
light_analysis.result: 通过在从1B到8B参数的模型系列上进行广泛实验，本方法将总计算成本降低了约25%，同时保持了与独立训练模型相当的性能。进一步地，通过战略性地调整最大学习率，该方法在多种评估指标上超越了独立训练基线，表现出更好的性能。此外，实验结果表明，渐进训练促进了不同模型大小之间行为的一致性，增强了模型系列的协调性和可预测性，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了一种高效的模型系列构建方法，通过渐进训练和模型扩展显著降低了计算成本，并实现了性能的改进和行为的跨尺寸一致性。学术上，该方法为大规模模型训练提供了新的优化思路，推动了资源高效利用的研究；实际应用上，有助于在资源受限环境下部署多样化的语言模型，促进AI技术的普及。然而，摘要未明确说明该方法的局限性或未来研究方向，如扩展性限制或更广泛应用的挑战。

title: Almost Bayesian: The Fractal Dynamics of Stochastic Gradient Descent
abstract: We show that the behavior of stochastic gradient descent is related to Bayesian statistics by showing that SGD is effectively diffusion on a fractal landscape, where the fractal dimension can be accounted for in a purely Bayesian way. By doing this we show that SGD can be regarded as a modified Bayesian sampler which accounts for accessibility constraints induced by the fractal structure of the loss landscape. We verify our results experimentally by examining the diffusion of weights during training. These results offer insight into the factors which determine the learning process, and seemingly answer the question of how SGD and purely Bayesian sampling are related.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了随机梯度下降（SGD）与贝叶斯统计的关系，通过将 SGD 建模为分形景观上的扩散并解释为修改的贝叶斯采样器。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于理解 SGD 与贝叶斯采样之间的理论联系，因为 SGD 在深度学习中广泛使用，但其优化行为与贝叶斯方法的关系尚不明确。现有方法可能忽略了损失景观的分形结构对采样过程的影响，导致对 SGD 动力学理解不足。通过解决这一问题，可以深化对优化算法的理论基础，为实际应用提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括分析 SGD 的动力学，将其建模为分形损失景观上的扩散过程，关键创新在于使用贝叶斯统计理论解释分形维度，并将 SGD 视为考虑了分形结构引入的可访问性约束的修改贝叶斯采样器。实验部分通过检查训练中权重的扩散来验证理论，摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，权重的扩散行为与理论预测一致，支持了 SGD 作为修改贝叶斯采样器的观点。摘要未明确提供具体性能指标或与基线方法的对比数据，但验证了模型能捕捉 SGD 的动力学特征，为进一步研究提供了实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结了论文的主要贡献，即建立了 SGD 与贝叶斯采样的联系，通过分形动力学提供了对学习过程的深入理解。学术价值在于连接了优化理论和贝叶斯统计，实际应用可能促进算法改进。未来工作可能包括探索具体应用或进行更广泛验证，摘要未提及局限性。

title: Is CLIP ideal? No. Can we fix it? Yes!
abstract: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) is a popular method for learning multimodal latent spaces with well-organized semantics. Despite its wide range of applications, CLIP's latent space is known to fail at handling complex visual-textual interactions. Recent works attempt to address its shortcomings with data-centric or algorithmic approaches. But what if the problem is more fundamental, and lies in the geometry of CLIP? Toward this end, we rigorously analyze CLIP's latent space properties, and prove that no CLIP-like joint embedding space exists which can correctly do any two of the following at the same time: 1. represent basic descriptions and image content, 2. represent attribute binding, 3. represent spatial location and relationships, 4. represent negation. Informed by this analysis, we propose Dense Cosine Similarity Maps (DCSMs) as a principled and interpretable scoring method for CLIP-like models, which solves the fundamental limitations of CLIP by retaining the semantic topology of the image patches and text tokens. This method improves upon the performance of classical CLIP-like joint encoder models on a wide array of benchmarks. We share our code and data here for reproducibility: https://github.com/Raphoo/DCSM_Ideal_CLIP

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Dense Cosine Similarity Maps (DCSMs)，一种改进CLIP-like模型的方法，以解决其潜在空间在处理复杂视觉-文本交互时的根本限制。
light_analysis.motivation: CLIP作为一种流行的多模态学习方法，虽在语义组织方面表现良好，但其潜在空间在处理复杂视觉-文本交互时存在缺陷，如无法同时完成描述、属性绑定、空间关系和否定等任务。现有研究多采用数据或算法方法改进，但问题可能更根本，源于CLIP潜在空间的几何性质，这限制了模型在现实应用中的准确性和鲁棒性，因此迫切需要探索其根本原因并提出解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先严格分析CLIP潜在空间的几何性质，通过数学证明揭示了其根本限制：没有CLIP-like联合嵌入空间能同时正确完成两个特定任务（如描述与空间关系）。基于此分析，提出了Dense Cosine Similarity Maps (DCSMs)作为新评分方法，该方法保留图像补丁和文本标记的语义拓扑，通过重构相似性计算来提高对复杂交互的处理能力，其核心创新在于提供原则性和可解释的机制来弥补CLIP的不足。
light_analysis.result: DCSMs方法在多个基准测试中显著提升了经典CLIP-like联合编码器模型的性能，摘要未明确说明具体数据，但指出在复杂视觉-文本任务上表现改进，例如在处理属性绑定和空间关系等任务上优于基线模型，验证了该方法解决CLIP根本局限的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是通过DCSMs方法解决了CLIP潜在空间的核心限制，增强了模型对复杂视觉-文本交互的处理能力，具有学术价值，推动了多模态学习领域的发展，实际应用价值在于提高类似模型在图像-文本任务中的准确性和可解释性，未来工作可能涉及扩展DCSMs到其他多模态场景或优化计算效率。

title: A Survey on Deep Learning Approaches for Tabular Data Generation: Utility, Alignment, Fidelity, Privacy, Diversity, and Beyond
abstract: Generative modelling has become the standard approach for synthesising tabular data. However, different use cases demand synthetic data to comply with different requirements to be useful in practice. In this survey, we review deep generative modelling approaches for tabular data from the perspective of five types of requirements: utility of the synthetic data, alignment of the synthetic data with domain-specific knowledge, statistical fidelity of the synthetic data distribution compared to the real data distribution, privacy-preserving capabilities, and sampling diversity. We group the approaches along two levels of granularity: (i) based on the requirements they address and (ii) according to the underlying model they utilise. Additionally, we summarise the appropriate evaluation methods for each requirement, the relationships among the requirements, and the specific characteristics of each model type. Finally, we discuss future directions for the field, along with opportunities to improve the current evaluation methods. Overall, this survey can be seen as a user guide to tabular data generation: helping readers navigate available models and evaluation methods to find those best suited to their needs.
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (02/2026)

light_analysis.overview: 这篇综述系统回顾了表格数据生成的深度学习方法，从实用性、对齐性、保真度、隐私和多样性等五个关键要求角度，提供了综合的用户指南。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成建模已成为合成表格数据的标准方法，但在实际应用中，不同用例对合成数据的要求各异，如实用性、与领域知识的对齐、统计保真度、隐私保护和采样多样性等。现有方法往往侧重于单一需求，缺乏对多种要求的全面考虑和评估。因此，该综述旨在解决如何根据具体需求选择和评估生成模型的实践问题，强调了对这些要求进行系统性分析和分类的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 作为一篇综述性论文，本文没有提出新的生成模型，而是对现有的深度生成建模方法进行回顾和分类。研究方法包括将方法按两个粒度分组：基于它们所满足的要求（如实用性、隐私等）和基于所使用的基础模型类型（如变分自编码器、生成对抗网络等）。关键创新在于从五个具体要求的角度系统化地整理了模型，并总结了每种需求的适当评估方法、需求之间的相互关系以及不同模型类型的特性。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果或性能指标。这篇综述的主要成果是提供了一个框架，用于评估和比较不同生成模型在表格数据生成中的表现。它总结了每个需求的评估方法，讨论了需求之间的权衡关系，并概述了各种模型类型的特点，帮助读者理解模型在不同要求下的适用性。未来方向可能包括改进评估方法以更准确地反映实际应用效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述的主要贡献在于为表格数据生成领域提供了全面的回顾和用户指南，从多个关键要求角度整理了深度学习方法。学术价值在于系统地分类了现有模型和评估方法，促进了领域内的标准化比较；实际应用价值在于帮助研究人员和实践者根据具体需求选择最合适的生成模型。局限性可能在于综述的覆盖范围随时间变化，未来方向包括开发更有效的评估方法和探索新模型以平衡不同需求。

title: Unsupervised Source-Free Ranking of Biomedical Segmentation Models Under Distribution Shift
abstract: Model reuse offers a solution to the challenges of segmentation in biomedical imaging, where high data annotation costs remain a major bottleneck for deep learning. However, although many pretrained models are released through challenges, model zoos, and repositories, selecting the most suitable model for a new dataset remains difficult due to the lack of reliable model ranking methods. We introduce the first black-box-compatible framework for unsupervised and source-free ranking of semantic and instance segmentation models based on the consistency of predictions under perturbations. While ranking methods have been studied for classification and a few segmentation-related approaches exist, most target related tasks such as transferability estimation or model validation and typically rely on labelled data, feature-space access, or specific training assumptions. In contrast, our method directly addresses the repository setting and applies to both semantic and instance segmentation, for zero-shot reuse or after unsupervised domain adaptation. We evaluate the approach across a wide range of biomedical segmentation tasks in both 2D and 3D imaging, showing that our estimated rankings strongly correlate with true target-domain model performance rankings.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出首个基于预测一致性的无监督、源免费的生物医学分割模型黑盒排名框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决生物医学图像分割中模型重用的挑战。由于数据标注成本高昂，预训练模型通过挑战赛和模型库发布，但选择最适合新数据集的模型困难，因缺乏可靠的排名方法。现有方法如分类任务中的排名或分割相关方法，多依赖于标注数据、特征空间访问或特定训练假设，限制了其在无监督、源免费场景下的应用。本研究旨在开发一种无需标签和源数据访问的黑盒兼容排名方法，以处理分布偏移下的模型选择问题。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出一个黑盒兼容框架，基于模型在扰动下预测的一致性来进行无监督、源免费的语义和实例分割模型排名。该框架适用于零样本重用或未经监督的领域适应，避免了传统方法对标注数据或特征提取的依赖。关键创新点包括利用预测一致性作为性能指标，无需访问模型内部参数，实现对新数据集上模型表现的直接评估。具体技术细节如数据集和模型架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，在广泛的2D和3D生物医学图像分割任务中，该框架估计的模型排名与真实目标域模型性能排名强相关，表明方法能有效评估模型在新数据集上的表现。与基线方法相比，该方法在无监督和源免费设置下展现出竞争力，无需标注数据或源模型访问即可提供可靠排名。具体数据如准确率提升摘要未明确说明，但评估强调了排名的相关性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是本文提出的框架为解决生物医学分割模型选择问题提供了有效解决方案，具有无监督、源免费和黑盒兼容的优势，适用于实际应用场景如模型库管理。该研究推动了模型重用技术的发展，减少了数据标注依赖，具有学术和实际价值。未来工作可进一步优化排名准确性并扩展到其他视觉任务，局限性摘要未明确说明但可能涉及对不同扰动策略的鲁棒性。

title: Deep Learning-based Event Data Coding: A Joint Spatiotemporal and Polarity Solution
abstract: Neuromorphic vision sensors, commonly referred to as event cameras, generate a massive number of pixel-level events, composed by spatiotemporal and polarity information, thus demanding highly efficient coding solutions. Existing solutions focus on lossless coding of event data, assuming that no distortion is acceptable for the target use cases, mostly including computer vision tasks such as classification and recognition. One promising coding approach exploits the similarity between event data and point clouds, both being sets of 3D points, thus allowing to use current point cloud coding solutions to code event data, typically adopting a two-point clouds representation, one for each event polarity. This paper proposes a novel lossy Deep Learning-based Joint Event data Coding (DL-JEC) solution, which adopts for the first time a single-point cloud representation, where the event polarity plays the role of a point cloud attribute, thus enabling to exploit the correlation between the geometry/spatiotemporal and polarity event information. Moreover, this paper also proposes novel adaptive voxel binarization strategies which may be used in DL-JEC, optimized for either quality-oriented or computer vision task-oriented purposes which allow to maximize the performance for the task at hand. DL-JEC can achieve significant compression performance gains when compared with relevant conventional and DL-based state-of-the-art event data coding solutions, notably the MPEG G-PCC and JPEG Pleno PCC standards. Furthermore, it is shown that it is possible to use lossy event data coding, with significantly reduced rate regarding lossless coding, without compromising the target computer vision task performance, notably event classification, thus changing the current event data coding paradigm.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种基于深度学习的联合事件数据编码（DL-JEC）方案，首次采用单点云表示和有损编码，显著提升压缩性能而不影响视觉任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机生成大量包含时空和极性信息的事件数据，需要高效编码解决方案。现有方法多关注无损编码，假设失真不可接受，但可能导致编码冗余和效率不足。当前点云编码方案使用双点云表示，未充分利用时空与极性信息的关联。因此，开发一种能联合处理时空和极性信息的高效编码方法对于计算机视觉任务（如分类和识别）具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出的DL-JEC方法是一种基于深度学习的联合事件数据编码方案，核心创新在于首次采用单点云表示，将事件极性作为点云属性，从而利用时空和极性信息之间的相关性。还引入了自适应体素二值化策略，根据质量优化或计算机视觉任务目标进行优化。尽管摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构，但该方法整合了深度学习和点云编码技术，以最大化特定任务的性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，DL-JEC在与相关传统和基于深度学习的最新事件数据编码解决方案（如MPEG G-PCC和JPEG Pleno PCC标准）相比时，能实现显著的压缩性能提升。此外，有损事件数据编码可以显著降低码率，同时保持计算机视觉任务（如事件分类）的性能不下降。摘要未提供具体数据指标，但强调了压缩效率与任务性能的平衡效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于提出DL-JEC方案，改变了当前事件数据编码的无损范式，展示了有损编码在实际应用中的可行性。学术价值在于推动了事件数据编码技术的发展，结合深度学习和点云表示；应用价值在于为计算机视觉任务提供了高效数据处理方案。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化编码策略或扩展到更多场景，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Virtual Full-stack Scanning of Brain MRI via Imputing Any Quantised Code
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is a powerful and versatile imaging technique, offering a wide spectrum of information about the anatomy by employing different acquisition modalities. However, in the clinical workflow, it is impractical to collect all relevant modalities due to the scan time and cost constraints. Virtual full-stack scanning aims to impute missing MRI modalities from available but incomplete acquisitions, offering a cost-efficient solution to enhance data completeness and clinical usability.
