Existing imputation methods often depend on global conditioning or modality-specific designs, which limit their generalisability across patient cohorts and imaging protocols. To address these limitations, we propose CodeBrain, a unified framework that reformulates various ``any-to-any'' imputation tasks as a region-level full-stack code prediction problem. CodeBrain adopts a two-stage pipeline: (1) it learns the compact representation of a complete MRI modality set by encoding it into scalar-quantised codes at the region level, enabling high-fidelity image reconstruction after decoding these codes along with modality-agnostic common features; (2) it trains a projection encoder to predict the full-stack code map from incomplete modalities via a grading-based design for diverse imputation scenarios. Extensive experiments on two public brain MRI datasets, i.e., IXI and BraTS 2023, demonstrate that CodeBrain consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, establishing a new benchmark for unified brain MRI imputation and enabling virtual full-stack scanning. Our code will be released at https://github.com/ycwu1997/CodeBrain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CodeBrain框架，通过区域级量化代码预测实现脑MRI虚拟全栈扫描，统一了‘any-to-any’模态估算任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 在临床脑MRI扫描中，由于扫描时间和成本限制，难以收集所有相关模态，导致数据不完整，影响诊断和科研。虚拟全栈扫描旨在从可用但不完整的采集数据中估算缺失模态，以成本效益方式提升数据完整性和临床实用性。现有估算方法多依赖于全局条件或针对特定模态设计，这限制了方法在不同患者队列和成像协议间的泛化能力，无法灵活应对多种缺失场景。因此，需要一种统一且通用的方法来解决这一问题。
light_analysis.method: CodeBrain是一个两阶段框架：首先，将完整MRI模态集编码为区域级的标量量化代码，结合模态无关的公共特征，实现高保真图像重建；其次，训练一个投影编码器，基于分级设计从部分模态预测全栈代码映射，以处理多种‘any-to-any’估算场景。关键创新在于将复杂估算任务重新定义为区域级代码预测问题，利用量化编码减少冗余并保留局部信息，增强方法的灵活性和泛化性。该方法在IXI和BraTS 2023数据集上进行了验证。
light_analysis.result: 在IXI和BraTS 2023两个公共脑MRI数据集上进行广泛实验，CodeBrain在多种‘any-to-any’模态估算任务中一致优于当前最先进方法，确立了新的性能基准。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进的数值，但论文强调CodeBrain在泛化性和精度方面表现优异，实现了虚拟全栈扫描的目标，为脑MRI数据完整性提供了有效解决方案。与基线方法相比，显示了显著的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出CodeBrain框架，通过将脑MRI模态估算统一为区域级代码预测问题，克服了现有方法的泛化局限，主要贡献在于建立了一个灵活且高效的虚拟全栈扫描方案。学术上，它推动了医学图像处理和AI应用的发展；实际应用中，降低了MRI扫描成本，提高了临床数据的可用性和完整性。未来工作包括代码公开以促进社区使用，并探索该方法在其他医学影像任务中的扩展潜力，尽管当前研究可能受限于特定数据集或模态类型。

title: Towards Balanced Multi-Modal Learning in 3D Human Pose Estimation
abstract: 3D human pose estimation (3D HPE) has emerged as a prominent research topic, particularly in the realm of RGB-based methods. However, the use of RGB images is often limited by issues such as occlusion and privacy constraints. Consequently, multi-modal sensing, which leverages non-intrusive sensors, is gaining increasing attention. Nevertheless, multi-modal 3D HPE still faces challenges, including modality imbalance. In this work, we introduce a novel balanced multi-modal learning method for 3D HPE, which harnesses the power of RGB, LiDAR, mmWave, and WiFi. Specifically, we propose a Shapley value-based contribution algorithm to assess the contribution of each modality and detect modality imbalance. To address this imbalance, we design a modality learning regulation strategy that decelerates the learning process during the early stages of training. We conduct extensive experiments on the widely adopted multi-modal dataset, MM-Fi, demonstrating the superiority of our approach in enhancing 3D pose estimation under complex conditions. Our source code is available at https://github.com/MICLAB-BUPT/AWC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种基于Shapley值的平衡多模态学习方法，用于解决3D人体姿态估计中的模态不平衡问题。
light_analysis.motivation: RGB-based 3D人体姿态估计方法常受遮挡和隐私限制，多模态感知虽能弥补不足，但面临模态不平衡的挑战，即不同模态数据贡献不均，导致性能下降。因此，研究平衡多模态学习对于提升复杂条件下姿态估计的鲁棒性和准确性至关重要，当前方法在处理模态差异和融合优化方面仍有不足。
light_analysis.method: 本工作提出一种平衡多模态学习方法，整合RGB、LiDAR、mmWave和WiFi数据。核心创新是引入基于Shapley值的贡献算法，评估各模态贡献并检测不平衡；同时设计模态学习调节策略，在训练早期减缓学习速度以优化模态融合。在广泛使用的多模态数据集MM-Fi上进行实验验证，模型架构具体细节摘要未详述，但强调这些技术策略的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在MM-Fi数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在复杂条件下能有效提升3D人体姿态估计性能，优于基线方法，展现了更好的适应性和精度。但具体性能指标如准确率提升百分比摘要未明确说明，仅总体展示了方法的优越性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过Shapley值算法和模态学习调节策略，成功解决了多模态3D人体姿态估计中的模态不平衡问题，提高了估计准确性和鲁棒性，在遮挡和隐私受限场景有实际应用价值。学术上推动多模态学习理论发展，未来可探索更多模态集成或优化策略，局限性摘要未明确说明。

title: Reasoning to Attend: Try to Understand How <SEG> Token Works
abstract: Current Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) empowered visual grounding typically rely on $\texttt{<SEG>}$ tokens as a text prompt to jointly optimize the vision-language model (e.g., LLaVA) and the downstream task-specific model (e.g., SAM). However, we observe that little research has looked into how it works.In this work, we first visualize the similarity maps, which are obtained by computing the semantic similarity between the $\texttt{<SEG>}$ token and the image token embeddings derived from the last hidden layer in both the LLaVA encoder and SAM decoder. Intriguingly, we have found that a striking consistency holds in terms of activation responses in the similarity map, which reveals that what the $\texttt{<SEG>}$ token contributes to is semantic similarity within image-text pairs. Specifically, the $\texttt{<SEG>}$ token, a placeholder expanded in text vocabulary, extensively queries among individual tokenized image patches to match the semantics of an object from text to the paired image, while the Large Language Models (LLMs) are being fine-tuned. Upon the above findings, we present READ, which facilitates LMMs' resilient $\textbf{REA}$soning capability of where to atten$\textbf{D}$ under the guidance of highly activated points borrowed from similarity maps. Remarkably, READ features an intuitive design, Similarity as Points module (SasP), which can be seamlessly applied to $\texttt{<SEG>}$-like paradigms in a plug-and-play fashion. Also, extensive experiments have been conducted on ReasonSeg and RefCOCO(+/g) datasets. To validate whether READ suffers from catastrophic forgetting of previous skills after fine-tuning, we further assess its generation ability on an augmented FP-RefCOCO(+/g) dataset. All codes and models are publicly available at https://github.com/rui-qian/READ.
comment: This work has been accepted to CVPR 2025, please refer to https://github.com/rui-qian/READ

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出READ方法，通过分析<SEG>令牌在大型多模态模型中的工作机制，利用相似性图指导视觉 grounding中的推理注意力，创新性地引入Similarity as Points模块。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大型多模态模型在视觉 grounding中广泛使用<SEG>令牌作为文本提示，联合优化视觉-语言模型和下游任务模型，但对其内部工作机制的研究不足。这一问题的重要性在于深入理解<SEG>令牌能帮助改进模型性能和泛化能力，而现有方法缺乏系统分析，导致潜在优化空间未被充分利用，限制了模型在复杂多模态任务中的表现。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先可视化相似性图，通过计算<SEG>令牌与LLaVA编码器和SAM解码器中图像令牌嵌入的语义相似性，揭示其一致性。基于此发现，提出READ方法，核心是Similarity as Points模块，从相似性图中提取高度激活点，指导模型在图像文本配对中更精确地定位对象。该方法可插拔式应用于类似<SEG>的范式，无需复杂调整，增强了模型的可解释性和适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在ReasonSeg和RefCOCO(+/g)数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了READ方法的有效性；为评估灾难性遗忘问题，进一步在增强的FP-RefCOCO(+/g)数据集上测试生成能力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但实验结果表明READ能提升视觉 grounding的推理能力，同时保持原有技能的保留。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于深入揭示了<SEG>令牌在大型多模态模型中的工作机制，提出READ方法以增强视觉 grounding中的推理注意力。学术价值在于提供了令牌作用的理论见解，推动模型可解释性研究；实际应用上，SasP模块的插拔式设计便于集成到现有系统。未来工作可进一步探索其他令牌范式或扩展到更多多模态任务，以解决潜在局限性。

title: Symplectic Neural Flows for Modeling and Discovery
abstract: Hamilton's equations are fundamental for modeling complex physical systems, where preserving key properties such as energy and momentum is crucial for reliable long-term simulations. Geometric integrators are widely used for this purpose, but neural network-based methods that incorporate these principles remain underexplored. This work introduces SympFlow, a time-dependent symplectic neural network designed using parameterized Hamiltonian flow maps. This design allows for backward error analysis and ensures the preservation of the symplectic structure. SympFlow allows for two key applications: (i) providing a time-continuous symplectic approximation of the exact flow of a Hamiltonian system purely based on the differential equations it satisfies, and (ii) approximating the flow map of an unknown Hamiltonian system relying on trajectory data. We demonstrate the effectiveness of SympFlow on diverse problems, including chaotic and dissipative systems, showing improved energy conservation compared to general-purpose numerical methods and accurate approximations from sparse irregular data. We also provide a thorough theoretical analysis of SympFlow, showing it can approximate the flow of any time-dependent Hamiltonian system, and providing an a-posteriori error estimate in terms of energy conservation.

light_analysis.overview: SympFlow 是一种基于参数化 Hamilton 流映射的时间依赖辛神经网络，用于物理系统建模和发现，显著提高了能量守恒性。
light_analysis.motivation: Hamilton 方程在复杂物理系统建模中至关重要，需要保持能量和动量等属性以确保可靠的长期模拟。现有方法如几何积分器虽广泛使用，但基于神经网络的方法在结合辛几何原则方面研究不足，难以在模拟中有效保持这些关键性质。因此，本研究旨在开发一种神经网络方法，以解决能量守恒不足的问题，提升物理系统建模的准确性和长期稳定性。
light_analysis.method: SympFlow 是一种时间依赖的辛神经网络，设计基于参数化 Hamilton 流映射。关键创新点包括允许后向误差分析，并确保辛结构的保持。该方法支持两个主要应用：基于微分方程精确流的连续辛近似，以及利用轨迹数据近似未知 Hamilton 系统的流映射。技术特色是将神经网络与辛几何原理结合，使用时间依赖架构来建模复杂物理系统，提高了方法的灵活性和适用性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在混沌和耗散系统上进行，SympFlow 相比通用数值方法，能量守恒性得到显著改善。结果表明，即使在稀疏不规则数据下，也能实现准确近似。理论分析证实 SympFlow 可以近似任何时间依赖 Hamilton 系统的流，并提供基于能量守恒的后验误差估计，为方法的可靠性和有效性提供了支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出 SympFlow，一种创新辛神经网络方法，用于物理系统建模和发现。其学术价值在于将神经网络与辛几何结合，提高了模拟的长期稳定性和准确性，具有广泛的应用潜力。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多物理系统类型或进一步优化计算效率，以应对更复杂的场景。

title: INST-IT: Boosting Instance Understanding via Explicit Visual Prompt Instruction Tuning
abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have made significant breakthroughs with the advancement of instruction tuning. However, while existing models can understand images and videos at a holistic level, they still struggle with instance-level understanding that requires a more fine-grained comprehension and alignment. Instance-level understanding is crucial for LMMs, as it focuses on the specific elements that we are most interested in. Excitingly, existing works find that the SOTA LMMs exhibit strong instance understanding capabilities when provided with explicit visual cues. Motivated by this, we proposed Inst-IT, a solution to enhance LMMs in Instance understanding via explicit visual prompt Instruction Tuning for instance guidance. Inst-IT consists of a benchmark to diagnose multimodal instance-level understanding, a large-scale instruction-tuning dataset, and a continuous instruction-tuning training paradigm to effectively enhance spatial-temporal instance understanding capabilities of existing LMMs. Experimental results show that, enhanced by Inst-IT, our models not only achieve outstanding performance on Inst-IT Bench and other instance understanding benchmarks, but also demonstrate significant improvements across various generic image and video understanding benchmarks. This highlights that our method not only boosts instance-level understanding but also strengthens the overall capabilities of generic image and video comprehension.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Inst-IT方法，通过显式视觉提示指令调优增强大型多模态模型的实例理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型多模态模型在指令调优方面进展显著，但主要侧重于整体图像和视频理解，而在细粒度的实例级别理解上仍存在不足，实例理解关注具体元素，对于目标检测、场景解析等实际应用至关重要。研究发现，当提供明确视觉线索时，最先进模型展现出实例理解潜力，但现有方法缺乏系统化提升机制，因此本研究旨在通过指令调优填补这一空白，解决实例对齐和理解的挑战。
light_analysis.method: Inst-IT方法基于显式视觉提示指令调优，包括三个核心组件：一个用于诊断多模态实例级别理解的基准，以评估模型能力；一个大规模指令调优数据集，用于训练模型；以及一个连续指令调优训练范式，旨在增强现有大型多模态模型的空间-时间实例理解能力。该方法通过集成视觉提示和指令调优，促进细粒度理解和对齐，具体数据集和模型架构细节在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，经过Inst-IT增强的模型在Inst-IT Bench等实例理解基准上实现了出色性能，具体表现为准确率和效率的提升，尽管摘要未提供具体数据。同时，模型在多个通用图像和视频理解基准上也显示出显著改进，对比基线方法有优势，验证了该方法不仅提升实例级别理解，还强化了整体理解能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献在于提出了Inst-IT方法，有效增强了大型多模态模型的实例理解和通用理解能力，学术上为细粒度多模态理解提供了新的训练范式，推动了领域发展；实际应用中能改善模型在复杂场景的表现。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多任务或验证更广泛基准，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: On the Adversarial Transferability of Generalized "Skip Connections"
abstract: Skip connection is an essential ingredient for modern deep models to be deeper and more powerful. Despite their huge success in normal scenarios (state-of-the-art classification performance on natural examples), we investigate and identify an interesting property of skip connections under adversarial scenarios, namely, the use of skip connections allows easier generation of highly transferable adversarial examples. Specifically, in ResNet-like models (with skip connections), we find that biasing backpropagation to favor gradients from skip connections--while suppressing those from residual modules via a decay factor--allows one to craft adversarial examples with high transferability. Based on this insight, we propose the Skip Gradient Method (SGM). Although starting from ResNet-like models in vision domains, we further extend SGM to more advanced architectures, including Vision Transformers (ViTs), models with varying-length paths, and other domains such as natural language processing. We conduct comprehensive transfer-based attacks against diverse model families, including ResNets, Transformers, Inceptions, Neural Architecture Search-based models, and Large Language Models (LLMs). The results demonstrate that employing SGM can greatly improve the transferability of crafted attacks in almost all cases. Furthermore, we demonstrate that SGM can still be effective under more challenging settings such as ensemble-based attacks, targeted attacks, and against defense equipped models. At last, we provide theoretical explanations and empirical insights on how SGM works. Our findings not only motivate new adversarial research into the architectural characteristics of models but also open up further challenges for secure model architecture design. Our code is available at https://github.com/mo666666/SGM.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Skip Gradient Method (SGM)，通过偏置skip connections梯度来增强对抗样本的可转移性，并在多种模型架构中验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: skip connections是现代深度模型实现更深层和更强性能的关键组件，但在对抗性场景下的特性未被充分研究。本研究旨在解决对抗攻击中样本可转移性的问题，发现skip connections使生成高可转移性对抗样本更易，这突显了模型架构在安全漏洞中的重要性。现有方法可能未充分利用这一架构特性，导致对抗攻击效果受限，因此探索skip connections的影响对于理解模型脆弱性和改进攻击策略至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出Skip Gradient Method (SGM），其核心方法是在反向传播过程中偏置梯度，优先使用来自skip connections的梯度，同时通过衰减因子抑制残差模块的梯度。关键创新在于利用模型架构特性来优化对抗样本生成。从ResNet-like模型出发，SGM扩展到更先进的架构，包括Vision Transformers（ViTs）、具有变长路径的模型，以及自然语言处理等领域，展示了方法的通用性和适应性，无需依赖特定数据集或模型细节。
light_analysis.result: 在ResNets、Transformers、Inceptions、Neural Architecture Search模型和Large Language Models等多种模型家族上进行全面的转移攻击测试，结果表明SGM在几乎所有情况下都能显著提高对抗样本的可转移性。在更具挑战性的设置下，如集成攻击、针对性攻击和防御模型中，SGM仍保持有效。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据，但强调了方法的广泛适用性和改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了skip connections对对抗可转移性的关键影响，提出SGM方法以提高攻击效果，贡献在于推动对抗性研究深入模型架构特性。学术价值在于为模型安全设计提供新见解，实际应用价值包括帮助识别和缓解架构漏洞。未来工作可进一步探索其他架构特征、开发更鲁棒的防御机制，并扩展至更多领域和复杂场景。

title: Revisiting Face Forgery Detection: From Facial Representation to Forgery Detection
abstract: Face Forgery Detection (FFD), or Deepfake detection, aims to determine whether a digital face is real or fake. Due to different face synthesis algorithms with diverse forgery patterns, FFD models often overfit specific patterns in training datasets, resulting in poor generalization to other unseen forgeries. Existing FFD methods primarily leverage pre-trained backbones with general image representation capabilities and fine-tune them to identify facial forgery cues. However, these backbones lack domain-specific facial knowledge and insufficiently capture complex facial features, thus hindering effective implicit forgery cue identification and limiting generalization. Therefore, it is essential to revisit FFD workflow across the \textit{pre-training} and \textit{fine-tuning} stages, achieving an elaborate integration from facial representation to forgery detection to improve generalization. Specifically, we develop an FFD-specific pre-trained backbone with superior facial representation capabilities through self-supervised pre-training on real faces. We then propose a competitive fine-tuning framework that stimulates the backbone to identify implicit forgery cues through a competitive learning mechanism. Moreover, we devise a threshold optimization mechanism that utilizes prediction confidence to improve the inference reliability. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves excellent performance in FFD and extra face-related tasks, \ie, presentation attack detection. Code and models are available at \href{https://github.com/zhenglab/FFDBackbone}{https://github.com/zhenglab/FFDBackbone}.

light_analysis.overview: 该研究通过重新设计人脸伪造检测的预训练和微调流程，提出结合自监督预训练和竞争性学习的方法，显著提升了检测模型的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 人脸伪造检测（FFD）旨在识别数字人脸的伪造痕迹，但由于不同合成算法产生的伪造模式多样，现有模型容易过拟合训练数据中的特定模式，导致对未见伪造的泛化能力差。当前方法主要依赖通用预训练主干网络，这些主干缺乏针对性的人脸领域知识，不足以捕捉复杂面部特征和隐式伪造线索，限制了检测效果。因此，迫切需要优化FFD工作流程，从面部表示到伪造检测进行系统性改进，以解决泛化瓶颈和提升实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 本研究首先开发了一个FFD特定的预训练主干网络，通过在真实人脸上进行自监督预训练，以增强面部表示能力。接着，提出竞争性微调框架，通过竞争学习机制激励主干网络识别隐式伪造线索，从而避免过拟合。此外，设计了阈值优化机制，利用预测置信度来提高推理的可靠性。整体方法融合了预训练和微调阶段，实现了从面部表示到伪造检测的精细集成，关键创新在于领域特定预训练和竞争性学习策略的应用。
light_analysis.result: 综合实验结果表明，该方法在人脸伪造检测任务中表现出色，并在相关任务如演示攻击检测中取得优异性能。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据（如准确率提升），但指出代码和模型已公开，验证了方法的有效性。与基线方法相比，该方法通过优化面部表示和微调过程，在处理未见伪造模式时展现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献在于重新审视了FFD工作流程，提出了一种结合自监督预训练和竞争性学习的创新方法，有效提升了伪造检测的泛化性能。学术价值在于深化了对面部表示与伪造检测之间关系的理解，为领域提供了新的技术路线。实际应用价值广泛，可增强Deepfake检测等系统的可靠性，应对日益复杂的伪造威胁。未来工作可进一步探索该方法在其他面部相关任务中的应用和潜在优化机制。

title: FC-KAN: Function Combinations in Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
abstract: In this paper, we introduce FC-KAN, a Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) that leverages combinations of popular mathematical functions such as B-splines, wavelets, and radial basis functions on low-dimensional data through element-wise operations. We explore several methods for combining the outputs of these functions, including sum, element-wise product, the addition of sum and element-wise product, representations of quadratic and cubic functions, concatenation, linear transformation of the concatenated output, and others. In our experiments, we compare FC-KAN with a multi-layer perceptron network (MLP) and other existing KANs, such as BSRBF-KAN, EfficientKAN, FastKAN, and FasterKAN, on the MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets. Two variants of FC-KAN, which use a combination of outputs from B-splines and Derivative of Gaussians (DoG) and from B-splines and linear transformations in the form of a quadratic function, outperformed overall other models on the average of 5 independent training runs. We expect that FC-KAN can leverage function combinations to design future KANs. Our repository is publicly available at: https://github.com/hoangthangta/FC_KAN.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出FC-KAN，通过结合B样条、小波等数学函数的多种组合方式，在Kolmogorov-Arnold网络中实现了优于现有模型的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决现有Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KANs）在图像分类任务中性能有限的问题，特别是现有方法如BSRBF-KAN、EfficientKAN等可能依赖于单一函数类型，缺乏灵活性。该问题的重要性在于KANs作为新兴网络结构，改进其设计可以提升理论建模能力和实际应用效果。通过探索多种数学函数的组合，FC-KAN旨在增强网络的表示能力和鲁棒性，弥补现有方法的不足，推动KANs在机器学习中的发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络框架，提出FC-KAN，在低维数据上使用元素级操作结合B样条、小波、径向基函数等流行数学函数。核心创新包括探索多种函数输出组合方法，如求和、元素级乘积、二次和三次函数表示、拼接输出及线性变换等。技术路线涉及设计具体变体，例如结合B样条和高斯导数、B样条与线性变换以二次函数形式。实验使用MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集进行验证，对比多层感知机网络和其他KANs模型。
light_analysis.result: 在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST数据集上的实验显示，FC-KAN的两个变体（使用B样条和高斯导数组合、B样条与线性变换以二次函数形式）在5次独立训练运行的平均表现优于多层感知机网络（MLP）和其他现有KANs模型，如BSRBF-KAN、EfficientKAN、FastKAN和FasterKAN。摘要未提供具体准确率数据，但结果表明这些组合方法能显著提升分类性能，通过对比基线方法证实了FC-KAN的有效性和优越性，强调了函数组合在增强模型性能中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出了FC-KAN，通过创新性地结合多种数学函数，展示了函数组合在Kolmogorov-Arnold网络中的有效性。学术价值体现在扩展了KANs的设计方法，为神经网络理论提供了新的思路；实际应用价值在于可能在图像分类等任务中实现更高准确性，并公开代码库以促进后续研究。未来工作可进一步优化组合策略，探索更多函数类型和应用场景，局限性包括摘要未明确说明在其他数据集或任务中的泛化能力。

title: Learning 2D Invariant Affordance Knowledge for 3D Affordance Grounding
abstract: 3D Object Affordance Grounding aims to predict the functional regions on a 3D object and has laid the foundation for a wide range of applications in robotics. Recent advances tackle this problem via learning a mapping between 3D regions and a single human-object interaction image. However, the geometric structure of the 3D object and the object in the human-object interaction image are not always consistent, leading to poor generalization. To address this issue, we propose to learn generalizable invariant affordance knowledge from multiple human-object interaction images within the same affordance category. Specifically, we introduce the Multi-Image Guided Invariant-Feature-Aware 3D Affordance Grounding (MIFAG) framework. It grounds 3D object affordance regions by identifying common interaction patterns across multiple human-object interaction images. First, the Invariant Affordance Knowledge Extraction Module (IAM) utilizes an iterative updating strategy to gradually extract aligned affordance knowledge from multiple images and integrate it into an affordance dictionary. Then, the Affordance Dictionary Adaptive Fusion Module (ADM) learns comprehensive point cloud representations that consider all affordance candidates in multiple images. Besides, the Multi-Image and Point Affordance (MIPA) benchmark is constructed and our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods on various experimental comparisons.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出通过从多个人类-物体交互图像中学习不变功能知识的方法，以改善三维物体功能定位的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D物体功能定位旨在预测三维对象上的功能区域，为机器人等应用奠定基础。现有方法通常基于单个人类-物体交互图像进行学习，但由于三维对象与图像中的对象几何结构存在不一致性，导致模型泛化能力较差。因此，研究需要一种新方法来从多个图像中提取可泛化的不变知识，以解决这一关键问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入多图像引导的不变特征感知三维功能定位框架。该框架通过识别多个交互图像中的共同模式来定位功能区域。具体包括两个模块：不变功能知识提取模块，使用迭代更新策略从多个图像提取对齐知识并集成到功能字典中；功能字典自适应融合模块，学习全面的点云表示，考虑所有候选功能。此外，构建了多图像和点功能基准数据集，以支持实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 在构建的基准数据集上，该方法在各项实验比较中优于现有的最先进方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但表明通过多图像学习策略，显著提升了泛化能力和定位精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的贡献在于提出一个基于多图像学习不变功能知识的框架，改善了三维功能定位的泛化性能，并为机器人交互提供了理论支持。未来工作可扩展至更多功能类别或更复杂的场景，进一步提升鲁棒性和应用范围。

title: TraffiDent: A Dataset for Understanding the Interplay Between Traffic Dynamics and Incidents
abstract: Long-separated research has been conducted on two highly correlated tracks: traffic and incidents. Traffic track witnesses complicating deep learning models, e.g., to push the prediction a few percent more accurate, and the incident track only studies the incidents alone, e.g., to infer the incident risk. We, for the first time, spatiotemporally aligned the two tracks in a large-scale region (16,972 traffic nodes) from year 2022 to 2024: our TraffiDent dataset includes traffic, i.e., time-series indexes on traffic flow, lane occupancy, and average vehicle speed, and incident, whose records are spatiotemporally aligned with traffic data, with seven different incident classes. Additionally, each node includes detailed physical and policy-level meta-attributes of lanes. Previous datasets typically contain only traffic or incident data in isolation, limiting research to general forecasting tasks. TraffiDent integrates both, enabling detailed analysis of traffic-incident interactions and causal relationships. To demonstrate its broad applicability, we design: (1) post-incident traffic forecasting to quantify the impact of different incidents on traffic indexes; (2) incident classification using traffic indexes to determine the incidents types for precautions measures; (3) global causal analysis among the traffic indexes, meta-attributes, and incidents to give high-level guidance of the interrelations of various factors; (4) local causal analysis within road nodes to examine how different incidents affect the road segments' relations. The dataset is available at https://xaitraffic.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了TraffiDent数据集，首次在大规模区域上时空对齐交通和事故数据，支持交互和因果分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于交通和事故研究长期分离的问题：交通领域专注于使用深度学习模型提升预测精度，事故领域则单独分析事故风险，但两者高度相关。现有数据集通常只包含交通或事故数据，限制了综合性分析如交互关系和因果推断。这导致无法全面理解交通动态与事故之间的复杂影响，对于提高交通安全、优化预测模型和制定预防措施至关重要，因此需要整合数据集来促进跨领域研究。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是构建TraffiDent数据集，在大规模区域（覆盖16,972个交通节点，时间跨度从2022到2024年）上时空对齐交通数据和事故记录。交通数据包括时间序列索引如交通流、车道占用率和平均车速，事故数据有七种不同类型，并整合了每个节点的物理和政策层面元属性。创新点在于首次实现交通和事故数据的时空整合，通过设计四种分析任务（事故后交通预测、基于交通数据的事故分类、全局因果分析、本地因果分析）来展示数据集的广泛应用性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，如准确率或效率改进。但论文通过TraffiDent数据集设计了分析任务，预期能支持更深入的研究，例如在事故后交通预测中量化不同事故对交通指数的影响，以及在事故分类中利用交通数据确定事故类型。与基线方法的对比未提供，但数据集整合了丰富多维数据，有望在相关任务中提升性能，促进未来实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是创建了TraffiDent数据集，首次时空对齐交通和事故数据，支持详细的交互和因果分析。学术上，推动了交通和事故研究的整合，填补了现有数据集的空白；实际上，为预测、分类和因果分析提供数据基础，有助于指导交通管理和政策制定。潜在的局限性可能包括数据集的时间覆盖或区域范围，未来工作可扩展数据集规模或深化分析任务的应用。

title: MultiTask Learning AI system to assist BCC diagnosis with dual explanation
abstract: Basal cell carcinoma (BCC) accounts for about 75% of skin cancers. The adoption of teledermatology protocols in Spanish public hospitals has increased dermatologists' workload, motivating the development of AI tools for lesion prioritization. However, limited transparency in current systems hinders clinical acceptance. This study proposes an AI system for BCC detection from dermoscopic images that integrates dermatologist diagnostic criteria based on specific dermoscopic patterns.   We analyzed 1559 dermoscopic images from 60 primary care centers annotated by four dermatologists for seven BCC patterns. An Expectation-Maximization consensus algorithm was used to build a unified standard reference. A multitask learning model based on MobileNet-V2 was developed to classify lesions and identify clinically relevant patterns, supported by Grad-CAM visual explanations.   The system achieved 90% accuracy in BCC classification (precision 0.90, recall 0.89). Clinically relevant BCC patterns were correctly detected in 99% of positive cases, and the pigment network exclusion criterion was satisfied in 95% of non-BCC cases. Grad-CAM maps showed strong spatial agreement with dermatologist-defined regions.   The proposed system combines accurate BCC detection with transparent pattern-based explanations, helping bridge the gap between AI performance and clinical trust in teledermatology.
comment: 23 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables, under review in Scientific Reports

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个集成多任务学习和视觉解释的AI系统，以提高基底细胞癌皮肤镜图像检测的准确性和临床透明度。
light_analysis.motivation: 基底细胞癌（BCC）是皮肤癌的主要类型，约占75%。在西班牙公立医院，远程皮肤病学协议的采用显著增加了皮肤科医生的工作量，因此迫切需要AI工具来优先处理病变，提升诊断效率。然而，当前AI系统普遍缺乏透明度，决策过程难以解释，这严重阻碍了临床医生的接受和信任。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过开发一个能提供解释性输出的系统，以促进AI在临床环境中的实际应用和推广。
light_analysis.method: 本研究开发了一个基于MobileNet-V2架构的多任务学习模型，用于从皮肤镜图像中检测BCC病变并识别临床相关模式。关键创新在于整合了皮肤科医生的诊断标准，使用七个特定BCC模式进行标注。数据集包含1559张来自60个初级护理中心的图像，由四名皮肤科医生标注，并采用期望最大化共识算法构建统一参考标准以处理标注不一致性。此外，系统集成Grad-CAM技术提供视觉解释，增强决策透明度，使模型输出更易于临床理解。
light_analysis.result: 系统在BCC分类任务上达到90%的准确率，精确度为0.90，召回率为0.89。临床相关BCC模式的检测正确率在99%的阳性病例中得到验证，而色素网络排除标准在95%的非BCC病例中满足。Grad-CAM生成的视觉热图与皮肤科专家定义的区域显示出强空间一致性，证实了解释的有效性。这些结果不仅展示了系统的高性能，还突出了其提供可靠解释的能力，摘要未明确说明与基线方法的直接对比，但基于现有数据，系统在准确性和解释性方面表现出显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于开发了一个结合准确检测和透明解释的AI系统，有效弥合了AI性能与临床信任之间的差距。该系统通过多任务学习和视觉解释技术，提升了基底细胞癌诊断的可靠性和可接受性，具有重要的学术价值，推动了可解释AI在医疗领域的应用。在实际应用方面，它有助于缓解远程皮肤病学的工作负担，增强临床决策支持。未来工作可扩展至其他皮肤病变诊断，并进一步优化模型泛化能力和集成更多临床标准。

title: MetaGS: A Meta-Learned Gaussian-Phong Model for Out-of-Distribution 3D Scene Relighting
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) 3D relighting requires novel view synthesis under unseen lighting conditions that differ significantly from the observed images. Existing relighting methods, which assume consistent light source distributions between training and testing, often degrade in OOD scenarios. We introduce MetaGS to tackle this challenge from two perspectives. First, we propose a meta-learning approach to train 3D Gaussian splatting, which explicitly promotes learning generalizable Gaussian geometries and appearance attributes across diverse lighting conditions, even with biased training data. Second, we embed fundamental physical priors from the Blinn-Phong reflection model into Gaussian splatting, which enhances the decoupling of shading components and leads to more accurate 3D scene reconstruction. Results on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of MetaGS in challenging OOD relighting tasks, supporting efficient point-light relighting and generalizing well to unseen environment lighting maps.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MetaGS模型，结合元学习和Blinn-Phong物理先验，用于解决分布外3D场景重光照的挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究针对分布外3D重光照问题，即在训练数据中未见过的新光照条件下进行新视角合成。现有重光照方法通常假设训练和测试时的光源分布一致，但在真实世界中光照条件多变，这种假设导致在分布外场景中性能下降。这一问题的重要性在于实际应用如虚拟现实和增强现实，需要模型对不可预测光照具有鲁棒性，而现有方法在泛化能力上存在不足，限制了其实际部署价值。
light_analysis.method: MetaGS通过两个核心创新解决分布外重光照：首先，采用元学习方法训练3D高斯点云，即使在有偏训练数据下，也能促进几何和外观属性的泛化学习，使其适应多样化光照条件。其次，将Blinn-Phong反射模型的物理先验嵌入到高斯点云中，通过解耦光照组件的shading过程，提升3D场景重建的准确性。该方法结合了学习性框架和物理约束，增强了模型对复杂光照的建模能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果在合成和真实世界数据集上验证了MetaGS的有效性。该方法支持高效的点光源重光照，并能够泛化到未见过的环境光照图，在挑战性分布外任务中表现优于现有基线。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率，但强调了其在多样化光照条件下的稳健重建能力，表明模型在应对光源分布不一致场景时显著提升了性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: MetaGS的主要贡献在于提出了一种集成元学习和物理先验的创新方法，有效解决了分布外3D重光照问题，提高了场景重建的准确性和泛化性。这项研究在学术上推动了计算机视觉和图形学的交叉进展，实际应用中可增强虚拟环境的光照真实感，具有广泛潜力。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的光照模型或更大规模数据集，以进一步提升模型的适应性和效率。

title: ViWikiFC: Fact-Checking for Vietnamese Wikipedia-Based Textual Knowledge Source
abstract: Fact-checking is essential due to the explosion of misinformation in the media ecosystem. Although false information exists in every language and country, most research to solve the problem mainly concentrated on huge communities like English and Chinese. Low-resource languages like Vietnamese are necessary to explore corpora and models for fact verification. To bridge this gap, we construct ViWikiFC, the first manual annotated open-domain corpus for Vietnamese Wikipedia Fact Checking more than 20K claims generated by converting evidence sentences extracted from Wikipedia articles. We analyze our corpus through many linguistic aspects, from the new dependency rate, the new n-gram rate, and the new word rate. We conducted various experiments for Vietnamese fact-checking, including evidence retrieval and verdict prediction. BM25 and InfoXLM (Large) achieved the best results in two tasks, with BM25 achieving an accuracy of 88.30% for SUPPORTS, 86.93% for REFUTES, and only 56.67% for the NEI label in the evidence retrieval task, InfoXLM (Large) achieved an F1 score of 86.51%. Furthermore, we also conducted a pipeline approach, which only achieved a strict accuracy of 67.00% when using InfoXLM (Large) and BM25. These results demonstrate that our dataset is challenging for the Vietnamese language model in fact-checking tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文构建了首个越南语开放领域事实核查语料库ViWikiFC，并通过实验评估其在证据检索和判决预测任务中的性能，填补了低资源语言研究的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 由于媒体生态系统中错误信息爆炸，事实核查变得至关重要。然而，现有研究主要集中于英语和中文等高资源语言，导致越南语等低资源语言缺乏事实核查的语料库和模型。这限制了越南语在事实核查领域的发展，因此本研究旨在解决这一不平衡问题，通过构建ViWikiFC语料库探索越南语事实核查的可能性，推动低资源语言的自然语言处理研究，并为实际应用提供支持。
light_analysis.method: 本研究构建了ViWikiFC语料库，这是首个手动注释的越南语开放领域事实核查数据集，包含超过20,000个声明，通过从Wikipedia文章中提取证据句子生成并手动标注。语料库从新依赖率、新n-gram率和新词率等多个语言角度进行分析。实验方面，采用证据检索和判决预测两个任务，其中使用BM25进行证据检索，InfoXLM (Large)进行判决预测，并尝试了结合两者的管道方法，以评估模型在越南语事实核查中的性能。
light_analysis.result: 在证据检索任务中，BM25方法对SUPPORTS标签的准确率达到88.30%，REFUTES为86.93%，但对NEI标签仅为56.67%，显示出处理不确定信息的挑战。在判决预测任务中，InfoXLM (Large)模型取得了86.51%的F1得分。此外，管道方法结合BM25和InfoXLM (Large)的严格准确率仅为67.00%。这些结果与基线方法相比（摘要未明确指定具体基线），表明ViWikiFC数据集对越南语事实核查模型具有较高的挑战性，特别是在多标签分类任务中。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是构建了ViWikiFC语料库，为越南语事实核查提供了首个公开可用的数据集，实验结果表明该数据集在证据检索和判决预测任务中具有挑战性，突显了低资源语言研究的必要性和困难。这推动了相关模型的开发和评估，具有重要的学术价值，并为低资源语言的事实核查应用奠定了基础。潜在局限性包括模型性能在NEI标签上的不足，未来工作可聚焦于改进模型架构、扩展数据集或应用于其他低资源语言。

title: Biology-inspired joint distribution neurons based on Hierarchical Correlation Reconstruction allowing for multidirectional propagation of values and densities
abstract: Recently a million of biological neurons (BNN) has turned out better from modern RL methods in playing Pong~\cite{RL}, reminding they are still qualitatively superior e.g. in learning, flexibility and robustness - suggesting to try to improve current artificial e.g. MLP/KAN for better agreement with biological. There is proposed extension of KAN approach to neurons containing model of local joint distribution: $ρ(\mathbf{x})=\sum_{\mathbf{j}\in B} a_\mathbf{j} f_\mathbf{j}(\mathbf{x})$ for $\mathbf{x} \in [0,1]^d$, adding interpretation and information flow control to KAN, and allowing to gradually add missing 3 basic properties of biological: 1) biological axons propagate in both directions~\cite{axon}, while current artificial are focused on unidirectional propagation - joint distribution neurons can repair by substituting some variables to get conditional values/distributions for the remaining. 2) Animals show risk avoidance~\cite{risk} requiring to process variance, and generally real world rather needs probabilistic models - the proposed can predict and propagate also distributions as vectors of moments: (expected value, variance) or higher. 3) biological neurons require local training, and beside backpropagation, the proposed allows many additional ways, like direct training, through tensor decomposition, or finally local and promising: information bottleneck. Proposed approach is very general, can be also used as extension of softmax in embeddings of e.g. transformer, suggesting interpretation that features are mixed moments of joint density of real-world properties.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出受生物启发的联合分布神经元，基于分层相关重建扩展KAN方法，支持值和密度的多向传播，模拟生物神经元的双向传播、概率建模和局部训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于生物神经元在Pong游戏等任务中表现优于现代强化学习方法，凸显其在学习、灵活性和鲁棒性方面的优势。当前人工神经元如MLP/KAN存在单向传播、处理方差（风险规避）不足和局部训练方式有限的问题。生物神经元的这些属性对现实世界应用如概率建模至关重要，因此研究旨在改进人工神经元以更好地与生物一致，提升整体性能。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法扩展KAN（Kolmogorov-Arnold Network）到包含局部联合分布模型的神经元：ρ(x) = ∑_{j∈B} a_j f_j(x)，x∈[0,1]^d。关键创新包括允许值和密度的多向传播，通过替代变量实现双向传播；将分布作为矩向量（如期望值和方差）预测和传播；并支持多种训练方式如直接训练、张量分解和信息瓶颈。该方法通用性强，也可作为transformer嵌入中softmax的扩展，解释特征为真实世界属性联合密度的混合矩。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，如准确率提升或效率改进数据。但方法旨在通过模拟生物神经元的双向传播、概率处理和局部训练属性来改善人工神经网络性能，预计可增强学习效率、灵活性和鲁棒性。与基线方法的对比和具体性能指标需要进一步实验验证，以评估其实际效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出基于分层相关重建的联合分布神经元框架，扩展KAN以更好地模拟生物神经元的双向传播、概率建模和局部训练属性。这具有学术价值，推动了神经网络向生物一致性发展，并提供概率建模和多样化训练的新途径；实际应用价值包括改进transformer等模型的嵌入解释和性能。未来工作可能涉及实验验证、扩展应用到更多领域，并探索其他生物启发属性。

title: Point-In-Context: Understanding Point Cloud via In-Context Learning
abstract: The rise of large-scale models has catalyzed in-context learning as a powerful approach for multitasking, particularly in natural language and image processing. However, its application to 3D point cloud tasks has been largely unexplored. In this paper, we introduce Point-In-Context (PIC), a pioneering framework for 3D point cloud understanding that leverages in-context learning with a standard transformer architecture. PIC uniquely enables the execution of multiple tasks after a single, unified training phase, eliminating the need for fine-tuning. To extend masked point modeling to 3D in-context learning, we introduce a Joint Sampling module, a simple yet effective technique that emphasizes the mapping relationship between input and target. PIC treats both inputs and targets as coordinate-based, addressing the segmentation challenge by associating label points with pre-defined XYZ coordinates for each category. However, relying on such fixed label-coordinate assignments limits the model's ability to generalize to unseen domains. To address this limitation, we further propose two innovative training strategies: In-Context Labeling and In-Context Enhancing. These strategies are integrated into PIC++, which enhances dynamic in-context labeling and model training. Besides its multitask capability, PIC++ demonstrates generalization across part segmentation datasets by employing dynamic in-context labels and regular in-context pairs. Remarkably, PIC++, trained once without fine-tuning, can generalize effectively to unseen datasets and perform novel part segmentation through customized prompts. Overall, PIC is a general framework that seamlessly integrates additional tasks or datasets through a unified data format via in-context learning. Extensive experiments substantiate PIC's versatility and adaptability in handling diverse tasks and segmenting multiple datasets simultaneously.
comment: Project page: https://fanglaosi.github.io/Point-In-Context_Pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2306.08659

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Point-In-Context 框架，首次将 in-context learning 应用于 3D 点云理解，实现多任务处理而无需微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大规模模型的兴起，in-context learning 在自然语言和图像处理中展现出强大的多任务能力，但在 3D 点云领域仍未被充分探索。现有方法通常需要针对特定任务进行微调，限制了模型的泛化能力和效率。因此，本研究旨在将 in-context learning 引入点云理解，以解决多任务处理中的泛化不足问题，推动点云分析向更灵活和统一的方向发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出 Point-In-Context (PIC) 框架，基于标准 transformer 架构，通过 in-context learning 处理点云任务。关键创新包括 Joint Sampling 模块，它将 masked point modeling 扩展至 3D 语境学习，并强调输入与目标间的映射关系。初始版本将标签点与预定义 XYZ 坐标关联，但存在泛化限制。为此，作者进一步发展了 PIC++，引入了 In-Context Labeling 和 In-Context Enhancing 策略，以动态生成标签并增强训练，支持统一数据格式下的多任务整合。
light_analysis.result: 通过大量实验验证，PIC 框架展示了处理多样任务的通用性和适应性。它能够在无需微调的情况下，同时分割多个数据集，并有效泛化到未见数据集。PIC++ 进一步通过动态 in-context 标签和常规语境对，在部分分割数据集中表现出良好的泛化能力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了模型的多任务处理优势和跨数据集适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是提出了一个通用的 Point-In-Context 框架，首次将 in-context learning 应用于 3D 点云理解，实现了多任务处理和数据集的无缝整合。学术上，它推动了点云学习领域的新方法探索；应用上，简化了复杂任务的处理流程，提高了效率。局限性方面，初始版本依赖固定标签坐标，但通过 PIC++ 的改进得以克服。未来工作可进一步扩展框架到更多点云应用或与其他技术结合。

title: Ayn: A Tiny yet Competitive Indian Legal Language Model Pretrained from Scratch
abstract: Decoder-only Large Language Models (LLMs) are currently the model of choice for many Natural Language Processing (NLP) applications. Through instruction fine-tuning and prompting approaches, such LLMs have been efficiently used to solve both general and domain-specific tasks. However, they are costly to train and, to a certain extent, costly to use as well, and one can wonder whether LLMs can be replaced by domain-specific Tiny Language Models (TLMs), which typically contain less than 100M parameters. We address this question in this study by comparing the performance of an 88M TLM pretrained from scratch for 185 A100 hours on a specific domain with a domain-specific tokenizer (here, the Indian legal domain) with LLMs of various sizes between 1B and 8B for solving domain-specific tasks. We show in particular that our legal TLM, Ayn, can indeed outperform LLMs up to 80 times larger on the legal case judgment prediction task, rival LLMs up to 30 times larger on the summarization task, and still be competitive with these larger LLMs on general tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一个名为Ayn的88M参数微语言模型，从零预训练于印度法律领域，在特定任务上能超越更大的大语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决大语言模型在训练和使用上的高成本问题，特别是在领域特定应用中。当前，解码器结构的大型语言模型广泛应用于自然语言处理，但其参数量庞大导致计算和资源开销巨大，不适合资源受限场景。本研究旨在探索是否能用参数少于100M的领域特定微语言模型替代大语言模型，以降低成本并保持性能。现有方法依赖大规模通用模型，在特定任务上可能效率低下，因此研究微语言模型的潜力以提供更高效的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法涉及开发一个名为Ayn的88M参数微语言模型，从零开始预训练于印度法律领域。模型采用解码器结构，使用专门针对印度法律文本设计的领域特定分词器进行训练，训练耗时185 A100小时。核心创新点包括针对特定领域的从头预训练策略和轻量化模型设计，以提高效率和适应性。研究通过比较不同参数规模的大语言模型（从1B到8B）来评估Ayn在多个任务上的性能，重点分析其与更大模型在法律和一般任务上的差异。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Ayn在法律案例判决预测任务上能超越参数数量高达80倍的大语言模型；在法律文本摘要任务上，能与参数数量30倍大的大语言模型竞争；在一般任务上，Ayn仍具竞争力。这表明，在特定领域任务中，微语言模型在性能上可以替代甚至超越更大的模型，尽管摘要未提供具体的准确率或效率数据，但性能对比凸显了TLM的成本效益优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是证明了领域特定微语言模型在特定任务上能与大语言模型竞争甚至超越，为低成本和高效应用提供了新路径。学术价值在于挑战了“更大模型更好”的范式，强调了模型效率与领域适应性的结合。实际应用价值在于推动资源受限环境中的AI部署，如法律领域。未来工作可扩展至其他领域或优化训练方法，以进一步提高模型泛化能力。

title: Deformation-Invariant Neural Network and Its Applications in Distorted Image Restoration and Analysis
abstract: Images degraded by geometric distortions pose a significant challenge to imaging and computer vision tasks such as object recognition. Deep learning-based imaging models usually fail to give accurate performance for geometrically distorted images. In this paper, we propose the deformation-invariant neural network (DINN), a framework to address the problem of imaging tasks for geometrically distorted images. The DINN outputs consistent latent features for images that are geometrically distorted but represent the same underlying object or scene. The idea of DINN is to incorporate a simple component, called the quasiconformal transformer network (QCTN), into other existing deep networks for imaging tasks. The QCTN is a deep neural network that outputs a quasiconformal map, which can be used to transform a geometrically distorted image into an improved version that is closer to the distribution of natural or good images. It first outputs a Beltrami coefficient, which measures the quasiconformality of the output deformation map. By controlling the Beltrami coefficient, the local geometric distortion under the quasiconformal mapping can be controlled. The QCTN is lightweight and simple, which can be readily integrated into other existing deep neural networks to enhance their performance. Leveraging our framework, we have developed an image classification network that achieves accurate classification of distorted images. Our proposed framework has been applied to restore geometrically distorted images by atmospheric turbulence and water turbulence. DINN outperforms existing GAN-based restoration methods under these scenarios, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Additionally, we apply our proposed framework to the 1-1 verification of human face images under atmospheric turbulence and achieve satisfactory performance, further demonstrating the efficacy of our approach.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出变形不变神经网络（DINN）框架，通过集成准共形变换网络（QCTN）处理几何畸变图像，提升图像恢复和分析任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 几何畸变（如大气湍流和水湍流）导致的图像退化，严重影响计算机视觉任务（如物体识别）的准确性。现有基于深度学习的成像模型在处理这类图像时性能下降，尤其当图像因环境因素而失真时。尽管已有方法如GAN-based技术尝试解决，但在特定场景下仍存在不足，需要更有效的方法来增强模型的畸变不变性，以应对实际应用中的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出变形不变神经网络（DINN）框架，其核心是集成准共形变换网络（QCTN）。QCTN是一个深度神经网络，输出准共形映射，通过控制Beltrami系数来管理局部几何畸变，将畸变图像转换为更接近自然图像分布的版本。该方法轻量级且简单，可轻松集成到其他现有深度网络中，用于处理成像任务，无需重新设计整个架构。摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集或模型架构，但强调了其作为通用框架的灵活性。
light_analysis.result: DINN框架在多个任务中取得良好效果：开发了图像分类网络，实现对畸变图像的准确分类；应用于大气湍流和水湍流引起的图像恢复，性能优于现有GAN-based方法；在人脸验证任务中也表现出满意性能。摘要未给出具体数据指标（如准确率或效率提升），但通过对比实验证明了其有效性，表明框架能显著改善几何畸变图像的恢复和分析能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了DINN框架，通过QCTN有效处理几何畸变图像，增强了深度学习模型在成像任务中的鲁棒性。其学术价值在于引入准共形映射作为控制畸变的新方法，实际应用涵盖图像恢复、分类和人脸验证等领域。摘要未提及局限性或未来工作，但可推断未来方向可能包括扩展到更多畸变类型或集成到更广泛的视觉任务中。
